Basic Nymph Queen Spellcasting.name: 基础宁芙女王施法 Basic Nymph Queen Spellcasting
Basic Nymph Queen Spellcasting.description:
自然的低语直接在你耳边诉说，赐予你更强大的魔法，并使你更接近自己作为宁芙女王的命运。你获得基础施法的收益。

特殊 如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.iT9TFsJb5FlV5Hoy]{Queen's Inklings} 族裔专长，将该专长的1级与2级法术与基础宁芙女王施法中的法术合并。当你这样做时，Queen's Inklings中的法术不再是原初先天法术，而是改为通过宁芙女王变体为你提供额外的法术位，你可以每天准备这些法术位。

Nature's whispers speak directly into your ear, granting you more powerful magic and bringing you closer to your destiny as a nymph queen. You gain the basic spellcasting benefits.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.iT9TFsJb5FlV5Hoy]{Queen's Inklings} ancestry feat, combine the 1st- and 2nd-level spells from that feat with the ones from Basic Nymph Queen Spellcasting. When you do, the spells from Queen's Inklings are no longer primal innate spells but instead grants you additional spell slots you can prepare each day with the nymph queen archetype.

Maze Call.name: 迷宫呼唤 Maze Call
Maze Call.description:
频率 每天一次

你将双手按在地面上，唤起一面扭曲的石墙，形如迷宫的墙壁，用以迷惑、分隔并减缓你的敌人。这具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kOa055FIrO9Smnya]{Wall of Stone}法术的效果。

Frequency once per day

You press your hands against the ground and call forth a twisting wall of stone, resembling the walls of a labyrinth, in order to confound, separate, and slow down your foes. This has the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kOa055FIrO9Smnya]{Wall of Stone} spell.

Adaptive Ancestry.name: 适应性族裔 Adaptive Ancestry
Adaptive Ancestry.description:
你对自己最常冒充的族裔已经吸收了如此之多的特性，以至于你本质上几乎已经成为其中一员。也许你甚至认为自己是该族裔的正式成员。你获得你偏好形态的族裔对应的 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry} 通用专长（如果你有多个偏好形态，则为其中一个偏好形态的族裔），并且你还从该族裔获得一个 1级族裔专长。由你的GM酌情决定，如果变形足以获得所需的生理特征，他们可能会允许你获得一些需要生理特征的族裔专长，但这些专长仅能在你偏好形态的族裔形态下使用。

You have taken on so many features of the ancestry you impersonate most often that you have essentially become one. Perhaps you even consider yourself to be a full member of that ancestry. You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry} general feat for your preferred form's ancestry (or one of your preferred forms' ancestries if you have multiple preferred forms), and you also gain one 1st-level ancestry feat from that ancestry. At your GM's discretion, they might allow you to gain some ancestry feats that require physical features, usable only in the form of your preferred form's ancestry, if shapeshifting would be sufficient to gain the necessary physical features.

Languorous Slow.name: 慵懒迟缓 Languorous Slow
Languorous Slow.description:
频率 每天一次 你或许已经否认了怠惰之罪对你的掌控，但这不意味着你不能减缓你的敌人。选择30尺内的一个生物。其必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] 豁免，对抗你职业DC或法术DC中较高者，并产生如下效果：

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1} 持续1轮。

失败 目标陷入slowed 1持续1分钟。

大成功或大失败 目标获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 2} 持续1分钟。

Frequency once per day You may have denied the sin of sloth's hold over you, but that doesn't mean you can't slow your foe down. Choose one creature within 30 feet. They must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC, with the following effects:

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target is slowed 1 for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Slowed]{Slowed 2} for 1 minute.

Animal Ally.name: 动物盟友 Animal Ally
Animal Ally.description:
你可以与各种动物交谈，并且在必要时特别擅长与它们结盟。你可以与所有动物交谈，而不只是节肢动物。你在对动物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象}时获得+1环境加值（这通常需要你使用交涉（技能））。

You can speak with all sorts of animals, and you're especially skilled at making alliances with them when necessary. You can speak to all animals, not just arthropods. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} on animals (which typically requires you to use the Diplomacy skill).

Oni Lore.name: 恶鬼学识 Oni Lore
Oni Lore.description:
当你以恶鬼特立独行者的身份踏上旅程时，你既作为前神灵磨练了自己对自然世界的知识，也磨练了自己的伪装技能。你获得欺瞒与自然的受训（熟练度）等级。若你会自动在其中一项技能上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训。你还获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore}专长，所获得的学识为奥里学识。

As you began your journey as an oni maverick, you practiced your knowledge of the natural world as a former kami, as well as your skills in disguise. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Deception and Nature. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat in Ori Lore.

Enforce Decorum.name: 维护礼仪 Enforce Decorum
Enforce Decorum.description:
那些对你背信弃义的人将为此受苦。每当你与另一名生物都自愿同意一项协议或条款时，若你们任何一方背弃诺言，最先这么做的一方在接下来1周内，对另一方进行的检定与DC都承受–1状态减值；这是一个诅咒、预言与异界效果。即使协议未被说出口，只要双方都理解，该规则同样适用。例如，具有待客与宾客文化的人类可能会意识到：只要自愿接受你提供的食物或饮料，他们就等于接受了你的款待，必须遵守得体礼节并以主人的身份礼貌对待你；但一只狼则不会。同样地，你也知道：他们一旦自愿接受你的款待，就成为了你的客人，而你必须依照西德族的待客标准为其提供照拂，并避免令其受到伤害。照常，被魔法影响而作出决定的生物并非自愿。

Those who break faith with you suffer for it. Whenever you and another creature both willingly approve an agreement or term, if either of you go back on your word, the one who does so first takes a –1 status penalty on checks and DCs against the other for 1 week; this is a curse, divination, and occult effect. This also applies when the agreement is understood by both parties, even if it isn't spoken. For instance, a human with a culture of hosting and guests might realize that by willingly accepting food or drink you offer, they have accepted your hospitality and must act with the proper decorum and treat you politely as their host, but a wolf would not. Likewise, you know that by willingly accepting your hospitality they have become your guest and you must provide for them based on sidhe standards of hospitality and avoid bringing them harm. As usual, a creature magically influenced into making a decision is not willing.

Boiling Blood.name: 沸腾之血 Boiling Blood
Boiling Blood.description:
触发 一个相邻的生物对你造成挥砍或穿刺伤害。

附近那些胆敢让你流血的生物，很快就会学会畏惧你沸腾的血液，因为你可以在每次擦伤与割伤之后将其喷洒并溅射到它们身上。攻击者受到 @Damage[6d4[fire]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic:true] 豁免来对抗你的职业DC。于第14等级时，以及此后每过2个等级，火焰伤害提高[[/r 1d4]]。

@Damage[max(6,floor(@actor.level/2))d4[fire]]{随等级提升的火焰伤害}

Trigger An adjacent creature deals slashing or piercing damage to you.

Nearby creatures that dare to make you bleed soon learn to fear your boiling blood, as you can spray and splash it onto them after every nick and cut. The attacker takes @Damage[6d4[fire]] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic:true] save against your class DC. At 14th level, and every 2 levels thereafter, the fire damage increases by [[/r 1d4]].

@Damage[max(6,floor(@actor.level/2))d4[fire]]{Leveled Fire Damage}

Coiffure Familiar.name: 发型魔宠 Coiffure Familiar
Coiffure Familiar.description:
你与头发中的某一条蛇的联系尤其强大，使其提升为魔宠的角色。你获得一个魔宠，且必须是一条蛇。你的蛇魔宠可以用一个单动作重新附着回你的头发中，该动作具有操作（特征）。当它在你的头发中时，你的魔宠不能被单独作为目标或单独受到影响，并且它不能采取动作，除非是返回为一条自主行动的蛇——这同样是一个单动作，并具有操作（特征）。它每天会自动获得此魔宠能力一次，并且这会计入它的魔宠能力上限（对于拥有此专长的1级角色而言，通常为两项能力）。

Your connection to one of the snakes in your hair in particular is stronger than the rest, elevating it to the role of a familiar. You gain a familiar, which must be a snake. Your snake familiar can attach back into your hair as a single action, which has the manipulate trait. While it’s in your hair, your familiar can’t be targeted or affected separately, and it can’t act except to return back into an autonomous snake, which is also a single action, which has the manipulate trait. It automatically gains this familiar ability each day, and it counts against its limit for familiar abilities (which is typically two abilities for a 1st level character with this feat).

Dredge Out Darkness.name: 疏浚黑暗 Dredge Out Darkness
Dredge Out Darkness.description:
你可以将自己过去的黑暗召唤出来，用连黑暗视觉也无法穿透的黑暗包围自己。你可以每小时一次以原始的先天法术施放4级@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4GE2ZdODgIQtg51c]{黑暗}。

You can bring forth the darkness from your own past to surround yourself in darkness that not even darkvision can penetrate. You can cast 4th-level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4GE2ZdODgIQtg51c]{Darkness} once per hour as a primal innate spell.

Magislime.name: 魔法史莱姆 Magislime
Magislime.description:
你体内流淌着奇异的魔法能量，类似于法术史莱姆，使你能够施放一个基础魔法法术。从奥术或秘术列表中选择一个戏法。你可以将该戏法作为相应魔法根源的天生法术施放。

You flow with strange magical energies, similarly to a spellslime, allowing you to cast a basic magic spell. Choose a cantrip from the arcane or occult list. You can cast this cantrip as an innate spell of the appropriate magical tradition.

Adaptive Flight.name: 适应性飞行 Adaptive Flight
Adaptive Flight.description:
你适应带翼形态的能力不再有任何限制。你可以使用翱翔伪装随心所欲地变成带翼形态，而不受持续时间限制。即使你选择的形态通常没有翅膀，你也可以通过翱翔伪装长出翅膀并飞行；不过如果你这么做，这通常会成为一个明显线索，表明你并非看起来那样的该族裔的普通成员。

Your ability to adapt a form with wings no longer has any limitations. You can change into a winged form using Soaring Disguise as often as you like without a duration limitation. You can even grow wings and fly using Soaring Disguise if the form you've chosen doesn't ordinarily have wings, although if you do so, this will usually be an obvious clue that you aren't an ordinary member of the ancestry you seem to be.

Vicious Criticals.name: 凶狠的大成功或大失败 Vicious Criticals
Vicious Criticals.description:
你在近距离的最强力打击会让你的敌人受苦。当你用徒手攻击或非触及近战武器造成大成功时，你会造成1d4持续伤害，其伤害类型取决于你的传承：babau或omox为酸蚀，brimorak为火焰，vrock为电击，其他传承为流血。

Your most powerful blows in close quarters make your foes suffer. On a critical hit with an unarmed attack or a non-reach melee weapon, you deal 1d4 persistent damage with the damage type depending on your heritage: acid for babau or omox, fire for brimorak, electricity for vrock, and bleed for other heritages.

Stone's Might.name: 石之威能 Stone's Might
Stone's Might.description:
当你专注你的石质飞弹时，它会将你的敌人击退。若你使用你的石质飞弹命中一次 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.qYJopPiOLSVIJpG4]{专注飞弹}，并且你决定将你的敌人向后推开，则敌人必须尝试一次对抗你职业DC或法术DC中较高者的 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，否则你会将其击退。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标被击退5尺。

失败 目标被击退10尺。

大成功或大失败 目标被击退20尺；若你在专注飞弹上花费了三个动作，则改为被击退30尺。

When you focus your stony missile, it knocks your foes back. If you hit with a @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.qYJopPiOLSVIJpG4]{Focused Missile} using your stony missile and you decide to push your foe back, the foe must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC or you knock them back.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is pushed back 5 feet.

Failure The target is pushed back 10 feet.

Critical Failure The target is pushed back 20 feet, or 30 feet if you spent three actions on Focused Missile.

Confounding Split.name: 迷惑分裂 Confounding Split
Confounding Split.description:
频率 每小时一次

你分裂为四个版本的自己，其中三个只是无脑的黏液堆，随时准备被拍碎以保护你免受伤害。分身最多持续 1 分钟。它们在你的空间内移动，使人无法分辨哪一个才是真正的你，除非使用真实视域或其他能够看穿该变化系效果的效果。这会导致那些对你进行攻击的生物有时会击中某个分身而不是你。任何本应命中你的攻击，都有随机几率改为命中你的某个分身而不是你。若三个分身都还在，则命中你的几率为 1/4（1d4 掷出 1）。若剩两个，则命中你的几率为 1/3（1d6 掷出 1–2）。若只剩一个分身，则几率为 1/2（1d6 掷出 1–3）。

一旦某个分身被命中，它就会被摧毁。若一次攻击掷骰未能命中你的 AC 但没有大失败，则会摧毁一个分身，但没有额外效果（即使该攻击通常会在失败时产生效果）。若一次攻击掷骰为大成功且本会命中某个分身，则会摧毁其中一个分身，并且该攻击掷骰改为对你成功。

该效果不会与 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.j8vIoIEWElvpwkcI]{Mirror Image} 累积。当你拥有任何来自「扰乱分裂」的分身时，你无法使用 mirror image，反之亦然。

Frequency once per hour

You split into four versions of yourself, three of which are simply mindless piles of goop ready to be splatted to protect you from harm. The duplicates last for up to 1 minute. They move throughout your space, making it impossible to tell which of you is which without the use of true seeing or another effect that sees through the transmutation. This causes those who attack you to sometimes hit one of the duplicates instead of you. Any attack that would hit you has a random chance of hitting one of your duplicates instead of you. If all three duplicates remain, there is a 1 in 4 chance of hitting you (1 on 1d4). With two remaining, there is a 1 in 3 chance of hitting you (1–2 on 1d6). With only one duplicate, the chances are 1 in 2 (1–3 on 1d6).

Once a duplicate is hit, it is destroyed. If an attack roll fails to hit your AC but doesn't critically fail, it destroys a duplicate but has no additional effect (even if the attack would normally have an effect on a failure). If an attack roll is a critical success and would hit one of the duplicates, one of the duplicates is destroyed and the attack roll becomes a success against you.

This effect isn't cumulative with @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.j8vIoIEWElvpwkcI]{Mirror Image}. While you have any duplicates from Confounding Split, you can't use mirror image, and vice versa.

Cloak of Winds.name: 风之斗篷 Cloak of Winds
Cloak of Winds.description:
频率 每分钟一次

触发 你成为你知晓的一次物理远程攻击的目标。

你掌控风势，在你周身形成一件斗篷，将物理攻击推开。你针对该次触发攻击的AC获得+4环境加值。若该攻击未命中，你的风将其偏转。与某些类似能力不同的是，这股风势极其强烈，你可以使用此专长来偏转异常巨大的远程投射物（例如巨石或弩炮箭）。

Frequency once per minute

Trigger You are the target of a physical ranged attack that you're aware of.

You take control of the winds and form a cloak around you that pushes away physical attacks. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If the attack misses, your winds deflected it. Unlike some similar abilities, the wind is so intense that you can use this feat to deflect unusually massive ranged projectiles (such as boulders or ballista bolts).

Avatar's Adaptability.name: 化身的适应性 Avatar's Adaptability
Avatar's Adaptability.description:
你的化身越来越能够融入同一族裔的其他生物之中。你获得与你化身外貌相匹配的族裔对应的 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{收养族裔} 通用专长，并且你还从你为【收养族裔】专长所选择的族裔中获得一个1级族裔专长。GM可能会裁定，由于你的化身的生理结构，你可以选择某些通常在【收养族裔】下不被允许的专长。例如，一个新觉醒的化身仍然不能选择需要活了一百年的精灵专长，但他们可能可以选择一个需要尾巴的蜥蜴人专长，因为他们有尾巴。

Your avatar has become more and more able to fit in with other creatures of the same ancestry. You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry} general feat for the ancestry that matches your avatar's appearance, and you also gain one 1st-level ancestry feat from the ancestry you chose for the Adopted Ancestry feat. The GM might determine that you can take certain feats that would normally not be allowed with Adopted Ancestry due to your avatar's physiology. For example, a newly-awakened avatar still couldn't take an elf feat that required living for a century, but they might be able to take a lizardfolk feat that required a tail, since they have a tail.

Darksight Disguise.name: 黑暗视觉伪装 Darksight Disguise
Darksight Disguise.description:
当你使用你的变形怪伪装进行变形时，你获得你替代形态在黑暗中视物的能力。当你使用变形怪伪装来冒充一个具有黑暗视觉的类人生物时，你获得黑暗视觉。这些好处会持续到你保持该伪装为止，并在你变为不同形态时结束，除非新形态同样是一个具有黑暗视觉的类人生物。

When you transform using your doppelganger's disguise, you gain your alternate form's ability to see in the dark. When you use doppelganger's disguise to Impersonate a humanoid creature that has darkvision, you gain darkvision. These benefits last as long as you remain in that disguise, ending when you change to a different form unless the new form is also a humanoid creature that has darkvision.

Labyrinthine Geometry.name: 迷宫几何学 Labyrinthine Geometry
Labyrinthine Geometry.description:
频率 每天一次

你操纵幻象，以将你周围的空间塑造成一座难以理解的迷宫，让生物困惑地被投放到他们最意想不到的地方，即使从外部向内看时该区域可能显得正常。这具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.m4Mc5XbdML92BKOE]{Strange Geometry}法术的效果，进行一次@Check[will|against:class-spell]豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。

Frequency once per day

You manipulate illusions in order to shape the space around you into an incomprehensible maze that confusingly deposits creatures wherever they least expect it, even though the area might appear normal to those looking from the outside in. This has the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.m4Mc5XbdML92BKOE]{Strange Geometry} spell, with a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Change Shape (Doppelganger).name: 变形（变形怪） Change Shape (Doppelganger)
Change Shape (Doppelganger).description:
你改变形态的速度甚至比你的变形怪伪装通常所允许的还要快。使用变形怪伪装时，你可以以单动作来冒充任何小型或中型类人生物形态，而不只是你的偏好形态。当你变形为你的某个偏好形态时，你的变形会自动战胜用于判定你是否属于你所变成的族裔或生物类型的察觉DC，并且你的欺瞒DC获得+4状态加值，以防止他人看穿你的伪装。

You can change your shape even more quickly than your doppelganger's disguise normally allows. When using doppelganger's disguise, you can Impersonate any Small or Medium humanoid form as a single action, not just your preferred form. When transforming into one of your preferred forms, your transformation automatically defeats Perception DCs to determine whether you are a member of the ancestry or creature type into which you transformed, and you gain a +4 status bonus to your Deception DC to prevent others from seeing through your disguise.

Abyssal Escape.name: 深渊逃脱 Abyssal Escape
Abyssal Escape.description:
和深渊中许多最强大的恶魔一样，你可以将自己从一处传送到另一处。你可以每天施放一次5级@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Dimension Door}，作为一种神圣天生法术。

Like many of the most powerful demons in the Abyss, you can transport yourself from place to place. You can cast 5th-level @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Dimension Door} once per day as a divine innate spell.

Aquatic Disguise.name: 水栖伪装 Aquatic Disguise
Aquatic Disguise.description:
你变形为水栖（特征）类人形生物的能力超越了任何其他变形怪。当你使用变形怪的伪装来冒充水栖（特征）或两栖类人形生物时，你获得在水下呼吸的能力，以及15英尺的游泳速度或该族裔通常的游泳速度，取较慢者。只要你保持该伪装，这些益处就会持续。

Your ability to transform into aquatic humanoids surpasses that of any other doppelgangers. When you use doppelganger's disguise to Impersonate an aquatic or amphibious humanoid, you gain the ability to breathe underwater and a swim Speed of 15 feet or the ancestry's usual swim Speed, whichever is slower. These benefits last as long as you remain in that disguise.

Spirit Oni Familiar.name: 灵体恶鬼魔宠 Spirit Oni Familiar
Spirit Oni Familiar.description:
当你还是一名神祇时，你曾有一位朋友、弟子、家人或其他亲密的同伴与你一同承受那骇人的惩罚；但在你成为一名独行的恶鬼后，你设法将他们从折磨中拯救出来，使其在凡人世界中以灵体恶鬼魔宠的形态与你一同显现。

你获得一只魔宠，其外形大致类似一张活的恶鬼面具。它获得以下能力，该能力占用其通常魔宠能力之一：你的灵体恶鬼魔宠可以用两动作行动在其通常形态与一张你可以戴在脸上的、几乎无法移动的面具之间变形。即使处于面具形态，灵体恶鬼也能在你脸上稍微移动并以独特的声音说话（若它能说话）。当它在你脸上凝固不动时，你的灵体恶鬼魔宠无需进行“伪装”为冒充一张普通面具以应付随意一瞥，并且在对抗主动观察者“搜寻”或以其他方式研究它时，其针对欺瞒 DC 获得+4环境加值。

You had a friend, disciple, family member, or other close companion back when you were a kami who shared your horrific punishment, but after becoming an oni maverick, you managed to save them from their torment by manifesting them alongside you in the mortal world as a spirit oni familiar.

You gain a familiar whose form looks roughly similar to a living oni mask. They gain the following ability, which takes up one of their usual familiar abilities: Your spirit oni familiar can transform between their usual form and a mostly-immobile mask you can wear on your face, as a two-action activity. Even in mask form, the spirit oni can move around slightly on your face and speak in a distinct voice (if they can talk). When they freeze in place on your face, your spirit oni familiar doesn't need to Impersonate to disguise as a mundane mask to a casual glance, and they gain a +4 circumstance bonus to their Deception DC against an active observer Seeking or otherwise studying them.

Flavor Food.name: 风味食物 Flavor Food
Flavor Food.description:
频率 每小时一次

你暂时改善至多1加仑的非魔法水或至多5磅食物的味道，加入你所选择的任何美味风味，以满足你的美食家口味。你必须接触食物或水才能添加风味，且该食物或水会保留新的风味至多1小时。

Frequency once per hour

You temporarily improve the taste of up to 1 gallon of nonmagical water or up to 5 pounds of food, adding whatever delicious flavor you choose to suit your gourmet palate. You must touch the food or water to add the flavor, and the food or water retains the new flavor for up to 1 hour.

Megataur Transformation.name: 巨牛魔变形 Megataur Transformation
Megataur Transformation.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你可以在短时间内将你的体型增大到更高的程度，让你能够碾压你的敌人。你获得4环@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge}的效果，持续1分钟。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You can increase your size to an even greater degree for a brief time, allowing you to wreck through your foes. You gain the effects of 4th-level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} for 1 minute.

Ally Bond.name: 盟友羁绊 Ally Bond
Ally Bond.description:
你与守护对象的羁绊已经断裂，但你设法与一名盟友建立起更为微弱的联系。当你获得此专长时，选择一名自愿的盟友。以该盟友为对象，你可以将射程为接触的法术改为以30尺射程施放，而该盟友也可以将射程为接触的法术以30尺射程对你施放。若该盟友死亡或因其他原因不再自愿，则羁绊断裂，你无法从盟友羁绊中获得任何好处，并且你很可能应当对其进行重训（要么再次选择盟友羁绊专长并选择不同的盟友，要么选择一个新的专长）。若该盟友死而复生或再次变得自愿，你可能无需重训也能修复该羁绊：通过一个简单的仪式，你们二人需要连续24小时彼此相伴。

Your bond to your ward has broken, but you've managed to establish a fainter connection to one of your allies. When you gain this feat, choose a willing ally. On that ally, you can cast spells that have a range of touch at a range of 30 feet instead, and the ally can cast spells that have a range of touch on you from a range of 30 feet. If the ally dies or is otherwise no longer willing, the bond breaks, and you gain no benefit from Ally Bond and should likely retrain it (either selecting the Ally Bond feat again and choosing a different ally, or selecting a new feat). It's possible to repair the bond without retraining if the ally returns from the dead or becomes willing again, via a simple ritual requiring the two of you to spend 24 hours in each others' company continuously.

Nuanced Beauty.name: 精致之美 Nuanced Beauty
Nuanced Beauty.description:
你的美貌有多个面向，无法仅用单一特质来定义。为你的美貌选择一个不同的性相（令人安心、蛊惑人心或令人震撼），且该性相必须不同于你在获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-features.Item.wUCMUSk7IIsshmyd]{超凡美貌} 族裔能力时所选择的性相。你获得超凡美貌能力在该选择下所给予的增益。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长，每次选择超凡美貌所提供的不同性相。

Your beauty has multiple facets, impossible to define with only a single quality. Choose a different aspect for your beauty (comforting, beguiling, or overwhelming) than the one you chose when you gained the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-features.Item.wUCMUSk7IIsshmyd]{Unearthly Beauty} ancestry ability. You gain the benefit granted by the unearthly beauty ability for that choice.

Special You can select this feat multiple times, each time choosing a different aspect offered by unearthly beauty.

Frozen Strike.name: 冰冻打击 Frozen Strike
Frozen Strike.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 你以一次近战打击对一名生物造成大成功或大失败。

 每当你做出一次完美打击时，你便将自身的冰霜完美驱使至更高境界，从而冻结你的敌人。触发生物必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，其DC等于你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。

成功 该生物不受影响

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1} 状态，持续 1 轮。

大成功或大失败 该生物获得迟缓 1状态，持续 [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 轮}。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You critically hit a creature with a melee Strike.

 You spur your icy perfection to great heights whenever you make a perfect strike, allowing you to freeze your foes. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save, with a DC equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Success The creature is unaffected

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is slowed 1 for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Lampad Queen's Beauty.name: 灯笼女王之美 Lampad Queen's Beauty
Lampad Queen's Beauty.description:
你的美貌使附近的生物被情绪淹没。任何在其回合结束时位于你10英尺内的生物必须尝试一次意志豁免，对抗你的原始法术DC。若失败，他们汹涌的情绪会分散其注意力，使其在1轮内无法采取反应动作（）。若大成功或大失败为大失败，他们此外还会获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑}，直到其在下一回合采取其第一个动作时为止（以此方式陷入困惑时，他们不会使用其困惑动作来攻击你）。随后，他们会在1分钟内获得暂时免疫。你可以使用一个具有专注（特征）的单动作来开启或关闭此灵光，并且你可以选择不影响你的盟友。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.QRLyKA5X8XJq6YxL]{效果：兰帕德女王的美貌（大成功或大失败：大失败）}

Your beauty causes nearby creatures to become overwhelmed by their emotions. Any creature that ends its turn within 10 feet of you must attempt a Will save against your primal spell DC. On a failure their overwhelming emotions distract them, and they can't take reactions for 1 round, and on a critical failure, they are also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} until they take their first action on their next turn (while confused in this way, they don't use their confused action to attack you). They are then temporarily immune for 1 minute. You can turn this aura on or off using a single action, which has the concentrate trait, and you can choose not to affect your allies.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.QRLyKA5X8XJq6YxL]{Effect: Lampad Queen's Beauty (Critical Failure)}

Call Forth Room.name: 召唤房间 Call Forth Room
Call Forth Room.description:
你从你的地城中将一间无人占用的房间（或其他类似的区域）拉入这个世界，以便给自己提供一个安全的休息场所。你每天一次可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.mwPfoYfVGSMAaUec]{Cozy Cabin}作为天生法术施放，但该区域的形状是与你的传承相对应的地城房间，而非小屋，并且你直接从你的地城中将其召唤出来。若你拥有陵墓传承，该法术为神圣；若你拥有其他人造地城传承（如迷宫或高塔），则为奥术；若你拥有自然传承（如群岛、洞窟或巨树），则为原初。

You pull an unoccupied room (or other similar area) from your dungeon into the world in order to give yourself a safe place to rest. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.mwPfoYfVGSMAaUec]{Cozy Cabin} once per day as an innate spell, but the area is shaped like a dungeon room corresponding to your heritage, rather than a cabin, and you conjure it directly from your dungeon. The spell is divine if you have the mausoleum heritage, arcane if you have another artificial dungeon heritage (such as labyrinth or tower) or primal if you have a natural heritage (such as archipelago, caverns, or tree).

Ice's Chill.name: 寒冰之凛冽 Ice's Chill
Ice's Chill.description:
当你将寒冷专注并凝聚在你的冰霜飞弹之中，它会令你的敌人发冷并部分冻结，降低其移动速度。若你使用你的冰霜飞弹施展“聚焦飞弹”并命中，敌人必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗你更高的职业DC或法术DC，否则其移动速度将承受状态减值。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的速度在1轮内承受–5尺状态减值。

失败 目标的速度在1轮内承受–10尺状态减值。

大成功或大失败 目标的速度在1轮内承受–15尺状态减值；若你在“聚焦飞弹”上花费了三个动作，则其速度在1轮内承受–20尺状态减值。

特殊 若你是冰元素化身（Battlezoo Eldamon），你可以选择改为施加冻结状态（Battlezoo Eldamon）：成功时冻结1，失败时冻结2，大成功或大失败时冻结3；若你花费三个动作，则大成功或大失败时冻结4。若你如此做，来自“冰之寒颤”的冻结状态会与来自你使用“冰霜积累”（Battlezoo Eldamon）的能力所造成的冻结状态累积。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.exeUW5KJO9gGlNGI]{效果：冰之寒颤}

When you focus and concentrate the cold inside your ice missile, it chills your foe and partially freezes them over, lowering their movement speed. If you hit with a Focused Missile using your ice missile, the foe must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC or take a status penalty to their movement Speeds.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes a –5-foot status penalty to their Speeds for 1 round.

Failure The target takes a –10-foot status penalty to their Speeds for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes a –15-foot status penalty to their Speeds for 1 round, or a –20-foot status penalty to their Speeds if you spent three actions on Focused Missile.

Special If you're an ice elemental avatar (Battlezoo Eldamon), you can choose to instead inflict the frozen condition (Battlezoo Eldamon): frozen 1 on a success, frozen 2 on a failure, frozen 3 on a critical failure, or frozen 4 on a critical failure if you spend three actions. If you do, the frozen condition from Ice's Chill is cumulative with the frozen condition from your powers using ice accumulation (Battlezoo Eldamon).

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.exeUW5KJO9gGlNGI]{Effect: Ice's Chill}

Guiding Strike.name: 引导打击 Guiding Strike
Guiding Strike.description:
频率 每天一次

你将自己的移动专注为一种武器，并在攻击前分析每一种可能性。在你的回合结束前，你下一次进行攻击掷骰时，将该次攻击掷骰掷两次并取更好的结果。该次攻击忽略攻击掷骰的环境减值，以及因目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏} 而需要进行的任何纯骰检定。

Frequency once per day

You focus on your movements as a weapon and analyze every possibility before attacking. The next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll the attack twice and use the better result. The attack ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll and any flat check required due to the target being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}.

Dryad Queen's Beauty.name: 树精女王的美貌 Dryad Queen's Beauty
Dryad Queen's Beauty.description:
你的美貌会让附近的生物原地生根，使它们更难移开。任何在其回合结束时处于你10英尺内的生物都必须尝试一次对抗你原始法术DC的意志豁免。失败时，它们的速度在1分钟内承受–15英尺的环境减值；大成功或大失败：大失败时，它们还会在1轮内 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}。若它们对抗你的原始法术DC进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}，则这些效果会提前结束。之后该生物在1分钟内暂时免疫。你可以用一个具有专注（特征）的单动作开启或关闭此灵光，并且你可以选择不影响你的盟友。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.pVkymay3wqmW3fUp]{效果：树妖女王的美貌（失败）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.Tt3V1fAXrfCbd9Qr]{效果：树妖女王的美貌（大成功或大失败：大失败）}

 

Your beauty causes nearby creatures to become rooted to the spot, making it harder for them to move away. Any creature that ends its turn within 10 feet of you must attempt a Will save against your primal spell DC. On a failure they take a –15-foot circumstance penalty to their Speeds for 1 minute, and on a critical failure, they are also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round. These effects end early if they @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} against your primal spell DC. The creature is then temporarily immune for 1 minute. You can turn this aura on or off using a single action, which has the concentrate trait, and you can choose not to affect your allies.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.pVkymay3wqmW3fUp]{Effect: Dryad Queen's Beauty (Failure)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.Tt3V1fAXrfCbd9Qr]{Effect: Dryad Queen's Beauty (Critical Failure)}

Cause for Alarm.name: 警报原因 Cause for Alarm
Cause for Alarm.description:
你可以从你的地城内部引出魔法警报，提醒你入侵者的存在。你可以每天施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.4WAib3GichxLjp5p]{Alarm}作为先天法术。若你拥有陵墓传承，该法术的根源为神圣；若你拥有其他人工地城传承（如迷宫或高塔），则为奥术；若你拥有自然地城传承（如群岛、洞窟、利维坦或巨树），则为原初。

You can draw forth magical alarms from within your dungeon to alert you of intruders' presence. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.4WAib3GichxLjp5p]{Alarm} once per day as an innate spell. The spell tradition is divine if you have the mausoleum heritage, arcane if you have another artificial dungeon heritage (such as labyrinth or tower) or primal if you have a natural one (such as archipelago, caverns, leviathan or tree).

Contagious Whisper.name: 传染性低语 Contagious Whisper
Contagious Whisper.description:
频率 每日一次

你以如簧巧舌低声说出甜蜜言辞，影响30尺内的一名生物采取你期望的动作，同时将这句耳语传播给他人。耳语中的动作必须以一种对目标而言似乎合乎逻辑的行动方案来措辞，且不能是自我毁灭的，或明显违背目标自身利益的。目标必须尝试一次对抗你职业DC或法术DC（取较高者）的@Check[will|against:class-spell]意志豁免。未通过豁免的目标可以将耳语传递给另一个生物：以具有与原本的传染性耳语相同特征与豁免的双动作行动，对该生物低声耳语；并在完成你所建议的任务所需的情况下如此行事。一次意志豁免成功的生物会在24小时内暂时免疫所有传染性耳语。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响，并且知道你试图操控它。

成功 该生物不受影响，并认为你只是在正常与它交谈，而非对它使用某种魔法能力。

失败 该生物会立刻遵从你耳语的行动方案，持续至多1分钟；或直到目标完成一段有限的行动方案，或该动作变得自我毁灭，或出现其他明显的负面效果为止。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但最大持续时间为1小时。

Frequency once per day

You whisper honeyed words with your silver tongue, influencing a creature within 30 feet to take the action you desire while spreading the whisper to others. The whispered action must be phrased in such a way as to seem like a logical course of action to the target and can't be self-destructive or obviously against the target's selfinterest. The target must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] saving throw against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. A target who fails their save can pass the whisper on to another creature by whispering to that creature as a two-action activity with the same traits and saving throw as the original Contagious Whisper, and they do so as necessary to complete the task you suggested. A creature who succeeds at their Will saving throw is temporarily immune to all Contagious Whispers for 24 hours.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and knows you tried to manipulate it.

Success The creature is unaffected and thinks you were talking to it normally, not using a magical ability on it.

Failure The creature immediately follows your whispered course of action for up to 1 minute, or until the target has completed a finite course of action or the action becomes self-destructive or has other obvious negative effects.

Critical Failure As failure, except that the maximum duration is 1 hour.

Familiar's Fealty.name: 魔宠的忠诚 Familiar's Fealty
Familiar's Fealty.description:
在童话故事中，就连动物本身宣誓效忠也并不罕见，而凯特希与库希尤其可能从它们所体现的动物那里获得敬重。你使用《Pathfinder 第二版 核心规则书》中常规的魔宠规则获得一只魔宠。若你是凯特希，你的魔宠很可能是一只猫；若你是库希，你的魔宠很可能是一只小型犬或幼犬。其他希则拥有符合自身叙事的魔宠（例如，象征智慧、学识或睿智的魔宠适用于艾斯希；外表高贵威严的魔宠适用于多伊内希，等等）。

It's not unusual in fairy tales for even the animals themselves to swear fealty, and cait sidhe and cu sidhe are especially likely to command respect from the animals they embody. You gain a familiar using the normal familiar rules from Pathfinder Second Edition Core Rulebook. If you're a cait sidhe, your familiar is very likely to be a cat, and if you're a cu sidhe, your familiar is very likely to be a diminutive dog or puppy. Other sidhe have familiars that suit their own narrative (familiars that symbolize wisdom, scholarship or sagacity for aes sidhe, regal-looking familiars for daoine sidhe, and so on).

Tree Shaper.name: 树形塑者 Tree Shaper
Tree Shaper.description:
你变形为一棵幼小的橡树。这具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.dileJ0Yxqg76LMvu]{One with Plants}的效果（仅变为植物），但你的体型仍为中型。

You transform into a young oak tree. This has the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.dileJ0Yxqg76LMvu]{One with Plants} (Turn into a Plant only) except that your size remains Medium.

Narrative Pacing.name: 叙事节奏 Narrative Pacing
Narrative Pacing.description:
在西狄异界中，人们所经历的时间流逝方式不同，他们常常回到家后才发现，实际过去的时间比自己预期的多得多或少得多——这正符合他们故事的弧线。你无法创造如此深远的效果，但你可以调整一名生物的步调，使其与周遭世界不同步。你每天可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o6YCGx4lycsYpww4]{Haste} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow} 之一作为秘法先天法术施放一次。你可以每天临机决定要如何改变时间的流动，并因此选择施放这两个法术中的哪一个；但在某一天里一旦你施放了其中一个，就不能在同一天施放另一个。若你是艾斯·西狄，你也可以选择将它们作为奥术先天法术施放，而非秘法先天法术。

Time flows differently for people in sidhe otherworlds, and they often return home to learn that much more or less time has passed than they expected, as befits the arc of their tale. You can't create quite such a profound effect, but you can adjust the pacing of a creature out of sync with the world around it. You can cast either @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o6YCGx4lycsYpww4]{Haste} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow} as an occult innate spell once per day. You can choose each day on the fly how you'll alter the flow of time and thus which of the two spells you cast, but once you cast one of them on a given day, you can't cast the other. If you're an aes sidhe, you can cast them as arcane innate spells instead of occult innate spells if you prefer.

Coil Switch.name: 线圈开关 Coil Switch
Coil Switch.description:
其他人有时会在言语和举止上进行语码转换，以融入周围的文化环境，但作为一名斯忒诺，你已经学会如何把你的蛇发真正伪装成更符合你所伪装的族裔的发型。使用 Coil Switch 时，你看起来仍是你自己，但没有蛇发，这使得其他生物在第一眼时更难辨认出你是斯忒诺。蛇的意识与存在不会因这种伪装而被压制，而一名专门检查你的生物可以如常尝试进行一次察觉检定，对抗你的欺瞒 DC，以发现真相。该效果持续直到你再次使用 Coil Switch，并且在你非斯忒诺的伪装状态下，你无法使用任何需要你的头发是蛇的能力，例如“蛇之搜索”族裔能力或“蛇颚”徒手攻击。

Others sometimes code switch in their speech and mannerisms in order to fit in with the cultural environment around them, but as a stheno, you've learned how to literally disguise your snake hair as a type of hair more typical in the ancestry you resemble. While using Coil Switch, you appear as yourself without snake hair, which makes it much more difficult for other creatures to tell that you're a stheno at first glance. The snakes' consciousnesses and existence aren't suppressed by this disguise, and a creature who specifically examines you can attempt a Perception check against your Deception DC as normal to discover the truth. The effect lasts until you use Coil Switch again, and while in your non-stheno disguise, you can't use any abilities that require your hair to be snakes, such as the snake search ancestry ability or a snake jaws unarmed attack.

Distant Projection.name: 远距投射 Distant Projection
Distant Projection.description:
当你显现你的化身时，你可以在一定距离处这么做，而不必要求将你的化身在你自己的空间内形成。你的化身可以出现在你30尺内任何你能看见且你拥有清晰效果线之处，然后一旦它出现，你会被沿直线直接拉入你的化身手中。你进入你的化身手中的移动具有移动（特征）；如果有什么东西扰乱了你进入你的化身之手的移动，你的化身会瞬间消失，而你会在移动被扰乱的位置坠落到地面上。

When you manifest your avatar, you can do so at a distance, rather than being required to form your avatar within your own space. Your avatar can appear anywhere within 30 feet of you that you can see and to which you have a clear line of effect, and then once it appears, you're pulled in a straight line directly into your avatar's hands. Your movement into your avatar's hands has the move trait; if something disrupts your movement into your avatar's hand, your avatar winks out and you fall to the ground at the spot where the movement was disrupted.

Elusive Mind.name: 飘忽心智 Elusive Mind
Elusive Mind.description:
你可以比平常更频繁地将效果转移给你的持用者。你可以每小时使用一次你的@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.clIKzoDT3a8N1g3L]{Hidden Mind}动作，而非每天一次。

You can shunt effects to your wielder more often than normal. You can use your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.clIKzoDT3a8N1g3L]{Hidden Mind} action once per hour, instead of once per day.

Animal Speaker.name: 动物交谈者 Animal Speaker
Animal Speaker.description:
你能够与动物交流。你可以向动物提问、从动物那里获得回答，并对动物使用交涉（技能）。你在对动物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象} 时获得+1环境加值（这通常使用交涉（技能））。

You are able to communicate with animals. You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} on animals (which usually uses the Diplomacy skill).

Perpetual Wings (Demon).name: 永恒之翼（恶魔） Perpetual Wings (Demon)
Perpetual Wings (Demon).description:
你的翅膀永久处于激活状态。你始终获得恶魔之翼的效果，而不再是每天仅一次持续10分钟。翅膀会持续到你希望为止，不过它们可以被收回；你可以以无限的频率使用恶魔之翼来收回你的翅膀或再次显现它们。

Your wings are permanently active. You gain the effects of Demon Wings at all times, rather than just once per day for 10 minutes. The wings last as long as you wish, though they are revocable; you can use Demon Wings with an unlimited frequency to withdraw your wings or manifest them again.

Sunlight Adaptation.name: 阳光适应性 Sunlight Adaptation
Sunlight Adaptation.description:
你已经完全适应了光照，现在它对你来说无害。你不再会因长时间暴露在直射阳光下而变得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained}。

You've completely adapted to light, and it's harmless to you now. You no longer become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained} from lengthy exposure to direct sunlight.

Woodtouched.name: 木触者 Woodtouched
Woodtouched.description:
你与林地以及居住于其中的树精有着强大的联系。你获得纠缠术戏法，这是一种原始的先天戏法。如常，戏法会以你等级的一半（向上取整）进行升阶。你可以从上方列出的“额外专长”中选择先决条件为树精传承的宁芙专长。

You have a powerful connection to the woodlands and the dryads who live there. You gain the tanglefoot cantrip is a primal innate cantrip. As normal, a cantrip is heightened to half your level, rounded up. You can take nymph feats from the Additional Feats listed above with a prerequisite of dryad heritage.

Focused Assault.name: 专注强袭 Focused Assault
Focused Assault.description:
需求 你正各用一只手持用两把近战武器。

你用两把武器对单一目标发起攻击，你那四只无实体的手交织出武刃的幽魂复制品，将近乎无可逃避的猛攻聚焦于你的敌人。进行两次打击，每次各使用你两把近战武器中的一把，并且每次都使用你当前的多重攻击减值。两次打击必须以同一目标为目标。若第二次打击所用的武器不具有灵巧特征，则该次打击承受–2减值。若两次攻击均命中，则合并它们的伤害，然后在仅结算一次弱点与抗力之前，将两把武器的任何其他适用效果一并加入。你仅能加入一次精准伤害，并将其加在你选择的一次攻击上。若两次攻击均未命中，则从未出现大成功或大失败的打击中选择一次，并如同该武器命中一般应用其效果。若两次打击均为大成功或大失败，则你不造成伤害并完全落空。照常，由于你进行了两次打击，在计算你的多重攻击减值时这算作两次攻击。

Requirements You are wielding two melee weapons, each in a different hand.

You attack a single target with both your weapons, and your four insubstantial hands weave in spectral duplicates of the blades, focusing a nearly inescapable assault on your foe. Make two Strikes, one with each of your two melee weapons, each using your current multiple attack penalty. Both Strikes must have the same target. If the second Strike is made with a weapon that doesn't have the agile trait, it takes a –2 penalty. If both attacks hit, combine their damage, and then add any other applicable effects from both weapons before apply weaknesses and resistances only once. You add any precision damage only once, to the attack of your choice. If both attacks miss, choose one of the Strikes that wasn't a critical failure and apply the effects of a hit with that weapon. If both Strikes critically failed, you deal no damage and miss entirely. As normal, since you made two Strikes, this counts as two attacks when calculating your multiple attack penalty.

Antivenom Blood.name: 抗毒血液 Antivenom Blood
Antivenom Blood.description:
你的斯忒诺血脉能够产生抗毒剂，帮助你和他人将毒素从体内清除。你可以对自己使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{处理毒素}，无需医疗包，甚至不需要空出一只手——只要专注于重新引导你的血流即可。若你这么做，这将是一个专注动作，而非操作动作。每小时一次，你可以加速这个过程，以 自由动作（） 以这种方式对自己进行处理毒素。

你也可以在对他人进行处理毒素时使用你的血液来替代医疗包，前提是你正在承受持续流血伤害，或你选择在进行处理毒素的检定时失去 [[/r 1]] 生命值作为检定的一部分。使用你的血液来处理毒素时，你获得该技能检定+1物品加值。该加值在第9等级时提升至+2，在第17等级时提升至+3。此外，在治疗蛇毒时，你还会获得该技能检定+2环境加值。

Your stheno blood is capable of producing antivenoms to help you and others to clear toxins from your system. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison} on yourself without a healer's kit or even having a hand free, simply by concentrating on redirecting your blood flow. If you do, it's a concentrate action, not a manipulate action. Once per hour, you can accelerate the process and Treat Poison on yourself in this way as a free action.

You can also Treat Poison on others using your blood instead of a healer's kit if you are taking persistent bleed damage, or if you choose to lose [[/r 1]] Hit Point as part of the check to Treat Poison. When using your blood to Treat Poison, you gain a +1 item bonus to the skill check. This increases to +2 at 9th level and +3 at 17th level. Additionally, you receive a +2 circumstance bonus to the skill check when treating snake venom.

Big Slime.name: 大型黏液怪 Big Slime
Big Slime.description:
随着时代推移，你变得越来越大，而在此刻，你已成为一团巨大的黏液怪，体型与许多其他种类的软泥怪一样庞大。你变为大型，持续获得@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge}的效果。

You've been growing larger and larger over time, and at this point, you've become a massive slime, as large as many other types of oozes. You become Large, gaining the effects of @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} constantly.

Energy Surge.name: 能量涌动 Energy Surge
Energy Surge.description:
你的大成功或大失败重击迸发出能量，并黏附在你的敌人身上。以伪足的徒手攻击造成大成功或大失败命中时，你对目标造成[[/r 1d4[persistent]]]点与伪足徒手攻击所造成类型相同的伤害。

Your critical blows surge with energy that clings to your foes. On a critical hit with a pseudopod unarmed attack you deal the target [[/r 1d4[persistent]]] damage of the same type your pseudopod unarmed attack deals.

Gremlin's Gate.name: 小魔怪之门 Gremlin's Gate
Gremlin's Gate.description:
你可以往返于精类国度，为你在刚完成一次大阴谋、劫案或恶作剧后提供一个避风港。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{位面转移}作为一项原初先天法术，你每周可以施放两次。这只能用于在仙灵国度与物质位面之间往返旅行。由于你作为小魔怪的本性，你可以充当法术焦点，并且不需要音叉。

You can transport to and fro from the realm of the fey, giving you a good place to lie low after you've just completed a big scheme, heist, or prank. You gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Plane Shift} as a primal innate spell, which you can cast twice per week. This can be used only to travel back and forth between the faerie realm and the Material Plane. Due to your nature as a gremlin, you can act as the spell focus, and you don't require a tuning fork.

Haniver Wind Rider.name: 哈尼弗·驭风者 Haniver Wind Rider
Haniver Wind Rider.description:
你可以将你富有弹性的鳍当作翅膀使用，在需要时起飞并在天空中翱翔一段时间。通过绷紧你的鳍，你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度，持续10分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.SN3MpmZOSKrBiOhV]{效果：哈尼佛风之骑手}

You can use your rubbery fins as wings to lift off and soar through the sky, for a stretch when needed. By straining your fins, you gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.SN3MpmZOSKrBiOhV]{Effect: Haniver Wind Rider}

Plant Speaker.name: 植物代言人 Plant Speaker
Plant Speaker.description:
你可以与一种特定类型的植物交谈，通常对树精而言是落叶树，对水泽宁芙而言是海藻，对果园宁芙而言是水果和蔬菜，对酒狂宁芙而言是葡萄藤与毒性植物，或对其他每一种宁芙传承而言是一类同样常见的植物。GM决定哪些其他植物类别是此专长的可行选项。

You can speak to a specific type of plant, typically deciduous trees for dryads, seaweed for naiads, fruits and vegetables for epimelides, grape vines and poisonous plants for maenads, or a similarly prevalent group of plants for each other nymph heritage. The GM determines which other categories of plants are viable options for this feat.

Reforge Self.name: 重铸自我 Reforge Self
Reforge Self.description:
每天，你都可以将你的魔法重塑为你自己的形态来改变外形，将自己重新锻造成另一种你拥有许可的0或1等级武器。在你的每日准备期间，你可以改变自己是哪一种武器。这可能会导致你的一些符文、专长或类似能力失去其效果，因为如果你不再是能够从这些符文、专长或类似能力中获得收益的合适武器类型，你就无法获得其好处。例如，如果你拥有创伤符文并且不再是一把穿刺或挥砍的近战武器，你将无法从中获得任何收益。如果你的GM允许你获得某种特定武器的收益，你就不能使用此专长来变成另一种武器。

注：由于该族裔的自动化提供方式，为了重新锻造，你需要将一份新的智能武器族裔拖入你的角色卡，并选择你的新武器类型。

Each day, you can reshape your magic into your own form to alter your shape, reforging yourself as a different kind of level 0 or 1 weapon to which you have access. During your daily preparations, you can change what kind of weapon you are. This might cause some of your runes, feats, or similar abilities to lose their effects if you are no longer an appropriate kind of weapon to gain the benefit of those runes, feats, or similar abilities. For example, if you have the wounding rune and cease to be a piercing or slashing melee weapon, you would gain no benefit from it. If your GM allows you to gain the benefits of a specific weapon, you can't use this feat to change to a different kind of weapon.

Note: Due to how the automation for the ancestry is provided, to reforge you will need to drag a new copy of the intelligent weapon ancestry to your sheet and select your new weapon type.

Brimorak Breath.name: 布里莫拉克吐息 Brimorak Breath
Brimorak Breath.description:
你向外喷吐一股沸腾的血液，形成一个 @Template[type:line|distance:20]，造成[[/r @actor.level[fire]]]{等同于你等级的火焰伤害}，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC)|basic:true] 豁免，DC等于你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。你在[[/br 1d4 #Brimorak Breath Recharge]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用你的吐息武器。该区域内的地面变得湿滑，具有以一个区域为目标的@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Wu0xFpewMKRK3HG8]{油腻术}法术的效果，直到它被清理干净或你再次能够使用你的Brimorak吐息为止，以先发生者为准。

You spit out a gout of boiling blood in a @Template[type:line|distance:20] that deals [[/r @actor.level[fire]]]{fire damage equal to your level}, with a @Check[reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC)|basic:true] save with a DC equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC. You can't use your Breath Weapon again for [[/br 1d4 #Brimorak Breath Recharge]]{1d4 rounds}. The ground within the area becomes slippery, with the effects of a @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.Wu0xFpewMKRK3HG8]{Grease} spell targeting an area until it's cleaned up or you become able to use your Brimorak Breath again, whichever comes first.

Devour Treasure.name: 吞噬宝藏 Devour Treasure
Devour Treasure.description:
你在自己与以太位面上的一个宝藏箱之间锻造连接，使你能够吞食宝藏并将其送往那里，或将其取回到自己体内。你可以花费1分钟吞食宝藏，使你能够储存总负载不超过你等级的物品，并将其送往以太位面的最深处；你可以解消该效果以归还宝藏，否则该效果的持续时间为无限。你吞食的宝藏不能包含任何生物，即使该生物位于异次元空间中也不行。负载上限适用于你此能力的所有使用。宝藏的时间正常流逝，并且以太位面的环境效果适用于它。尽管极不可能，但以太位面上的生物仍有可能偶然发现你的宝藏。

You forge a connection between yourself and a treasure chest on the Ethereal Plane, allowing you to gorge on treasure and send it there or retrieve it back into yourself. You can spend 1 minute devouring treasure, allowing you to store items with a total amount of Bulk up to your level, and send it to the deepest reaches of the Ethereal Plane; you can Dismiss the effect to return the treasure, though otherwise, the effect has an unlimited duration. The treasure you devour can't contain any creatures, even if the creature is in an extradimensional space. The Bulk limit applies across all uses of this ability. Time passes normally for the treasure, and the environmental effects of the Ethereal Plane apply to it. Though very unlikely, it's possible for a creature on the Ethereal Plane to stumble upon your treasure.

Caverns Climber.name: 洞穴攀登者 Caverns Climber
Caverns Climber.description:
你与地城内四通八达的洞窟建立的联系，使你的化身获得了轻松攀爬的能力。你获得10英尺的攀爬速度。

Your connection to the sprawling caverns within your dungeon has granted your avatar the ability to climb with ease. You gain a climb Speed of 10 feet.

Change Shape (Nymph).name: 改变形态（宁芙） Change Shape (Nymph)
Change Shape (Nymph).description:
如同宁芙女王一般，你可以采取一种类人生物的伪装，其外观与你的宁芙形态相似，但更像有血有肉的类人生物。你的类人形态是你成长地常见的一种中型类人族裔的特定形态（通常为人类）。该形态鲜明且独特，并且与您的宁芙形态高度相似，而且你每次都会变为同一种形态。使用 Change Shape 视为为 Deception 的 Impersonate 用法制造了一次伪装，但仅限于采用你的替代形态。你可以无限期保持你的替代形态，并且可以再次使用此动作变回你真实的宁芙形态。

Like a nymph queen, you can take a humanoid guise that looks similar to your nymph form but more like a flesh and blood humanoid. Your humanoid form is a specific form from a common Medium humanoid ancestry prevalent where you grew up (typically human). This form is distinctive and unique and greatly resembles your nymph form, and you change into the same form each time. Using Change Shape counts as creating a disguise for the Impersonate use of Deception, though only to adopt your alternate form. You can remain in your alternate form indefinitely, and you can shift back to your true nymph form by using this action again.

Flying Weapon.name: 飞行武器 Flying Weapon
Flying Weapon.description:
频率 每小时一次

你将额外的魔法能量集中注入维系你漂浮的武器身躯的循环之中，使你能在再次为力量充能之前短暂飞行。你获得等同于你速度的飞行速度，持续1分钟。

Frequency once per hour

You concentrate additional magical energy into the circulation through your weapon body that keeps you floating, allowing you to fly for a brief time until you recharge the power again. You gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed for 1 minute.

Indomitable Maverick.name: 不屈的特立独行者 Indomitable Maverick
Indomitable Maverick.description:
你拒绝服从那位将你从折磨中拯救出来的邪恶神祇，因此从那之后，其他一切形式的心灵控制对你而言都不值一提，尽管较弱的敌人还在不断尝试，这也挺可爱的。若你会在你的回合开始时因意志豁免失败而获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}，你可以选择针对相同的DC尝试进行一次意志豁免。若你如此做且成功，则你会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}直到你的下个回合，而非违背你的意志行动。

You refused to obey the wicked deity who saved you from torment, so after that, all other forms of mind control are as nothing to you, though it's cute that lesser foes keep trying. If you would start your turn @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} due to a failed Will save, you can choose to attempt a Will save against the same DC. If you do so and succeed, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} until your next turn, rather than act against your will.

Double Jinx.name: 双重厄运 Double Jinx
Double Jinx.description:
你的霉运如湿冷的云雾般在你周围汇聚，使你能比以往更频繁地给其他生物施加厄运。你可以每小时使用一次你的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.IYhpgmgSiS7uaJkK]{Pugwampi Jinx}，而非每天一次。

Your bad luck pools around you like a clammy cloud, allowing you to jinx other creatures more often than before. You can use your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.IYhpgmgSiS7uaJkK]{Pugwampi Jinx} once per hour, instead of once per day.

Adhesive Climb.name: 黏附攀爬 Adhesive Climb
Adhesive Climb.description:
你可以用拟足上的黏附物轻松攀爬任何表面。你获得15尺的攀爬速度。

You can use the adhesive on your pseudopods to climb any surface with ease. You gain a climb Speed of 15 feet.

Nymph Queen Dedication.name: 宁芙女王献身 Nymph Queen Dedication
Nymph Queen Dedication.description:
尽管你是一位四处漂泊的宁芙，自然世界仍已接纳你作为宁芙女王候选者，能够在未来某天开辟并强化你自己的领域。如今，你的女王之力的最初萌芽每日涌入你的精神，以自然每天向你低语的原初法术之形显现。

你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{施法（行动）}行动的许可。你每天可以从原初法术列表中准备两个普通戏法，或准备你学会或发现的其他任何原初戏法。你在原初法术的法术攻击掷骰与法术DC上受训。你的宁芙女王变体法术的关键施法能力由你选择感知或魅力，且它们是原初宁芙女王法术。

选择一种与你的宁芙传承相匹配的地形。你是该类型领地的潜在女王。你在自然上受训；若你已在自然上受训，则改为在你选择的一项技能上受训。你还获得与所选地形相对应的一项学识（技能）的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 技能专长，例如森林学识或洞窟学识。

特殊 若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.BTy3q0TjIYR5PChQ]{Nymph Magic} 族裔专长，将该专长提供的戏法与宁芙女王奉献专长提供的戏法合并。如此一来，来自 Nymph Magic 的戏法不再是原初先天法术，而是改为使你通过宁芙女王变体每天可准备的戏法数量增加至第三个。

Despite being a nymph wanderer, the natural world has accepted you as a nymph queen candidate, capable of one day carving out and empowering your own domain. For now, those first inklings of your queen powers pour into your spirit daily in the form of primal spells that nature whispers to you each day.

You gain access to the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{Cast a Spell} activity. You can prepare two common cantrips each day from the primal spell list or any other primal cantrips you learn or discover. You're trained in spell attack rolls and spell DCs for primal spells. Your key spellcasting ability for nymph queen archetype spells is your choice of Wisdom or Charisma, and they are primal nymph queen spells.

Choose a type of terrain that matches your nymph heritage. You're a potential queen for a territory of that type. You become trained in Nature and if you were already trained, you become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} skill feat for a lore skill corresponding to the terrain you chose, such as Forest Lore or Cavern Lore.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.BTy3q0TjIYR5PChQ]{Nymph Magic} ancestry feat, combine the cantrip from that feat with the ones from Nymph Queen Dedication. When you do, the cantrip from Nymph Magic is no longer a primal innate spell but instead grants you a third cantrip you can prepare each day with the nymph queen archetype.

Asteria Queen's Beauty.name: 阿斯忒里娅女王之美 Asteria Queen's Beauty
Asteria Queen's Beauty.description:
你的美貌使附近的生物如同被夜空中闪烁的群星照耀般受到 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}。任何在你周围10尺内结束其回合的生物都必须尝试一次对抗你原初法术DC的意志豁免。失败则其目眩持续1轮，而大失败则其还会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} 1轮。随后其会在1分钟内获得暂时免疫。你可以使用一个具有专注（特征）的单动作开启或关闭此灵光，并且你可以选择不影响你的盟友。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.1TiEMr0AyTzXLmw0]{效果：阿斯特莉亚女王的美貌（失败）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.jkPayvj5YNmWSeJv]{效果：阿斯特莉亚女王的美貌（大失败）}

Your beauty causes nearby creatures to be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} as if by the twinkling stars of the night sky. Any creature that ends its turn within 10 feet of you must attempt a Will save against your primal spell DC. On a failure they're dazzled for 1 round, and on a critical failure, they‘re also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round. They are then temporarily immune for 1 minute. You can turn this aura on or off using a single action, which has the concentrate trait, and you can choose not to affect your allies.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.1TiEMr0AyTzXLmw0]{Effect: Asteria Queen's Beauty (Failure)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.jkPayvj5YNmWSeJv]{Effect: Asteria Queen's Beauty (Critical Failure)}

In Vino Veritas.name: 酒后吐真言 In Vino Veritas
In Vino Veritas.description:
频率 每日一次

 你召来一场浸满美酒的狂欢，迫使参与其中者更加诚实。你在30英尺内设置一场位于 @Template[type:burst|distance:20] 的派对，它持续至多10分钟。当你使用In Vino Veritas时位于区域内的每个生物，以及之后进入该区域的任何生物，都必须尝试一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 意志豁免，对抗你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者。若该生物离开并再次进入区域，使用这次初始豁免的结果；但其在区域内第一次自愿饮酒时，必须再尝试第二次意志豁免。受影响的生物在区域内知道自己说谎会变得困难，并且可以避免回答那些其通常会用谎言作答的问题，或可以含糊其辞或误导他人，只要仍然保持在事实的边界之内。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物在欺瞒检定上承受–2状态减值。

失败 该生物无法故意说谎，并在欺瞒检定上承受–2状态减值。

大成功或大失败：失败 同失败，但该生物在欺瞒检定上的状态减值为–4。

Frequency once per day

 You call forth a wine-soaked revelry that compels those who partake to be more truthful. You set up the party in a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] within 30 feet, and it lasts for up to 10 minutes. Every creature in the area when you use In Vino Veritas, and any creature that enters the area later, must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC. It uses the results of this initial save if it leaves and reenters the area, but the first time it imbibes in alcohol willingly while in the area, it must attempt a second Will save. Affected creatures in the area are aware of their difficulty lying and can avoid answering questions to which they would normally respond with a lie, or they can be evasive or misleading, as long as they remain within the boundaries of the truth.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes a –2 status penalty to Deception checks.

Failure The creature can't intentionally speak a lie and takes a –2 status penalty to Deception checks.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature's status penalty on Deception checks is –4.

Hulking Mimic.name: 巨型拟形怪 Hulking Mimic
Hulking Mimic.description:
你狼吞虎咽地吃下超过一吨的食物，随后进入深度睡眠，通常持续一天，不过在GM裁量下可能会稍长或稍短。在这段时间里，你的身体在体型上激增。之后，你变为大型，持续获得 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} 的效果。

You gorge on over a ton of food and enter a deep slumber that typically lasts for a day, though it might last for slightly more or less time at the GM's discretion. During this time, your body surges in size. Afterward, you become Large, gaining the effects of @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} constantly.

Ascending Disguise.name: 攀升伪装 Ascending Disguise
Ascending Disguise.description:
与你不同于其他变形怪的是，你可以复制某种形态快速轻松地攀爬的能力。当你使用变形怪的伪装来拟态一个通常具有攀爬速度的人型生物时，你获得15尺的攀爬速度，或该族裔通常的攀爬速度，以较慢者为准。只要你保持该伪装，这些增益就会持续。

Unlike other doppelgangers, you can duplicate a form's ability to climb quickly and easily. When you use doppelganger's disguise to Impersonate a humanoid that normally has a climb Speed, you gain a climb Speed of 15 feet or the ancestry's usual climb Speed, whichever is slower. These benefits last as long as you remain in that disguise.

Change Shape (Demon).name: 变形（恶魔） Change Shape (Demon)
Change Shape (Demon).description:
你已学会采取一个类人伪装，该伪装与你的恶魔形态在某些明显的特性上相同，因此认识你其中一种形态的人也能在另一种形态中认出你，但除此之外看起来就像一个凡人的类人生物。你的类人形态是该区域内常见的中型类人族裔中的一种特定形态（通常为人类）。此形态鲜明且独一无二，并且你每次都会变成同一个形态。使用改变形态等同于为欺瞒技能中冒充用途制造一次伪装，但仅限于采用你的替代形态。你可以无限期保持你的替代形态，并且你可以再次使用此动作变回你的真实恶魔形态。

You've learned how to take a humanoid guise that shares some obvious features in common with your demon form, such that those who know you in one form can recognize you in the other, but otherwise looks like a mortal humanoid. Your humanoid form is a specific form from a common Medium humanoid ancestry prevalent in the area (typically human). This form is distinctive and unique, and you change into the same form each time. Using Change Shape counts as creating a disguise for the Impersonate use of Deception, though only to adopt your alternate form. You can remain in your alternate form indefinitely, and you can shift back to your true demon form by using this action again.

Deny Sloth.name: 否定怠惰 Deny Sloth
Deny Sloth.description:
触发 你的回合开始，你即将获得本回合的动作与反应动作（）。

需求 你没有处于迟缓、目眩，或以其他方式在你的回合开始时会获得的动作数量上受到限制。

拒绝你内心的懒惰是一件需要每日练习的事，因为你会引诱自己偷懒，但随后又推动自己去达成目标。另一方面，结果不言自明。掷骰 [[/r 1d4]]。掷出1或2时，你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}且本轮只恢复2个动作。掷出3时，你照常恢复3个动作；掷出4时，你在本轮获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{迅捷}并且可以用这个额外动作来进行打击、疾走或挪步。如果你不喜欢d4的结果，你可以选择重骰并采用第二次结果，即使该结果更差；这次重骰是一个幸运效果。如果你重骰，则掷出2、3或4时的结果与前述相同，但如果你重骰到1，你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 2}且本回合只恢复1个动作。

Trigger Your turn begins and you are about to gain your actions and reaction for the turn.

Requirements You aren't slowed, stunned, or otherwise limited in the number of actions you would gain at the start of y our turn.

Denying your inner sloth is something that requires daily practice, as you tempt yourself to slack but then push yourself to achieve. On the other hand, the results speak for themselves. Roll [[/r 1d4]]. On a 1 or a 2, you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and only regain 2 actions this round. On a 3, you regain 3 actions as normal, and on a 4, you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} this round and can use the extra action to Strike, Stride, or Step. If you don't like the result of the d4, you can choose to reroll it and take the second result, even if that result is worse; this reroll is a fortune effect. If you reroll, the results are the same on a 2, 3, or 4, but if you reroll to a 1, you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} and only regain 1 action this turn.

Spellblade.name: 咒刃 Spellblade
Spellblade.description:
你被灌注了魔法能量，使你能够随意施展一个简单的法术。请选择一个来自你武器魔法根源的戏法（见 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-features.Item.zwkI4D5P4nGE6uTS]{Weapon} 族裔能力）。你可以将此戏法作为“施放法术”的启动随意使用。该启动使用你的法术DC。若你尚未如此，你将对你武器魔法根源的法术之法术攻击掷骰与法术DC成为受训，而你的施法关键属性值由你在智力、感知或魅力中选择其一。

You're infused with magical energy that allows you to produce a simple spell as often as you like. Choose a cantrip from your weapon magical tradition (see the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-features.Item.zwkI4D5P4nGE6uTS]{Weapon} ancestry ability). You can use this cantrip as a Cast a Spell activation at will. The activation uses your spell DC. You become trained in spell attack rolls and spell DCs for spells of your weapon magical tradition if you weren't already, and your spellcasting ability score is your choice of Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma.

Adhesive Grappler.name: 黏着擒抱者 Adhesive Grappler
Adhesive Grappler.description:
你已经练习过在改善自身移动而调整黏着剂之后，仍能将黏着剂附加到你的攻击上。你在运动（或若你已经受训于运动，则选择你想要的另一项技能）方面成为受训；你的假足无武器攻击（以及任何通过拟形怪专长或特性获得的无武器近战攻击）获得擒抱特征；并且你可以通过让自己身体的任何部分变得黏稠，即使没有空闲的手也能 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple} 生物。

You've practiced adding your adhesive to your attacks even after altering your adhesive to improve your movement. You become trained in Athletics (or another skill of your choice if you're already trained in Athletics), your pseudopod unarmed attacks (and any unarmed melee attacks gained via mimic feats or features) gain the grapple trait, and you can @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple} creatures even if you don't have a free hand by making any part of yourself sticky.

Darkseer Weapon.name: 暗影先知武器 Darkseer Weapon
Darkseer Weapon.description:
你强化了你在创造时获得的感官，使你能够在黑暗中视物。你获得黑暗视觉。提醒一下，由于失去了昏暗视觉，一个附身的武器无法从此专长中获得益处，除非他们正附身于拥有昏暗视觉的生物（并且如果他们正附身于拥有黑暗视觉的生物，此专长不会为他们提供任何益处）。

You've enhanced the senses you received during your creation, allowing you to see in the dark. You gain darkvision. As a reminder, due to losing low-light vision, a possessing weapon can't gain the benefit of this feat unless they're possessing a creature with low-light vision (and if they're possessing a creature with darkvision, this feat doesn't provide them any benefit).

Destructive Smash.name: 毁灭性猛击 Destructive Smash
Destructive Smash.description:
你的破坏者凶猛激励你比其他 vexgit 更容易粉碎与摧毁事物。你的打击无视生物或物体的硬度，最高达 5 点。

Your wrecker ferocity inspires you to smash and destroy things more easily than other vexgits. Your Strikes ignore up to 5 of a creature or object's Hardness.

Doppelganger Weapon Mimesis.name: 变形怪 武器 拟态 Doppelganger Weapon Mimesis
Doppelganger Weapon Mimesis.description:
你能够无瑕地模仿你偏好族裔的武器技巧，使你在机会出现、施以毁灭一击时能够最大化利用它们。每当你使用来自你“变形怪武器熟悉”专长、且你受训的武器造成大成功时，你会应用该武器的大成功或大失败专精效果。

Your ability to mimic your preferred ancestry's weapon techniques flawlessly allows you to take best advantage of them when the opportunity presents itself to deliver a crushing blow. Whenever you critically hit using a weapon from your Doppelganger Weapon Familiarity feat in which you're trained, you apply the weapon's critical specialization effect.

Interior Camouflage.name: 内部伪装 Interior Camouflage
Interior Camouflage.description:
你改变自身形状、质地与色彩的能力提升为能随移动而反应，使你能够轻松在普通建筑中伪装。即使没有掩蔽或隐蔽，你也能在大多数标准建筑内 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}；并且若你在没有掩蔽或隐蔽的情况下结束你的 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Sneak]{Sneak}，你也不会在此类建筑中自动变为被观察。GM 决定哪些建筑适用，但一般而言，它适用于除装潢异常奇特的建筑之外的大多数建筑，但不适用于自然环境。

Your ability to alter your shape, texture, and coloration improves to become reactive as you move, allowing you to camouflage within ordinary buildings easily. You can @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} in most standard buildings even without cover or concealment, and you don't become automatically observed in such a building if you end your @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Sneak]{Sneak} without cover or concealment. The GM determines which buildings apply, but in general, it applies in most buildings except those with exceptionally unusual decor, but not in natural environments.

Plentiful Orchard.name: 丰饶果园 Plentiful Orchard
Plentiful Orchard.description:
当你重新建立与果园的联系时，你能够更频繁地产出水果。你可以每小时使用一次你的epimelid传承能力来产出水果，而不是每天一次。

As you reestablish your connection to orchards, you are capable of producing fruit much more often. You can use your epimelid heritage ability to produce fruit once per hour, instead of once per day.

Grab Weapon.name: 夺取武器 Grab Weapon
Grab Weapon.description:
频率 每分钟一次

触发 一名生物用近战武器命中你。

你将泥浆之躯绷紧迎向敌人的攻击，然后试图把他们的武器从其握持中拉出并拖入你的泥浆中。你尝试对触发的生物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{缴械}。在大成功或大失败时，你可以选择让武器被你的身体吞没，而非坠落到地面；在敌人能够取回武器之前，必须先将其缴械出来。你可以用一次交互动作从你自己的泥浆中取回该武器。你的泥浆之躯以这种方式最多能容纳一把武器，持续至多1分钟。GM可能会裁定某些特别巨大的武器，例如巨型的巨剑，无法装入你的泥浆之躯中；不过只要你有能力对该体型的生物进行缴械（例如通过“泰坦摔跤手”专长），你仍然可以使用“夺取武器”来尝试对其缴械。

Frequency once per minute

Trigger A creature hits you with a melee weapon.

You flex your sludge body into your foe's attack and then attempt to pull their weapon out of their grip and into your sludge. You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm} the triggering creature. On a critical success, you can choose to have the weapon become subsumed within your body rather than falling to the ground, from which it must be Disarmed before your foe can retrieve it. You can retrieve the weapon from your own sludge with a single Interact action. Your sludge body can hold a single weapon in this way for up to 1 minute. The GM might rule that particularly large weapons, such as a gargantuan greatsword, don't fit within your sludge body, though you can still attempt to Disarm them with Grab Weapon as long as you are capable of Disarming a creature of that size (such as with the Titan Wrestler feat).

Check the Narrative.name: 检定叙事 Check the Narrative
Check the Narrative.description:
频率 每天一次

当你需要确保得到正确的信息时，你会尝试将你所见与自己对叙事进展方式的看法进行比较，尤其在你试图判定你遇到的新人物或奇异生物的角色时效果更佳。你进行@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}，在该回忆知识检定上获得+1状态加值。若你在该检定上掷骰得到大失败，则改为失败。若掷骰成功且目标为生物，你会获得关于该生物的额外信息或背景。

Frequency once per day

When you need to make sure you get the right information, you try to compare what you're seeing to your own view of how the narrative is proceeding, with particular effect if you are trying to determine the roll of a new person or strange creature you've encountered. You @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}, gaining +1 status bonus on the Recall Knowledge check. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the roll is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature.

Third Eye.name: 第三只眼 Third Eye
Third Eye.description:
你可以从额头中央的第三只眼发射元素能量。你获得一种取决于你传承的投射物远程徒手攻击。你的投射物徒手攻击的射程增量为20尺，属于斗殴武器组，并造成下列所列类型的 @Damage[1d4[untyped]] 伤害，且具有括号中列出的元素（特征）。

电能飞弹（水 yai）1d4 电击（水）

火焰飞弹（火 yai）1d4 火焰（火）

呼啸飞弹（风 yai）1d4 音波（风）

寒冰飞弹（冰 yai）1d4 寒冷（寒冷）

岩石飞弹（土 yai）1d4 钝击（土）

You can fire off elemental energy from the third eye in the center of your forehead. You gain a missile ranged unarmed attack depending on your heritage. Your missile unarmed attack has a range increment of 20 feet, is in the brawling weapon group, and deals @Damage[1d4[untyped]] damage of the type listed below, and with the elemental trait listed in parentheses.

Electric Missile (water yai) 1d4 electricity (water)

Fire Missile (fire yai) 1d4 fire (fire)

Howling Missile (wind yai) 1d4 sonic (air)

Ice Missile (ice yai) 1d4 cold (cold)

Stony Missile (earth yai) 1d4 bludgeoning (earth)

Nature's Protection.name: 自然的庇护 Nature's Protection
Nature's Protection.description:
自然会不遗余力地保护其眷顾的孩子免受其极端环境的侵害，使你对多种不同形式的非物理伤害具有抗力。你获得抗力5，对抗酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰、力场、心灵、负能量、毒素、正能量以及音波伤害。

Nature goes out of its way to protect its favored children from its extremes, rendering you resistant to harm from various different forms of non-physical damage. You gain resistance 5 to acid, cold, electricity, fire, force, mental, negative, poison, positive, and sonic damage.

Yai's Reach.name: 亚伊的触及 Yai's Reach
Yai's Reach.description:
你利用你的体型来增加你攻击的触及。只要你处于大型，你的触及就会增加到10英尺。

You leverage your size to increase the reach of your attacks. Your reach increases to 10 feet as long as you are Large.

Winetouched.name: 酒润者 Winetouched
Winetouched.description:
无论你是迈那得的后裔，还是追随她们的巴克科伊之一，你都是派对的灵魂。你获得等同于你等级一半的毒素抗力（最低为1）。你可以从上方列出的额外专长中选择前提为迈那得传承的宁芙专长。

Whether you're a maenad's descendant or one of the bacchae who trail after them, you're the life of the party. You gain poison resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1). You can take nymph feats from the Additional Feats listed above with a prerequisite of maenad heritage.

Gremlin Unarmed Warrior.name: 小魔怪徒手战士 Gremlin Unarmed Warrior
Gremlin Unarmed Warrior.description:
你的小魔怪徒手攻击比你的同类更强。如果你是fuath，你的爪子武器伤害骰从1d4提升至1d6；如果你是nuglub，你的颚部获得灵巧特征；如果你是vexgit，你的颚钳武器伤害骰从1d4提升至1d6。

特殊 如果你是vexgit，你可以获得该专长作为加值专长，而无需为此花费一个族裔专长，但你必须接受以下vexgit弱点作为交换：你的外骨骼会发出响亮的咔啦声，使你在移动时进行隐匿检定时承受–2减值（例如用于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{避免注意}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}的检定，但不包括用于躲藏的检定）。面对一个完全无法听见你的生物时（例如一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{失聪}生物，或处于一片寂静区域内的生物），你不会承受该减值。

Your gremlin unarmed attack is more powerful than your fellows. If you're a fuath, your claw's weapon damage die increases from 1d4 to 1d6, if you're a nuglub, your jaws gain the agile trait, and if you're a vexgit, your mandibles' weapon damage die increases from 1d4 to 1d6.

Special If you're a vexgit, you can gain this feat as a bonus feat without spending an ancestry feat to do so in exchange for accepting the following vexgit vulnerability: Your exoskeleton clanks loudly, giving you a –2 penalty on Stealth checks when moving around (such as checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}, but not checks to Hide). You don't take this penalty against a creature that is completely unable to hear you (such as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} creature, or a creature in an area of silence).

Style Maven.name: 风格专家 Style Maven
Style Maven.description:
全世界再也没有人比你更懂时尚与风格！你以自己能在任何时候调整衣装以契合气氛与叙事而自豪。你可以随意使用Sidhe Styling，不受频率限制。然而，在同一天内你第一次之后每次使用Sidhe Styling时，你在该日先前做出的那次改动都会复原。一天结束时，你当日最后一次改动将永久保留。

No one in the whole wide world knows fashion and style better than you! You pride yourself on being able to adjust a garment to fit the mood and the narrative at any time. You can use Sidhe Styling at will with no frequency limitation. However, each time you use Sidhe Styling after the first time on the same day, the previous change you made that same day reverts. At the end of the day, your final change of the day remains permanent.

Petrifying Finish.name: 石化终结技 Petrifying Finish
Petrifying Finish.description:
当你击败一名生物时，只要其缺乏恢复血肉所需的生命能量，你就可以将其变为石头。当你将一名生物的生命值降至0，且其本应处于濒死或死亡状态时，你也可以选择用一瞥将其石化。若其本应处于濒死而非死亡（例如其拥有再生），其仍可继续再生并接受治疗；若其被治疗至生命值1或更高，石化结束。若其本应已死亡，治疗不会结束石化。

When you defeat a creature, you can turn it to stone as long as it lacks the vital energy to return to flesh. When you reduce a creature to 0 Hit Points and they would be dying or dead, you can choose to petrify them as well with a glance. If they would have been dying and not dead (such as if they have regeneration), they can continue to regenerate and be healed, and if they're healed to 1 Hit Point or higher, the petrification ends. If they would have been dead, healing won't end the petrification.

Gripping Coiffure.name: 紧抓发髻 Gripping Coiffure
Gripping Coiffure.description:
当其他人谈论“抓握力十足”的发型时，他们可没有你这么字面意义上的理解。你的蛇发可以帮助你擒抱。你可以在没有空闲手的情况下擒抱，改用你的蛇发来进行。如果你用蛇发拥有蛇牙或蛇颚的徒手攻击，则该徒手攻击获得擒抱特征。

When other people talk about gripping hairstyles, they don't take it quite as literally as you do. Your hair snakes can help you grapple. You can grapple without a free hand, using your hair snakes instead. If you have a snake fangs or snake jaws unarmed attack with your hair snakes, the unarmed attack gains the grapple trait.

Precious Synthesis.name: 珍贵合成 Precious Synthesis
Precious Synthesis.description:
你要么将一种较为廉价的贵金属融入你的构成之中，要么作为一件智能武器，通过自身的神秘成长映照该贵金属的神秘特性。选择冷铁或银。为确定弱点、抗力及类似效果的效果时，你被视为所选择的贵金属类型。

You either incorporate one of the more inexpensive precious metals into your composition or mirror that precious metal's mystical properties through your own mystical growth as an intelligent weapon. Choose either cold iron or silver. You are treated as the chosen type of precious metal to determine the effects of weaknesses, resistances, and the like.

Shredding Strikes.name: 粉碎打击 Shredding Strikes
Shredding Strikes.description:
无论你是否否认结绳斩手那种“只要施加足够的武力就能解决所有问题”的哲学，一个简单的事实是：你的角与武器都能无情地将你的敌人撕碎。用你的角或挥砍或穿刺武器造成大成功时，你额外造成 @Damage[1d4[persistent,bleed]] 伤害。

Whether or not you deny the knot slashers' philosophy that all problems can be solved with a sufficient application of force, it's a simple fact that your horns and weapons are capable of shredding your foes mercilessly. On a critical hit with your horn or a slashing or piercing weapon, you deal an additional @Damage[1d4[persistent,bleed]] damage.

Fake It.name: 假装成功 Fake It
Fake It.description:
你已经学会如何在基础层面伪装自己在技能与任务上的熟练度，从而让你能以各种职业身份混入其中。你获得 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.9jGaBxLUtevZYcZO]{Untrained Improvisation} 通用专长。此外，即使你未受训，你也可以尝试那些通常要求你已受训才能进行的技能动作。最后，当你试图谎称自己在某方面已受训而实际上并非如此时，你在进行以说谎为目的的欺瞒检定时获得 +1 环境加值。

You've learned how to fake proficiency at skills and tasks to a basic level, allowing you to blend in as various occupations. You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.9jGaBxLUtevZYcZO]{Untrained Improvisation} general feat. In addition, you can attempt skill actions that normally require you to be trained, even if you are untrained. Finally, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Deception checks to Lie specifically when attempting to claim you are trained in something when you aren't.

Oni Weapon Familiarity.name: 恶鬼武器熟稔 Oni Weapon Familiarity
Oni Weapon Familiarity.description:
你偏好某些巨大而可怖的武器，以及那些由恶鬼开发的武器，并且你能够轻松使用它们。你获得带有恶鬼特征的非普通武器的许可。你熟悉带有恶鬼特征的武器，以及巨棒、武士刀、长弓、复合长弓和大槌——就熟练度而言，你将其中任何属于军用武器的视为简易武器，将任何属于进阶武器的视为军用武器。

在第5等级时，每当你使用上述列表中的某一把武器造成一次大成功或大失败命中时，你可以施加该武器的大成功或大失败专精效果。

You favor certain big and fearsome weapons, as well as those developed by oni, and you can use them with ease. You gain access to uncommon weapons with the oni trait. You have familiarity with weapons with the oni trait, as well as with greatclubs, katanas, longbows, composite longbows, and mauls—for the purposes of proficiency, you treat any of these that are martial weapons as simple weapons and any that are advanced weapons as martial weapons.

At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with one of the weapons listed above, you can apply that weapon's critical specialization effect.

Demon Wings.name: 恶魔之翼 Demon Wings
Demon Wings.description:
频率 每日一次

你可以从背上召唤出蝙蝠般或其他恶魔般的翅膀。一旦显现，这些翅膀持续 10 分钟。在你显现翅膀期间，你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.FUB7CcA0oMZyChDt]{效果: 恶魔之翼}

Frequency once per day

You can call forth bat-like or otherwise demonic wings from your back. Once manifested, these wings remain for 10 minutes. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed while you've manifested your wings.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.FUB7CcA0oMZyChDt]{Effect: Demon Wings}

Conjure Abode.name: 召唤居所 Conjure Abode
Conjure Abode.description:
你可以召唤一个通往微小异界的入口，其中除了一座由你亲自设计的宅邸之外空无一物。你每天一次可以以异术天生法术施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.vPWMEyVTreMOoFnm]{Magnificent Mansion}（如果你是aes sidhe，你也可以选择改为将其作为奥术天生法术施放，若你更愿意如此）。你每次施放该法术时召唤出的宅邸与仆役都相同，并且它会在两次施放之间持续存在；你只是将入口移动到一个新的地点。

You can call upon an entrance to a tiny Otherworld that contains naught but a mansion of your own design. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.vPWMEyVTreMOoFnm]{Magnificent Mansion} once per day as an occult innate spell (if you're an aes sidhe, you can choose to cast it as an arcane innate spell instead if you prefer). The mansion and servants you conjure are the same each time you cast the spell, and it continues to exist between castings; you are simply moving the entrance to a new location.

Fuath Paddler.name: 怨灵划手 Fuath Paddler
Fuath Paddler.description:
你在潜水、漂浮和划水方面提升的技能提高了你在水中的速度。你的游泳速度从15尺提升至25尺。

Your increased skills in diving, floating, and paddling increase your speed in the water. Your swim Speed increases from 15 feet to 25 feet.

Deduce Story.name: 推断故事 Deduce Story
Deduce Story.description:
频率 每日一次

即使没有任何线索，你也能仅凭你对故事及其情节往往如何展开的知识，以及在你体内流淌的魔法，来猜测在你当前位置上演过的故事或叙事所留下的先前印象。你每连续花费 1 分钟思索在该区域交织的故事线索，便会从前一日获得关于关键情绪与隐喻性故事片段的印象；这些印象会提供晦涩的线索与关于过去的细节，而非字面意义上的幻象。你最多可以持续将这些印象拼凑 10 分钟，从而获得关于过去 10 天事件的线索。

Frequency once per day

You are able to guess prior impressions from the story or narrative that played out at your current location even with no clues, simply based on your knowledge of the way stories and their plots tend to unfold and the magic that flows within you. For each consecutive minute that you ponder the story threads interweaving the area, you gain impressions from the previous day of key emotions and metaphorical story fragments that provide cryptic clues and details of the past, rather than literal visions. You can continue piecing together impressions for up to 10 minutes, which would grant you clues about the events of the past 10 days.

Gremlin Climb.name: 小魔怪攀爬 Gremlin Climb
Gremlin Climb.description:
你可以在洞窟、隧道、下水道、建筑或船只的墙壁上爬上爬下，以便更好地触及你破坏行动的目标。你获得15尺的攀爬速度。

You can scrabble up and down the walls of caverns, tunnels, sewers, buildings, or ships, the better to reach the target of your sabotage. You gain a climb Speed of 15 feet.

Void Form.name: 虚空形态 Void Form
Void Form.description:
你可以采取一种非实体的虚空形态，看起来像你的影子，使你能更轻松地潜行。你的虚空形态会持续，直到你花费一个单动作变回原状。在该形态下，你获得以下效果：你失去对AC的任何物品加值，以及来自护甲的所有其他效果与加值，并且你使用你的无甲防御熟练度调整值。你获得8点对物理伤害的抗力并免疫精准伤害，并且你在用于躲藏、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}以及@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{避人耳目}的隐匿检定上获得+2环境加值。你不能施放法术、启动物品，或使用带有攻击或操作（特征）的动作。你可以滑过细小的裂缝。

特殊 如果你拥有@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.dWt7gCCF1opRQa7b]{非实体形态}专长，若你愿意，你可以立即重训为一个不同的第13等级或更低的恶鬼族裔专长。你也可以选择保留该专长，因为它用于变形所需的动作更少，并为水夜叉提供一种不同的形态。

You can take an insubstantial void form, which looks like your shadow, allowing you to sneak around more easily. Your void form lasts until you spend a single action to turn back. In this form, you gain the following effects: you lose any item bonus to AC and all other effects and bonuses from armor, and you use your proficiency modifier for unarmored defense. You gain resistance 8 to physical damage and are immune to precision damage, and you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Stealth checks to Hide, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice}. You can't cast spells, activate items, or use actions that have the attack or manipulate trait. You can slip through tiny cracks.
