Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.dWt7gCCF1opRQa7b]{Insubstantial Form} feat, you can immediately retrain to a different 13th level or lower oni ancestry feat if you want. You can instead choose to keep the feat because it costs fewer actions to transform and offers a different form to water yai.

Succubus's Embrace.name: 魅魔的拥抱 Succubus's Embrace
Succubus's Embrace.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你用迷人的魅惑环绕自身，引诱另一名生物接受你的拥抱。你尝试使用你的交涉调整值而非运动来对一名生物进行@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{擒抱}。如果该生物是自愿的，则你改为自动将其擒抱。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You swathe yourself in enchanting charms, enticing another creature into accepting your embrace. You attempt to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple} a creature using your Diplomacy modifier instead of Athletics. If the creature is willing, you instead grapple it automatically.

Adaptive Disguise.name: 适应性伪装 Adaptive Disguise
Adaptive Disguise.description:
你已适应于更容易从你的替代形态中获得特性，也能在你并未处于通常会拥有这些特性的形态时，依然保留你最擅长的特性。即使你并未处于通常会给予你其好处的形态中，你依然获得你所拥有的下列任意专长的好处：Aquatic Disguise、Ascending Disguise、Darksight Disguise，以及 Olfactory Disguise。此外，当你处于一种会从上述专长之一获得一个或多个能力、但你并未拥有该专长的形态时（攀爬速度、黑暗视觉、嗅觉，或同时获得游泳速度与水下呼吸），即使你没有该专长，你仍可获得其中至多一项好处。

例如，若你拥有 Olfactory Disguise 与 Ascending Disguise，你将始终获得 15 英尺的攀爬速度，以及延伸至 30 英尺的不精确嗅觉。若你接着变形为一名具备水栖（特征）且拥有黑暗视觉的人形生物，你可以选择获得黑暗视觉，或同时获得水下呼吸与 15 英尺的游泳速度；你在两者中选择其一后，该效果会在你处于该形态期间持续。

You've adapted to gain features from your alternate forms more easily, as well as to keep the features you know best even when you're not in a form that would ordinarily possess them. You gain the benefits of any of the following feats you possess, even when not in a form that would usually grant you the benefits: Aquatic Disguise, Ascending Disguise, Darksight Disguise, and Olfactory Disguise. Additionally, when in a form that would gain one or more abilities from one of those feats you don't possess (a climb speed, darkvision, scent, or both a swim speed and water breathing), you can gain up to one of those benefits, despite not having the feat.

For example, if you had Olfactory Disguise and Ascending Disguise, you would always gain a climb Speed of 15 feet and imprecise scent out to 30 feet. If you then transformed into a humanoid that was aquatic and had darkvision, you could choose to gain either darkvision or both water breathing and a swim Speed of 15 feet; whichever of the two you choose, it would last while you were in that form.

Manifested Arms.name: 显现之臂 Manifested Arms
Manifested Arms.description:
只要你保持自信，你的四条额外幽灵手臂就会显现得足够凝实，以便短暂地帮助你攀附。只要你没有惊惧（状态），并且你未处于碾压性绝望的效果或类似的情绪效果之下，即使你没有空出的手，你也可以通过使用转瞬即逝的幽灵手臂来协助你进行@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Climb]{攀爬}或@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grab an Edge]{抓住边缘}。显现手臂专长永远不会给予你一只空闲的手，因此它不允许你使用任何需要空手的能力。

As long as you maintain your confidence, your four additional spectral arms manifest solidly enough to help cling momentarily. As long as you don't have the frightened condition and you aren't under the effect of crushing despair or a similar emotion effect, you can @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Climb]{Climb} or @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grab an Edge]{Grab an Edge} even if you don't have a hand free, by using the fleeting spectral arms to assist you. The Manifested Arms feat doesn't ever give you a free hand, so it doesn't allow you to use any abilities that require one.

Marshal Rule.name: 元帅规则 Marshal Rule
Marshal Rule.description:
你可以用你巧舌如簧的口才或你高傲的气场来激励你的爪牙与盟友。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.MYzRfNExDYp25rro]{Marshal Dedication} 专长，即使你通常必须先从你当前的变体中选取更多专长才能再选择另一个奉献专长。当你使用元帅变体的动作时，你所提供的增益来自你混杂着西德自信与为盟友扭转叙事的手段。除此之外，该变体的机制照常运作。

You can use your silver tongue or your haughty presence to motivate your minions and allies alike. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.MYzRfNExDYp25rro]{Marshal Dedication} feat, even if you normally couldn't take another dedication feat until you take more feats from your current archetype. When you use actions from the marshal archetype, the benefits you provide come from a mixture of your sidhe confidence and twisting the story on behalf of your allies. The mechanics for the archetype otherwise function the same.

Nymph Magic.name: 宁芙魔法 Nymph Magic
Nymph Magic.description:
你与原初魔法的联结比其他宁芙漫游者更强。选择一个来自原初法术列表的普通戏法，或另一个你拥有许可的原初戏法。你可以随意将该戏法作为原初先天法术施放。如常，该戏法的强化等级为你等级的一半（向上取整）。

Your connection to primal magic runs stronger than other nymph wanderers. Choose a common cantrip from the primal spell list, or another primal cantrip to which you have access. You can cast this cantrip as a primal innate spell at will. As normal, the cantrip is heightened to half your level, rounded up.

Kneecapper.name: 碎膝者 Kneecapper
Kneecapper.description:
频率 每日一次

触发 一个位于你触及范围内且体型比你大一档的生物在其移动动作期间离开一个方格

你以灵巧的身体扭转猛然扫向敌人的膝盖，将其击倒在地。进行一次 @Check[acrobatics|defense:reflex] 检定，对抗触发生物的反射DC。若成功，目标倒下并以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地} 状态着地。若大成功或大失败，他们还会受到等同于你的 @Damage[(@actor.level + @actor.abilities.str.mod)[untyped]]{等级加上你的力量调整值} 的伤害；如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.KhqlnAUbDjELOS4F]{Kick 'Em While They're Down} 专长，即使你没有对目标进行打击且目标起初并非倒地，该环境加值仍适用于所造成的伤害。

Frequency once per day

Trigger A creature one size larger than you within your reach leaves a square during its move action

You lash out at your foe's knees, knocking them to the ground with an acrobatic twist of your body. Make an @Check[acrobatics|defense:reflex] check against the triggering creature's Reflex DC. On a success, the target falls and lands @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. On a critical success, they also take damage equal to your @Damage[(@actor.level + @actor.abilities.str.mod)[untyped]]{level plus your Strength modifier}; If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.KhqlnAUbDjELOS4F]{Kick 'Em While They're Down} feat, the circumstance bonus applies to the damage dealt, even though you didn't Strike the target and they weren't initially prone.

Dungeon Lore.name: 地城学识 Dungeon Lore
Dungeon Lore.description:
你已尽可能了解觉醒地城的一切，以便更好理解真正的你是谁、是什么。你获得制作的受训（熟练度），以及以下技能之一的受训（熟练度）：宗教（若你是陵墓）、奥术（若你具有迷宫、塔楼或其他人造地城传承），或自然（若你具有群岛、洞窟、利维坦、树或其他自然地城传承）。若你本应自动在这些技能之一中变为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能中变为受训（熟练度）。你还获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识（技能）} 技能专长，适用于觉醒地城学识（技能）。

You have learned all you can about awakened dungeons in order to understand more about who and what you truly are. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Crafting and in either Religion (if you're a mausoleum), Arcana (if you have the labyrinth, tower, or other artificial dungeon heritage), or Nature (if you have the archipelago, caverns, leviathan, tree, or other natural dungeon heritage). If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} skill feat for Awakened Dungeon Lore.

Blessing of Redemption.name: 救赎祝福 Blessing of Redemption
Blessing of Redemption.description:
你继承了那位仁慈女神赐福的一小部分——她曾聆听斯特诺的祈祷并创造了斯特诺族裔——这使你能够将祝福传播给他人。你每天一次可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{Bless}作为神圣先天法术施放。

A small portion of the blessing from the benevolent goddess who heard Stheno’s prayer and created the stheno ancestry has been passed on to you, allowing you to spread the blessing to others. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{Bless} once per day as a divine innate spell.

Dungeon Unity.name: 地城统一 Dungeon Unity
Dungeon Unity.description:
地城无法无限期地存续，如果它们内部只有一只生物独自存在，即便那只生物强大到如同地城化身。它们是统一的生态系统，凭借协同作用与团队合作来摧毁入侵者，而你的核心与化身体现了那种同袍情谊的精神。你在援助的检定上获得+4环境加值。

Dungeons can't survive indefinitely if they contain only a single creature within them alone, even if that single creature is as powerful as a dungeon avatar. They're unified ecosystems with synergies and teamwork that come together to destroy invaders, and your core and avatar embody that spirit of camaraderie. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus on checks to Aid.

Dungeon Dumpster.name: 地城垃圾箱 Dungeon Dumpster
Dungeon Dumpster.description:
地城几乎能吸收任何东西。虽然这个想法对你来说可能令人尴尬或有失尊严，但你可以把真正的地城自我当作储藏库，用来存放尘土与垃圾并清理环境。你可以将你触及范围内一个未被看管的松散物体（1负载或更少）移动到一个夹层空间中，或将大致等量的污秽或污垢移入其中；该夹层空间会缓慢转移进你的内在地城，从而迅速清洁一小片区域。若你需要移动负载更高的物体，你可以在连续的轮中使用该动作来做到这一点，逐步积累能量。你使用“地城垃圾箱”后的1小时内，该物品或污秽的夹层空间会缓慢旅行至你的地城，并在1小时结束时在地城内的随机地点卸下。在此期间，其他生物若对你进行彻底搜查，可以找到该夹层空间；不过由于夹层空间的朦胧感，你在用于隐藏物体的隐匿检定上获得+2环境加值。想从夹层空间取回物品的生物，可以通过 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.RDXXE7wMrSPCLv5k]{偷窃} 动作来这么做，或通过束缚或使你失能来取回；但他们在偷窃处于夹层空间内的物品时承受-2环境减值。一旦物品进入你的地城，他们就必须进入你的地城才能把它取回。

你无法以这种方式将诅咒物品、神器或其他极难摧毁的物品转移到你的地城中；你也无法转移一个生物，甚至无法转移一个其异次元空间内含有生物的物品。

特殊 若你拥有陵墓传承，该专长获得神术（特征）；若你拥有其他人工地城传承（如迷宫或高塔），则获得奥术；若你拥有自然地城传承（如群岛、洞窟、利维坦或巨树），则获得原初。

Dungeons can absorb pretty much anything, and while the idea might be embarrassing or demeaning to you, you can use your true dungeon self as a repository to store dirt and garbage and clean things up. You can move a loose unattended object of 1 Bulk or less within your reach, or a roughly equivalent amount of filth or grime, into an interstitial space that slowly transfers into your inner dungeon, quickly cleaning a small area. If you need to move an object of greater Bulk, you can use this action on consecutive rounds in order to do so, working up the energy little by little. Over the course of an hour after you use Dungeon Dumpster, the item or filth's interstitial space slowly travels to your dungeon, unloading at a random location there when the hour is complete. In the meantime, other creatures who search you thoroughly can find the interstitial space, though you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Stealth checks to Conceal the Objects from the haziness of the interstitial space. Creatures who wish to retrieve an item from the interstitial space can do so via the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.RDXXE7wMrSPCLv5k]{Steal} action or by restraining or incapacitating you, though they take a -2 circumstance penalty to Steal an item in an interstitial space. Once the item is inside your dungeon, they'll have to enter your dungeon to get it back.

You can't transfer a cursed item, artifact, or other extremely difficult to destroy item to your dungeon in this way, and you can't transfer a creature, or even an item with an extradimensional space containing a creature.

Special This feat gains the divine trait if you have the mausoleum heritage, arcane if you have another artificial dungeon heritage (such as labyrinth or tower) or primal if you have a natural one (such as an archipelago, caverns, leviathan, or tree).

Serpents' Vigilance.name: 群蛇警戒 Serpents' Vigilance
Serpents' Vigilance.description:
你的发蛇会自行留意较弱的威胁，这样你就能更专注地对付更危险的对手。即使你未使用“蛇之视”，你的发蛇也会留意与你同等级或更低等级的生物，并且你不会被它们夹击。它们仍会为更高等级的生物提供夹击。

Your hair snakes take care of looking out for weaker threats on their own, so you can focus more closely on your more dangerous opponents. Even when you aren't using Serpent's Sight, your hair snakes look out for creatures of your level or lower, and you can't be flanked by them. They still provide flanking for higher-level creatures.

Demonic Marauder Dedication.name: 恶魔掠袭者专长献身 Demonic Marauder Dedication
Demonic Marauder Dedication.description:
你是一名恶魔劫掠者，并且专注于重新挪用深渊的力量与技巧，以创造你自己独特的武艺风格。你要么专注于徒手攻击，要么专注于机动劫掠。选择以下一项增益：你要么获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.RQBlbzOPd4h3Scsj]{Demonic Strikes} 族裔专长作为奖励专长，使你的徒手攻击，或来自 Demonic Strikes 专长的徒手攻击的伤害骰提高一级（从 d4 到 d6 或从 d6 到 d8）；要么你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.60oX91gHZBlV26gD]{Maraud} 动作。

特殊 若你选择获得 Demonic Strikes 专长但你已拥有该专长，你可以免费将其重训为另一个 1级恶魔族裔专长，而无需花费重训的时间。若你的传承能够赋予多个徒手攻击且你想保留其中两个或更多，你不必重训该专长。

You're a demonic marauder, and you're focused on reappropriating abyssal powers and techniques to create your own unique martial style. You either focus on unarmed attacks or on mobile marauding. Choose one of the following benefits: Either you gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.RQBlbzOPd4h3Scsj]{Demonic Strikes} ancestry feat as a bonus feat, increasing the damage die of your unarmed attack or unarmed attacks from the Demonic Strikes feat by one step (from d4 to d6 or from d6 to d8), or you gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.60oX91gHZBlV26gD]{Maraud} action.

Special If you choose to gain the Demonic Strikes feat and you already have that feat, you can retrain it to another 1st-level demon ancestry feat for free without spending time retraining. You aren't required to retrain the feat if your heritage can grant multiple unarmed attacks and you want to keep two or more of them.

Constant Levitation.name: 恒定漂浮 Constant Levitation
Constant Levitation.description:
你始终可以运用原始魔法在空中飞行。你始终获得恶鬼的悬浮术的效果，而非仅每日一次持续10分钟。

You can fly through the air using primal magic at all times. You gain the effects of Oni's Levitation at all times, rather than just once per day for 10 minutes.

Speedy Sabotage.name: 迅捷破坏 Speedy Sabotage
Speedy Sabotage.description:
当你技艺娴熟或运气够好时，你能比任何人更快地拆解装置。如果你在进行需要多次成功的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick a Lock} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable a Device} 的巧手检定时掷出大成功或大失败，你获得三次成功来撬锁或禁用装置，而不是两次成功。

When you are skillful or lucky, you can dismantle a device faster than anyone else. If you roll a critical success on a Thievery check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick a Lock} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable a Device} that requires multiple successes, you gain three successes towards picking the lock or disabling the device, instead of two successes.

Gourmet.name: 美食家 Gourmet
Gourmet.description:
在被迫进入现实之外的无形状态、嗅觉与味觉毫无意义之后，你渴望品尝世上最美味的食物。这让你对烹饪与味道有了深刻理解。你获得制作与烹饪学识的受训（熟练度）。如果你本应自动在上述某项技能中成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训（熟练度）。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.1Eceqc6zbMj2x0q9]{Seasoned} 技能专长。

After being forced into a disembodied state outside reality where smell and taste were meaningless, you desire to taste the best food in the world. This has led you to deeply understand cooking and taste. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Crafting and Cooking Lore. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You additionally gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.1Eceqc6zbMj2x0q9]{Seasoned} skill feat.

Oni's Levitation.name: 恶鬼的悬浮 Oni's Levitation
Oni's Levitation.description:
频率 每天一次

虽然你没有翅膀，但你可以汲取飞行的力量，仅凭原始魔法就能推动自己穿过空中。你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度，持续10分钟。

Frequency once per day

While you don't have wings, you can tap into the power of flight, propelling yourself through the air with primal magic alone. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed, which lasts for 10 minutes.

Leanan Sidhe Confidant.name: 莉安南·西德知己 Leanan Sidhe Confidant
Leanan Sidhe Confidant.description:
你发现自己尤其容易结交朋友并赢得人们的信任，尤其是艺术家和表演者。你在交涉中获得受训（熟练度）。如果你本会自动在交涉中成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训。你获得 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.cc8O47KFsODReoBe]{Glad-Hand} 专长的益处，但仅适用于艺术家和表演者。如果你拥有 Glad-Hand 专长，当目标是艺术家或表演者时，你不再在你的即时交涉检定上承受 –5 减值。

You find it especially easy to make friends and gain people's confidence, especially artists and performers. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Diplomacy. If you would automatically become trained in Diplomacy (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain the benefits of the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.cc8O47KFsODReoBe]{Glad-Hand} feat, but only with artists and performers. If you have the Glad-Hand feat, you no longer take the –5 penalty on your immediate Diplomacy check if the target is an artist or performer.

Profane Gift.name: 亵渎赋礼 Profane Gift
Profane Gift.description:
频率 每日一次

你可以通过触碰，给予一名相邻且自愿的生物一个亵渎的赋礼，不过根据你的宿主与倾向，你的赋礼可能比通常魅魔的更不那么亵渎。该生物在最多 1 小时内获得对攻击掷骰、技能检定与豁免检定的 +1 状态加值，不过你可以让该效果提前结束，但会让目标付出巨大代价（见下文）。只要该赋礼持续，你就能与目标在任意距离进行心灵感应交流，通过该生物的感官视物，并通过心灵感应链接向该生物提出请求。此外，你在对目标进行交涉检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request} 其做某事，或对目标进行欺瞒检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie} 时，使用比你掷出的结果高一级的成功度结果。

一个生物同一时间无法拥有超过一个来自魅魔的亵渎赋礼（包括来自本专长与来自生物能力的两种亵渎赋礼），且一名魅魔同一时间也无法授予超过一个亵渎赋礼。若某生物将获得第二个亵渎赋礼，则持续时间更长的赋礼会取代另一个赋礼（这意味着生物能力会取代专长）。提前移除亵渎赋礼需要进行一次赎罪仪式，但由于该仪式通常耗时长于赋礼的持续时间，因此通常更容易等待赋礼自行结束。

你可以以带有专注（特征）的 自由动作（）移除该赋礼，使受赠者获得永久的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞（状态） 3} 状态。需要施放 4 环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SnaLVgxZ9ryUFmUr]{Restoration} 法术才能使该呆滞（状态）状态降低 1。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.IAaEv3S70WAG5LfM]{效果: 亵渎赋礼（加值）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.UwjEQzCXOV4YzOZ9]{效果: 亵渎赋礼（减值）}

Frequency Once per day

You can give an adjacent willing creature a profane gift by touching it, though depending on your host and inclinations, your gift might be less profane than a usual succubus's. That creature gains a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, skill checks, and saving throws for up to 1 hour, though you can end the effect early at great cost to the target (see below). As long as the gift persists, you can communicate telepathically with the target at any distance, see through the creature's senses, and make Requests of the creature through the telepathic link. In addition, you use an outcome one degree of success better than you roll on Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request} something from the target or Deception checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie} to the target.

A creature can't have more than one profane gift from a succubus at a time (including both profane gifts from this feat and from the creature ability), and a succubus can't grant more than one profane gift at a time. If a creature would gain a second profane gift, the gift with the longer duration supersedes the other gift (which means the creature ability supersedes the feat). Removing the profane gift early requires an atone ritual, but since the ritual normally takes longer than the gift's duration, it's usually easier to wait for the gift to end instead.

You can remove the gift as a free action, which has the concentrate trait, to give the recipient a permanent @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3} condition. A 4th‑level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SnaLVgxZ9ryUFmUr]{Restoration} spell is required to reduce this stupefied condition by 1.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.IAaEv3S70WAG5LfM]{Effect: Profane Gift (Bonus)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.UwjEQzCXOV4YzOZ9]{Effect: Profane Gift (Penalty)}

Distant Missiles.name: 远程飞弹 Distant Missiles
Distant Missiles.description:
你可以从你的第三只眼发射飞弹，比大多数其他恶鬼特立独行者要远得多。你由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.8k2etAnsPjxPjIL8]{Third Eye} 授予的飞弹徒手攻击的射程增量从40英尺提高到80英尺。

特殊 若你拥有“虚空飞弹”专长，则该专长的效果也适用于你的虚空飞弹徒手攻击。

You can fire your missiles from your third eye much farther than most other oni mavericks. Your range increment for your missile unarmed attack granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.8k2etAnsPjxPjIL8]{Third Eye} increases from 40 feet to 80 feet.

Special The feat's effect also applies to your void missile unarmed attack if you have the Void Missile feat.

Poisonous Pustules.name: 毒性脓疱 Poisonous Pustules
Poisonous Pustules.description:
频率 每分钟一次

需求 你正在擒抱一个生物。

你从全身的疖子和疣中喷溅出骇人且剧毒的体液。一个你已@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}或@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained}的生物受到[[/r (@actor.level+@actor.abilities.con.mod)[poison]]]{等于你等级加上你的体质调整值的毒素伤害}，并进行一次@Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|basic:true]豁免，DC等于你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者。

Frequency once per minute

Requirements You are grappling a creature.

You spurt horrifically toxic fluids from boils and warts all over your body. A creature you have @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained} takes [[/r (@actor.level+@actor.abilities.con.mod)[poison]]]{poison damage equal to your level plus your Constitution modifier}, with a @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|basic:true] save with a DC equal to the higher of your class DC and spell DC.

Darksight.name: 黑暗视觉 Darksight
Darksight.description:
你的心神飘回你作为无形灵体时所经历的活黑暗时代，而你的双眼已适应黑暗。你获得黑暗视觉。

Your mind drifts back to the living darkness during your time as a disembodied spirit, and your eyes become adjusted to the darkness. You gain darkvision.

Purge Corruption.name: 净化腐化 Purge Corruption
Purge Corruption.description:
你为了摆脱自身的罪孽而如此努力，以至于你成功克服了你的恶魔弱点。你不再拥有来自恶魔坚韧能力的对邪恶伤害与善良伤害的弱点，不过无论你的阵营如何，你仍会承受邪恶与善良伤害。

You've worked so hard to divest yourself of your sin that you've managed to overcome your demonic weaknesses. You no longer have the weakness to evil damage and good damage from the demonic fortitude ability, though you still take both evil and good damage regardless of your alignment.

Charming Beauty.name: 魅惑美貌 Charming Beauty
Charming Beauty.description:
频率 每日一次

你放大自身美貌的力量，可能魅惑所有过于仔细凝视你华彩的人。1分钟内，你获得一个迷人的美貌灵光，以你为中心的 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内生效。进入灵光的敌人（或你启动时已在灵光中的敌人）必须进行一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者，结果如下。之后，它们在24小时内获得暂时免疫。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物对你的态度改善1个阶段。若此调整使该生物对你的态度至少达到冷漠，则它不能对你采取敌对动作，但只要你对该生物或其盟友采取敌对动作，该效果立即结束。

失败 该生物对你的态度改善2个阶段。该生物不能对你采取敌对动作，但只要你对该生物或其盟友采取敌对动作，该效果立即结束。

大成功或大失败：失败 同失败，但该生物对你的态度变为乐于助人。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.eNIbk5lbEiMSnqH6]{效果：迷人美貌}

Frequency once per day

You amplify the power of your beauty, potentially charming all those who gaze too closely upon your splendor. For 1 minute, you gain a charming beauty aura in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] around you. Enemies who enter the aura (or are in the aura when you activate it) must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC with the following results. Afterwards, they are temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature's attitude toward you improves by one step. If that adjustment improves the creature's attitude to at least indifferent, it can't take hostile actions against you, though the effect ends as soon as you take a hostile action against the creature or its allies.

Failure The creature's attitude toward you improves by two steps. The creature can't take hostile actions against you, though the effect ends as soon as you take a hostile action against the creature or its allies.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature's attitude becomes helpful toward you.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.eNIbk5lbEiMSnqH6]{Effect: Charming Beauty}

Marauder's Duality.name: 掠夺者的二元性 Marauder's Duality
Marauder's Duality.description:
你太贪心了：当你能同时拥有两种选择时，怎么会只选其中一种。你获得你在选择@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.Cg6i1sD0YIClJfmP]{恶魔掠袭者奉献}时未选择的那项收益。

特殊 若剩余的收益会给予你@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.RQBlbzOPd4h3Scsj]{恶魔打击}专长，且你已经拥有该专长，你可以免费将其重训为另一个1级恶魔族裔专长，而无需花费重训时代。若你的传承能给予多个徒手攻击且你想保留其中两种或更多种，你不必重训该专长。

You're too greedy to pick one of two options when you can have both instead. You gain the benefit from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.Cg6i1sD0YIClJfmP]{Demonic Marauder Dedication} that you didn't already choose when you took Demonic Marauder Dedication.

Special If the remaining benefit grants you the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.RQBlbzOPd4h3Scsj]{Demonic Strikes} feat and you already have that feat, you can retrain it to another 1st-level demon ancestry feat for free without spending time retraining. You aren't required to retrain the feat if your heritage can grant multiple unarmed attacks and you want to keep two or more of them.

Rewire Senses.name: 重接感官 Rewire Senses
Rewire Senses.description:
你不仅能重新布线机械：甚至还能重新布线其他生物的感官，使他们更容易落入你的把戏与阴谋之中。你可以每天施放一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OAt2ZEns1gIOCgrn]{联觉}，作为原初先天法术。

You don't just rewire machinery: you can even rewire other creatures' senses, causing them to fall prey to your tricks and schemes more easily. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OAt2ZEns1gIOCgrn]{Synesthesia} once per day as a primal innate spell.

Energy Spit.name: 能量唾液喷吐 Energy Spit
Energy Spit.description:
你可以从你的黏液怪身体中吐出或甩出能量，从远处击败你的敌人。你获得一个能量吐息徒手攻击，其造成与你的伪足相同类型的1d4伤害（伤害掷骰不加上任何能力调整值），射程增量为20英尺。你的能量吐息攻击属于投石索武器组，并具有魔法（特征）。与其他徒手攻击一样，你可以用强力打击手缠来强化这个攻击。

You can spit or fling energy from your slime body to defeat your foes from a distance. You gain an energy spit unarmed attack, which deals 1d4 damage of the same type as your pseudopod (no ability modifier is added to the damage roll), with a range increment of 20 feet. Your energy spit attack is in the sling weapon group and has the magical trait. Like other unarmed attacks, you can improve this attack with handwraps of mighty blows.

Hulking Reach.name: 魁梧触及 Hulking Reach
Hulking Reach.description:
你不仅体型庞大，而且还拥有惊人的触及。只要你是大型，你的触及增加到10尺。

You're not only big, you also have an incredible reach. Your reach increases to 10 feet as long as you are Large.

Perpetual Wings (Nymph).name: 永恒之翼（宁芙） Perpetual Wings (Nymph)
Perpetual Wings (Nymph).description:
你可以随心所欲地飞行。你始终获得“自然飞行”的效果，而非每天仅能使用一次并持续10分钟。飞行会持续到你想结束为止，不过若你愿意，也可以将其停用，或长出或收回翅膀；你可以以无限的频率使用“自然飞行”来启用或停用你的飞行，或收回你的翅膀或再次显现它们。

You can fly whenever you wish. You gain the effects of Nature's Flight at all times, rather than just once per day for 10 minutes. The flight lasts as long as you wish, though you can deactivate it or grow or retract wings if you wish; you can use Nature's Flight with an unlimited frequency to activate or deactivate your flight, or to withdraw your wings or manifest them again.

Towering Yai.name: 高耸亚伊 Towering Yai
Towering Yai.description:
通过专注于你与元素的联系，或引导虚空的腐化力量，你获得了非独行的水或风亚伊的体态……或在身高上变得类似虚空亚伊。你的体型增至超巨型，你的触及增至10英尺（若你拥有亚伊的触及专长，则为15英尺）。这不会改变你的任何其他数据。

By concentrating on your connection to the elements or channeling the corrupting power of the void, you've gained the stature of a nonmaverick water or wind yai... or become akin to a void yai in height. Your size increases to Huge and your reach increases to 10 feet (or 15 feet if you have the Yai's Reach feat). This doesn't change any of your other statistics.

Repel Magic.name: 排斥魔法 Repel Magic
Repel Magic.description:
你以魔法能量包围自身，让你能轻松排斥敌对魔法。你在对抗魔法的所有豁免中获得+1状态加值。

You surround yourself with magical energy, allowing you to repel hostile magic with ease. You gain a +1 status bonus to all saving throws against magic.

Fling Self.name: 投掷自身 Fling Self
Fling Self.description:
频率 每小时一次

你可以将自己抛掷穿越空中一定距离。你以直线向任意方向抛掷自己30英尺，甚至可以笔直向上。你可以选择立刻以正常悬浮状态着陆，或者在你使用下一个动作后坠落；你在抛掷自己时选择其一。

Frequency once per hour

You can fling yourself through the air at a distance. You fling yourself 30 feet in a straight line in any direction, even straight up. You can either land into a normal hover immediately or fall after using your next action; you choose when you fling yourself.

Disguise Quality.name: 伪装质量 Disguise Quality
Disguise Quality.description:
你可以伪装你的品质与外观，以迷惑那些注视你的人。决定你想为自己施加何种伪装。你可以让自己看起来破旧不堪，显得损坏且粗劣。你可以让自己看起来完美无瑕，仿佛崭新且高度抛光或精心保养。你也可以制作其他类似的伪装，由GM决定。该幻觉会持续，直到你使用 Disguise Quality 结束它或改变你的伪装。与您进行互动的生物可以尝试识破该幻觉（DC等于你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者）。

You can disguise your quality and appearance to befuddle those who look upon you. Decide what sort of disguise you wish to place on yourself. You can make yourself look decrepit, appearing broken and shoddy. You can make yourself look perfect, appearing as though you're brand new and highly polished or well maintained. You can also make other similar disguises, as determined by the GM. The illusion lasts until you use Disguise Quality to end it or change your disguise. A creature that Interacts with you can attempt to disbelieve the illusion (the DC is equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC).

Call Forth Traps.name: 召唤陷阱 Call Forth Traps
Call Forth Traps.description:
你学会了各种巧妙的把戏，使你能够从你自己的个人地城中召唤出众多陷阱，并将它们带到战场上来困扰你的敌人。你获得 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.4MUbwilvb9dI0X59]{Snarecrafter Dedication} 专长，即使你通常在从你当前的变体中取得更多专长之前无法再选择另一个奉献专长。每当你使用来自 snarecrafter 变体的快速部署时，你是在让陷阱从你的地城内部显现出来，而不是快速建造它，但除此之外该变体的机制仍以相同方式运作。

You've learned all sorts of clever tricks allowing you to call forth some of the many traps from within your own personal dungeon and bring them to the battlefield to bedevil your foes. You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.4MUbwilvb9dI0X59]{Snarecrafter Dedication} feat, even if you normally couldn't take another dedication feat until you take more feats from your current archetype. Any time you use quick deployment from the snarecrafter archetype, you are causing the trap to manifest forth from inside of your dungeon, rather than building it quickly, but the mechanics for the archetype otherwise function the same.

Caverntouched.name: 洞窟之触 Caverntouched
Caverntouched.description:
你与灯侍宁芙与洞窟之间的联系使你能够用提灯引导他人。你获得舞光术作为一项原初先天戏法。照常，戏法会被升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）。你可以从上方列出的“额外专长”中选择前提为灯侍宁芙传承的宁芙专长，不过你必须拥有微光视觉才能选择 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.TD5hploi3nL6Y2kU]{洞窟视域} 专长。

Your connection to lampads and caverns allows you to guide others with lanterns. You gain dancing lights as a primal innate cantrip. As normal, a cantrip is heightened to half your level, rounded up. You can take nymph feats from the Additional Feats listed above with a prerequisite of lampad heritage, though you must possess low-light vision to take the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.TD5hploi3nL6Y2kU]{Cavern Sight} feat.

Comprehend Mental Narrative.name: 理解心灵叙事 Comprehend Mental Narrative
Comprehend Mental Narrative.description:
你理解人类心智如何融入你讲述的叙事与故事之中。你每天一次可以将 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC]{心灵探知} 作为异术先天法术施放。若你是aes sidhe，你也可以选择将心灵探知作为奥术先天法术获得。

You understand how human minds fit into the narratives and stories you tell. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC]{Mind Reading} as an occult innate spell once per day. If you're an aes sidhe, you can gain mind reading as an arcane innate spell if you prefer.

Roaring Gale.name: 咆哮狂风 Roaring Gale
Roaring Gale.description:
频率 每小时一次

你召起狂风将敌人掀飞。你120英尺内10英尺半径爆发范围内的所有生物都会被吹飞，其结果取决于它们针对你职业DC或法术DC中较高者进行的 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物不受影响

成功 你将该生物吹离你5英尺。

失败 你将该生物抛向空中，迫使其落在你选择的、至多离你10英尺远的位置。该生物因坠落受到 @Damage[5d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。若其将要落地的空间内有另一个生物，则另一个生物也受到等量伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免；坠落的生物结束于其选择的最近未被占据的空间。该伤害在15级时增加至6d6，在17级时增加至7d6，在19级时增加至8d6。

当前伤害：@Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2 - 2)d6[bludgeoning]]

大成功或大失败：失败 你将该生物高高抛向空中，使其重重砸在你选择的、至多离你20英尺远的地面上。该生物因撞击受到 @Damage[10d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害，并倒地 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。若其将要落地的空间内有另一个生物，则另一个生物也受到等量伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免；坠落的生物结束于你选择的最近未被占据的空间。该伤害在15级时增加至12d6，在17级时增加至14d6，在19级时增加至16d6。

当前伤害：@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2 - 2)*2)d6[bludgeoning]]

Frequency once per hour

You muster up the winds to fling your foes away. All creatures within a 10-foot radius burst within 120 feet are blown away, with results depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected

Success You blow the creature 5 feet away from you.

Failure You fling the creature into the air, forcing it to land your choice of up to 10 feet away from you. The creature takes @Damage[5d6[bludgeoning]] damage from the fall. If there's another creature in the space where it would land, the other creature takes the same amount of damage, with a basic Reflex save, and the falling creature ends in the nearest unoccupied space of their choice. The damage increases to 6d6 at 15th level, 7d6 at 17th level, and 8d6 at 19th level.

Current damage: @Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2 - 2)d6[bludgeoning]]

Critical Failure You fling the creature high into the air, crashing it into the ground your choice of up to 20 feet away from you. The creature takes @Damage[10d6[bludgeoning]] damage from the crash and falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If there's another creature in the space where it would land, the other creature takes the same amount of damage, with a basic Reflex save, and the falling creature ends in the nearest unoccupied space of your choice. The damage increases to 12d6 at 15th level, 14d6 at 17th level, and 16d6 at 19th level.

Current damage: @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2 - 2)*2)d6[bludgeoning]]

Disinter.name: 解离 Disinter
Disinter.description:
你从你的地城中唤出一具不死尸体，要么用作脆弱的一次性棋子，要么用来恐吓另一名生物。你每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.9WGeBwIIbbUuWKq0]{活化死尸}或@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.4koZzrnMXhhosn0D]{恐惧}作为神圣先天法术；你可以每天临时决定施放哪一个法术；一旦你施放了其中任意一个法术，当天也就不能再施放另一个。当你以这种方式施放恐惧时，目标会看到尸体被掘出的影像。

You call forth an undead corpse from your dungeon, either to use a weak expendable pawn or to scare another creature. You can cast either @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.9WGeBwIIbbUuWKq0]{Animate Dead} or @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.4koZzrnMXhhosn0D]{Fear} once per day as a divine innate spell; you can choose which spell to cast each day on the fly; once you've cast either of the spells, you can't cast the other that day either. When casting fear in this way, the target sees images of corpses being disinterred.

Return to Sin.name: 重归罪孽 Return to Sin
Return to Sin.description:
@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.8g0jb1Ax1oq7fuPh]{效果：重返罪孽}

尽管你竭尽全力想要忘却你的罪孽，但有时在被逼到绝境时，你不得不调用你所有的旧日力量来脱身，变形为一种罪形态，以最糟糕的方式唤起你原本的本性。你变成罪形态的方式独一无二，但它总会唤起你原初罪孽的某个要素，而且视觉效果总是极其震撼。当你变形时，你周围10尺内的每个生物都会在1轮内陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，除非其在对抗你的职业DC或法术DC（取较高者）的@Check[fortitude|against:class-spell]豁免中成功。若你原本为中型或更小，当你进入罪形态时，你变为大型且你的触及增加5尺（若你不知为何起初是超小型，则改为增加10尺）。你必须拥有足够的空间来膨胀，否则该效果将失去。你还会获得以下增益：

  • 40点临时生命值。
  • 等同于你速度的飞行速度。
  • 对抗魔法的豁免获得+1状态加值。
  • 黑暗视觉。
  • 你从“恶魔打击”专长获得的所有徒手攻击，其伤害骰体型提升一级。此外，若其未从强力符文获得增益，则其伤害骰从1颗增加到2颗。
  • 你的徒手攻击，以及你的武器造成额外1点邪恶伤害。

你的罪形态外观大致与你成为叛逆者之前相似，尽管若你原本的恶魔形态为中型或更小，它可能会更大、甚至更具压迫感。你最多可以维持罪形态1分钟。处于罪形态时，你可以将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.hVU9msO9yGkxKZ3J]{神圣天谴}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.fd31tAHSSGXyOxW6]{吸血枯竭}作为6环神圣先天法术施放，每次使用此专长时每个法术各可施放一次。当你从罪形态现身时，你会变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{枯竭 3}

特殊 你不能同时拥有此专长与@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.DPa3UkRYuU3Nhtfu]{净化腐化}专长。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.8g0jb1Ax1oq7fuPh]{Effect: Return to Sin}

Despite your best efforts to forget your sin, sometimes when push comes to shove, you have to call upon all your old power to escape from dire straits, transforming into a sin form that recalls your original nature in all the worst possible ways. Your transformation into your sin form is unique to you, but it always recalls some element of your original sin, and it's always extremely visually impressive. Every creature within 10 feet of you when you transform is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round unless they succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher. If you were Medium or smaller, when you enter your sin form, you become Large and your reach increases by 5 feet (or by 10 feet if you somehow started out Tiny). You must have space to expand into, or the effect is lost. You also gain the following benefits:

  • 40 temporary Hit Points.
  • A fly Speed equal to your Speed.
  • A +1 status bonus to saves against magic.
  • Darkvision.
  • All unarmed attacks you gained from the Demonic Strikes feat increases their damage die size by one step. Additionally, if they aren't gaining the benefits of a striking rune, they increase from one damage die to two.
  • Your unarmed attacks, and your weapons deal 1 additional evil damage.

Your sin form looks roughly like you did before you became a renegade, though it might be larger and even more imposing if your original demon form was Medium or smaller. You can remain in your sin form for up to 1 minute. While in your sin form, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.hVU9msO9yGkxKZ3J]{Divine Wrath}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.fd31tAHSSGXyOxW6]{Vampiric Exsanguination}, as 6th-level divine innate spells, once each per use of this feat. When you emerge from your sin form, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3}

Special You can't have both this feat and the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.DPa3UkRYuU3Nhtfu]{Purge Corruption} feat.

Dog Scion.name: 犬裔传人 Dog Scion
Dog Scion.description:
无论你的父母之一是否为库·希德，或是你在没有进行掩蔽的情况下听见库·希德连续吠叫三次后命运从此改变，你都能够变形为一只狗。以单动作进行（具有专注、奥术、变形与嬗变特征），你可以在你的人形形态与狗形形态之间来回切换；你的狗形形态是一只特定的小型犬（通常毛发蓬乱且呈苔绿色）。你可以从上方所列的“额外专长”中选择前提为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Item.5LL04KyeSKlD6lWM]{Cu Sidhe} 传承的希德专长。

Whether one of your parents was a cu sidhe, or your fate changed forever after hearing a cu sidhe bark three times without taking cover, you're able to transform into a dog. As a single action, which has the concentration, occult, polymorph, and transmutation traits, you can switch back and forth between your humanoid form and your dog form, a specific Small dog (typically shaggy and moss green). You can take sidhe feats from the Additional Feats listed above with a prerequisite of @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Item.5LL04KyeSKlD6lWM]{Cu Sidhe} heritage.

Enforce Commitment.name: 强制承诺 Enforce Commitment
Enforce Commitment.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 一名生物声明他们将执行一个动作（就此触发而言，只有该人的确切措辞重要，而非其意图，因此“强制履约”可以因轻率或讥讽式的承诺而触发）。

一旦有人对你做出承诺，你就能以魔法强制其履行，使其之后难以反悔。触发生物必须尝试一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 意志豁免，对抗你法术DC或职业DC中较高者。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受“强制履约”专长的约束而必须履行对你的承诺，不过若其愿意仍可照做。

成功 若该生物未能完全履行其承诺，则其在1天内对抗你时的所有检定与DC承受–1状态减值。此减值仅在其明确未履行承诺之后才适用。

失败 若该生物未能完全履行其承诺，则其在1周内对抗你时的所有检定与DC承受–1状态减值。此减值仅在其明确未履行承诺之后才适用。当其承诺变得相关时——要么立刻（例如你要一杯水而他们同意在你提出请求后给你端来），要么在之后某个日期（例如他们承诺参加你即将到来的聚会）——他们必须履行该承诺至少1分钟，除非这样做会变得自我毁灭或造成明显的负面效果。若该承诺是有限的并在持续时间结束前完成，则该强迫效果会提前结束。GM对承诺何时变得相关拥有最终裁定权。大多数显然不会立刻执行的承诺，例如“我会还你钱”或“我会给你找些珠宝”，其何时变得相关可能没有明确时间表，而是可能根据情境变得相关（例如，在承诺还钱的人有足够钱之后，或在承诺给你找珠宝的人到了市场时）。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但该生物必须履行其对你做出的承诺至少1小时，而非仅需至少1分钟，除非这样做会变得自我毁灭或造成任何其他明显的负面效果。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger A creature states that they will perform an action (for the purpose of this trigger, only a person's exact wording matters, not their intent, so Enforce Commitment can trigger on a careless or sarcastic commitment).

Once someone makes a commitment to you, you can magically enforce it, making it difficult for them to later renege on their agreement. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your spell or class DC.

Critical Success The creature is under no obligation from the Enforce Commitment feat to fulfill their commitment to you, though they can still do so if they wish.

Success If the creature fails to fulfill its commitment in full, they take a –1 status penalty on all checks and DCs against you for 1 day. This penalty only applies after they definitively fail in the commitment.

Failure If the creature fails to fulfill their commitment in full, they take a –1 status penalty on all checks and DCs against you for 1 week. This penalty only applies after they definitively fail in the commitment. When their commitment becomes relevant, either right away (for instance if they agree to bring you a glass of water after you ask for one) or at a later date (for instance if they promise to attend your upcoming party), they must fulfill the commitment for at least 1 minute unless doing so becomes self destructive or causes obvious negative effects. If the commitment is finite and completed before the duration elapses, the compulsion ends early. The GM is the final arbiter of when the commitment becomes relevant. Most commitments that would obviously not be performed right away, such as "I'll pay you back" or "I'll find you some jewelry" might not have an explicit timetable when they become relevant, but instead might become relevant based on the context (for instance, after the person who promised to pay you back has enough money to do so, or when the person who promised to find you some jewelry is at a market).

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature must fulfill the commitment they made to you for at least 1 hour, rather than only needing to fulfill it for at least 1 minute, unless doing so becomes self-destructive or causes any other obvious negative effects.

Wanderer's Way.name: 流浪者之道 Wanderer's Way
Wanderer's Way.description:
自然将你视为一名流浪者，因此它向你伸出援手，在你所有的旅行中赐予你轻松与迅捷。你每天可以施放一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KcLVELhCUcKXxiKE]{Tailwind}，作为一种原始先天法术。

Nature recognizes you as a wanderer, and so it reaches out to you in order to grant you ease and swiftness in all of your travels. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KcLVELhCUcKXxiKE]{Tailwind} once per day as a primal innate spell.

Bully.name: 霸凌者 Bully
Bully.description:
你知道如何仅凭一个眼神就支配他人。你受训于威吓（若你已受训于威吓，则改为你选择的另一项技能），并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare} 技能专长作为奖励专长。

You know how to dominate others with a mere look. You are trained in Intimidation (or another skill of your choice if you're already trained in Intimidation) and gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare} skill feat as a bonus feat.

Flurry of Fashion.name: 时尚连击 Flurry of Fashion
Flurry of Fashion.description:
你可以随意改变你的外貌打扮，不过每天只有一次改变会保持永久。你可以随心所欲地使用变形怪的时尚，且没有频率限制。然而，每当你在同一天内第一次之后再次使用变形怪的时尚时，你在同一天内之前做出的改变会复原。到一天结束时，你当天最后一次改变会保持永久。

You can alter your fashion as often as you want, though only one change each day remains permanent. You can use Doppelganger's Fashion at will with no frequency limitation. However, each time you use Doppelganger's Fashion after the first time on the same day, the previous change you made that same day reverts. At the end of the day, your final change of the day remains permanent.

Energy Avatar.name: 能量化身 Energy Avatar
Energy Avatar.description:
频率 每天一次

你将大量能量灌注自身，使身体转化为巨大的黏液，在短时间内化身为能量的化身。该效果持续1分钟。在此期间，你变为巨型，且若你的触及小于10尺，则你的触及增加至10尺。你获得你在获得 @Compendium[battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.RtbmL0RXgU7Kc9Ii]{Energy Slime} 专长时所选择的能量类型的免疫。你的伪足与 @Compendium[battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.EnENOaq24nUGRW92]{Energy Spit} 攻击会造成所选类型额外1d8点伤害，而你的其他徒手攻击会造成所选类型额外1d4点伤害。任何触碰你或以徒手近战攻击或无触及近战武器对你造成伤害的生物，都会受到所选类型的[[/r 3d6 #Damage]]{3d6}伤害。每轮第一次当你使用近战徒手攻击对一个生物造成所选类型的能量伤害时，你将其吸收进体内，因你的身体通过能量消化对方获得养分而获得[[/r 3d6 #Temporary HP]]{3d6 temporary HP}。当变形结束时，任何剩余的临时HP也会一并消失。Energy Avatar 获得与你所选能量类型相对应的特征。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.fXhEerVlYl1CzqaY]{效果: Energy Avatar}

Frequency once per day

You transform your body into a huge slime by infusing yourself with massive amounts of energy, becoming an avatar of energy for a brief time. The effect lasts 1 minute. During that time, you become Huge and your reach increases to 10 feet, if it was less than 10 feet. You gain immunity to the energy type you chose when you gained the @Compendium[battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.RtbmL0RXgU7Kc9Ii]{Energy Slime} feat. Your pseudopod and @Compendium[battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.EnENOaq24nUGRW92]{Energy Spit} attacks deal 1d8 additional damage of the chosen type, and your other unarmed attacks deal 1d4 additional damage of the chosen type. Any creature that touches you or damages you with an unarmed melee attack or non-reach melee weapon takes [[/r 3d6 #Damage]]{3d6} damage of the chosen type. The first time each round that you deal energy damage of the chosen type to a creature using a melee unarmed attack, you absorb them into you, gaining [[/r 3d6 #Temporary HP]]{3d6 temporary HP} as your body gains nutrients from digesting them with your energy. When the transformation ends, any remaining temporary HP expires as well. Energy Avatar gains the trait corresponding to your chosen energy type.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.fXhEerVlYl1CzqaY]{Effect: Energy Avatar}

Greater Darksight Disguise.name: 高等黑暗视觉伪装 Greater Darksight Disguise
Greater Darksight Disguise.description:
你已经提升了自己采用某种形态的黑暗视觉的能力，使你也能复制强化黑暗视觉。当你使用变形怪的伪装来【冒充】一名具有强化黑暗视觉的类人生物时，你获得强化黑暗视觉。只要你维持该伪装，这些益处就会持续。

You've improved your ability to adopt a form's darkvision, allowing you to reproduce greater darkvision as well. When you use doppelganger's disguise to Impersonate a humanoid creature that has greater darkvision, you gain greater darkvision. These benefits last as long as you remain in that disguise.

Renegade Heroics.name: 叛逆英雄事迹 Renegade Heroics
Renegade Heroics.description:
你引导那种绝对的确信，使你能够将构成你存在的罪恶本身弃绝，并将其转化为英雄气概。你可以每天一次以神圣先天法术对自己施放@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.KqvqNAfGIE5a9wSv]{英雄气概}。

You channel the absolute certainty that allowed you to abjure the very sin that made up your being into heroics. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.KqvqNAfGIE5a9wSv]{Heroism} on yourself as a divine innate spell once per day.

Item Shrinker.name: 物品缩小器 Item Shrinker
Item Shrinker.description:
有时候，将一个物体带走比单纯地对其动手脚并把它留在原地更容易。你每天可以施放一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kWh8sJH7yawidMyW]{Shrink Item}，作为原始自发法术。

Sometimes it's easier to carry an object away, rather than simply tamper with it and leave it in place . You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kWh8sJH7yawidMyW]{Shrink Item} once per day as a primal innate spell.

Convincing Face.name: 令人信服的面孔 Convincing Face
Convincing Face.description:
与你大多数黏液怪同类不同，你可以改变你类人形态的质地、颜色与其他细节，以便更有效地伪装自己。当你使用无定形形态变为类人形态时，你可以选择看起来像某个类人族裔的成员（通常是人类），而不是一个显然由黏液组成、仅仅模糊呈类人轮廓的形状。该形态的具体细节与你本身密不可分，无法改变，即使你对该专长进行重训也不行。这使你能够有效地冒充所选族裔的成员，除非他人仔细检查并注意到细微的不一致之处，否则无法看出你是一只黏液怪。

Unlike most slimes, you can change the texture, coloration, and other details of your humanoid form in order to disguise yourself more effectively. When you change into your humanoid form using amorphous form, you can choose to look like a member of a humanoid ancestry (typically a human), rather than a vaguely humanoid shape that is clearly made out of slime. The specific details of this form are inherent to you, and they can't be changed, even if you retrain this feat. This allows you to effectively Impersonate a member of the chosen ancestry, without others being able to tell you're a slime unless they examine you carefully and notice the small inconsistencies.

Adamantine Synthesis.name: 精金合成 Adamantine Synthesis
Adamantine Synthesis.description:
你将天金精金的合金或精金的部分神秘特性融入自身构成。为确定弱点、抗力等的效果时，你被视为精金。

You incorporate an alloy of the skymetal adamantine or some of adamantine's mystical properties into your composition. You are treated as if you were adamantine to determine the effects of weaknesses, resistances, and the like.

Hindering Weapon.name: 阻碍武器 Hindering Weapon
Hindering Weapon.description:
你通过训练与重塑调整了自身，以利用三种可能的妨害动作之一。你获得卸武、推撞或绊摔特征之一（由你选择）。

You've adjusted yourself through training and reshaping to take advantage of one of three possible hindering maneuvers. You gain your choice of the disarm, shove, or trip traits.

Meld Into Stone.name: 融入石中 Meld Into Stone
Meld Into Stone.description:
你已恢复了与洞窟足够的连接，能够将身体融入岩石以躲避伤害。你每天可施放一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vh1RpbWfqdNC4L3P]{One with Stone}（仅限 Merge with Stone），作为一种原初先天法术。

You've recovered enough connection to caverns to meld your body into the rock in order to escape harm. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vh1RpbWfqdNC4L3P]{One with Stone} (Merge with Stone only) once per day as a primal innate spell.

Minotaur's Visage.name: 牛头人的面容 Minotaur's Visage
Minotaur's Visage.description:
频率 每日一次

你变形为任何人所能想象到的最恐怖的牛头人面貌，使任何攻击你的人短暂感受到自己成为猎物的感觉。在接下来的1分钟内，当任何生物试图对你采取敌对动作时，该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 意志豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。之后，该生物暂时免疫，直到其下一回合结束。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物在使用其动作之前成为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}。

大成功或大失败 该生物成为 frightened 2，且其动作失败并被浪费。

Frequency once per day

You transform into the most horrifying visage of a minotaur that anyone can imagine, causing anyone who attacks you to briefly feel the sensation of being prey. For the next minute, when any creature attempts a hostile action against you, the creature must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. It is then temporarily immune until the end of its next turn.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2} before using its action.

Critical Failure The creature becomes frightened 2, and its action fails and is wasted.

Cunning Twist.name: 狡诈扭转 Cunning Twist
Cunning Twist.description:
频率 每日一次

触发 你在一次非秘密技能检定中失败。

每当计划出错，或问题为你和你的盟友带来新的转折或复杂情况时，你就使出一个巧妙的变化来帮助你扭转局势。重骰该触发的技能检定，并采用新的结果。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You fail a non-secret skill check.

Whenever a plan goes wrong or a problem presents a new wrinkle or complication for you and your allies, you pull out a cunning twist to help you turn things around. Reroll the triggering skill check, taking the new result.

Preferred Weapon Familiarity.name: 偏好武器熟练度 Preferred Weapon Familiarity
Preferred Weapon Familiarity.description:
你知道如何使用你偏好形态所特有的武器。你获得与你偏好形态相关联的1级武器熟悉族裔专长。你将所获得的武器熟悉专长视为先决条件，以满足5级和13级族裔专长的族裔先决条件。

You know how to use the weapons specific to your preferred form. You gain the level 1 Weapon Familiarity ancestry feat associated with your preferred form. You meet the ancestry prerequisite for the level 5 and level 13 ancestry feats with the Weapon Familiarity feat you gained as a prerequisite.

Zephyr's Wrath.name: 西风之怒 Zephyr's Wrath
Zephyr's Wrath.description:
频率 每小时一次

虽然奥莱通常不易动怒，但凡惹怒你的人都将感受如同狂风本身的怒火。所有位于@Template[type:cone|distance:40]内的生物都会被吹飞，结果取决于其对你较高者（职业DC或法术DC）的@Check[fortitude|against:class-spell]豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响

成功 狂怒之风将该生物吹离你5英尺。

失败 狂怒之风将该生物抛向空中，迫使其落在你选择的、至多离你10英尺远的位置。该生物因坠落承受@Damage[5d6[bludgeoning]]伤害。如果它将要落地的空间中还有另一名生物，则另一名生物也承受相同数值的伤害，并进行一次基础反射豁免；坠落的生物最终落在其选择的最近的未被占据的空间中。该伤害在15级时提高至6d6、17级时提高至7d6、19级时提高至8d6。

大成功或大失败 狂暴之风将该生物高高抛入空中，随后将其重重摔回地面。如同失败，但你可以迫使该生物坠落在至多离你20英尺远的位置；该生物（以及它落在其上的任意生物）承受失败条目所列伤害的两倍，且该生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。

Frequency once per hour

While aurai aren't usually quick to anger, those who earn your ire feel the wrath of the winds themselves. All creatures within a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] are blown away, with results depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected

Success The angry winds blow the creature 5 feet away from you.

Failure The angry winds toss the creature into the air, forcing it to land your choice of up to 10 feet away from you. The creature takes @Damage[5d6[bludgeoning]] damage from the fall. If there's another creature in the space where it would land, the other creature takes the same amount of damage, with a basic Reflex save, and the falling creature ends in the nearest unoccupied space of their choice. The damage increases to 6d6 at 15th level, 7d6 at 17th level, and 8d6 at 19th level.

Critical Failure The enraged winds propel the creature high into the air before crashing the creature back into the ground. As failure, except you can force the creature to fall up to 20 feet away from you, the creature (and any creature on which it lands) takes double the damage listed in the failure entry, and the creature falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Putrid Vomit.name: 腐臭呕吐 Putrid Vomit
Putrid Vomit.description:
你喷吐出一条 @Template[type:line|distance:30] 的喷射状呕吐物。区域内的每个生物必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|] 豁免，对抗你职业DC或法术DC中较高者，失败则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{反胃1}，大失败则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{反胃2}。

You spew a @Template[type:line|distance:30] of projectile vomit. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC, becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} on a failure and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure.

Regenerative Recovery.name: 再生性恢复 Regenerative Recovery
Regenerative Recovery.description:
尽管你可能不具备与邪恶势力完成其契约的恶鬼那样完整的再生能力，但你仍比大多数生物更快从伤势中恢复。若你休息10分钟，你获得等同于你[[/r @actor.abilities.con.mod * floor(@actor.level/2)]]{体质调整值 × 你等级的一半}的生命值。此效果可与任何你从 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}获得的治疗累加。

While you might not possess the full regeneration of oni who complete their contract with the forces of evil, you still recover from wounds much more quickly than most creatures. If you rest for 10 minutes, you gain Hit Points equal to your [[/r @actor.abilities.con.mod * floor(@actor.level/2)]]{Constitution modifier × half your level}. This is cumulative with any healing you receive from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}.

Traverse the Labyrinth.name: 穿越迷宫 Traverse the Labyrinth
Traverse the Labyrinth.description:
频率 每天一次

你将自己与盟友从世界迷宫的桎梏中解放出来。在接下来的1小时内，你与至多10个其他生物不会因植被、瓦砾、强风或其他环境特性而在速度上承受环境加值罚值，不论该环境是否为魔法，并且他们会无视由此类环境特性造成的困难地形

Frequency once per day

You release yourself and your allies from the confines of the world's labyrinth. For the next hour, you and up to 10 other creatures don't take circumstance penalties to Speed from vegetation, rubble, winds, or other properties of the environment, whether or not the environment is magical, and they ignore difficult terrain from such environmental properties

Heal Slime.name: 治疗黏液怪 Heal Slime
Heal Slime.description:
构成你身体的黏液怪具有治疗特性。只要你有一条空闲的拟足，并选择在进行施展急救或治疗伤口的检定时作为该检定的一部分失去[[/r 1 #Hit Point]]{1 Hit Point}，你就可以在没有治疗者工具的情况下 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{施展急救} 或 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Treat Wounds]{治疗伤口}。如果你拥有 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.wYerMk6F1RZb0Fwt]{战场医疗} 专长，你也可以对战场医疗如此做。当你使用你的黏液怪来进行这些动作中的任意一种时，你获得技能检定的+1物品加值。该加值在第9等级提升至+2，并在第17等级提升至+3。

The slime that makes up your body has healing properties. You can @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid} or @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Treat Wounds]{Treat Wounds} without healer's tools as long as you have a free pseudopod and choose to lose [[/r 1 #Hit Point]]{1 Hit Point} as part of the check to Administer First Aid or Treat Wounds. If you have the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.wYerMk6F1RZb0Fwt]{Battle Medicine} feat, you can do so with Battle Medicine as well. When using your slime for any of these actions, you gain a +1 item bonus to the skill check. This increases to +2 at 9th level and +3 at 17th level.

Sidhe Lore.name: 西迪学识 Sidhe Lore
Sidhe Lore.description:
你通晓妖精文化中错综复杂的习俗与礼仪规则，以及奥术魔法的形态。你获得奥术学和社交两项技能的受训（熟练度）。如果你本会自动在其中一项技能上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训。你还获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore}技能专长，选择的学识为西地学识。

You are knowledgeable about the labyrinthine customs and rules of etiquette of sidhe culture, as well as the shape of occult magic. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Occultism and Society. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} skill feat in Sidhe Lore.

Unusual Shift.name: 异常转变 Unusual Shift
Unusual Shift.description:
你可以变形为一些更不寻常的形态，但整体仍大致呈类人外形。除了小型与中型类人生物外，你还可以使用变形怪的伪装来呈现为另一种类型、但具有标准类人身体轮廓的生物，例如宁芙或巴利瑟天使。对于任何其他变形怪能力，只要其指定你必须采取类人形态，你也可以采取这些具有类人外形的其他类型生物的形态。

You can shapeshift into somewhat more unusual forms, though still roughly humanoid in shape. In addition to Small and Medium humanoids, you can use doppelganger's disguise to appear as a creature of another type with a standard humanoid body shape, such as a nymph or a balisse angel. For any other doppelganger abilities that specify you must take a humanoid form, you can also take the form of one of these humanoid-shaped creatures of other types.

Reactive Talons.name: 反应利爪 Reactive Talons
Reactive Talons.description:
触发 你触及内的一名生物使用操控动作或移动动作、进行一次远程攻击，或在其正在使用的移动动作中离开一个方格。

需求 你正在飞行。

你用一记利爪猛击，然后若第一击未命中则再来一击，希望从空中扰乱你的敌人。使用由@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.RQBlbzOPd4h3Scsj]{恶魔打击}专长授予的利爪徒手攻击，对触发生物进行一次打击。若该利爪打击未命中，你可以立刻以–5减值尝试第二次利爪打击。若任一利爪打击为大成功或大失败且触发为操控动作，你扰乱该动作。你的利爪打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，且你的多重攻击减值不适用于它们。

Trigger A creature within your reach uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

Requirements You are flying.

You lash out with a talon, then another if the first one misses, hoping to disrupt your foe from the air. Make a Strike with the talon unarmed attack granted by the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.RQBlbzOPd4h3Scsj]{Demonic Strikes} feat against the triggering creature. If the talon Strike misses, you can immediately attempt a second talon Strike at a –5 penalty. If either talon Strike is a critical hit and the trigger was a manipulate action, you disrupt that action. Your talon Strike or Strikes don't count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to them.

Doppelborn's Disguise.name: 化身双生的伪装 Doppelborn's Disguise
Doppelborn's Disguise.description:
你通过练习改进了你的多卜生变形能力。你决心有朝一日甚至超越真正的变形怪！当你使用你的传承能力以更快的速度对生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{伪装} 时，你可以以单动作伪装为一种与你族裔相同的生物的特定形态，该形态在你第一次选择此专长时选定，称为你的“偏好形态”。你的偏好形态极具个人色彩，通常基于你内心最深处的渴望。对许多多卜生而言，这是一种理想化的自我版本，或是他们所仰慕之人的样貌。正因如此，即使重训此专长，通常也无法让你改变偏好形态。你必须先在根本层面改变你自己。此外，你获得上方额外专长章节所列、以“变形怪的伪装”为前提的1级变形怪专长之一。

特殊 此专长满足变形怪族裔专长的“变形怪的伪装族裔能力”前提条件。

You've improved your doppelborn shapeshifting through practice. You're determined to surpass even full doppelgangers some day! When you use your heritage ability to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} creatures more quickly, you can Impersonate one specific form of a creature of your ancestry, chosen when you select this feat the first time, called your "preferred form" with a single action. Your preferred form is deeply personal and is usually based on your deepest desires. For many doppelborn it's an idealized version of themselves or a person they admire. For this reason, even retraining this feat doesn't normally allow you to change your preferred form. You'd first have to change yourself on a fundamental level. Additionally, you gain one of the 1st-level doppelganger feats listed in the additional feats section above with doppelganger's disguise as a prerequisite.

Special This feat fulfills the "doppelganger's disguise ancestry ability" prerequisite for doppelganger ancestry feats.

Dungeon Armor.name: 地城护甲 Dungeon Armor
Dungeon Armor.description:
频率 每日一次

为了保护你的核心免于毁灭，你从你地城的墙壁、地板与天花板内部抽取物质，形成一层致密物质的外壳以保护你的化身，即使每次攻击都会将外壳凿碎一部分。持续10分钟，你获得10点对抗物理伤害的抗力，但精金除外。然而，每次该抗力生效时，抗力值降低1。当该抗力在将物理伤害降低10次后降至0时，该效果结束。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.0bqiRrIPKasNYIdW]{效果：地城护甲}

Frequency once per day

In order to protect your core from destruction, you draw forth matter from within your dungeon's walls, floors, and ceiling to form a shell of dense matter that protects your avatar, even as each attack chips through the shell. For 10 minutes, you gain resistance 10 against physical damage, except adamantine. However, each time the resistance applies the resistance value decreases by 1. When the resistance reaches 0 after reducing physical damage 10 times, the effect ends.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.0bqiRrIPKasNYIdW]{Effect: Dungeon Armor}

Meadowtouched.name: 草原之触 Meadowtouched
Meadowtouched.description:
如同一名epimelid，你与草甸和果园有着强烈的羁绊。每天一次，你可以以单动作产出一枚水果。若在接下来1小时内，一名能够从水果获取营养的活生物以交互动作食用它，则其恢复1d8生命值，且在你1级之后，你每超出1级2个等级便额外恢复1d8生命值。该水果的效果具有治疗、死灵、正能量以及原能（特征）特征。你可以从上方列出的“额外专长”中选择先决条件为epimelid传承的宁芙专长。

[[/r (floor(@actor.level/2)+1)d8[healing]]]{分级治疗}

Like an epimelid, you have a strong bond to meadows and orchards. Once per day, you can produce a fruit as a single action. If a living creature that can derive sustenance from fruit consumes it as an Interact action within the next hour, they regain 1d8 Hit Points, plus an additional 1d8 Hit Points for every 2 of your levels beyond 1st. The fruit's effect has the healing, necromancy, positive, and primal traits. You can take nymph feats from the Additional Feats listed above with a prerequisite of epimelid heritage.

[[/r (floor(@actor.level/2)+1)d8[healing]]]{Leveled Healing}

Stheno's Defiance.name: 斯忒诺的蔑视 Stheno's Defiance
Stheno's Defiance.description:
你呼唤神圣之力来抗拒你的命运，就像你之前的斯忒诺所做的那样，保护你自己、你的朋友，或两者兼顾。你每天一次可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.1b55SgYTV65JvmQd]{Blessing of Defiance}作为神圣先天法术施放。

You call upon the divine to defy your fate, just as Stheno did before you, protecting yourself, your friends, or both. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.1b55SgYTV65JvmQd]{Blessing of Defiance} once per day as a divine innate spell.

Midnight Sight.name: 午夜视界 Midnight Sight
Midnight Sight.description:
无论你是与黑暗与夜晚相关的宫廷结盟，还是使自己与午夜魔法调谐，你都强化了你的希德族微光视觉，让你能够在黑暗中自如视物。你获得黑暗视觉。

Whether you affiliate yourself with courts associated with darkness and the night or attuned yourself to midnight magic, you have improved your sidhe low-light vision, allowing you to see comfortably in the darkness. You gain darkvision.

Baobhan Sidhe Captivator.name: 魅惑者·芭奥班希伊 Baobhan Sidhe Captivator
Baobhan Sidhe Captivator.description:
你那引人入胜的舞蹈堪称传奇。你获得 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.7LB00jkh6JaJr3vS]{Fascinating Performance} 与 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.lFwfUvH2708rl6i3]{Virtuosic Performer} 技能专长。对于 Virtuosic Performer 技能专长，你的表演类型为舞蹈。对于上述两个你已经拥有的技能专长中的每一个，你获得另一个你选择且满足其先决条件的1级技能专长

Your captivating dances are the stuff of legends. You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.7LB00jkh6JaJr3vS]{Fascinating Performance} and @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.lFwfUvH2708rl6i3]{Virtuosic Performer} skill feats. Your type of performance for the Virtuosic Performer skill feat is dance. For each of those two skill feats you already have, you gain another 1st level skill feat of your choice for which you meet the prerequisites

Doppelganger Weapon Expertise.name: 变形怪武器专精 Doppelganger Weapon Expertise
Doppelganger Weapon Expertise.description:
你完全能够利用你从其他血统中模仿来的武器，使你也能将你进阶的职业训练应用于它们。每当你获得一项职业特性，使你在某些武器上获得专家或更高的熟练度时，你也会在你通过变形怪武器亲和专长获得且你已受训的武器上获得该熟练度。

You are fully able to take advantage of the weapons you've mimicked from other ancestries, allowing you to apply your advanced class training to them as well. Whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency in certain weapons, you also gain that proficiency in weapons from your Doppelganger Weapon Familiarity feat in which you're trained.

Divine Manifestation.name: 神圣显现 Divine Manifestation
Divine Manifestation.description:
你要么拥抱深渊之力，要么完善你叛逆者的身份以引导对立的能量，使你转化为承载阵营能量的容器。你每天可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.hiVL8qsnTJtpouw0]{Divine Vessel}作为神圣先天法术施放一次。

You either embrace Abyssal power or perfect your renegade status to channel opposing energies, transforming you into a vessel for aligned energies. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.hiVL8qsnTJtpouw0]{Divine Vessel} once per day as a divine innate spell.

Fear Of The Abyss.name: 深渊恐惧 Fear Of The Abyss
Fear Of The Abyss.description:
尽管你可能已将深渊抛诸脑后，但你仍能将对深渊的恐惧打入他人的心中。你每天一次可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.4koZzrnMXhhosn0D]{Fear}作为神术先天法术施放。

While you might have left the Abyss behind, you can still strike the fear of the Abyss into the hearts of others. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.4koZzrnMXhhosn0D]{Fear} as a divine innate spell once per day.

Amorphous Protection.name: 无定形防护 Amorphous Protection
Amorphous Protection.description:
你那无定形的身体以非凡的韧性保护着以你的核心为中心的神经系统。每当你受到一次重击时，进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:17]。若成功，它将变为一次普通命中。这不会与加固符文或类似能力叠加。你从最低要害能力获得的对精准伤害的抗力提升至等同于你的等级。

Your amorphous body protects your nervous system, centered on your nucleus, with exceptional resilience. Each time you're critically hit, attempt a @Check[flat|dc:17]. On a success, it becomes a normal hit. This isn't cumulative with the fortification rune or similar abilities. Your resistance to precision damage from the minimal vitals ability increases to be equal to your level.

Massive Consumption.name: 海量吞噬 Massive Consumption
Massive Consumption.description:
你可以吸收大量食物以修复身体。若你狼吞虎咽10分钟，最多吃下相当于1周份量的食物，你获得等同于你的体质调整值 × 你所吃食物的天数份量的生命值。此效果可与任何你从 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Treat Wounds]{Treat Wounds} 获得的治疗累加。在第13等级时，你最多可以吃下相当于10天份量的食物；在第17等级时，你最多可以吃下相当于两周份量的食物。

You can absorb massive amounts of food in order to repair your body. If you gorge for 10 minutes, eating up to 1 week's worth of food, you gain Hit Points equal to your Constitution modifier × the number of days' worth of food. This is cumulative with any healing you receive from @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Treat Wounds]{Treat Wounds}. At 13th level, you can eat up to 10 days' worth of food, and at 17th level you can eat up to two weeks' worth of food.

First Scion.name: 第一裔 First Scion
First Scion.description:
无论你是由一位aes sidhe所生，还是前往他们的妖精家园旅行并食用了他们提供的食物与饮品，sidhe魔法已在你体内苏醒。从奥术或通灵法术列表中选择一个常见戏法，或从你所选列表中选择你有许可的另一个戏法。你可以将该戏法作为所选根源的先天法术随意施放（如常按你的等级一半升阶）。你可以从上方列出的附加专长中选择先决条件为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Item.JQFDxsBN7Jcbt1qE]{Aes Sidhe}传承的sidhe专长。

Whether you were born to an aes sidhe or journeyed to their faerie home and ate and drank of the fare provided, sidhe magic has awakened within you. Choose a common cantrip from the arcane or occult spell list, or another cantrip from the list you chose to which you have access. You can cast this cantrip as an innate spell of the chosen tradition at will (heightened to half your level as normal). You can take sidhe feats from the Additional Feats listed above with a prerequisite of @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Item.JQFDxsBN7Jcbt1qE]{Aes Sidhe} heritage.

Master Nymph Queen Spellcasting.name: 宗师宁芙女王法术施放 Master Nymph Queen Spellcasting
Master Nymph Queen Spellcasting.description:
你与自然融为一体，而自然回应你的召唤，以强大的法术守护你的子民，并将复仇之雨倾泻在那些侵扰你领地之人身上。你获得大师施法的益处。

You are one with nature, and nature answers your call with mighty spells to protect your subjects and rain vengeance upon those who assail your domain. You gain the master spellcasting benefits.

Kick 'Em While They're Down.name: 趁他们倒地时踢一脚 Kick 'Em While They're Down
Kick 'Em While They're Down.description:
你尤其擅长在把敌人击倒在地后痛打他们。对抗 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} 目标时，你的打击在伤害掷骰中获得+2环境加值。

You're especially skilled at beating on foes after knocking them on the ground. Against @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} targets, your Strikes gain a +2 circumstance bonus to damage rolls.

Cait Sidhe Jinx.name: 凯特·西德厄厄运 Cait Sidhe Jinx
Cait Sidhe Jinx.description:
频率 每天一次

你可以诅咒另一个生物，以在一段时间内抵消其幸运。选择30尺内的一个目标生物。该生物必须进行一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗你职业DC或法术DC中较高者。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到诅咒影响，诅咒影响其所有掷骰，持续1轮。除此之外没有其他效果，但由于这是一个厄运效果，它会抵消幸运效果。

失败 如同成功，但诅咒持续并影响其所有掷骰，持续1分钟。

大成功或大失败：失败 如同成功，但诅咒影响其所有掷骰，持续1天，且该生物在持续时间内的攻击掷骰、豁免与技能检定承受–1状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.jZ56j5RLQHMHPWkJ]{效果：Cait Sidhe Jinx（大成功或大失败：失败）}

Frequency once per day

You can jinx another creature to cancel their fortune for a time. Choose a target creature within 30 feet. That creature must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is under the jinx, which affects all its rolls for 1 round. This has no other effect, but since it's a misfortune effect, it cancels fortune effects.

Failure As success, except the jinx lasts affects all its rolls for 1 minute.

Critical Failure As success, except the jinx affects all its rolls for 1 day and the creature takes a –1 status penalty on attack rolls, saving throws, and skill checks for the duration.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.jZ56j5RLQHMHPWkJ]{Effect: Cait Sidhe Jinx (Critical Failure)}

Abyssal Magic.name: 深渊魔法 Abyssal Magic
Abyssal Magic.description:
尽管你已挣脱罪孽的枷锁，你仍拥有来自深渊源头的神圣魔法。选择一个普通的神圣戏法（或另一个你拥有许可的神圣戏法）。你可以将该戏法作为先天神圣法术施放。照常，戏法会自动升阶至你等级的一半，向上取整。

Though you've cast off the fetters of sin, you still have divine magic from an Abyssal source. Choose a common divine cantrip (or another divine cantrip to which you have access). You can cast that cantrip as an innate divine spell. As normal, cantrips are automatically heightened to half your level, rounded up.

Lethal Hair.name: 致命毛发 Lethal Hair
Lethal Hair.description:
你的发蛇通常可能很温顺，但你已经训练它们在必要时如何战斗。如果你没有 @Compendium[battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Bce7vr1KqZKHK1XL]{Fanghair} 传承，你获得一次蛇颚徒手攻击，属于拳斗武器组，造成 [[/r 1d4[piercing]]] 且具有灵巧与娴熟特征。尽管你的蛇会协助蛇颚攻击，但进行攻击的人仍然是你，并且该攻击适用你的所有特殊能力、调整值、加值与减值，包括你的多重攻击减值以及其他许多内容。

如果你拥有fanghair传承，则你改为获得以下益处：你的蛇牙造成1d6 伤害而非1d4，并且如果你在拳斗武器组拥有大成功专精，你可以在通常的拳斗大成功专精效果与来自你传承的持续性毒素伤害之间进行选择。

Your hair snakes might usually be gentle, but you’ve trained them in how to fight when necessary. If you don’t have the @Compendium[battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Bce7vr1KqZKHK1XL]{Fanghair} heritage, you gain a snake jaws unarmed attack in the brawling weapon group that deals [[/r 1d4[piercing]]] and has the agile and finesse traits. Although your snakes help with the snake jaws attack, you’re still the one making the attack, and it applies all your special abilities, modifiers, bonuses, and penalties, including your multiple attack penalty among many others.

If you have the fanghair heritage instead of the above benefit, your snake fangs deal 1d6 damage instead of 1d4, and you can choose between the normal brawling critical specialization effect and the persistent poison damage from your heritage if you have critical specialization in the brawling weapon group.

Nature's Wrath.name: 自然之怒 Nature's Wrath
Nature's Wrath.description:
频率 每小时一次

你与自然的原初连结让你能够将一片林间空地、树林或其他自然区域化为敌人的梦魇。持续1分钟，当你使用自然之怒时，你周围的 @Template[type:emanation|distance:80] 内所有包含植物的方格都变得有害且极难通行，不过仅对你的敌人生效。对你的敌人而言，该区域变为困难地形，而那些由于植物而天然为困难地形的区域也会变为更高等困难地形并同时成为有害地形，使敌人每次进入一个受影响的方格时受到 @Damage[6[毒素]] 伤害。

如果你是星裔或灵光，当你选择此专长时，你可以改为选择影响你周围的空气，仅为飞行生物制造困难地形；若你是星裔，则任何由于空间扭曲的星座而已是困难地形的方格，会提升为更高等困难地形并成为有害地形，造成 @Damage[6[bludgeoning]] 伤害；若你是灵光，则任何由于风而已是困难地形的方格，会提升为更高等困难地形并成为有害地形，造成 @Damage[6[bludgeoning]] 伤害；若你如此选择，且你是星裔，则自然之怒获得传送（特征）而非植物（特征）；若你如此选择，且你是灵光，则自然之怒获得气（特征）而非植物（特征）。如果你是灯侍，当你选择此专长时，你可以改为选择影响该区域内的天然石头，而非植物，且有害地形造成的伤害改为 @Damage[6[piercing]] 而非毒素伤害；若你如此选择，自然之怒获得土（特征）而非植物（特征）。最后，如果你是水灵，当你选择此专长时，你可以改为选择影响你周围的水体，仅为游泳生物制造困难地形；任何由于水流或潮汐而已是困难地形的方格，会提升为更高等困难地形并成为有害地形，造成 @Damage[6[bludgeoning]] 伤害；若你如此选择，自然之怒获得水（特征）而非植物（特征）。

Frequency once per hour

Your primal connection to nature allows you to turn a glade, grove, or other natural area into a nightmare for your foes. For 1 minute, all squares containing plants in an @Template[type:emanation|distance:80] around you when you used Nature's Wrath become hazardous and extremely difficult to navigate, though only to your foes. To your enemies, the area becomes difficult terrain, and areas that were naturally difficult terrain due to plants become greater difficult terrain as well as hazardous terrain, dealing @Damage[6[poison]] damage to an enemy each time it enters an affected square.

If you're an asteria or an aura, when you select this feat, you can instead choose to affect the air around you, creating difficult terrain for flying creatures only which increases to greater difficult terrain and hazardous terrain dealing @Damage[6[bludgeoning]] damage in any squares that were already difficult terrain due to constellations of spatial distortions if you're an asteria or winds if you're an aura; if you do, Nature's Wrath gains the teleportation trait instead of the plant trait if you're an asteria or the air trait instead of the plant trait if you're an aura. If you're a lampad, when you select this feat, you can choose to affect natural stone in the area, instead of plants, and the hazardous terrain deals @Damage[6[piercing]] damage instead of poison damage; if you do, Nature's Wrath gains the earth trait instead of the plant trait. Finally, if you're a naiad, when you select this feat you can instead choose to affect the water around you, creating difficult terrain for swimming creatures only which increases to greater difficult terrain and hazardous terrain dealing @Damage[6[bludgeoning]] damage in any squares that were already difficult terrain due to currents or tides; if you do, Nature's Wrath gains the water trait instead of the plant trait.

Wind's Howl.name: 风之嚎叫 Wind's Howl
Wind's Howl.description:
你的呼啸飞弹响彻云霄，足以伤害敌人的听觉。在一次成功的呼啸飞弹打击命中时，目标必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell]，对抗你的职业或法术DC（取较高者），否则将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋} 1轮；若为大失败，则耳聋 1分钟。若该打击为大成功命中，则改为在强韧豁免失败时耳聋 1分钟，而在大失败时永久耳聋。无论结果如何，之后他们会对你的风之嚎叫的耳聋效果获得暂时免疫 1分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.Zb0BHXXnjZUhs0II]{效果: 风之嚎叫（失败）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.fay9zlSGfizDOMT7]{效果: 风之嚎叫（大失败）}

Your howling missile is so loud, it can damage your foe's hearing. On a successful howling missile Strike, the target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] against your class or spell DC (whichever is higher) or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 round, or 1 minute on a critical failure. If the Strike is a critical hit, they are instead deafened for 1 minute on a failed Fortitude save and permanently deafened on a critical failure. No matter the result, they are then temporarily immune to the deafening effect of your Wind's Howl for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.Zb0BHXXnjZUhs0II]{Effect: Wind's Howl (Failure)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.fay9zlSGfizDOMT7]{Effect: Wind's Howl (Critical Failure)}

Overlord.name: 霸主 Overlord
Overlord.description:
在征服了你个人地城的至少一层，并逐渐明白那一层对你的身份与本质究竟意味着什么之后，你获得了对该层的极端掌控力，足以创造出一处舒适的天堂：怪物会清扫地面、整理床铺，而陷阱则向下延伸来为你的饮品续杯。每日一次，你可以花费1分钟创造一道通往你地城安全区域的门径。入口是一道微弱、闪烁的竖直矩形，宽5英尺、高10英尺。你在施放该法术时指定哪些人可以进入。一旦进入其中，你可以关闭入口，使其隐形。你与被你指定的生物可以随意重新打开这道门，如同打开一扇实体门一样。该门径将持续存在，直到你花费1分钟将其移动到另一处地点。其内部，被你改造成据点的地城楼层会依照你的喜好装饰，但仍会遵循基于你的传承而来的主题（群岛地城对应一座私人岛屿；塔型地城对应一座巨塔的一层；以此类推）。该层的区域取决于你的地城细节以及你所选择的楼层，这些由你的GM决定，但通常其地面空间至少应有1,600平方英尺，而多数地城楼层会显著更大。当你将该层作为你的据点使用时，你会将其与其他入侵者隔绝，使得几乎不可能离开或进入该层，即便是从地城中的其他楼层也不行（通常试图这么做的人会完全绕过该层，直接跳到它之后的下一层）。当外部入口关闭时，外界的效果无法渗透其中，反之亦然，唯有@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Plane Shift}例外，其仍可如常用来进入地城。你只能在那些能够跨越位面的情况下，才能使用探知魔法及类似效果来观察外界。一支怪物的侍从团队会在据点内招待你的宾客，在地城楼层内耕作或以其他方式收集食物，并为宾客烹饪餐食，能够每天提供最多150人份既美味又饱腹的餐点。

特殊 若你拥有陵寝传承，则该专长获得神术（特征）；若你拥有其他人工地城传承（例如迷宫或高塔），则为奥术；若你拥有自然地城传承（例如群岛、洞窟或巨树），则为原初。

After conquering at least one floor of your personal dungeon and coming to learn exactly what that floor means about who and what you are, you've gained extreme control over the floor, enough to create a comfortable paradise, where the monsters clean the floors and make the beds while the traps extend downwards to refill your drinks. Once per day, you can spend 1 minute to create a gateway into the safe portion of your dungeon. The entrance is a faint, shimmering, vertical rectangle 5 feet wide and 10 feet high. You designate who can enter when you cast the spell. Once inside, you can shut the entrance, making it invisible. You and the creatures you designated can reopen the door at will, just like opening a physical door. The gateway lasts until you spend 1 minute to move it to another location. Inside, the dungeon floor you've turned into your stronghold is decorated to match your taste, though it keeps to the theme based on your heritage (a private island for an archipelago dungeon, a floor of a giant tower for a tower dungeon, and so on). The floor's area depends on the specifics of your dungeon and the floor you chose, which are determined by your GM, but they should typically be at least 1,600 square feet of floor space, and most dungeon floors are significantly larger. While using the floor as your stronghold, you sequester it from other intruders, making it virtually impossible to leave or enter the floor, even from other floors in the dungeon (typically those who attempt to do so bypass the floor entirely and skip to the next floor past it). While the entrance from the outside is closed, effects from outside fail to penetrate it, and vice versa, except for @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Plane Shift}, which can be used to enter the dungeon as normal. You can use scrying magic and similar effects to observe the outside only if they're capable of crossing planes. A staff of monsters attends to your guests within the stronghold, works to farm or otherwise collect food on the dungeon floor, and cooks meals for the guests, able to feed delicious and filling meals for up to 150 people a day.

Special This feat gains the divine trait if you have the mausoleum heritage, arcane if you have another artificial dungeon heritage (such as labyrinth or tower) or primal if you have a natural dungeon heritage (such as archipelago, caverns, or tree).

Abyssal Servitor.name: 深渊仆从 Abyssal Servitor
Abyssal Servitor.description:
当你成为反抗自身罪孽的叛逆者时，你带来了一只次级深渊魔宠，它比夸塞特更弱，但忠于你和你的价值观。你获得一只魔宠。它所类似的动物类型由你决定，遵循正常的魔宠规则。

When you became a renegade against your sin, you brought a minor Abyssal familiar along with you, weaker than a quasit but loyal to you and your values. You gain a familiar. The type of animal it resembles is up to you, per the normal familiar rules.

Fey Skin (Sidhe).name: 妖精之肤（希德） Fey Skin (Sidhe)
Fey Skin (Sidhe).description:
你惊人的长寿得以提升，使你获得大幅增强的生存能力与恢复能力，但作为交换，你会承受同样的对冷铁的弱点——这正是困扰非英雄西狄的祸患。你的最大生命值提高，增加量等同于你的等级。若你休息10分钟，你的魔法会维系并恢复你，使你恢复等同于你等级数量的生命值；这与任何你从 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} 恢复的生命值叠加。然而，你获得对冷铁的弱点5。

Your incredible longevity improves to grant you drastically increased survivability and recovery, though in exchange you suffer the same weakness to cold iron that plagues sidhe who aren't heroes. Increase your maximum Hit Points by an amount equal to your level. If you rest for 10 minutes, your magic sustains and recovers you, causing you to regain a number of Hit Points equal to your level; this is cumulative with any Hit Points you regain from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. However, you gain weakness 5 to cold iron.

Infused Criticals.name: 注入式大成功或大失败 Infused Criticals
Infused Criticals.description:
如果你是雅伊，你会为自己最强力的攻击注入能量；否则，你会造成强力的放血效果。以徒手攻击造成大成功时，你会造成 1d4 持续性伤害，其伤害类型取决于你的传承：火焰雅伊为火焰，冰霜雅伊为寒冷，流水雅伊为电击，其他传承则为流血。
