You infuse your most powerful attacks with energy if you're a yai, or a powerful bloodletting otherwise. On a critical hit with an unarmed attack, you deal 1d4 persistent damage with the damage type depending on your heritage: fire for fire yai, cold for ice yai, electricity for water yai, and bleed for other heritages.

Dungeon Vault.name: 地城宝库 Dungeon Vault
Dungeon Vault.description:
你可以将宝藏送入你地城内一个大体安全的宝库，并在之后取回。你可以花费1分钟，将你的宝藏（由总负载不超过你等级的物品组成）送入你地城的宝库；你可以解除该效果来使宝藏返回，否则该效果的持续时间为无限。宝藏不能包含任何生物，即使该生物位于异次元空间中也不行。宝藏的时间照常流逝，并且地城的环境效果也会作用于它。虽然可能性极低，但地城中的某个生物仍有可能偶然发现你的宝库并携带你的宝藏逃走。

You can send treasure into a mostly-secure vault in your dungeon and retrieve it later. You can spend 1 minute to send your treasure, consisting of items with a total amount of Bulk up to your level, into your dungeon's vault; you can Dismiss the effect to return the treasure back, though otherwise the effect has an unlimited duration. The treasure can't contain any creatures, even if the creature is in an extradimensional space. Time passes normally for the treasure, and the environmental effects of the dungeon apply to it. Though very unlikely, it's possible for a creature in the dungeon to stumble upon your vault and make off with your treasure.

Mind Reader.name: 读心者 Mind Reader
Mind Reader.description:
你可以运用你与生俱来的变形怪魔法来探入他人的心智。你每天一次，可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC]{心灵探知}作为奥术先天法术施放。

You can tap into others' minds using your innate doppelganger magic. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC]{Mind Reading} as an arcane innate spell once per day.

Swarm Spit.name: 虫群吐液 Swarm Spit
Swarm Spit.description:
频率 每小时一次

传说帕西淮（Pasiphae），牛头人血脉的第一位女族长，能够将敌人的唾液变成虫群。无论真假，你都继承了这份力量。选择30尺内的一个目标。其唾液化为昆虫，使其在@Template[type:cone|distance:30]中打嗝喷出一团虫群。害虫爬满目标与区域内的所有人，它们的啃咬与蜇刺造成[[/r 2d8[piercing]]]伤害，进行一次@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true]豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。豁免失败的生物还会成为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{反胃 1}。随后昆虫化作尘埃崩散。伤害在12级时提升为[[/r 3d8[piercing]]]，在15级时为[[/r 4d8[piercing]]]，在18级时为[[/r 5d8[piercing]]]。

Frequency once per hour

Legends say that Pasiphae, the first matriarch of the minotaur line, could turn her foe's saliva into swarms of insects. Whether that's true or not, you've inherited that power. Choose a target within 30 feet. Their saliva turns into insects, causing them to belch forth a swarm of insects in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30]. The vermin swarm over the target and anyone in the area, their bites and stings dealing [[/r 2d8[piercing]]] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. A creature that fails its saving throw also becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1}. Then the insects crumble into dust. The damage increases to [[/r 3d8[piercing]]] at 12th level, [[/r 4d8[piercing]]] at 15th level, and [[/r 5d8[piercing]]] at 18th level.

Nature's Flight.name: 自然的飞行 Nature's Flight
Nature's Flight.description:
频率 每日一次

你呼唤微风、星光或日光携你凌空而行。你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度，持续10分钟。若你愿意，你也可以选择长出翅膀，在这种情况下，此次使用自然飞行会获得化形（特征）。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.5pkqWowr8snEjw2Y]{效果：自然飞行}

Frequency once per day

You call upon the breezes, starlight, or sunlight to carry you through the air. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed for 10 minutes. If you wish, you can also choose to grow wings, in which case that use of Nature's Flight gains the morph trait.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.5pkqWowr8snEjw2Y]{Effect: Nature's Flight}

Fey's Shift.name: 妖精移位 Fey's Shift
Fey's Shift.description:
以你自身进行谐调，你可以往返于妖精领域。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{位面间传送} 作为一项原初先天法术，你每周可以施放两次。此能力只能用于在妖精领域与物质位面之间往返旅行。由于你作为宁芙的本质，你可以充当该法术的法术焦点，并且不需要音叉。

Using yourself to attune, you can transport to and from the realm of the fey. You gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Interplanar Teleport} as a primal innate spell, which you can cast twice per week. This can be used only to travel back and forth between the faerie realm and the Material Plane. Due to your nature as a nymph, you can act as the spell focus, and you don't require a tuning fork.

Perfected Change Shape.name: 完美化变形能力 Perfected Change Shape
Perfected Change Shape.description:
你的变形能力使你的伪装极难被识破，即使是在伪装成特定个体时也是如此。当你使用变形怪的伪装变形为任意小型或中型类人生物形态时——包括特定个体的形态，而不仅仅是你偏好的形态之一——你的变形会自动战胜用于判定你是否属于你所变形成的族裔或生物类型的察觉DC（但若你变为特定个体的形态，则不会自动战胜用于判定你是否为该特定个体的察觉DC），并且你的欺瞒DC获得+4状态加值，以防止他人看穿你的伪装。

Your ability to transform makes your disguises extremely difficult to pierce, even when disguising as specific individuals. When using doppelganger's disguise to transform into any Small or Medium humanoid form, including specific individual forms and not just one of your preferred forms, your transformation automatically defeats Perception DCs to determine whether you are a member of the ancestry or creature type into which you transformed (though not to determine whether you are the specific individual in question, if you take the form of a specific individual), and you gain a +4 status bonus to your Deception DC to prevent others from seeing through your disguise.

Serpent Scent.name: 蛇类气味 Serpent Scent
Serpent Scent.description:
你和你的发蛇共享敏锐的蛇类嗅觉，不过有时需要伸出舌头才能最大限度地利用它，这可能会让旁观者感到不安。你和你的发蛇获得气味作为一种模糊感官，最远30尺。这意味着你可以用嗅觉来确定一个生物的确切位置。如果你位于该生物的下风处，GM通常会将射程加倍；如果你位于上风处，则将射程减半。此外，当你试图定位一个位于你气味射程内的未被察觉的生物时，你和你的发蛇在察觉检定上获得+2环境加值。

You and your hair snakes share a keen serpentine sense of scent, though it sometimes requires flicking out your tongue to make the most of it, which might unsettle onlookers. You and your hair snakes gain scent as an imprecise sense out to 30 feet. This means you can use your sense of smell to determine the exact location of a creature. The GM will usually double the range if you're downwind from the creature or halve the range if you're upwind. In addition, you and your hair snakes gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks whenever you're trying to locate an undetected creature that is within the range of your scent.

Illusory Facade.name: 幻象外观 Illusory Facade
Illusory Facade.description:
当你破坏一件物品时，你可以用幻术将其遮掩，使其看起来状况良好。在你完成对一个体型不超过10英尺×10英尺×10英尺的物体的破坏行为后，你用一层“如常”的幻术包裹它；你一次只能以这种方式伪装一个这样的物体。与处于你伪装之下的物品互动的生物，或花费动作仔细观察它的生物，可以尝试识破该幻术，并进行一次@Check[perception|against:class-spell]检定，对抗你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者。

When you sabotage an item, you can make it appear to be in good condition by covering it from an illusion. After completing an act of sabotage on an object no more than 10 feet by 10 feet by 10 feet in size, you swathe it in an illusion of normalcy; you can have only one such object disguised in this way. Creatures who interact with an item under your facade or spend actions observing it carefully can attempt to disbelieve the illusion, with a @Check[perception|against:class-spell] check against the higher of your class DC and spell DC.

Fated Strike.name: 宿命打击 Fated Strike
Fated Strike.description:
频率 每日一次

你向命运呼唤，为你的下一次攻击注入对你故事而言更深的意义，从而提高你命中的机会。首先大声描述你这次攻击的重要性，将其奉为你个人叙事中的神圣一击。由于“命定打击”没有听觉（特征），因此其他人能否听见你说话并不重要，只要你与命运知晓即可。若你如此做，那么在你的回合结束前，下次你进行一次攻击掷骰时，你掷两次并使用较佳结果。该攻击无视攻击掷骰的环境罚值，以及由于目标处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{隐蔽}或@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{躲藏}而需要进行的任何纯骰检定。

Frequency once per day

You call out to Fate, imbuing your next attack with additional meaning to your story, and thus increasing your chance to land it. First describe the importance of your attack aloud, sanctifying it in your own personal narrative. Since Fated Strike doesn't have the auditory trait, it's not important whether anyone else can hear you speak, as long as you and Fate know. If you do, then the next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll the attack twice and use the better result. The attack ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll and any flat check required due to the target being @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{Concealed} or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden}.

Bioluminescent Mimic.name: 生物发光拟形怪 Bioluminescent Mimic
Bioluminescent Mimic.description:
你已进化出生物发光，这能帮助你拟态那些会发光或散发光芒的物体。你可以持续发光，获得@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{Light}法术的效果。你可以花费一个单动作（具有专注（特征））来停止发光或再次开始发光。处于物体形态时，你可以控制生物发光从何处显现，以便成功伪装成只应在某些部位发光的物体。

You've developed bioluminescence, which can help you mimic objects that give off light or glow. You can constantly glow with the effects of the @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{Light} spell. You can spend a single action, which has the concentrate trait, to stop the glow or to start it again. When in an object form, you can control where the bioluminescence emerges to successfully disguise as an object that should only glow in some portions.

Snares And Sabotage.name: 陷阱与破坏 Snares And Sabotage
Snares And Sabotage.description:
你对新型圈套和陷阱的点子多到快要溢出来，闲暇时总是用手边能找到的任何材料不断地布置它们。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.4MUbwilvb9dI0X59]{Snarecrafter Dedication} 专长，即使你通常在从你当前的变体中取得更多专长之前不能再选择另一个奉献专长。

You're bursting at the seams with ideas for new snares and traps, constantly setting them up in your spare time with whatever materials you can find on hand. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.4MUbwilvb9dI0X59]{Snarecrafter Dedication} feat, even if you normally couldn't take another dedication feat until you take more feats from your current archetype.

Labyrinth Sight.name: 迷宫视界 Labyrinth Sight
Labyrinth Sight.description:
你能够在昏暗环境中视物，更容易在地下迷宫中导航。你获得昏暗视觉；如果你已经拥有昏暗视觉，则改为获得黑暗视觉。

You can see in low-light environments, making it easier to navigate subterranean mazes. You gain low-light vision, or darkvision if you already have low-light vision.

Share Slithering Senses.name: 共享滑行感官 Share Slithering Senses
Share Slithering Senses.description:
你与蛇魔宠之间的联系——它最初是你自己身体的一部分——让你更容易共享你的感官。你获得共享感官大师能力，并且它不计入你通常的魔宠能力上限。此外，由于你与作为你自身头发一部分的蛇之间的共感纽带，当使用该能力时，你可以维持专注长达10分钟，而不是仅能维持1分钟。

Your connection to your snake familiar, which was originally a part of your own body, makes it much easier for you to share your senses. You gain the share senses master ability, and it doesn't count against your usual limit of familiar abilities. Furthermore, due to your sympathetic bond with the snake as part of your own hair, when using that ability, you sustain the concentration for up to 10 minutes, instead of only up to 1 minute.

Omega Charge.name: 欧米伽充能 Omega Charge
Omega Charge.description:
频率 每日一次

你可以用能量强化自身并冲锋穿过敌人，造成巨量伤害。沿直线进行三次疾走，无视困难地形与更大困难地形，并穿过路径上任何生物的空间，对这些生物造成[[/r 18d6[piercing]]]伤害（若你是长巨角牛头人，你也可以选择造成钝击伤害），并令其进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true] 豁免，对抗你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者。你的移动不会触发反应动作（）。

Frequency once per day

You can empower yourself with energy and charge through foes, dealing massive damage. Stride three times in a straight line, ignoring difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain and moving through the spaces of any creatures in your way, dealing those creatures [[/r 18d6[piercing]]] damage (or you can choose to deal bludgeoning damage if you're a great horned minotaur) with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC. Your movement doesn't trigger reactions.

Faerie Ring Transport.name: 仙灵环传送 Faerie Ring Transport
Faerie Ring Transport.description:
据传各类妖精会通过蘑菇环来传送自身，这种蘑菇环也被称为妖精之环或妖精圆环。多亏了这些故事的力量，你找到了一种方法，能借助魔法与残留的叙事在它们之间真正传送自己。你每天可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.F1qxaqsEItmBura2]{Tree Stride}作为一次天生的原始法术施放一次，但你不是在两棵树之间传送，而是在两个妖精之环之间传送。

Faeries of all sorts are rumored to transport themselves via rings of mushrooms, also known as faerie rings or faerie circles, and thanks to the power of those stories, you have found a way to actually transport yourself between them using magic and the lingering narrative. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.F1qxaqsEItmBura2]{Tree Stride} as an innate primal spell once per day, except that instead of transporting between two trees, you transport between two faerie rings.

Twilighttouched.name: 暮光之触 Twilighttouched
Twilighttouched.description:
作为一位源自或与赫斯珀里得斯有所联系的存在，日落对你而言是一个特殊的时代。你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.JfYyuKoVJLjruKS4]{制造金苹果}行动。你可以从上方列出的额外专长中选择任何先决条件为赫斯珀里德传承的宁芙专长。

As one descended from or connected to hesperides, the sunset is a special time for you. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.JfYyuKoVJLjruKS4]{Create Golden Apple} activity. You can take nymph feats from the Additional Feats listed above with a prerequisite of hesperid heritage.

Martial Culture.name: 武艺文化 Martial Culture
Martial Culture.description:
随着斯忒诺探索成为斯忒诺意味着什么，并在世界各地发展文化，在你的地区，这种文化的一部分与该地区其他族裔的武艺训练与武器使用的根源相交织。选择一把罕见的简易或军用武器，其特征与您成长地区的主导族裔（例如矮人、地精或兽人）相对应，或是在你成长的文化或地区中常见。你获得对该武器的许可，并且在决定你的熟练度时，该武器视为一把简易武器。如果你受训于所有军用武器，你可以选择一把具有此类特征的罕见高级武器。你获得对该武器的许可，并且在决定你的熟练度时，该武器视为一把军用武器。

As sthenos explore what it means to be a stheno and develop cultures throughout the world, in your region, part of that culture intersects with the tradition of martial training and weapon use of other ancestries from the region. Choose an uncommon simple or martial weapon with a trait corresponding to the prevailing ancestry in the region where you grew up (such as dwarf, goblin, or orc) or that is common in the culture or region where you grew up. You gain access to that weapon, and for the purpose of determining your proficiency, that weapon is a simple weapon. If you are trained in all martial weapons, you can choose an uncommon advanced weapon with such a trait. You gain access to that weapon, and for the purpose of determining your proficiency, that weapon is a martial weapon.

Rejuvenating Shapeshifting.name: 焕新变形 Rejuvenating Shapeshifting
Rejuvenating Shapeshifting.description:
你的身体不断变形以修复伤势、治疗伤害，并从其他伤害中恢复。如果你休息10分钟，你获得等于你的体质调整值 × 你等级的一半的[[/r (floor(@actor.level/2)*@actor.abilities.con.mod)[healing]]]{生命值}。这与任何你从@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Treat Wounds]{治疗伤口}获得的治疗是累加的。

Your body is constantly shapeshifting itself to repair injuries, heal damage, and recover from other harm. If you rest for 10 minutes, you gain [[/r (floor(@actor.level/2)*@actor.abilities.con.mod)[healing]]]{Hit Points} equal to your Constitution modifier × half your level. This is cumulative with any healing you receive from @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Treat Wounds]{Treat Wounds}.

Dungeon Magic.name: 地城魔法 Dungeon Magic
Dungeon Magic.description:
你能够将法术从你的地城中引入你的化身，赋予你一个戏法。选择一个戏法：如果你是陵墓，则从神圣法术列表中选择；如果你拥有迷宫或高塔传承（或其他人工地城），则从奥术法术列表中选择；如果你拥有群岛、洞窟、利维坦或巨树传承（或其他自然地城），则从原初法术列表中选择。你可以将此戏法作为一个天生法术来施放，并依适当情况视为奥术、神圣或原初。

You are able to draw forth spells from your dungeon into your avatar, granting you a cantrip. Choose a cantrip from the divine spell list, if you’re a mausoleum, the arcane spell list, if you have the labyrinth or tower heritage (or other artificial dungeon), or the primal spell list if you have the archipelago, caverns, leviathan, or tree heritage (or other natural dungeon). You can cast this cantrip as an innate spell, either arcane, divine, or primal as appropriate.

Phenomenal Fin Wings.name: 惊异鳍翼 Phenomenal Fin Wings
Phenomenal Fin Wings.description:
你的鳍也同样能像翅膀一样发挥作用。你永久获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度，并且当你使用 Haniver Wind Rider 时，你获得对你飞行速度的+20英尺状态加值，持续10分钟。

Your fins serve equally well as wings. You permanently gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed, and when you use Haniver Wind Rider, you gain a +20-foot status bonus to your fly Speed for 10 minutes instead.

Chitinous Reinforcement.name: 甲壳加固 Chitinous Reinforcement
Chitinous Reinforcement.description:
你已学会用更厚的几丁质强化你所有的形态，即使你仍然看起来像一件普通的物体。你的几丁质属于板甲护甲组的中型护甲，给予AC+4物品加值、敏捷上限+1、检定减值–2、速度减值–5尺，以及力量值16。你永远不能穿戴其他护甲或移除你的几丁质；然而，你仍不会因睡眠而陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fatigued]{Fatigued}。最后，你可以如常将护甲符文蚀刻到你的几丁质上。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-equipment.Item.L8l8BAdTaMdww44I]{几丁质}

You've learned to reinforce all your forms with thicker chitin, even while you still appear like an ordinary object. Your chitin is medium armor in the plate armor group that grants a +4 item bonus to AC, a Dex cap of +1, a check penalty of –2, a speed penalty of –5 feet, and a Strength value of 16. You can never wear other armor or remove your chitin; however, you still don't become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fatigued]{Fatigued} from sleeping. Finally, you can etch armor runes onto your chitin as normal.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-equipment.Item.L8l8BAdTaMdww44I]{Chitin}

Misleading Split.name: 误导性分裂 Misleading Split
Misleading Split.description:
频率 每天一次

你看起来像是分裂成了自己的两半，但实际上，它们都是假的，而你会变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{隐形}，至多 1 分钟。每轮，在你的回合，你必须花费一个带有专注（特征）的单动作，以在心智中指示你的复制体在该轮要遵循的行动方针。如果你没有花费该动作，整个效果结束。如果你确实花费了该动作，你的复制体会如同拥有你完整数量的动作那样行动，尽管它们实际上无法对环境中的任何事物造成影响。复制体与你的隐形都会在效果的持续时间内持续存在。进行敌对动作不会结束隐形，就像一个 4 环的 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形} 法术一样。一个判定这些复制体是幻象的生物不一定知道你处于隐形状态，而一个能看见你隐形形体的生物也不一定知道你的复制体是幻象。

如果你施放法术、攻击，或以其他方式与另一名生物互动，作为该动作的一部分，你可以尝试进行一次 @Check[deception] 检定，对抗观察者的察觉 DC，以使他们相信是你的某个复制体使用了该动作。这无法欺骗任何知道你的复制体是幻象的人；而且如果该攻击显然不可能来自复制体，也不会生效。例如，如果你发射一道射线，你可以让它看起来像是从复制体发出的，只要复制体的位置合适；但如果你用假足攻击，而你的复制体在房间的另一边、远离目标，你的欺瞒检定将自动失败。

Frequency once per day

You appear to split into two halves of yourself, but in reality, both of them are fakes and you turn @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible} for up to 1 minute. Each round, on your turn, you must spend a single action, which has the concentrate trait, in order to mentally dictate a course of action for your duplicates to follow that round. If you don't spend the action, the entire effect ends. If you do spend the action, your duplicates act as though they had your full number of actions, though they can't actually affect anything in the environment. Both the duplicates and your invisibility persist for the effect's duration. Performing a hostile action doesn't end the invisibility, just like a 4th-level @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} spell. A creature that determines the duplicates are illusions doesn't necessarily know you're invisible, and one that can see your invisible form doesn't necessarily know your duplicates are illusions.

If you Cast a Spell, attack, or otherwise interact with another creature, as a part of that action you can attempt a @Check[deception] check against observers' Perception DCs to convince them one of your duplicates used that action. This doesn't fool anyone who's aware your duplicate is an illusion, nor does it work if the attack obviously couldn't have come from the duplicate. For instance, if you fired a ray, you could make it look like it came from the duplicate as long as the duplicate was positioned appropriately, but if you attacked with a pseudopod and your duplicate was across the room from the target, your Deception check would automatically fail.

Stunning Screech.name: 震慑尖啸 Stunning Screech
Stunning Screech.description:
你发出极其刺耳的尖啸，使附近的非恶魔陷入震慑。所有位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内的非恶魔必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗的DC等于你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者，并产生以下效果。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}。

大成功或大失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3}。

You emit an incredibly shrill screech, stunning non-demons nearby. All non-demons within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against a DC equal to the higher of your class DC and your spell DC, with the following effects.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3}.

Cu Sidhe Bark.name: 库·西德吠叫 Cu Sidhe Bark
Cu Sidhe Bark.description:
你的吠声极其响亮，远处也能听见，警告所有听到的人别挡你的路。你可以在一分钟内以一个行动连续吠叫三次，而这些吠声最远可在三英里外被听见。有些文化迷信认为，如果他们在你第三次吠叫前没能找到掩蔽，就会发生不好的事。由GM酌情决定，相信这种迷信的人在听到你的吠声时可能会趴下寻找掩蔽

Your bark is so loud it can be heard at great distances, warning all who hear it to get out of your way. You can let out a series of three barks, as an activity over the course of a minute, and the barks can be heard up to three miles away. Some cultures have superstitions that something bad will happen if they don't find cover by the time you make the third bark. At the GM's discretion, those who believe in such superstitions might duck for cover when they hear your barking

Nymph Shot.name: 宁芙射击 Nymph Shot
Nymph Shot.description:
你将自身灌注以远距离操控自然的能力，依据你的传承获得一种新的远程徒手攻击：

Asteria：你获得“流星”徒手攻击，造成1d6钝击伤害，并具有推进与传送（特征）特征，射程增量为20尺。你的“流星”徒手攻击属于斗殴武器组。

灵光：你获得“疾风”徒手攻击，造成1d6钝击伤害，并具有推进特征，射程增量为20尺。你的“疾风”徒手攻击属于斗殴武器组。

Dryad：你获得“飞叶”徒手攻击，造成1d6挥砍伤害，并具有推进特征，射程增量为20尺。你的“飞叶”徒手攻击属于斗殴武器组。

Epimelid：你获得“灌注果实”徒手攻击，造成1d6钝击伤害，并具有推进特征，射程增量为20尺。你的“灌注果实”徒手攻击属于斗殴武器组。

Hesperid：你获得“落日光线”徒手攻击，造成1d6火焰伤害并额外造成1点正能量伤害，射程增量为20尺。提醒一下，额外伤害不属于武器伤害骰的一部分，也不会随着强击符文或类似效果而增加。你的“落日光线”徒手攻击属于斗殴武器组。

Lampad：你获得“光之鬼火”徒手攻击，造成1d6火焰伤害并额外造成1点心灵伤害，射程增量为20尺。提醒一下，额外伤害不属于武器伤害骰的一部分，也不会随着强击符文或类似效果而增加。你的“光之鬼火”徒手攻击属于斗殴武器组。

Maenad：你获得“酒液飞溅”徒手攻击，造成1d6毒素伤害并额外造成1点持续毒素伤害，射程增量为20尺。提醒一下，额外伤害不属于武器伤害骰的一部分，也不会随着强击符文或类似效果而增加。你的“酒液飞溅”徒手攻击属于斗殴武器组。

Naiad：你获得“崩涌浪潮”徒手攻击，造成1d6钝击伤害，并具有推进特征，射程增量为20尺。你的“崩涌浪潮”徒手攻击属于斗殴武器组。

You imbue yourself with the ability to manipulate nature at a distance, granting you a new ranged unarmed attack based on your heritage:

Asteria: You gain a shooting star unarmed attack, which deals 1d6 bludgeoning damage and has the propulsive and teleportation traits and a range increment of 20 feet. Your shooting star unarmed attack is in the brawling weapon group.

Aura: You gain a gust unarmed attack, which deals 1d6 bludgeoning damage and has the propulsive trait and a range increment of 20 feet. Your gust unarmed attack is in the brawling weapon group.

Dryad: You gain a leaves unarmed attack, which deals 1d6 slashing damage and has the propulsive trait and a range increment of 20 feet. Your leaves unarmed attack is in the brawling weapon group.

Epimelid: You gain an infused fruit unarmed attack, which deals 1d6 bludgeoning damage and has the propulsive trait and a range increment of 20 feet. Your infused fruit unarmed attack is in the brawling weapon group.

Hesperid: You gain a sunset ray unarmed attack, which deals 1d6 fire damage and 1 additional positive damage, and has a range increment of 20 feet. As a reminder, additional damage is not part of the weapon damage die, and doesn't increase with a striking rune or similar effects. Your sunset ray unarmed attack is in the brawling weapon group.

Lampad: You gain a light wisp unarmed attack, which deals 1d6 fire damage and 1 additional mental damage, and has a range increment of 20 feet. As a reminder, additional damage is not part of the weapon damage die, and doesn't increase with a striking rune or similar effects. Your light wisp unarmed attack is in the brawling weapon group.

Maenad: You gain a wine splash unarmed attack, which deals 1d6 poison damage and 1 additional persistent poison damage, and has a range increment of 20 feet. As a reminder, additional damage is not part of the weapon damage die, and doesn't increase with a striking rune or similar effects. Your wine splash unarmed attack is in the brawling weapon group.

Naiad: You gain a crashing wave unarmed attack, which deals 1d6 bludgeoning damage and has the propulsive trait and a range increment of 20 feet. Your crashing wave unarmed attack is in the brawling weapon group.

Instinctive Strikes.name: 本能打击 Instinctive Strikes
Instinctive Strikes.description:
频率 每小时一次

你将本能化作武器，并与速度武器的力量相连，使你能毫不费力地挥砍、刺击或射击。用你自己进行一次打击。持续1分钟，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{迅捷（状态）}，并且你可以使用这额外的动作用你自己进行一次打击。如果你处于无生命模式，或你是一个物品的智能武器，你不会进行打击，而是你的持用者获得迅捷（状态）而非你。

Frequency once per hour

You connect to your instincts as a weapon and the power of speed weapons, causing you to swing, stab, or shoot effortlessly. Make a Strike with yourself. For 1 minute, you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}, and you can use the extra action to make a Strike with yourself. If you're in inanimate mode or you're an item intelligent weapon, you don't make a Strike, and your wielder gains the quickened condition instead of you.

Utile Arms.name: 多用武器臂 Utile Arms
Utile Arms.description:
你那幻象般显现的手臂仍然稍纵即逝，但它们可以执行更广泛种类的动作。你显现的手能够执行简单的交互动作，例如打开一扇未上锁的门。它们无法执行需要显著手部灵巧度或持续的物理存在的动作，包括任何需要通过检定才能完成的动作，并且你不能用它来持握物品。此外，即使你的正常双手都被占用，你也可以使用显现的手臂来进行 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Disarm]{Disarm} 或 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Trip]{Trip}。和显现手臂一样，这永远不会给你一只空手，因此它也不允许你使用任何需要空手的能力。

Your phantasmal manifested arms are still fleeting, but they can perform a wider variety of actions. Your manifested hands can perform simple Interact actions, such as opening an unlocked door. They can't perform actions that require significant manual dexterity or persistent physical presence, including any action that would require a check to accomplish, and you can't use it to hold items. Additionally, you can use the manifested arms to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Disarm]{Disarm} or @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Trip]{Trip} even if your normal hands are full. Like Manifested Arms, this doesn't ever give you a free hand, so it doesn't allow you to use any abilities that require one.

Insidious Mimic.name: 阴险的拟形怪 Insidious Mimic
Insidious Mimic.description:
当你使用魔法时，几乎不可能有人能判断你实际上是一只拟形怪。除非某个效果的反制等级为10或更高，否则侦测与揭示效果会侦测或揭示与你当前形态相符的结果，而非真实信息。举例来说，如果你伪装成一张桌子，那么侦测阵营的法术与特殊感官不会揭示任何阵营（因为桌子不应有阵营），而9环或更低的@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{True Seeing}会将你的桌子形态显示为真实。

It's almost impossible for anyone to determine you're actually a mimic when using magic. Detection and revelation effects detect or reveal the results appropriate for your form rather than the true information unless the effect has a counteract level of 10 or higher. For instance, if you were disguised as a table, spells and special senses that detect alignments wouldn't reveal any alignment (since a table shouldn't have an alignment), and a 9th-level or lower @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{True Seeing} would show your table form as true.

Expert Nymph Queen Spellcasting.name: 专家宁芙女王施法 Expert Nymph Queen Spellcasting
Expert Nymph Queen Spellcasting.description:
当你精通了与自然沟通的能力后，你触及了流经大地的更深层魔法，而大地也赋予了你更强的魔法能力。你获得专家法术施放的收益。

特殊 若你也拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.TfnrKFWqy0RLy0Wk]{Queen's Dweomers} 族裔专长，你将该专长的3环与4环法术与基础与专家宁芙法术施放中的法术合并。如此一来，来自Queen's Dweomers的法术不再是原初先天法术；取而代之，Queen's Dweomers会授予你额外的法术位，你可以通过宁芙女王变体每日准备这些法术位：一个3环与一个4环。

As you've mastered your ability to commune with nature, you've tapped into the deeper magic coursing through the land, and the land has provided you with greater magical abilities. You gain the expert spellcasting benefits.

Special If you also have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.TfnrKFWqy0RLy0Wk]{Queen's Dweomers} ancestry feat, you combine the 3rd- and 4th-level spells from that feat with the ones from Basic and Expert Nymph Spellcasting. When you do, the spells from Queen's Dweomers are no longer primal innate spells; instead, Queen's Dweomers grants you additional spell slots you can prepare each day with the nymph queen archetype, one of 3rd-level and one of 4th-level.

Hesperid Queen's Beauty.name: 赫斯珀里得女王之美 Hesperid Queen's Beauty
Hesperid Queen's Beauty.description:
你的美貌会使附近的生物因敬畏而目眩神迷。任何在其回合结束时位于你10尺以内的生物都必须尝试一次意志豁免，对抗你的原始法术DC。若失败，他们会成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}；若大失败，他们会成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}。随后，他们在1分钟内暂时免疫。你可以使用一个带有专注（特征）的单动作来开启或关闭此灵光，并且你可以选择不影响你的盟友。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.v2AgmyiWLYVZ7YfV]{效果：赫斯珀里得女王之美（失败）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.h0aFEvTqa159OD7v]{效果：赫斯珀里得女王之美（大失败）}

Your beauty causes nearby creatures to become transfixed in awe. Any creature that ends its turn within 10 feet of you must attempt a Will save against your primal spell DC. On a failure they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, and on a critical failure, they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}. They are then temporarily immune for 1 minute. You can turn this aura on or off using a single action, which has the concentrate trait, and you can choose not to affect your allies.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.v2AgmyiWLYVZ7YfV]{Effect: Hesperid Queen's Beauty (Failure)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.h0aFEvTqa159OD7v]{Effect: Hesperid Queen's Beauty (Critical Failure)}

Giant Shift.name: 巨人位移 Giant Shift
Giant Shift.description:
当你以变形怪的易容进行伪装时，你可以伪装成一名大型类人生物。若你这么做，只要你继续这样做，你也会获得@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge}法术的效果。每天一次，你可以以变形怪的易容进行伪装，使自己伪装成一名超大型类人生物，持续5分钟。在此期间，你获得一个4环Enlarge的效果。不同于其他未列出持续时间的伪装用途，当你伪装成一名超大型生物时，整个伪装会在5分钟后结束。当它结束时，你会恢复为你所选择的自然形态或你的偏好形态。

When you Impersonate with doppelganger's disguise, you can disguise as a Large humanoid. If you do, you also gain the effects of the @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} spell as long as you continue to do so. Once per day, you can Impersonate with doppelganger's disguise to disguise as a Huge humanoid for 5 minutes. During this time, you gain the effects of a 4th-level Enlarge. Unlike other uses of Impersonate which have no listed duration, when you disguise as a Huge creature, the entire disguise ends after 5 minutes. When it does, so you revert to your choice of your natural form or your preferred form.

Mimic Lore.name: 拟形怪学识 Mimic Lore
Mimic Lore.description:
你要么拥有构成你的孢子所携带的祖先记忆，要么在后来的生活中投入精力去更多了解拟形怪。你获得运动和欺瞒的受训（熟练度）。如果你本来会自动在这些技能之一上成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训（熟练度）。你还获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 专长，所对应的为拟形怪学识。

You either possessed ancestral memories from the spores that formed you, or else you spent effort later in life to learn more about mimics. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Athletics and Deception. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat in Mimic Lore.

Slime Lore.name: 黏液怪学识 Slime Lore
Slime Lore.description:
你曾从各种离奇的来源寻求更多信息，试图理解你的自我意识以及它如何诞生，同时也研究你黏液怪身体运动的运动学。你在运动和奥秘学中获得受训（熟练度）熟练度等级。如果你会自动在其中一项技能中成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训。你在黏液怪学识中获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 专长。

You have sought more information to try to understand your sapience and how it came to be from a variety of bizarre sources, while also studying the kinematics of your slime body's motions. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Athletics and Occultism. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat in Slime Lore.

Oni Magic.name: 恶鬼魔法 Oni Magic
Oni Magic.description:
尽管你已成为恶鬼，你仍保有自然世界的魔法。选择一个普通的原初戏法（或另一个你拥有许可的原初戏法）。你可以将该戏法作为一种先天原初法术施放。如常，戏法会自动升阶至你等级的一半，向上取整。

Despite becoming an oni, you retain magic of the natural world. Choose a common primal cantrip (or another primal cantrip to which you have access). You can cast that cantrip as an innate primal spell. As normal, cantrips are automatically heightened to half your level, rounded up.

Athletic Marauder.name: 运动劫掠者 Athletic Marauder
Athletic Marauder.description:
当你蹂躏你的敌人时，你可以掺入一套运动类战技，而不是仅仅撕咬、扯裂并痛击他们。当你进行蹂躏时，你可以将一次或多次攻击替换为擒抱、推撞或绊摔，顺序任意。例如，你可以先@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔}一个敌人，然后对其打击两次。照常而言，如果你@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}一个敌人，并且在你的蹂躏完成前没有跟随他们，导致他们离开你的触及，你就无法从你的蹂躏中采取剩余的动作。

When you ravage your foes, you can mix in a mixture of athletic maneuvers rather than simply rip, tear, and batter them. When you Ravage, you can replace one or more of the attacks with Grapples, Shoves, or Trips, in any order. For instance, you could @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} a foe first, then Strike them twice. As normal, if you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} a foe and don't follow them before your Ravage is complete, causing them to leave your reach, you can't take the remaining actions from your Ravage.

Jinkin Tinker.name: 金金工匠 Jinkin Tinker
Jinkin Tinker.description:
你与另外五名金奇人（他们不需要拥有此专长）可以协作1小时，在60尺射程内将一个魔法物品灌注上诅咒。尽管该过程耗时很长，但也很不显眼，并且可以在你进行躲藏时施行。该诅咒使该物品变得不可靠（@Check[flat|dc:5]，否则浪费任何用于启动、用其进行攻击或以其他方式使用该物品的动作）。由GM酌情决定，这些金奇人工匠也许能够施加其他威力相近的诅咒。

在9级时，总共只需要3名金奇人即可诅咒一个物品，且过程只需10分钟。在13级时，总共只需要2名金奇人，并且你可以选择让过程只需1分钟，作为交换，若该物品有人持用，你将允许其进行一次对抗你职业DC或法术DC中较高者的@Check[will|against:class-spell]豁免；豁免成功将抵消该诅咒。在17级时，你可以独自诅咒一个物品，并且若你选择允许对有人持用的物品进行意志豁免，则该过程只需要一个三动作行动。如常，移除你的诅咒需要@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]{净化苦难}或类似的魔法。

You and five other jinkins (who don't need to have this feat) can work together for an hour to imbue a magic item with a curse at a range of 60 feet. While this process is lengthy, it's also unobtrusive and can be performed while Hiding. The curse makes the item unreliable (@Check[flat|dc:5] or waste any action to Activate, attack with, or otherwise use the item). At the GM's discretion, the jinkins tinkers might be able to impart some other curse of a similar caliber.

At 9th level, only 3 jinkins total are required to curse an item and the process only takes 10 minutes. At 13th level, only 2 jinkins total are required and you can choose to have the process only take 1 minute, in exchange for allowing a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC if the item is attended, with a successful saving throw negating the curse. At 17th level, you can curse an item on your own and if you choose to allow a Will save for attended items, the process only requires a three-action activity. As normal, a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]{Cleanse Affliction} or similar magic is required to remove your curse.

Flowing Omox.name: 涌流欧莫克斯 Flowing Omox
Flowing Omox.description:
虽然你的形态比深渊奥莫克斯更为坚实，但你已训练自己恢复曾经的能力，能够在水中啪嗒作响并流动穿行。你获得10尺的游泳速度。

While your form is more solid than Abyssal omoxes, you've trained yourself to regain your old ability to splorch and flow through water. You gain a swim Speed of 10 feet.

Shift Claw.name: 移位爪 Shift Claw
Shift Claw.description:
你可以将你的爪子变形为数种构型，每一种都有其特定的优势与劣势。直到你下一次使用 Shift Claw，或你变形为没有可见爪子的形态为止，从下列选项中选择一项：

  • 你的爪子变得巨大，带有修长的刃片，既能轻易穿刺也能轻易劈砍。你的爪子造成 1d8 挥砍伤害，并获得多用穿刺特征，但它失去灵巧特征。
  • 你的爪子变得更小更薄，更易用于后续攻击或缴械，同时依然同样危险。你的爪子获得敏捷与缴械特征。
  • 你的爪子变得更大并向外展开，使你能够在积蓄动能的同时进行横扫攻击。你的爪子获得横扫与强力特征，但它失去灵巧特征。
  • 你的爪子变得格外锋利、穿刺且致命。它获得致命 d8 与多用穿刺特征。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.SX31kqEXaaQUNsIa]{效果: Shift Claw}

You can transform your claws into several configurations, each of which has specific strengths and weaknesses. Until the next time you use Shift Claw or you shift forms to not have a visible claw, choose one of the following:

  • Your claw becomes oversized, with lengthy blades that can pierce as easily as slash. Your claw deals 1d8 slashing damage and gains the versatile piercing trait, but it loses the finesse trait.
  • Your claw becomes smaller and thinner, easier to use in follow- up attacks or to disarm, while still being no less dangerous. Your claw gains the agile and disarm traits.
  • Your claw becomes larger and fans out, allowing you to make sweeping attacks while building momentum. Your claw gains the sweep and forceful traits, but it loses the finesse trait.
  • Your claw becomes especially sharp, piercing, and deadly. It gains the deadly d8 and versatile piercing traits.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.SX31kqEXaaQUNsIa]{Effect: Shift Claw}

Trickster's Shuffle.name: 诡术师的洗牌 Trickster's Shuffle
Trickster's Shuffle.description:
频率 每日一次

在任何人能做出反应之前，你重新定位自己，以抵达你阴谋或逃避后果的完美位置。你可以从下列动作中选择两次（你可以两次选择同一个动作，或选择两个不同动作）：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}、站起、踏步或疾行。若你拥有合适的速度，你可以将掘地、攀爬、飞行或游泳加入此列表。你的移动不会触发其他生物的反应动作（）——这些反应动作（）通常会被移动触发，例如借机攻击。

Frequency once per day

Before anyone can react, you reposition yourself to reach the perfect spot for your scheme or escape the consequences. You can take your choice of the following actions twice (you can choose the same action twice or two different actions): @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}, Stand, Step, or Stride. If you have an appropriate Speed, you can add Burrow, Climb, Fly, or Swim to this list. Your movement doesn't trigger other creatures' reactions that would normally be triggered by movement, such as Attack of Opportunity.

Startouched.name: 星触 Startouched
Startouched.description:
星辰或其星灵守护者赐福于你，使你拥有属于自己的引路星。你获得指引戏法，它是一个原始先天戏法。照常，戏法会升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）。你可以从上方列出的附加专长中选择先决条件为星灵传承的宁芙专长。

The stars or their asteria protectors have blessed you with a guiding star of your own. You gain the guidance cantrip is a primal innate cantrip. As normal, a cantrip is heightened to half your level, rounded up. You can take nymph feats from the Additional Feats listed above with a prerequisite of asteria heritage.

Water Font.name: 水之圣池 Water Font
Water Font.description:
频率 每小时一次

你将双手捧在一起，六加仑的淡水从中泼洒而出。若无人饮用，这些水会在1小时后蒸发。

Frequency once per hour

You cup your hands together, and six gallons of fresh water spills out. If no one drinks it, the water evaporates after 1 hour.

Glued Grip.name: 黏胶握柄 Glued Grip
Glued Grip.description:
与你所有的冒险拟形怪同类一样，你已调整了你的黏着物质以便更轻松地四处移动；即便如此，你也学会了在静止站立时选择性地让它与地面接触，以及让它与手中握持的物品接触。你获得+2环境加值，适用于对抗试图@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Shove]{Shove}你或通过强迫移动将你从你的位置移开的尝试的豁免与DC，以及对抗试图@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Disarm]{Disarm}你的尝试。此外，如果任何效果将迫使你移动10英尺或更多，你只会移动一半的距离，因为部分力量会被消耗在撕扯穿过黏着物质的抓附上。

Like all adventuring mimics, you've altered your adhesive to allow you to move about more easily, but even so, you've learned how to use it selectively in contact with the ground whenever you're standing still and with items you're holding. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your saving throws and DCs against attempts to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Shove]{Shove} you or move you from your position via forced movement, as well as attempts to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Disarm]{Disarm} you. In addition, if any effect would force you to move 10 feet or more, you are moved only half the distance, as some of the force is expended, tearing through the adhesive's grip.

Eternal Sanguinity.name: 永恒血性 Eternal Sanguinity
Eternal Sanguinity.description:
即使在血腥的战斗中，你也能保持一种出人意料的乐观视角，不过那些在你成为叛徒之前就认识你的人可能不会对这种心态感到惊讶。因此，你几乎拥有无限供应的酸性血液。你可以在其正常频率（每天一次，或若拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.kGUh6xIWtFblHVD5]{Blood Splatter} 专长则每小时一次）之外使用你的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.xorlcY1YBzidwL6C]{Reactive Slime} 反应动作（）。当你这样做时，你将伤害骰从 d10 降为 d4。以这种方式使用 Reactive Slime 不会重置频率。例如，如果你拥有 Blood Splatter 专长并以完整伤害使用了 Reactive Slime，然后在接下来的 40 分钟内又以降低后的伤害再使用 Reactive Slime 七次，你仍然可以在再过 20 分钟后再次以完整伤害使用它。

[[/r ceil(@actor.level/2)d4[acid]]]{随等级增长的酸性伤害}

You're able to keep up a surprisingly optimistic viewpoint even during bloody battles, though those who knew you before you became a renegade might not be shocked by this outlook. As a result, you have a nigh limitless supply of acidic blood. You can use your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.xorlcY1YBzidwL6C]{Reactive Slime} reaction beyond its normal frequency of once per day (or once per hour with the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.kGUh6xIWtFblHVD5]{Blood Splatter} feat). When you do, you reduce the damage dice from d10s to d4s. Using Reactive Slime in this way doesn't reset the frequency. For instance, if you had the Blood Splatter feat and used Reactive Slime for the full damage, then used Reactive Slime seven more times for the reduced damage within the next 40 minutes, you could still use it again for the full damage after another 20 minutes.

[[/r ceil(@actor.level/2)d4[acid]]]{Leveled Acid Damage}

Shining Weapon.name: 闪耀武器 Shining Weapon
Shining Weapon.description:
如同许多最著名且强大的武器一样，你可以散发出绚丽的彩色光环。你可以持续发光，获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{光亮}法术的效果，以你选择的颜色发光。你可以花费一个具有专注（特征）的单动作来停止发光或再次开始发光；这是一次启动。

Like many of the most famous and powerful weapons, you can glow with a brilliant nimbus of color. You can constantly glow, with the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{Light} spell, glowing a color of your choice. You can spend a single action, which has the concentrate trait, to stop the glow or to start it again; this is an activation.

Call Forth Items.name: 召唤物品 Call Forth Items
Call Forth Items.description:
每当你进入其中时，你都会从内在的地城中取出物品以适应任何情况，使用你的现金和魔法来催化这些物品的成长。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.bh2jHyyYrkLMsIdX]{预知规划者} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lHFz4MmebvPqTb0A]{预知消耗品} 通用专长。对你而言，预知规划者的需求条目改为如下内容：

"需求 自从你上一次使用你的“进入地城”族裔能力进入你的内在地城以来，你尚未使用过此能力"

You pull out items from the dungeon within to fit any sort of situation whenever you enter it, using your currency and magic to catalyze the items' growth. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.bh2jHyyYrkLMsIdX]{Prescient Planner} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.lHFz4MmebvPqTb0A]{Prescient Consumable} general feats. For you, Prescient Planner's Requirements entry changes to read

"Requirements You haven't used this ability since the last time you've used your enter the dungeon ancestry ability to enter your inner dungeon"

Fey Skin (Gremlin).name: 精类皮肤（小魔怪） Fey Skin (Gremlin)
Fey Skin (Gremlin).description:
你在不知疲倦的诡计者故事中扮演的角色让你变得坚韧，即使受伤也能重新站起来，不过作为交换，你也和其他小魔怪一样承受对寒铁的同样弱点。你的最大生命值增加，增加量等于你的等级。若你休息10分钟，你的魔法会维持并恢复你，使你恢复等于你等级数量的[[/r @actor.level[healing]]{生命值}；这与任何你从@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}恢复的生命值叠加。然而，你获得寒铁弱点5。

Your role to play in tales of indefatigable tricksters makes you tough and able to pop back up after taking a wound, though in exchange you suffer the same weakness to cold iron as other gremlins. Increase your maximum Hit Points by an amount equal to your level. If you rest for 10 minutes, your magic sustains and recovers you, causing you to regain a number of [[/r @actor.level[healing]]{Hit Points} equal to your level; this is cumulative with any Hit Points you regain from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. However, you gain weakness 5 to cold iron.

Demonic Strikes.name: 恶魔打击 Demonic Strikes
Demonic Strikes.description:
尽管你摒弃了你传承的罪孽，你仍获得一种你传承的深渊恶魔典型的额外徒手攻击。你的徒手攻击选项取决于你的传承。如果你是巴巴乌、怯魔或赫兹罗，你可以选择爪或颚的徒手攻击；如果你是布里莫拉克，你获得蹄的徒手攻击；如果你是玛利利丝，你获得尾的徒手攻击；如果你是奥莫克斯，你获得污泥触须的徒手攻击；如果你是魅魔，你获得爪的徒手攻击；如果你是弗洛克，你可以选择喙、爪或利爪的徒手攻击。无论你获得哪一种徒手攻击，它都属于格斗武器组，并具有所列的伤害与特征。

喙 1d6 挥砍（灵巧，徒手）

爪 1d4 挥砍（敏捷，灵巧，徒手，多用穿刺）

蹄 1d6 钝击（灵巧，徒手）

颚 1d6 穿刺（灵巧，徒手）

污泥触须 1d6 钝击（徒手，多用酸）

尾 1d4 钝击（敏捷，灵巧，徒手）

利爪 1d4 挥砍（敏捷，灵巧 徒手，多用穿刺）

特殊 如果你的传承列出了多种类型的徒手攻击（例如巴巴乌、怯魔、赫兹罗或弗洛克），你可以再次选择此专长，以从你的传承中获得另一种徒手攻击。

Despite eschewing your heritage's sin, you have an additional unarmed attack typical to Abyssal demons of your heritage. Your unarmed attack options depend on your heritage. If you're a babau, dretch, or hezrou, you can choose a claw or jaws unarmed attack; if you're a brimorak, you gain a hoof unarmed attack; if you're a marilith, you gain a tail unarmed attack; if you're an omox, you gain a sludge tendril unarmed attack; if you're a succubus, you gain a claw unarmed attack; if you're a vrock, you can choose a beak, claw, or talon unarmed attack. Whichever unarmed attack you gain, it's in the brawling weapon group and has the listed damage and traits.

Beak 1d6 slashing (finesse, unarmed)

Claw 1d4 slashing (agile, finesse, unarmed, versatile piercing)

Hoof 1d6 bludgeoning (finesse, unarmed)

Jaws 1d6 piercing (finesse, unarmed)

Sludge Tendril 1d6 bludgeoning (unarmed, versatile acid)

Tail 1d4 bludgeoning (agile, finesse, unarmed)

Talon 1d4 slashing (agile, finesse unarmed, versatile piercing)

Special If your heritage has multiple listed types of unarmed attacks (such as babau, dretch, hezrou, or vrock), you can take this feat again to gain another unarmed attack from your heritage.

Viscous Choke.name: 黏稠窒息 Viscous Choke
Viscous Choke.description:
频率 每天一次

你唤来水流以令敌人窒息。你用一层粘稠水膜的魔法薄膜包裹30英尺内一个能呼吸空气的生物的头部，持续1分钟。目标必须进行一次@Check[reflex|against:class-spell]豁免，对抗你职业DC与法术DC中较高者。若失败，他们开始窒息，并必须屏住呼吸以避免溺水。窒息的生物或与其相邻的生物合计以3个交互动作可暂时擦去这层薄膜，从而获得一次新的反射豁免，并在该次豁免中获得+2环境加值以终止该效果。（这些动作不必连续进行，也不必由同一个生物完成。）

Frequency once per day

You call forth water to choke your foe. You surround the head of one air-breathing creature within 30 feet in a magical film of viscous water for 1 minute. The target must succeed at a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. On a failure, they begin to choke and must hold their breath to avoid drowning. The film can be temporarily wiped away with a total of 3 Interact actions by the choking creature or creatures adjacent to it, allowing a new Reflex save with a +2 circumstance bonus to end the effect. (These actions don't need to be consecutive or made by the same creature.)

Shifter's Tongue.name: 变形者之舌 Shifter's Tongue
Shifter's Tongue.description:
你改变思维方式并融入各种文化的能力使你很容易学习许多语言，这无论如何都很有用，但如果你采取多种形态则尤其有帮助。你学习三种新语言，从你有许可的常见语言与非普通语言中选择。这些语言与你的其他语言采用相同形式（手语或口语）。当你选择 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{Multilingual} 专长时，你学习三种新语言而非两种。

Your ability to change the way you think and blend in with various cultures makes it easy for you to learn many languages, which is useful no matter what but can be especially helpful if you take a variety of forms. You learn three new languages, chosen from common languages and uncommon languages you have access to. These languages take the same form (signed or spoken) as your other languages. When you select the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{Multilingual} feat, you learn three new languages instead of two.

Object Lesson.name: 物体课程 Object Lesson
Object Lesson.description:
需求 你处于物体形态。

触发 一个认为你是普通物体而非拟形怪的生物触摸你或与你发生物理互动。

你对触发生物进行一次伪足打击。

Requirements You are in object form.

Trigger A creature who believes you are a normal object, rather than a mimic, touches or physically interacts with you.

You make a pseudopod Strike against the triggering creature.

Energy Slime.name: 能量黏液怪 Energy Slime
Energy Slime.description:
你的黏滑身体由酸液构成、燃烧着火焰，或是冷得惊人，但这会使你的拟足在钝击力冲击方面略逊一筹。你获得此专长时选择酸、冷或火；一旦做出选择，就无法更改。你的拟足徒手攻击造成所选类型的伤害，而非钝击伤害。此外，每当一名生物以近战徒手攻击命中你，或在其回合结束时仍在擒抱你时，它会受到1点所选类型的伤害。该伤害在第5、第9、第13和第17等级时各增加1点，在第17等级时最多增至5点。

Your slimy body is made of acid, is on fire, or is incredibly cold, though this causes your pseudopods to have a bit less blunt force impact. Choose acid, cold, or fire when you gain this feat; once you make the choice, you can't change it. Your pseudopod unarmed attacks deal damage of the chosen type instead of bludgeoning damage. Additionally, whenever a creature hits you with a melee unarmed attack or ends its turn grabbing you, it takes 1 damage of the chosen type. This damage increases by 1 at 5th, 9th, 13th, and 17th levels, to a maximum of 5 at 17th level.

Minotaur's Maze.name: 牛头人的迷宫 Minotaur's Maze
Minotaur's Maze.description:
频率 每日一次

你与迷宫与曲径相连的联系使你能够将一名敌人放逐进你自创的迷宫之中。选择一个30尺内的目标。目标尝试一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 意志豁免，对抗你更高的职业DC与法术DC，并产生以下效果。传送魔法无法帮助该生物逃脱，除非该魔法能够跨位面传送，例如@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Plane Shift}。当效果结束时——无论是因为目标逃脱，还是持续时间耗尽——目标会回到其被放逐时所占据的空间；若该空间如今被占据，则回到最近的空间。当一名生物位于你的牛头人迷宫中时，你仍可以用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.s5Eo7uy2WBsuVVx5]{Hunted Fear} 影响他们，尽管他们位于另一个维度，按理说不应能听见你。

大成功或大失败：成功 目标完全不会被拉入迷宫，并留在其原本的位置。

成功 目标会短暂被拉入迷宫，但它就位于出口附近，能够毫无困难地随意离开。它会消失进入迷宫，但在其回合中可花费1个动作逃脱。

失败 目标被拉入迷宫。每回合一次，目标可以花费1个动作尝试一次 @Check[survival|against:class-spell] 检定或 @Check[perception|against:class-spell] 检定，对抗牛头人迷宫的DC以逃脱。

大成功或大失败：失败 同失败，但目标必须在一次生存或察觉检定中大成功或大失败：成功才能逃离你的迷宫，或在两次生存或察觉检定中成功。若目标在已达成一次所需的生存或察觉检定成功后又大成功或大失败：失败，它会失去先前的成功并必须重新开始。

Frequency Once per day

Your connection to mazes and labyrinths allows you to banish a foe into a labyrinth of your own. Choose a target within 30 feet. The target attempts a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC, with the following effects. Teleportation magic doesn't help the creature escape unless the magic can transport across planes, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Plane Shift}. When the effect ends, either because the target escaped or the duration ran out, the target returns to the space it occupied when it was banished, or to the nearest space if the original is now filled. While a creature is in your Minotaur's Maze, you can affect them with @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.s5Eo7uy2WBsuVVx5]{Hunted Fear}, even though they are in another dimension and shouldn't be able to hear you.

Critical Success The target isn't drawn into the labyrinth at all, and they remain in their original location.

Success The target is briefly drawn into the labyrinth, but they are right near an exit and can leave at their leisure without any trouble. They vanish into the labyrinth, but on their turn they can spend 1 action to escape.

Failure The target is drawn into the labyrinth. Once each turn, the target can spend 1 action to attempt a @Check[survival|against:class-spell] check or @Check[perception|against:class-spell] check against Minotaur's Maze's DC to escape.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target must critically succeed on a Survival or Perception check to escape your labyrinth, or succeed on two Survival or Perception checks. If the target has succeeded at one of the required Survival or Perception checks and then critically fails, they lose their previous success and have to start over.

Enhanced Storage.name: 强化储物 Enhanced Storage
Enhanced Storage.description:
你可以用与储存你的灌注物品相同的方式在体内储存更多物品。你最多可以储存不超过你的轻载上限（通常为5加上你的力量调整值）的物品，但你拥有的任何护甲镀层、任何融合的灌注物品以及弹药都会计入此上限。

You can store more items within you in the same way as your invested items. You can store items up to the limit of your light load limit (typically 5 plus your Strength modifier), though any armor plating you have and any melded invested items and ammunition count against this limit.

Disguise Item.name: 伪装物品 Disguise Item
Disguise Item.description:
频率 每日一次

你开发出一种特殊技巧，使你能够运用那些通常用于将自己塑造成物体的才能来伪装其他物品：用你自身的一部分包裹它们，创造出虚幻的外表。选择一个你正触碰的物体，其体积不超过10英尺×10英尺×10英尺。决定你想施加在该物品上的伪装类型。你可以让它看起来破旧不堪，显得破损且粗劣。你可以让它看起来完美无瑕，仿佛全新且高度抛光或保养良好；一件破损的物品看起来完好且可用。你也可以制造其他类似的伪装，由GM决定。被摧毁的物品无法受到该法术影响。幻象持续1小时。与该物品进行互动的生物可以尝试识破该幻象（@Check[will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] DC等于你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者）。

Frequency once per day

You've developed a special technique that allows you to employ your talents ordinarily used to shape yourself into objects in order to disguise other items, surrounding them with bits of yourself to create an illusory guise. Choose an object you're touching 10 feet by 10 feet by 10 feet or less in volume. Decide what sort of disguise you wish to place on the item. You can make it look decrepit, appearing broken and shoddy. You can make it look perfect, appearing as though it's brand new and highly polished or well maintained; a broken item appears to be intact and functional. You can also make other similar disguises, as determined by the GM. Destroyed items can't be affected by this spell. The illusion lasts for 1 hour. A creature that Interacts with the item can attempt to disbelieve the illusion (@Check[will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] the DC is equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC).

Form of the Leviathan.name: 利维坦形态 Form of the Leviathan
Form of the Leviathan.description:
通过将你身体的潜能拉伸到极限，你可以短暂地采取一种与容纳你地城的强大生物相似的形态。你每天一次可将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.8AMvNVOUEtxBCDvJ]{Monstrosity Form}作为一种天生原始法术施放，但有一些调整。施放时间为三个动作而非两个，持续时间为3轮而非1分钟，并且当持续时间结束时，你会在10分钟内处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fatigued]{Fatigued}。你采取的形态使用monstrosity form中的三个选项之一，在你选择此专长时选定，以匹配容纳你地城的怪物。如有必要，与GM合作，调整所列无武装攻击的伤害类型与名称以同样匹配该地城，同时保持该形态的其他数据不变。例如，如果你的地城位于一条巨人熔岩巨蛇体内，你可以使用紫虫形态，将颚改为仍造成穿刺伤害的獠牙，并将毒刺改为造成钝击伤害与持续火焰伤害的尾击。

By stretching your body's capacities to their limits, you can briefly take a form paralleling the mighty creature housing your dungeon. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.8AMvNVOUEtxBCDvJ]{Monstrosity Form} once per day as an innate primal spell, with some adjustments. The casting time is three actions instead of two, the duration is 3 rounds instead of 1 minute, and when the duration ends, you're @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fatigued]{Fatigued} for 10 minutes. The form you take uses one of the three options from monstrosity form, chosen when you take this feat to match the monster housing your dungeon. If necessary, work with your GM to change the damage type and name of the listed unarmed attacks to match the dungeon as well, keeping the other statistics of the form the same. For instance, if your dungeon is inside a giant magma snake, you might use the purple worm form, changing the jaws to fangs that still do piercing damage and the stinger to a tail that deals bludgeoning damage and persistent fire damage.

Serpentine Shifts.name: 蛇形变换 Serpentine Shifts
Serpentine Shifts.description:
你的发蛇会在夜间轮流值守，即使你和其余发蛇正在睡觉也是如此。当你正常入睡时（而不是因 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} 来自睡眠法术或类似的魔法效果），你的一些发蛇仍保持清醒，使你更容易察觉到周围的动静。你在因失去意识而对AC、察觉与反射豁免承受–4状态减值时，若是在休息期间正常睡着，则因发蛇的专注与努力，你改为只承受–2状态减值。

Your hair snakes take shifts during the night to watch even when you and the rest of the hair snakes are sleeping. When you are sleeping normally (as opposed to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} from a sleep spell or similar magic effect), some of your hair snakes remain awake, making it easier for you to notice things. Instead of taking a –4 status penalty to AC, Perception, and Reflex saves for being unconscious, when you're asleep normally while resting, you take a –2 status penalty instead thanks to your hair snake's dedication and effort.

Dilating Projection.name: 扩张投影 Dilating Projection
Dilating Projection.description:
当你显现你的化身时，你可以通过扩张你的魔法来使其投射为不同的体型。在你的化身的正常体型，或具有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} 的效果（一个大型化身），或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.PjhUmyKnq6K5uDby]{Shrink} 的效果（一个超小型化身）之间选择。这会持续直到你显现一个不同体型的化身为止。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.xjtVfIuYMWuUfxid]{法术效果：Enlarge}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.QzvYL8GSc7HHxo9g]{法术效果：Shrink}

When you manifest your avatar, you can project it at a different size by dilating your magic. Choose between your avatar's normal size or an avatar with the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} (a Large avatar) or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.PjhUmyKnq6K5uDby]{Shrink} (a Tiny avatar). This lasts until you manifest an avatar of a different size.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.xjtVfIuYMWuUfxid]{Spell Effect: Enlarge}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.QzvYL8GSc7HHxo9g]{Spell Effect: Shrink}

Bacchanalia.name: 酒神狂欢 Bacchanalia
Bacchanalia.description:
你释放一场狂野的宴会，用你醉酒狂欢的力量驱使盟友陷入野性的狂怒。选择至多6个在30英尺内且自愿的生物（可以包括你自己）进入醉酒狂怒状态，持续1分钟。你选择的生物获得5点临时生命值，其速度获得+10英尺状态加值，并获得寒铁弱点5。它们还长出凶残的獠牙与利爪，作为徒手攻击。獠牙造成@Damage[2d8[piercing]]伤害；利爪造成@Damage[2d6[slashing]]伤害，并具有灵巧与娴熟特征。目标使用其最高的武器或徒手攻击熟练度来进行这些攻击。以这些徒手攻击之一造成一次大成功或大失败时，被击中的生物承受@Damage[1d4[persistent,poison]]伤害。

目标不能使用专注动作，除非这些动作也具有狂暴（特征），但@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻}除外。生物可以尝试通过使用一个单动作（该动作具有狂暴（特征））来尝试进行一次@Check[will|against:class-spell]豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者；成功时结束其自身受到的酒神狂欢的效果。在第17等级时，临时生命值与对寒铁的弱点从5提升至10；獠牙的@Damage[2d8[piercing]]伤害提升至@Damage[3d8[piercing]]伤害；利爪的@Damage[2d6[slashing]]伤害提升至@Damage[3d6[slashing]]伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.l26guPcBca5B0EqE]{效果: 酒神狂欢}

You unleash a wild party, driving your allies into a feral fury with the power of your drunken revels. Choose up to 6 willing creatures within 30 feet (which can include yourself) to enter a state of drunken fury for 1 minute. The creatures you chose gain 5 temporary Hit Points, a +10-foot status bonus to their Speeds, and weakness 5 to cold iron. They also grow vicious fangs and claws, which are unarmed attacks. The fangs deal @Damage[2d8[piercing]] damage; the claws deal @Damage[2d6[slashing]] damage and have the agile and finesse traits. The targets use their highest weapon or unarmed attack proficiency with these attacks. On a critical hit with one of these unarmed attacks, the creature struck takes @Damage[1d4[persistent,poison]] damage.

 The targets can't use concentrate actions unless those actions also have the rage trait, with the exception of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}. A creature can attempt to end the Bacchanalia's effect on itself by using a single action, which has the rage trait, to attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC, ending the Bacchanalia's effects on itself on a success. At 17th level, the temporary Hit Points and weakness to cold iron increase from 5 to 10, the fangs increase from @Damage[2d8[piercing]] damage to @Damage[3d8[piercing]] damage, and the claws increase from @Damage[2d6[slashing]] damage to @Damage[3d6[slashing]] damage.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.l26guPcBca5B0EqE]{Effect: Bacchanalia}

Scaleswap.name: 鳞片交换 Scaleswap
Scaleswap.description:
频率 每小时一次

你已精通一种神秘技巧，能够逆转你与蛇发之间的联系。你不再是头上长着蛇的头发，而是化作其中一条蛇背上的一片鳞片，操控它的移动，并有可能伪装自己。最多持续10分钟，你变形为一条超小型的蛇，并获得@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.gfPjmG6Fe6D3MFjl]{Pest Form}的效果。

Frequency once per hour

You’ve mastered a mystic technique to reverse the connection between yourself and your snake hair. Instead of the snakes being the hair on your head, you become a scale on the back of one of the snakes, controlling its movement and potentially disguising yourself. For up to 10 minutes, you transform into a Tiny snake with the effects of @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.gfPjmG6Fe6D3MFjl]{Pest Form}.

Dungeon World.name: 地城世界 Dungeon World
Dungeon World.description:
频率 每日一次

你将地城的几何结构与构成碎片插入你周围的世界之中，创造出一片令人心智扭曲的变异空间，使他人难以移动。持续1分钟，你在自身周围获得一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]的灵光。进入该灵光的敌人（或在你启动时位于灵光中的敌人）必须尝试一次@Check[will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)]意志豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者，其结果如下。应用这些效果后，它们在1分钟内对该灵光的任何进一步效果暂时免疫。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.o5fZPBUJNH6scv4j]{效果：地城世界灵光}

大成功 该生物不受扭曲几何的影响。

成功 对该生物而言，你的灵光中的每一格空间在1轮内为困难地形。

失败 对该生物而言，你的灵光中的每一格空间在1分钟内为困难地形。

大失败 对该生物而言，你的灵光中的每一格空间在1分钟内为更严重的困难地形。

Frequency once per day

You interpose fragments of the dungeon's geometry and composition into the world around you, creating a mind-twisting altered space where it's difficult for others to move. For 1 minute, you gain an aura in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] around you. Enemies who enter the aura (or are in the aura when you activate it) must attempt a @Check[will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC with the following results. After applying these effects, they are temporarily immune to any further effects of the aura for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.o5fZPBUJNH6scv4j]{Effect: Dungeon World Aura}

Critical Success The creature is unaffected by the warped geometry.

Success Every space in your aura is difficult terrain for the creature for 1 round.

Failure Every space in your aura is difficult terrain for the creature for 1 minute.

Critical Failure Every space in your aura is greater difficult terrain for the creature for 1 minute.

Island's Tides.name: 群岛潮汐 Island's Tides
Island's Tides.description:
你在游泳时可以从群岛中的岛屿唤起潮汐，增强你的游泳速度。你的游泳速度提升至25尺。

You can call forth the tides from the islands in your archipelago as you swim, enhancing your swim Speed. Your swim Speed increases to 25 feet.

Internal Container.name: 内部容器 Internal Container
Internal Container.description:
你可以将物体收纳在自己体内一个易于触及的隔层中，例如当你处于宝藏箱形态时，将物体放在你的宝藏箱盖内。你可以在自己体内储存最多总计 1 负载的物体。从你体内 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Steal]{Steal} 物体的检定 DC 增加 4。此外，如果你在自己体内只储存一件物体，你可以将其毫不费力地抽到手中，作为使用该物体的另一个动作的一部分。抽出该物品会使该另一个动作获得操作（特征）。

You can contain objects within yourself in an easy-to-reach compartment, such as inside your treasure chest lid if you're in the form of a treasure chest. You can store a collection of up to 1 Bulk of objects within yourself. The DC of checks to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Steal]{Steal} objects from inside your body increases by 4. Additionally, if you store only one object within yourself, you can draw it effortlessly into your hand as part of another action to use the object. Drawing the item grants this other action the manipulate trait.

Ophidian Critical.name: 蛇裔大成功或大失败 Ophidian Critical
Ophidian Critical.description:
你头发里的蛇能在你打出有力一击时为你的敌人送上强力的惊喜，甚至可能用无毒蛇也能让他们中毒。你的蛇颚或蛇牙徒手攻击获得大成功专精效果。如果你已经从其他来源获得了大成功专精效果，那么当你用蛇颚或蛇牙徒手攻击造成大成功时，你对目标造成[[/r 1d4[persistent,poison]]]。该伤害可与蛇牙大成功专精效果所造成的伤害叠加；如常，在应用弱点、抗力或类似效果之前，你先将这些伤害加总。

The snakes in your hair can deliver a powerful surprise to your foes when you land a telling blow, possibly even poisoning them with nonvenomous snakes. You gain critical specialization in your snake jaws or snake fangs unarmed attack. If you already had critical specialization from another source, on a critical hit with a snake jaws or snake fangs unarmed attack you deal the target [[/r 1d4[persistent,poison]]]. This damage is cumulative with the damage from the snake fangs critical specialization, and as usual, you add the damage together before applying weaknesses, resistances, or the like.

Storied Leadership.name: 传奇领导力 Storied Leadership
Storied Leadership.description:
由于传说故事将你描绘为天生的领袖，命运似乎会以某种方式扭转局势，使得当你带头、他人遵循你的专长时，一切都会变得稍微顺利一些。在探索期间，当你正在带领且盟友正在 Follow the Expert 时，如果你在适用的技能上为专家，你给予的将是 +3 环境加值而非 +2；如果你为大师，则给予 +4 环境加值。

Because the stories depict you as a natural leader, Fate seems to twist things in such a way that everything works out just a bit better when you take the lead and others follow your expertise. While exploring, when you are leading and allies are Following the Expert, you grant a +3 circumstance bonus instead of +2 if you're an expert in the applicable skill, and a +4 circumstance bonus if you're a master.

Cavern Sight.name: 洞窟视野 Cavern Sight
Cavern Sight.description:
你能够在地下的黑暗处像白天一样轻松视物。你获得黑暗视觉。

You're able to see in the dark places underground as easily as you can see during the day. You gain darkvision.

Medicinal Slime.name: 药用黏液怪 Medicinal Slime
Medicinal Slime.description:
你的黏液怪之躯能够生成可用于疗愈的草药制剂……或是用于夺命的邪恶毒素。你获得@Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.5CRt5Dy9eLv5LpRF]{草药师献身}或@Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.y7DDs03GtDnmhxFp]{毒素师献身}专长二选一，即使你通常在从当前变体中再取得更多专长之前无法再选择其他献身专长也可以。你仍必须满足该变体的先决条件。

Your slime body is able to generate herbal remedies that heal… or nefarious poisons to snuff lives. You gain your choice of the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.5CRt5Dy9eLv5LpRF]{Herbalist Dedication} or @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.y7DDs03GtDnmhxFp]{Poisoner Dedication} feat, even if you normally couldn't take another dedication feat until you take more feats from your current archetype. You must still meet the archetype's prerequisites.

Slither.name: 滑行 Slither
Slither.description:
你可以在@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{倒地}时沿地面蜿蜒前行，使你移动得比正常的匍匐更快。你可以@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Crawl]{匍匐}至多相当于你速度的一半，而非只有5尺。

You can slither along the ground while @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Prone]{Prone}, allowing you to move faster than a normal crawl. You @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Crawl]{Crawl} up to half your Speed, instead of only 5 feet.

Expert Longevity.name: 专家长寿 Expert Longevity
Expert Longevity.description:
你持续精进自己一生中获得的知识与技能。当你通过 @Compendium[battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.z58dAEGgIws0SBPY]{Ancestral Longevity} 选择一项要受训的技能时，你也可以选择一项你已受训的技能，并使你在该技能上成为专家。这会持续到你的 Ancestral Longevity 到期为止。

当 Ancestral Longevity 和 Expert Longevity 的效果到期时，你可以重训你的一次技能提升。你从此次重训获得的技能提升必须要么使你在通过 Ancestral Longevity 选择的技能上成为受训，要么使你在通过 Expert Longevity 选择的技能上成为专家。

You've continued to refine the knowledge and skills you've gained through your life. When you choose a skill in which to become trained with @Compendium[battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.z58dAEGgIws0SBPY]{Ancestral Longevity}, you can also choose a skill in which you are already trained and become an expert in that skill. This lasts until your Ancestral Longevity expires.

When the effects of Ancestral Longevity and Expert Longevity expire, you can retrain one of your skill increases. The skill increase you gain from this retraining must either make you trained in the skill you chose with Ancestral Longevity or make you an expert in the skill you chose with Expert Longevity.

Lodestone's Draw.name: 磁石的牵引 Lodestone's Draw
Lodestone's Draw.description:
频率 每日一次

你诅咒你的敌人，使其成为你盟友攻击的魔法指向石。选择60英尺内的一名生物成为指向石，然后再选择至多四名生物，使其攻击会被吸引至该生物。在你的下个回合开始前，这四名生物各自第一次对指向石进行攻击掷骰时，攻击者掷两次骰并使用较高的结果。这对攻击者而言是一个幸运效果。攻击者还会忽略该次攻击掷骰的情境罚值，以及因指向石处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿} 而需要进行的任何纯骰检定。

Frequency once per day

You jinx your foe into becoming a magical lodestone for your allies' attacks. Choose one creature within 60 feet to become a lodestone and then up to four creatures whose attacks will be drawn to that creature. The first time each of the four creatures makes an attack roll against the lodestone until your next turn, the attacker rolls twice and uses the better result. This is a fortune effect for the attacker. The attacker also ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll and any flat check required due to the lodestone being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}.

Queen's Dweomers.name: 女王的魔法效应 Queen's Dweomers
Queen's Dweomers.description:
你已获得与通常仅宁芙女王可用的原始魔法更强的连结。选择一个3级或更低的原始法术，以及一个4级或更低的原始法术。它们必须是你拥有许可的法术。你可以将你所选的每个法术作为原始先天法术每天施放一次。

You've reached a stronger connection to the primal magic normally available to nymph queens. Select one 3rd-level or lower primal spell and one 4th-level or lower primal spell. They must be spells to which you have access. You can cast each of your chosen spells once per day as primal innate spells.

Claim Territory.name: 宣称领地 Claim Territory
Claim Territory.description:
你已宣示对一片领地的所有权，使你在其边界之内获得数项力量。通过宣示你的领地，你已从宁芙女王候选者纵身一跃，成为完整的宁芙女王。当你选择此专长时，你宣示一片小而明确的领地，其地形类型必须与你在选择 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.7lTfpmT3PplrR3c3]{Nymph Queen Dedication} 专长时所选的地形相匹配，例如森林中的一处林间空地、一个小湖或池塘，或一座地下洞窟。与GM合作，为你的战役确定一片在规模与范围上都合适的区域。当你首次立下宣示时，该区域内所有超自然的居民都会意识到你正试图宣示这片领地；他们可以通过在自己选择的竞赛中击败你来反对你的宣示——若他们倾向于暴力，也可以选择战斗。居民有三天时间以此方式对你的宣示提出挑战，不过每个居民最多只能挑战你一次。一旦你击败所有前来挑战者，或他们选择不阻止你宣示该领地，你便成为这片领地的宁芙女王。若你在任一挑战中失败，则你无法宣示该领地，除非你驱逐或消灭击败你的生物；但你之后仍可尝试宣示另一片领地。若你成功并成为宁芙女王，你不能再次宣示领地。

一旦你建立了你的领地，植物、动物与超自然生物都会尊重你的宣示。当你位于你的领地内时，你在进行交涉（Diplomacy）检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} 与 Request，以及在进行威吓（Intimidation）检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce} 时，获得+1环境加值；该加值适用于动物、天界、邪魔、妖精、监视者、植物、灵体、具有与你宁芙传承的特征相匹配之特征的生物（例如灵光的 air），以及由GM决定的其他超自然生物。若你在相应技能上为大师，则该环境加值提升至+2。

在你的领地之内，生物与土地就是你的耳目。你可以在领地内与动物交谈并与植物交谈，并可对动物与非生物的植物使用交涉（Diplomacy），而且只要 Request 的范围仍在你的领地内，它们通常都会乐于接受。举例来说，你通常可以说服动物在你的领地内为你传递讯息，其效果类似 animal messenger 法术，但被限制在你的领地内。

你与你的领地在形而上学层面内在相连，使一方的变化会影响另一方。只要你保持健康，环境就会异常坚韧，使你能够自动尝试反制会伤害环境的法术与仪式，例如 blight；你以你的原初法术DC – 10作为你的反制调整值，且反制等级等同于你能施放的最高等级、非戏法的原初法术。当你在身体或心理上变得不健康时，你所守护的区域最终也会随之扭曲或变得不健康。在这种情况下，当你的心智与身体恢复到良好健康状态后，整个区域会在不久之后从你的病态中复原。

You've laid claim to a territory, granting you several powers within its boundaries. By claiming your territory, you've taken the plunge from a nymph queen candidate to a nymph queen in full. When you take the feat, you claim a small defined territory that matches the type of terrain you chose when you took the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.7lTfpmT3PplrR3c3]{Nymph Queen Dedication} feat, such as a glad in a forest, a small lake or pond, or an underground cavern. Work with your GM to determine an area of appropriate size and scope for your campaign. When you first stake the claim, all supernatural inhabitants of the area recognize that you are attempting to claim the territory, and they can oppose your claim by defeating you in a contest of their choosing, including combat if they're inclined to violence. The inhabitants have three days to contest your claim in this way, though they can each only challenge you at most once. Once you defeat all comers, or they choose not to prevent you from claiming the territory, you become the nymph queen of that territory. If you fail any of the challenges, you can't claim the territory unless you chase off or eliminate the creature that defeated you, but you can attempt to claim a different territory later. If you succeed and become a nymph queen, you can't claim a territory again.

Once you've established your territory, plants, animals, and supernatural creatures respect your claim. While within your territory, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and Request and Intimidation checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce}, which apply against animals, celestials, fiends, fey, monitors, plants, spirits, creatures with traits matching your nymph heritage's traits (such as air for an aura), and other supernatural creatures determined by the GM. If you're a master in the appropriate skill, this circumstance bonus increases to +2.

Within your territory, the creatures and the land are your eyes and ears. You can speak with animals and speak with plants within the territory and use Diplomacy on animals and non-creature plants, and they're typically receptive to your Requests, as long as the scope of the Request remains in your territory. For example, you can usually convince animals to deliver messages for you within your territory, with effects similar to the animal messenger spell but restricted to your territory.

You and your territory are intrinsically metaphysically linked, causing changes in one to affect the other. As long as you're healthy, the environment is exceptionally resilient, allowing you to automatically attempt to counteract spells and rituals such as blight that would harm the environment, using your primal spell DC – 10 as your counteract modifier with a counteract level equal to the highestlevel non-cantrip primal spell you can cast. When you become physically or psychologically unhealthy, however, your warded region eventually becomes twisted or unhealthy as well. In that case, when your mind and body are restored to good health, the entire region recovers from your malaise shortly thereafter.

Mimic Blade Acumen.name: 拟形怪刀刃敏锐 Mimic Blade Acumen
Mimic Blade Acumen.description:
你本能地能够从你拟态的刀刃中获取最大优势。每当你使用你的刃类徒手攻击造成大成功时，你施加该刀刃的大成功或大失败专精效果。若你本来就能这么做（例如，你的职业授予你大成功或大失败专精），你可以选择将匕首的大成功或大失败专精效果应用于你的刃类徒手攻击，而不是剑的大成功或大失败专精效果。每次你以你的刃类徒手攻击对一名敌人造成大成功时，你都可以在你可用的大成功或大失败专精之间进行选择。

You are instinctually able to get the best advantage from your mimicked blades. Whenever you critically hit using your blade unarmed attack, you apply the blade's critical specialization effect. If you would already be able to do so (for instance, if your class grants you critical specialization), you can choose to apply the knife critical specialization effect to your blade unarmed attack instead of the sword critical specialization effect. You can choose between your available critical specializations each time you critically hit a foe with your blade unarmed attack.

Merciful Weapon.name: 仁慈武器 Merciful Weapon
Merciful Weapon.description:
你体内的魔法并非为了夺取生命而生。你获得非致命（特征），不过每当你进行一次打击或另一名生物使用你进行打击时，你都可以选择保留或压制该特征。

The magic within you wasn't meant to take lives. You gain the nonlethal trait, though you can choose to either keep or suppress the trait each time you Strike or another creature Strikes with you.

Ooze Empathy.name: 软泥共感 Ooze Empathy
Ooze Empathy.description:
由于你的黏液怪天性，你能够在基础层面上与软泥怪（以及在GM裁量下的其他无定形异怪）建立联系。你可以使用交涉对软泥怪进行 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Make an Impression]{留下印象}，并向它们提出非常简单的 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{请求}。在大多数情况下，软泥怪会给你时代来陈述你的理由。

Thanks to your slime nature, you can connect with oozes (and other amorphous aberrations, at the GM's discretion) on a rudimentary level. You can use Diplomacy to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Make an Impression]{Make an Impression} on oozes and to make very simple @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Requests} of them. In most instances, oozes will give you time to make your case.

Demon Lore.name: 恶魔学识 Demon Lore
Demon Lore.description:
你理解神性的奥秘，并且对深渊的恐怖知道得足够多，足以吓到任何人。你获得恐吓和宗教的受训（熟练度）等级。如果你会自动在其中一项技能中成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训（熟练度）。你也在恶魔学识中成为受训（熟练度）。

You understand the secrets of divinity and know enough horrors of the Abyss to scare anyone. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Intimidation and Religion. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also become trained in Demon Lore.

Wielder Synergy.name: 持用者协同 Wielder Synergy
Wielder Synergy.description:
你与持有者（无论是附身、投射还是共生）之间获得了如此强大且不可分割的协同，以至于你能为自身目的获得更多源自其族裔的教诲与能力。你获得与持有者族裔相匹配的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{被收养的族裔}通用专长，并且你还获得一个来自持有者族裔的1级族裔专长。

You've gained such a powerful and inseparable synergy with your possessed, projected, or symbiotic wielder that you can access more of their ancestry's teachings and abilities for your own purposes. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry} general feat for the ancestry matching your wielder, and you also gain one 1st-level ancestry feat from your wielder's ancestry.

Misleading Hijinks.name: 误导恶作剧 Misleading Hijinks
Misleading Hijinks.description:
你可以创造一个幻象分身来替你承担你所做之事的后果，而你则以隐形之身逃离。你每小时可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WPXzPl7YbMEIGWfi]{Mislead} 作为一种原初先天法术施放一次。

You can create an illusory double to take the fall for your deeds while you escape invisibly. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WPXzPl7YbMEIGWfi]{Mislead} once per hour as a primal innate spell.

Corrosive Adhesive.name: 腐蚀性黏胶 Corrosive Adhesive
Corrosive Adhesive.description:
你将你的黏着物与身体转化为腐蚀性的酸，使你的整个身体转变为主要由酸构成。该效果持续1分钟。在此期间，你获得酸免疫。任何触碰你或以徒手近战攻击或非触及近战武器伤害你的生物都会受到[[/r 3d6[acid]]]伤害，并且你的徒手攻击额外造成1d4点酸伤害。每轮第一次你以这种方式对一个生物造成酸伤害时，你获得[[/r 3d6 #Temporary Hit Points]]临时生命值，因为你的身体消化被侵蚀的物质并将其转化为保护性的酸。当转化结束时，任何剩余的临时生命值也会到期。你的酸法术额外造成一颗酸伤害骰（与该法术使用的伤害骰相同）。你可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.gISYsBFby1TiXfBt]{Acid Splash}作为奥术先天法术施放；其溅射伤害影响15尺内的所有生物，而非通常的5尺。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.z7eImtjOAWHo7vuD]{效果：腐蚀性黏着物}

You transform your adhesive and your body into corrosive acid, shifting your entire body into being made mostly of acid. The effect lasts 1 minute. During that time, you gain acid immunity. Any creature that touches you or damages you with an unarmed melee attack or non-reach melee weapon takes [[/r 3d6[acid]]] damage, and your unarmed attacks deal 1d4 additional acid damage. The first time each round that you deal acid damage to a creature in this way, you gain [[/r 3d6 #Temporary Hit Points]] temporary HP as your body digests the eroded material and transforms it into a protective acid. When the transformation ends, any remaining temporary HP expires as well. Your acid spells deal one additional die of acid damage (of the same damage die the spell uses). You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.gISYsBFby1TiXfBt]{Acid Splash} as an occult innate spell; the splash damage affects all creatures within 15 feet instead of the normal 5 feet.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.z7eImtjOAWHo7vuD]{Effect: Corrosive Adhesive}

Vanishing Trick.name: 消失戏法 Vanishing Trick
Vanishing Trick.description:
频率 每小时一次

以你在失去实体时所体验到的“缺失”将自身笼罩，你从视野中消失。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形} 状态，持续10分钟。这使你对所有生物处于未被察觉状态，不过这些生物可以尝试寻找你，使你改为对其处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏} 状态。若你使用敌对动作，则该效果会在该敌对动作完成后结束。

Frequency once per hour

Shrouding yourself with the absence you experienced when you were disembodied, you disappear from view. You become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} for 10 minutes. This makes you undetected to all creatures, though the creatures can attempt to find you, making you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} to them instead. If you use a hostile action, the effect ends after that hostile action is completed.

Gremlin Magic.name: 小魔怪魔法 Gremlin Magic
Gremlin Magic.description:
你与小魔怪的骗术故事之间的魔法连接让你能够表演魔法把戏。你可以随意将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Qw3fnUlaUbnn7ipC]{Prestidigitation} 作为一种原始天生戏法施放。如常，该戏法会被升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）。

特殊 如果你是普格万皮，你可以在不花费族裔专长的情况下，以一个奖励专长获得此专长，作为交换你必须接受以下普格万皮弱点：你在依赖听觉的察觉检定上承受–2减值。

Your magical connection to the tales of trickster gremlins allows you to perform magic tricks. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Qw3fnUlaUbnn7ipC]{Prestidigitation} as a primal innate cantrip at will. As normal, the cantrip is heightened to half your level, rounded up.

Special If you're a pugwampi, you can gain this feat as a bonus feat without spending an ancestry feat to do so in exchange for accepting the following pugwampi vulnerability: You take a –2 penalty on Perception checks depending on hearing.

Well of Unluck.name: 厄运井 Well of Unluck
Well of Unluck.description:
你的坏运气迅速积累，等待着在你周围的所有人身上释放。你可以每小时使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.j470zDQ9gbmHb0wP]{厄运灵光}，而非每日一次。

Your bad luck builds up quickly, waiting to be unleashed on all those around you. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.j470zDQ9gbmHb0wP]{Unluck Aura} once per hour instead of once per day.

Into the Dungeon.name: 进入地城 Into the Dungeon
Into the Dungeon.description:
你将一名敌人拉入你内心的地城，让他们在诸多道路中徘徊，直到找到出去的方法。选择30尺内的一个目标。目标尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] 豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者，产生如下效果。传送魔法无法帮助生物逃脱，除非该魔法能够跨位面传送，例如位面转移。当法术结束时——无论是因为目标逃脱还是持续时间耗尽——目标回到其被放逐时占据的空间；若原空间现已被占据，则回到最近的空间。

大成功或大失败 目标不会被拉入地城。

成功 目标被短暂拉入地城，但他们正好在一个出口附近。他们消失在地城中，但在其回合可以花费1个动作来逃脱。

失败 目标被完全拉入地城，必须搜寻一个出口。每回合一次，目标可以花费1个动作，尝试一次求生检定或察觉检定，对抗“进入地城”的DC来逃脱。

大成功或大失败 如失败，但目标必须在一次求生或察觉检定上大成功或大失败才能逃脱，或者在两次求生或察觉检定上成功。若目标已在所需的求生或察觉检定中成功过一次，随后却大成功或大失败，则其失去先前的成功并必须重新开始。

特殊 若你拥有陵墓传承，则该专长获得神术（特征）；若你拥有另一种人造地城传承（例如迷宫或高塔），则获得奥术（特征）；若你拥有自然传承（例如群岛、洞窟、利维坦或树），则获得原能（特征）。

You draw a foe into your inner dungeon, leaving them to wander the many paths until they find a way out. Choose a target within 30 feet. The target attempts a @Check[will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC, with the following effects.
