Teleportation magic doesn't help the creature escape unless the magic can transport across planes, such as plane shift. When the spell ends, either because the target escaped or the duration ran out, the target returns to the space it occupied when it was banished, or to the nearest space if the original is now filled.

Critical Success The target isn't drawn into the dungeon.

Success The target is briefly drawn into the dungeon, but they are right near an exit. They vanish into the dungeon, but on their turn they can spend 1 action to escape.

Failure The target is drawn fully into the dungeon and must search for an exit. Once each turn, the target can spend 1 action to attempt a Survival check or Perception check against Into the Dungeon's DC to escape.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target must critically succeed on a Survival or Perception check to escape, or succeed on two Survival or Perception checks. If the target has succeeded at one of the required Survival or Perception checks and then critically fails, they lose their previous success and have to start over.

Special This feat gains the divine trait if you have the mausoleum heritage, the arcane trait if you have another artificial dungeon heritage (such as labyrinth or tower) or the primal trait if you have a natural heritage (such as an archipelago, caverns, leviathan, or tree).

Dark Dungeon.name: 黑暗地城 Dark Dungeon
Dark Dungeon.description:
洞窟并非唯一会浸没在黑暗中的地城，而你意识到，如果你的化身在黑暗中误触毒素陷阱并在你自己的真实身体里死去，你会羞愧到永远无法释怀。因此，你将你的地城魔法集中于你的化身，获得黑暗视觉。

Caverns aren't the only dungeons that be bathed in darkness, and you realized that if your avatar were to stumble into a poison trap in the darkness and die inside your own true body, you'd be too mortified to ever live it down. As such, you concentrated your dungeon magic on your avatar, gaining darkvision.

Sidhe Stride.name: 西德步伐 Sidhe Stride
Sidhe Stride.description:
你的步伐如同希德一般悠长。你的速度从25尺提升至30尺，或从20尺提升至25尺。若你的族裔起始速度已为30尺（例如你是精灵），则此专长没有效果。

Your stride is as long as a sidhe's. Your Speed increases from 25 feet to 30 feet or from 20 feet to 25 feet. This feat has no effect if your ancestry's starting Speed is already 30 feet (such as if you're an elf).

Internal Shapeshifting.name: 内在变形 Internal Shapeshifting
Internal Shapeshifting.description:
你将自己的内脏转化为一种不寻常的构造，将重要器官隐藏到它们通常不会出现的位置，并制造冗余结构，以阻碍那些打击精确部位的攻击，并尝试保护你免受一次重击。每次你被重击时，尝试一次 @Check[flat|dc:17]。若成功，则该次攻击改为普通命中。此效果不会与坚固符文或类似效果叠加。你额外获得对精准伤害的抗力5。在第20等级时，此项提升为对精准伤害的抗力10。

You transform your insides to an unusual configuration, hiding your vital organs in positions where they wouldn't usually appear and creating redundancies to hinder those striking in precise locations and attempt to protect you from a massive hit. Each time you're critically hit, attempt a @Check[flat|dc:17]. On a success, it becomes a normal hit. This isn't cumulative with the fortification rune or similar effects. You additionally gain resistance 5 to precision damage. At 20th level, this increases to resistance 10 to precision damage.

Mimic Blade.name: 拟形怪之刃 Mimic Blade
Mimic Blade.description:
你可以将你的两条拟足之一变形为一把利刃，用来攻击你的敌人。直到你下次在该拟足上使用拟形怪利刃为止，该拟足不再能握持或操控物体，也不能进行拟足徒手攻击，但你获得一次属于剑类武器组的利刃徒手攻击，从下列选项中选择其一：

  • 你的利刃又长又重，并且你可以重新构造它以穿刺你的敌人。你的利刃造成[[/r 1d8[slashing]]]伤害，并具有可变穿刺特征。
  • 你的利刃短而轻，并且你可以重新构造它以穿刺你的敌人。你的利刃造成[[/r 1d6[slashing]]]伤害，并具有灵巧、精准与可变穿刺特征。

     

You can transform one of your two pseudopods into a blade to attack your foes. Until the next time you use Mimic Blade on that pseudopod, the pseudopod can no longer hold or manipulate objects or make pseudopod unarmed attacks, but you gain a blade unarmed attack in the sword weapon group, choosing one of the following:

  • Your blade is long and heavy, and you can reconfigure it to pierce your foes. Your blade deals [[/r 1d8[slashing]]] damage and has the modular piercing trait.
  • Your blade is short and light, and you can reconfigure it to pierce your foes. Your blade deals [[/r 1d6[slashing]]] damage and has the agile, finesse, and modular piercing traits.

Second Synthesis.name: 第二次综合 Second Synthesis
Second Synthesis.description:
你在一次炼成中融入多种贵金属的形态。你在判定弱点、抗力及类似事项的效果时，会同时被视为冷铁与银，而不是仅仅被视为你在获得“贵重炼成”时选择的那一种贵金属。

You incorporate multiple forms of precious metal into your composition at once. You are treated as both cold iron and silver to determine the effects of weaknesses, resistances, and the like, instead of just the precious metal you chose when you took Precious Synthesis.

Gremlin Lore.name: 小魔怪学识 Gremlin Lore
Gremlin Lore.description:
你接受过各种欺诈与盗窃技巧的训练，使你能够进行破坏与恶作剧。你在欺瞒和盗窃中获得受训（熟练度）。如果你会自动在上述技能之一中成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训（熟练度）。你还获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore}技能专长，用于小魔怪学识（技能）。

You've trained in all sorts of duplicitous and burglarious techniques, allowing you to perform sabotage and pranks. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Deception and Thievery. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} skill feat for Gremlin Lore.

Ascendance of a Book.name: 书之升华 Ascendance of a Book
Ascendance of a Book.description:
频率 每天一次

需求 你必须空出一只手。

在你的地城某处有一座巨人的图书馆，而你可以从图书馆中召来一本典籍，使其升至塔顶，然后暂时跨越次元来到你的手中。若你的下一次动作是回忆知识，则典籍会出现在你手中，并翻开至合适的页面。这使你在回忆知识检定上获得+1状态加值。若你在此检定中掷出大失败，则改为失败。若该次掷骰成功且主题为生物，你会获得关于该生物的额外信息或背景。

Frequency once per day

Requirements You must have a hand free.

There’s a giant library somewhere in your dungeon, and you can call forth a tome from the library, causing it to ascend to the top of the tower and then temporarily cross dimensions into your hand. If your next action is to Recall Knowledge the tome appears in your hand, open to an appropriate page. This grants you a +1 status bonus on the Recall Knowledge check. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the roll is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature.

Self Proficiency.name: 自我熟练度 Self Proficiency
Self Proficiency.description:
由于你作为一件有智能的武器的本性，你天生就知道如何挥舞自己。如果你是一件军用武器，那么为了决定你的熟练度，你是一件简易武器。如果你是一件进阶武器，为了决定你的熟练度，你是一件军用武器。这不会影响你对其他同类武器的熟练度。5级时，每当你用自己造成一次大成功攻击命中时，你获得该武器的大成功专精效果。

You know how to wield yourself inherently due to your nature as an intelligent weapon. If you're a martial weapon, then for the purpose of determining your proficiency, you're a simple weapon. If you're an advanced weapon, for the purpose of determining your proficiency, you're a martial weapon. This doesn't affect your proficiency in other weapons of your same kind. At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with yourself, you get its critical specialization effect.

The Unwanted Undead Tempest.name: 不受欢迎的亡灵风暴 The Unwanted Undead Tempest
The Unwanted Undead Tempest.description:
多年来，许多生物死在你的地城里，甚至在你获得智慧之前也是如此。你可以将它们全部同时唤出，化作不死生物的化身风暴；事实上，这是一举两得，因为你大概也不希望它们继续在此地作祟。你每天一次可以将 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.JLdbyGKhjwAAoRLs]{Tempest of Shades} 作为天生法术施放。若你拥有陵墓传承，则该法术为神圣；若你拥有其他人造地城传承（如迷宫或高塔），则该法术为奥术；若你拥有自然地城传承（如群岛、洞窟、利维坦或巨树），则该法术为原初。

Many creatures have died in your dungeon over the years, even before you became sapient. You can call forth all of them at once as an incarnate tempest of the undead; in fact, it kills two birds with one stone because you'd probably rather not have them haunting the place anyway. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.JLdbyGKhjwAAoRLs]{Tempest of Shades} as an innate spell once per day. The spell is divine if you have the mausoleum heritage, arcane if you have another artificial dungeon heritage (such as labyrinth or tower) or primal if you have a natural dungeon heritage (such as archipelago, caverns, leviathan, or tree)

Reject The Unworthy.name: 拒斥不配者 Reject The Unworthy
Reject The Unworthy.description:
频率 每轮一次

无论你是肩负只为值得之人而设的使命的神圣武器，还是只是对同伴很挑剔，即使你处于无生命模式，你也能惩罚那些胆敢试图挥舞你的不配之人。处于无生命模式时挥舞你的生物（或者如果你作为物品进行游戏，则为挥舞你的生物）每拥有你1个等级，便承受 @Damage[(@actor.level)d6[force]] 伤害，并进行一次以你的职业DC或法术DC（取较高者）为目标的 @Check[will|against:class-spell|basic:true] 豁免。你可以选择强迫他们将你丢下。

Frequency once per round

Whether you're a divine weapon with a mission meant only for the worthy or simply choosy about your partners, even when you're in inanimate mode, you can punish the unworthy who dare to try and wield you. The creature wielding you in inanimate mode (or wielding you if you're playing as an item) takes @Damage[(@actor.level)d6[force]] damage for every level you have with a @Check[will|against:class-spell|basic:true] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher. You can choose to force them to drop you.

Omnidirectional Vision.name: 全向视觉 Omnidirectional Vision
Omnidirectional Vision.description:
作为软泥怪本就能看见已是非同寻常，而你更进一步，能够同时朝各个方向观察事物。你不会被与你同等级或更低等级的生物夹击。然而，他们仍然可以协助他们的盟友进行夹击。

While the ability to see as an ooze in the first place is already exceptional, you take it a step further, able to view things in all directions at once. You can't be flanked by a creature of your level or lower. However, they can still help their allies flank.

Hezrou's Stench.name: 赫兹罗的恶臭 Hezrou's Stench
Hezrou's Stench.description:
尽管大多数赫兹罗叛徒都乐于摆脱来自深渊沼泽的腐败恶臭，你却一直渴望在战斗中享受你旧日臭味带来的优势，并且你努力锻炼出一种几乎与你曾经拥有的一样污秽腥臭、令人作呕的恶臭。任何进入你10尺内的生物，无论是友方还是敌人，都必须尝试一次对抗你职业DC的@Check[fortitude|against:class]豁免，否则成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心（状态） 1}。随后它会在24小时内获得暂时免疫。区域内的恶心生物在对抗疾病的豁免以及从恶心状态中恢复的检定上也会承受–1环境减值。

While most hezrou renegades are happy to have lost the fetid stink of corruption from abyssal swamps, you've longed for the advantage your old stench brought you in combat, and you've worked hard to develop a horrible funk nearly as foul and rank as the one you once possessed. Any creature that comes within 10 feet of you, friend or foe, must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save against your class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. It then becomes temporarily immune for 24 hours. Sickened creatures in the area also take a –1 circumstance penalty on saves against disease and to recover from the sickened condition.

Engulfing Container.name: 吞噬容器 Engulfing Container
Engulfing Container.description:
你将物体吸收到你黏滑的身体中，让你能在需要时立刻将它们弹出。你可以在自身内储存至多 1 负载的物体集合。虽然其他生物若搜索这些物品仍可照常找到，但从你体内@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Steal]{偷窃}物体的检定 DC 提高 4。此外，如果你在自身内只储存一个物体，你可以将其毫不费力地抽到手中，作为另一个用于使用该物体的动作的一部分。抽出该物品会使这个其他动作获得操作（特征）。

You absorb objects into your slimy body, allowing you to pop them out right when you need them. You can store a collection of up to 1 Bulk of objects within yourself. While other creatures can find the items as normal if they search for them, the DC of checks to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Steal]{Steal} objects from inside your body increases by 4. Additionally, if you store only one object within yourself, you can draw it effortlessly into your hand as part of another action to use the object. Drawing the item grants this other action the manipulate trait.

Gorgoneion's Gaze.name: 戈耳戈涅翁的凝视 Gorgoneion's Gaze
Gorgoneion's Gaze.description:
频率 每小时一次

尽管大多数斯忒诺对这种可能性讳莫如深，仍有低声流传的故事称，最强大的斯忒诺能够通过极度用力绷紧双眼，在短短一瞬间拟态美杜莎的石化凝视。你已觉醒了这样的力量。你凝视120英尺内的一名敌人并试图将其石化。目标必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] 豁免，其DC等于你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢（状态） 1}。

失败 目标获得缓慢（状态） 1，并且必须在其每个回合结束时进行一次强韧豁免；该持续性豁免具有失能（特征）。豁免失败时，缓慢（状态）值增加1（大成功或大失败时增加2）。豁免成功时，缓慢（状态）值减少1。当某个生物因戈尔戈涅翁的凝视所造成的缓慢（状态）而无法行动时，该生物会永久地以非魔法方式被石化。若该生物被石化或缓慢（状态）被移除，则该效果结束。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但目标起始为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢（状态） 2}。

Frequency once per hour

Though most sthenos are quiet about the possibility, whispered stories speak of the most powerful sthenos becoming able to mimic the petrifying gaze of a medusa for a mere instant by intensely straining their eyes. You have awakened to just such a power. You gaze at a foe within 120 feet and attempt to petrify them. The target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] save, with a DC equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target is slowed 1 and must attempt a Fortitude save at the end of each of its turns; this ongoing save has the incapacitation trait. On a failed save, the slowed condition increases by 1 (or 2 on a critical failure). A successful save reduces the slowed condition by 1. When a creature is unable to act due to the slowed condition from Gorgoneion's Gaze, the creature is permanently non-magically petrified. The effect ends if the creature is petrified or the slowed condition is removed.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target is initially @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2}.

Stubborn Renegade.name: 顽固的叛徒 Stubborn Renegade
Stubborn Renegade.description:
你的意志足够强大，能够摆脱罪孽的召唤，而同样的本能也会保护你，抵御其他操纵你情绪的企图。你在对抗情绪效果的豁免上获得+1环境加值；并且当你在对抗情绪效果的豁免中掷骰获得成功时，你会改为获得大成功或大失败，无论这些效果的本质是凡俗还是魔法。

Your will is powerful enough to shake off the call of your sin, and the same instincts protect you against other attempts to manipulate your emotions. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on saves against emotion effects, and if you roll a success on a save against an emotion effect, you get a critical success instead, no matter whether they are mundane or magical in nature.

This Isn't Even....name: 这甚至都不算…… This Isn't Even...
This Isn't Even....description:
频率 每日一次

需求 你不处于你的自然形态

触发 你将会被降至 0 生命值但不会立即死亡。

你揭示对手刚刚击败的身体甚至都不是你的最终形态，你为了生存并完成战斗而逆转形态。你避免被击败并变回你的自然形态。在承受伤害后，你恢复 [[/r (2*@actor.level)[healing]]]{每等级 2 生命值}，并且你的 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{受伤（状态）} 状态增加 1。你的逆转之力不仅能治疗你，还会暂时让你更强。直到你下个回合结束前，你在攻击掷骰、AC 和 豁免 上获得 +1 状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.geSmP54BcbP5Q0gU]{效果：这甚至还不算……}

Frequency once per day

Requirements You aren't in your natural form

Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points but not immediately killed.

You reveal that the body your opponent just defeated wasn't even your final form, reverting in order to survive and finish the fight. You avoid being knocked out and change back to your natural form. After taking the damage, you are restored to [[/r (2*@actor.level)[healing]]]{2 Hit Points per level}, and your @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} condition increases by 1. The power of your reversion not only heals you, it temporarily makes you stronger. You gain a +1 status bonus on attack rolls, AC, and saving throws until the end of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.geSmP54BcbP5Q0gU]{Effect: This Isn't Even...}

Blood Scion.name: 血裔后嗣 Blood Scion
Blood Scion.description:
无论你是拜欧班希的子嗣，还是被妖精舞者迷惑并改造，鲜血的气味对你而言变得异常诱人，而你也完全有能力让鲜血流淌。你获得一次爪子徒手攻击，造成 @Damage[1d4[slashing]] 伤害，并具有灵巧与娴熟特征。你的爪子属于斗殴组，但它锋利如剃刀且容易造成流血，所以它改为使用匕首武器组的“大成功或大失败专精效果”。你可以从上方“额外专长”中选择以 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Item.09KkEPhpdBiAxO99]{Baobhan Sidhe} 传承为先决条件的希德专长。

Whether you're the child of a baobhan sidhe or were entranced and transfigured by the faerie dancers, the scent of blood has become oddly appealing to you, and you're more than able to spill it. You gain a claw unarmed attack, which deals @Damage[1d4[slashing]] damage and has the agile and finesse traits. Your claw is in the brawling group, but it's razor sharp and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} to causing bleeding, so it uses the critical specialization effect of the knife weapon group instead. You can take sidhe feats from the Additional Feats listed above with a prerequisite of @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Item.09KkEPhpdBiAxO99]{Baobhan Sidhe} heritage.

Gaze of Mercy.name: 慈悲凝视 Gaze of Mercy
Gaze of Mercy.description:
你并非觉醒了美杜莎石化凝视的力量，而是发展出一种凝视，能够终止石化效果，并对那些沦为其受害者的人施以怜悯。你凝视120英尺内的一个生物或一个大致人类尺寸的石质物体，使其解除石化。这会将一个被石化的生物恢复到其正常状态，或将一个石质物体转化为一团惰性的肉块（不具有石头的硬度），其形状大致相同。

Instead of awakening to the power of a medusa's petrifying gaze, you've developed a gaze that ends petrifying effects and grant mercy to those who fall victim to them. You gaze at a creature or roughly human-sized stone object within 120 feet and unpetrify them. This restores a petrified creature to its normal state or transforms a stone object into a mass of inert flesh (without stone's Hardness) in roughly the same shape.

Soaring Disguise.name: 翱翔伪装 Soaring Disguise
Soaring Disguise.description:
你可以费些力气进入一种允许你飞行的替代形态。每天一次，当你使用变形怪的伪装来【冒充】一种通常具有飞行速度的类人生物时，你获得等同于你的陆地速度或该族裔通常的飞行速度（以较慢者为准）的飞行速度，但该形态的持续时间仅为5分钟。与其他未列出持续时间的【冒充】用法不同，当你以这种方式伪装为会飞的生物时，在其5分钟持续时间结束后，整个伪装会结束，使你恢复为你选择的自然形态或你偏好的形态。

With some difficulty, you can enter an alternate form that allows you to fly. Once per day, when you use doppelganger's disguise to Impersonate a humanoid that normally has a fly Speed, you gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed or the ancestry's usual fly Speed, whichever is slower, but the form only lasts for a duration of 5 minutes. Unlike other uses of Impersonate which have no listed duration, when you disguise as a flying creature in this way, the entire disguise ends after its 5 minute duration expires, reverting you to your choice of your natural form or your preferred form.

Ooze Shifter.name: 软泥变形者 Ooze Shifter
Ooze Shifter.description:
你能够更频繁地变形为其他类型的泥怪，并且你可以消耗额外能量来变成更巨大的形态。你可以将 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.0gdZrT9lwO17EIxc]{Ooze Form} 作为3环天生秘法法术每小时施放一次，而不是每天一次。此外，你可以将 ooze form 作为5环天生秘法法术每天施放一次，使你能够采取巨型泥怪战斗形态。

You are able to transform into other types of oozes more often, and you can expend additional energy to become a much larger version. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.0gdZrT9lwO17EIxc]{Ooze Form} as a 3rd-level innate occult spell once per hour instead of once per day. Additionally, you can cast ooze form as a 5th-level innate occult spell once per day, allowing you to assume a Huge ooze battle form.

Adhesive Follow-Up.name: 黏着追击 Adhesive Follow-Up
Adhesive Follow-Up.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发 你以伪足徒手攻击（或通过拟形怪专长或特性获得的任何徒手近战攻击）命中一名生物，或你使用物体教训。

你分泌出足够的黏着物来将生物黏在你身上。尝试对触发生物进行一次@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{擒抱}，并使用与触发的打击相同的多重攻击减值。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger You hit a creature with a pseudopod unarmed attack (or any unarmed melee attacks gained via mimic feats or features), or you use Object Lesson.

You produce enough adhesive to attach creatures to you. Attempt to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple} the triggering creature, using the same multiple attack penalty as the triggering Strike.

Bullheaded.name: 蛮牛般固执 Bullheaded
Bullheaded.description:
你固执的牛脾气让他人更难对你颐指气使。你在对抗精神效果的意志豁免时获得+1环境加值；并且当你在对抗会直接控制你的精神效果的豁免中掷骰获得成功时，你改为获得大成功或大失败。

Your stubborn bullheadedness makes it much harder for others to boss you around. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Will saves against mental effects, and when you roll a success on save against a mental effect that would directly control you, you get a critical success instead.

Passionate Kiss.name: 激情之吻 Passionate Kiss
Passionate Kiss.description:
需求 你正在擒抱一个生物。

你以热情的拥抱与一个被擒抱的生物纠缠，汲取其生命精粹。一个你已使其陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed}或@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained}的生物会受到等同于该生物等级的负能量伤害，并进行一次@Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|basic:true]豁免，DC等同于你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者；随后他们会在24小时内暂时免疫你的激情之吻。只要该生物的等级比你低至少2级或更高，你就会获得等同于造成的伤害或该生物剩余生命值（取较低者）的临时生命值；否则，他们的能量不足以令你满足，无法为你提供益处。这些临时生命值最多持续1分钟。

Requirements You are grappling a creature.

You engage a grappled creature in a passionate embrace, draining their vital essence. A creature you have @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Restrained]{Restrained} takes negative damage equal to the creature's level, with a @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)|basic:true] save with a DC equal to the higher of your class DC and spell DC they then become temporarily immune to your Passionate Kiss for 24 hours. As long as the creature is 2 levels lower than you or higher, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to the damage dealt or the creature's remaining Hit Points, whichever is lower; otherwise, their energy is simply not satisfying enough to provide you a benefit. These temporary Hit Points last for up to 1 minute.

Labyrinth of Magic.name: 魔法迷宫 Labyrinth of Magic
Labyrinth of Magic.description:
你内心迷宫中最棘手的部分之一是魔法迷宫，其中幻象会遮蔽通往真正出口的线索，而你已学会从迷宫中召唤这些幻象物体。你每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.2oH5IufzdESuYxat]{Illusory Object}，作为奥术先天法术。

Some of the most tricky portions of your inner labyrinth are magical mazes where illusions obscure the clues towards the true exit, and you've learned to call forth these illusory objects from the labyrinth. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.2oH5IufzdESuYxat]{Illusory Object} once per day as an arcane innate spell.

Rusting Touch.name: 锈蚀接触 Rusting Touch
Rusting Touch.description:
你可以通过一次接触让物体锈蚀殆尽，并且你经常将该能力用作恶作剧或阴谋的一部分。你可以每小时施放一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.0fYE64odlKqISzft]{锈蚀之握}，作为原初先天法术。

You can rust objects away with a single touch, and you often use that ability as part of a prank or scheme. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.0fYE64odlKqISzft]{Rusting Grasp} once per hour as a primal innate spell.

Maenad Queen's Beauty.name: 迈那得女王的美貌 Maenad Queen's Beauty
Maenad Queen's Beauty.description:
你的美貌使附近的生物屈服于你迈那得酒神狂欢的原始本能。任何在你10英尺内结束其回合的生物都必须尝试一次对抗你原始法术DC的意志豁免。失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}，持续1轮；大失败时，他们还会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}，直到他们在其下个回合采取第一个动作（以这种方式混乱时，他们不会使用其混乱动作来攻击你）。随后，他们会获得持续1分钟的暂时免疫。你可以使用一个具有专注（特征）的单动作来开启或关闭此灵光，并且你可以选择不影响你的盟友。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.uRYhHBSfC9ojFr9K]{效果：迈那得女王的美貌（失败）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.Esvf1d9dvbhRzEBO]{效果：迈那得女王的美貌（大失败）}

Your beauty causes nearby creatures to give in to the primal nature of your maenad bacchanalia. Any creature that ends its turn within 10 feet of you must attempt a Will save against your primal spell DC. On a failure they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round, and on a critical failure, they are also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} until they take their first action on their next turn (while confused in this way, they don't use their confused action to attack you). They are then temporarily immune for 1 minute. You can turn this aura on or off using a single action, which has the concentrate trait, and you can choose not to affect your allies.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.uRYhHBSfC9ojFr9K]{Effect: Maenad Queen's Beauty (Failure)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.Esvf1d9dvbhRzEBO]{Effect: Maenad Queen's Beauty (Critical Failure)}

Impaling Push.name: 穿刺推击 Impaling Push
Impaling Push.description:
你尝试用一次劈砍或突刺将你的敌人钉穿，并在你移动时将其一同推行。用一把近战穿刺或挥砍武器，或近战穿刺或挥砍徒手攻击进行一次打击。若该打击命中，你尝试进行一次运动检定，对抗该目标生物的强韧DC，产生以下效果。

大成功或大失败 你可以向任意方向步行至多你速度的一半。被打击的生物受到 @Damage[4d6[persistent,bleed]] 伤害，并与你一同被推行相同距离。该生物处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱} 状态，直到你下个回合开始，或直到你用钉穿它的同一武器或徒手攻击进行另一次打击为止，以先发生者为准。

成功 同大成功或大失败，但该生物仅受到 @Damage[2d6[persistent,bleed]] 伤害，而非 [[/r 4d6]]。

失败 被打击的生物选择：要么被向后推5尺，要么为了避免被推行而变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] 直到你下个回合结束。

大成功或大失败 被打击的生物不受影响。

You attempt to impale your foe with a slash or thrust, pushing them along with your movement. Attempt a Strike with a melee piercing or slashing weapon or melee piercing or slashing unarmed attack. If the Strike hits, you attempt an Athletics check against the target creature's Fortitude DC with the following effects.

Critical Success You Stride up to half your Speed in any direction. The struck creature takes @Damage[4d6[persistent,bleed]] damage and is pushed along with you an equal distance. The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} until the beginning of your next turn or until you make another Strike with the same weapon or unarmed attack that's impaling them, whichever comes first.

Success As critical success, but the creature takes only @Damage[2d6[persistent,bleed]] damage, instead of [[/r 4d6]].

Failure The struck creature chooses whether to be pushed back 5 feet or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] until the end of your next turn to avoid the push.

Critical Failure The struck creature is unaffected.

Trapper Elite.name: 陷阱师精英 Trapper Elite
Trapper Elite.description:
你设置陷阱的能力堪称传奇，人们忧心忡忡地讲述着挑战你巢穴的危险故事。你获得 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.4MUbwilvb9dI0X59]{Snarecrafter Dedication} 专长，即使你通常必须先从你当前的变体中获得更多专长才能选择另一个奉献专长。

Your ability to set traps is a legend, and people tell worried stories about the dangers of challenging your lair. You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.4MUbwilvb9dI0X59]{Snarecrafter Dedication} feat, even if you normally couldn't take another dedication feat until you take more feats from your current archetype.

Animal Shape.name: 动物形态 Animal Shape
Animal Shape.description:
如同夸西特一般，你可以采取动物伪装，把自己伪装成无害且他人可能忽视的东西。你的动物形态是某种微型陆生动物的特定形态。该形态鲜明且独一无二，而你每次都会变成同一种形态。你的动物形态可能带有暗示你恶魔本性的线索，例如眼睛偶尔闪现红光；也可能没有任何能将你与同种其他动物区分开的特征。

使用你的动物形态视为为欺骗的“冒充”用途制造伪装，不过仅限于采用你的替代形态。在这种微型动物形态下，你获得1环@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.gfPjmG6Fe6D3MFjl]{害虫形态}法术的属性数据。你可以无限期保持你的替代动物形态，并且你可以再次使用动物形态动作以切换回你的恶魔形态。

Like a quasit, you can take an animal guise, disguising yourself as something harmless that others might overlook. Your animal form is a specific form from a Tiny terrestrial animal. This form is distinctive and unique, and you change into the same form each time. Your animal form might have a clue as to your demonic nature, such as eyes that occasionally flash red, or there might be nothing to distinguish you from other animals of the same species.

Using your Animal Shape counts as creating a disguise for the Impersonate use of Deception, though only to adopt your alternate form. In this Tiny animal form, you gain the statistics of a 1st-level @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.gfPjmG6Fe6D3MFjl]{Pest Form} spell. You can remain in your alternate animal form indefinitely, and you can shift back to your demon form by using the Animal Shape action again.

Queen's Senses.name: 女王的感官 Queen's Senses
Queen's Senses.description:
当你的领地里发生某些事情时，你总是第一个知道的人，而且你可以投射你的感官以进一步调查。你在领地的整个边界内拥有一种朦胧感官，能够侦测到特别受玷污或污秽的生物或魔法的大致存在或不存在，但无法得知确切位置。受玷污的生物可以照常尝试躲过你感官的注意：通过保持隐蔽并采取适当的预防措施，进行一次隐匿检定来进行躲藏、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{避免被注意}，或进行一次欺瞒检定来进行冒充，对抗你的察觉DC，如常规规则所述。此外，你每小时可以施放一次“千里耳闻”或“千里眼”，但只能在你的领地边界内施放。

When something happens in your territory, you're the first to know, and you can project your senses to investigate further. You have a vague sense within the entire boundaries of your territory that can detect the rough presence or absence of particularly blighted or foul creatures or magic, though not the exact location. Blighted creatures can attempt to escape your sense's notice as normal by being subtle and exercising appropriate precautions, rolling a Stealth check to Hide, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice} or a Deception check to Impersonate against your Perception DC as normal. Additionally, you can cast clairaudience or clairvoyance once per hour, but only within the boundaries of your territory.

Soothing Spring.name: 抚慰之泉 Soothing Spring
Soothing Spring.description:
你召唤出一处巨大的温泉、池塘、泥坑、天然桑拿或其他拥有抚慰性自然美景的地点，能够治疗无数生物。你每天一次可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.fH08MI4KP0KH2EQ9]{Soothing Spring} 作为原始源生法术施放，但你选择一种符合你宁芙传承的形态，且体型要大得多；你的泉池边长为40英尺，可容纳至多64个中型生物、8个大型生物或4个超大型生物。

You call forth an enormous hot spring, pond, mud pit, natural sauna or other location of soothing natural beauty that can heal countless creatures. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.fH08MI4KP0KH2EQ9]{Soothing Spring} once per day as a primal innate spell, except that you choose a form that fits with your nymph heritage, and the size is much larger; your spring is 40 feet to a side, fitting up to 64 Medium creatures, 8 Large creature, or 4 Huge creatures.

Unfettered Flock.name: 无拘群鸟 Unfettered Flock
Unfettered Flock.description:
你像牧养自己的羊群一样引导盟友，帮助他们轻松穿行于自然世界。你可以每天一次以先天原初法术施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.bVtkBJvGLP69qVGI]{Unfettered Pack}。

You shepherd your allies like your own flock, helping them move through the natural world with ease. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.bVtkBJvGLP69qVGI]{Unfettered Pack} as an innate primal spell once per day.

Yai's Reprisal.name: 雅伊的复仇 Yai's Reprisal
Yai's Reprisal.description:
触发 一个位于你触及内的生物使用操作动作或移动动作，进行远程攻击，或在其正在使用的移动动作期间离开一个方格。

你用一把恶鬼武器或徒手攻击猛然出击，让你的敌人措手不及。用@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.9h9QXiy9jnkPjRPF]{恶鬼武器熟稔}专长中列出的近战武器、一次近战徒手攻击，或由你的@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.8k2etAnsPjxPjIL8]{第三只眼}专长（或若你拥有则为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.w76e2AQgbZHf2Gpg]{虚空飞弹}专长）授予的飞弹徒手攻击，进行一次打击。若你的打击为大成功且触发条件为操作动作，你打断该动作。

Trigger A creature within your reach uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

You lash out with an oni weapon or unarmed attack, catching your foe by surprise. Make a Strike with a melee weapon listed in the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.9h9QXiy9jnkPjRPF]{Oni Weapon Familiarity} feat, a melee unarmed attack, or the missile unarmed attack granted by your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.8k2etAnsPjxPjIL8]{Third Eye} feat (or the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.w76e2AQgbZHf2Gpg]{Void Missile} feat if you have it). If your Strike is a critical hit and the trigger was a manipulate action, you disrupt that action.

Fume.name: 烟雾 Fume
Fume.description:
频率 每日一次

你释放出一团浓厚的黑色烟雾，形成一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:10] 并在原地持续 [[/br 1d4 #Rounds]]{1d4轮}。烟雾内的所有生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{隐蔽}，而烟雾外的所有生物对烟雾内的生物而言也变为隐蔽。进入烟雾或在烟雾内开始其回合的生物必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] 豁免，对抗你的职业DC和法术DC中较高者，否则变为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{恶心 1}（大失败则为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{恶心 2}）。

Frequency once per day

You unleash a cloud of thick black smoke in a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] that remains in place for [[/br 1d4 #Rounds]]{1d4 rounds}. All creatures within the smoke become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{Concealed}, and all creatures outside the smoke become concealed to creatures within it. A creature that enters or begins its turn within the smoke must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC or become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 1} (@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Sickened]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure).

Nymph Strikes.name: 宁芙 打击 Nymph Strikes
Nymph Strikes.description:
你重新恢复与自然之怒的联结，根据你的传承授予你一种新的徒手攻击，或调整你的拳击徒手攻击：

Asteria：你可以在拳头周围延伸出一条星辰轨迹，通过扭曲空间来提高伤害。你的拳击徒手攻击将其武器伤害骰从1d4提高至1d6，并获得传送（特征）（这并不意味着攻击能穿过障碍进行传送，但可能影响对传送（特征）的抗力或弱点）。

灵光：你的拳头由拍击而来的狂风驱动。你的拳击徒手攻击将其武器伤害骰从1d4提高至1d6，并获得气（特征）。

Dryad：你获得一种枝条徒手攻击，造成@Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]]伤害，并具有灵巧与多用穿刺特征。你的枝条徒手攻击属于格斗武器组。

Epimelid：你的拳头充盈着滋养的泥浆。你的拳击徒手攻击将其武器伤害骰从1d4提高至1d6，并获得土（特征）。

Hesperid：你获得一种落日飘带徒手攻击，造成@Damage[1d6[slashing]]伤害，并具有灵巧与灵巧特征。你的落日飘带徒手攻击属于格斗武器组。

Lampad：你的拳头覆上了岩石。你的拳击徒手攻击将其武器伤害骰从1d4提高至1d6，并获得土（特征）。

Maenad：你紫色的指甲足够锋利，可当作利爪使用，同时不影响你双手的精细灵巧。你获得一种爪击徒手攻击，造成@Damage[1d6[slashing]]伤害，并具有敏捷与灵巧特征。你的爪击徒手攻击属于格斗武器组。

Naiad：你的拳头被奔涌的流水强化。你的拳击徒手攻击将其武器伤害骰从1d4提高至1d6，并获得水（特征）。

You restore your connection to nature's wrath, granting you a new unarmed attack based on your heritage or adjusting your fist unarmed attack:

Asteria: You can extend a trail of stars around your fist, granting increased damage by warping space. Your fist unarmed attack increases its weapon damage die from 1d4 to 1d6 and gains the teleportation trait (this doesn't mean the attacks teleport through barriers but can affect resistances or weaknesses to teleportation). 

Aura: Your fist is powered by buffeting winds. Your fist unarmed attack increases its weapon damage die from 1d4 to 1d6 and gains the air trait.

Dryad: You gain a branch unarmed attack, which deals @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage and has the finesse and versatile piercing traits. Your branch unarmed attack is in the brawling weapon group.

Epimelid: Your fist is suffused with enriching mud. Your fist unarmed attack increases its weapon damage die from 1d4 to 1d6 and gains the earth trait.

Hesperid: You gain a sunset ribbon unarmed attack, which deals @Damage[1d6[slashing]] damage and has the agile and finesse traits. Your sunset ribbon unarmed attack is in the brawling weapon group.

Lampad: Your fist is covered in stone. Your fist unarmed attack increases its weapon damage die from 1d4 to 1d6 and gains the earth trait. 

Maenad: Your purple fingernails are sharp enough to use as claws, without affecting the manual dexterity of your hands. You gain a claw unarmed attack, which deals @Damage[1d6[slashing]] damage and has the agile and finesse traits. Your claw unarmed attack is in the brawling weapon group.

Naiad: Your fist is strengthened with surging water. Your fist unarmed attack increases its weapon damage die from 1d4 to 1d6 and gains the water trait.

Motion's Revelation.name: 运动启示 Motion's Revelation
Motion's Revelation.description:
你将你的动觉与视觉结合，以看见不可见之物并辨明真相。你始终获得@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See Invisibility}的效果。每天一次，你可以以一个两动作的行动获得@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{True Seeing}的效果，持续10分钟；该行动具有专注（特征）；你的反制调整值等于你的职业DC –10或你的法术DC – 10中较高者。

You combine your motion sense with your vision in order to see the unseen and determine the truth. You gain the effects of @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See Invisibility} at all times. Once per day, you can gain the effects of @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{True Seeing} for 10 minutes as a two-action activity, which has the concentrate trait; your counteract modifier is equal to the higher of your class DC –10 or your spell DC – 10.

Hobgoblin Commander.name: 大地精指挥官 Hobgoblin Commander
Hobgoblin Commander.description:
你已经深度融入大地精文化，以至于在任何意义上你都算是他们的一员。你获得针对大地精族裔的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry} 专长（即使大地精族裔是罕见的，且通常不会作为 Adopted Ancestry 的选项），并获得一个你选择的 1级 大地精族裔专长。为了判定那些仅对大地精生效的大地精族裔专长的效果时，你被视为大地精，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.aoz9dCq2NynyUYEf]{Formation Training}。

You've integrated so deeply into hobgoblin culture that you're one of them for all intents and purposes. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry} feat for the hobgoblin ancestry (even though the hobgoblin ancestry is uncommon and isn't normally an option for Adopted Ancestry) and gain a 1st level hobgoblin ancestry feat of your choice. You are a hobgoblin for the purpose of determining the effect of hobgoblin ancestry feats that only work with hobgoblins, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.aoz9dCq2NynyUYEf]{Formation Training}.

Plant Negotiator.name: 植物谈判专家 Plant Negotiator
Plant Negotiator.description:
你可以与各种各样的植物交谈，并且你尤其擅长与它们谈判。你可以与所有植物交谈，而不仅仅是你在获得植物代言人专长时选择的那类植物。你在对植物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象}（通常使用交涉（技能））时获得+1环境加值。

You can speak with all sorts of plants, and you're especially skilled at negotiating with them. You can speak to all plants, not just the type of plants you chose when you took the Plant Speaker feat. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} on plants (which usually uses the Diplomacy skill).

Sacrifice Nucleus.name: 牺牲核心 Sacrifice Nucleus
Sacrifice Nucleus.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 一名对手对你掷骰得到大成功。

你长出了一个多余的第二细胞核，其中包含第一细胞核全部信息的副本，而你乐于牺牲该细胞核来抵消一次致命打击；毕竟你总能再长出一个。该次大成功变为普通命中。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger An opponent rolls a critical hit against you.

You've grown a redundant second nucleus with a copy of all the information of the first, and you gladly sacrifice that nucleus to negate a telling blow; you can always grow another, after all. The critical hit becomes a normal hit instead.

Leviathan's Prowess.name: 利维坦的威能 Leviathan's Prowess
Leviathan's Prowess.description:
随着你的身体与灵魂与栖居你地城的生物愈发交织，你的联结攻击变得更加凶猛。你获得在获得利维坦传承时所选择的徒手攻击的大成功或大失败专精效果。此外，该徒手攻击获得你选择的擒抱、推离或绊摔特征。

As your body and soul become more and more intertwined with the creature housing your dungeon, your linked attacks become more ferocious. You gain the critical specialization effect for the unarmed attack you chose when you gained the leviathan heritage. Additionally, that unarmed attack gains your choice of the grapple, shove, or trip traits.

Deepsight.name: 深视 Deepsight
Deepsight.description:
频率 每小时一次

你更深入地探入自己创伤的过去，回忆起当世界失去所有色彩与光亮、你漂泊无依且孤身一人的时刻。这也许很痛苦，但它赋予你更深邃的黑暗视觉。你在1分钟内获得强效黑暗视觉。

Frequency once per hour

You push deeper into your traumatic past, remembering when everything in the world lost its color and light and you were adrift and alone. This might be painful, but it grants you a deeper darkvision. You gain greater darkvision for 1 minute.

Ooze's Resilience.name: 软泥怪的韧性 Ooze's Resilience
Ooze's Resilience.description:
像大多数泥怪一样，你需要承受大量打击才会倒下。你的最大生命值增加等同于你的等级。当你处于濒死（状态）时，你的复苏检定的 DC 等于 9 + 你的濒死值（而非 10 + 你的濒死值）。如果你也拥有 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.AmP0qu7c5dlBSath]{Toughness} 专长，则从该专长与本专长获得的生命值加成为累加，你的复苏检定的 DC 等于 6 + 你的濒死值。

Like most oozes, it takes a lot of punishment to take you down. Increase your maximum Hit Points by your level. When you have the dying condition, the DC of your recovery checks is equal to 9 + your dying value (instead of 10 + your dying value). If you also have the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.AmP0qu7c5dlBSath]{Toughness} feat, the Hit Points gained from it and this feat are cumulative, and the DC of your recovery checks is equal to 6 + your dying value.

Stheno Dynamism.name: 斯忒诺动能 Stheno Dynamism
Stheno Dynamism.description:
你与生俱来的活力与对石化及类似效果的韧性，使你能够维持自身的移动范围。你对会施加 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Paralyzed]{麻痹}、@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{石化}或 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢}状态的效果进行的豁免获得+1环境加值。当你将因麻痹、石化或缓慢而持续至少2轮时，将该持续时间减少1轮；这对无期限的石化没有效果。

Your inherent dynamism and resilience against petrification and similar effects allow you to maintain your range of movement. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saves against effects that would impose the @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Paralyzed]{Paralyzed}, @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{Petrified}, or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} conditions. When you would be paralyzed, petrified, or slowed for at least 2 rounds, reduce that duration by 1 round; this has no effect for indefinite petrification.

Spore Cloud.name: 孢子云 Spore Cloud
Spore Cloud.description:
你从体内释放出一团有毒孢子云。相邻的生物可能会被孢子侵染，这取决于它们进行的 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，其DC等于你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到等同于你等级的穿刺伤害。

失败 该生物受到等同于你等级的穿刺伤害，并且受到等同于你等级的持续穿刺伤害，因为孢子穿透该生物的皮肤并生长成扩散的绿色藤蔓。藤蔓在10轮后或持续伤害结束时停止生长；若在此之前未被刮除，它们会在 [[/br 1d4 #days]]{1d4天} 内枯萎消散。若该生物受到一个善良法术影响，或将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.z9T4c1hXwOotsMCp]{圣水}（以一个交互动作）施用于藤蔓上，则藤蔓可以被摧毁。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但初始穿刺伤害与持续穿刺伤害都等于你等级的两倍，而非你的等级。

You release a cloud of noxious spores from your body. Adjacent creatures might be infested by the spores, depending on their @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] saves with a DC equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes an amount of piercing damage equal to your level.

Failure The creature takes an amount of piercing damage equal to your level, as well as an amount of persistent piercing damage equal to your level, as the spores penetrate the creature's skin and grow into spreading green vines. The vines cease growing after 10 rounds or when the persistent damage ends, and they wither away in [[/br 1d4 #days]]{1d4 days} if not shaved off before then. The vines can be destroyed if the creature is affected by a good spell or if @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.z9T4c1hXwOotsMCp]{Holy Water} is applied to the vines (with an Interact action).

Critical Failure As failure, but both the initial piercing damage and persistent piercing damage are equal to twice your level, instead of your level.

Focus Beauty.name: 专注美貌 Focus Beauty
Focus Beauty.description:
你将你的美貌集中于一个特定的生物以延长效果。选择30尺内的一个生物。即使他们不在区域内，他们也必须立即针对来自先决专长的你的灵光进行一次豁免。如常，如果他们已经对你的美貌灵光暂时免疫，则这不会产生任何效果。

特殊 如果你在高于16级时才获得你传承的美貌专长，那么你可以将其作为你的16级职业专长重训为此专长，且这与重训的常规规则相悖。

You focus your beauty on a particular creature to extend the effect. Choose one creature within 30 feet. They must make an immediate saving throw against your aura from the prerequisite feat, even if they're not in the area. As normal, this has no effect if they're already temporarily immune to your beauty aura.

Special You can retrain into this feat as your 16th level class feat if you gain your heritage's beauty feat at a higher level than 16, contrary to the normal rules for retraining.

Void's Enervation.name: 虚空衰竭 Void's Enervation
Void's Enervation.description:
当你专注于你的虚空飞弹时，它会汲取你的敌人的生命。如果你使用虚空飞弹以 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.qYJopPiOLSVIJpG4]{专注飞弹}命中，则该敌人必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗你更高的职业DC或法术DC，否则会受到等同于其等级的额外负能量伤害；在应用弱点或抗力之前，将该伤害加入打击的正常负能量伤害中。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到全额额外负能量伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额额外负能量伤害；或者若该生物未处于汲取状态，则改为使其变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{汲取 1}。

大成功或大失败 该生物受到双倍的额外负能量伤害；或者若该生物未处于数值为2或更高的汲取状态，你可以选择改为使其变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{汲取 2}。

When you focus your void missile, it leaches your foe's life away. If you hit with a @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.qYJopPiOLSVIJpG4]{Focused Missile} using your void missile, the foe must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC or take additional negative damage equal to its level; add this damage to the Strike's normal negative damage before applying weakness or resistance.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes the full additional negative damage.

Failure The creature takes the full additional negative damage, or if the creature isn't drained, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} instead.

Critical Failure The creature takes double the additional negative damage, or if the creature isn't drained with a value of 2 or higher, you can choose to have the creature become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} instead.

Animated Hardness.name: 活化硬度 Animated Hardness
Animated Hardness.description:
你强大的魔法注入你身体的外壳，给予你硬度，直到你遭受足够的物理创伤将其击穿。你获得5点硬度，但在受到一次大成功或大失败命中后，或在你的生命值降至你最大生命值的一半以下后，你会失去该硬度。在你将生命值恢复至你的最大生命值后，你会恢复失去的硬度。

Your powerful magic infuses your body's outer shell, providing you hardness until you suffer enough physical trauma to break through. You gain 5 Hardness, but you lose the Hardness after taking a critical hit or after your Hit Points fall below half your maximum Hit Points. You regain your lost Hardness after you recover up to your maximum Hit Points.

Slime Trap.name: 黏液怪陷阱 Slime Trap
Slime Trap.description:
当你成功命中一记沉重打击时，你的污泥触须可以将敌人困在污秽之中。若你以污泥触须徒手攻击造成重击，你的敌人会被黏液覆盖，并在1分钟内其速度获得–10尺环境减值，直到它@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}（对抗你职业DC与法术DC中较高者），或直到它用水将污泥洗净为止；以上三者以最先发生者为准。这是重击专精效果。

Your sludge tendril can trap your foes in filth when you manage to land a solid blow. On a critical hit with your sludge tendril unarmed attack, your foe becomes covered in slime and gains a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 minute, until it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escapes} (against the higher of your class DC and spell DC), or until it washes off the sludge with water, whichever of the three comes first. This is a critical specialization effect.

Sidhe Styling.name: 希德风范 Sidhe Styling
Sidhe Styling.description:
频率 每天一次

你的时尚品味每天都会变化，因此你的衣橱也会随之变化。你花费一分钟整理并装饰你的衣服，以便用魔法改变其美学风格。这可以改变你当前所穿套装的颜色、质地、图案以及细微细节，但不会增加布料或材料，不会改变一件衣服的功能或整体形态，不会调整衣服尺寸，也不会提高该物品的制作质量。一旦你使用了西迪风格造型，该效果的持续时间为无限，这意味着它将永久持续，除非你的魔法被对抗。

Frequency once per day

Your fashion sense changes daily, and thus, so too does your wardrobe. You spend one minute fussing and primping your clothes in order to magically alter their aesthetic style. This can change the color, texture, pattern, and minor details of the ensemble you're currently wearing, though it doesn't add fabric or material, change the function or overall form of a piece of clothing, resize the clothing, or increase the quality of the item's crafting. Once you've used Sidhe Styling, the effect has an unlimited duration, meaning that it lasts forever unless your magic is counteracted.

Erase Memories.name: 抹除记忆 Erase Memories
Erase Memories.description:
频率 每小时一次

你可以抹除你认为无聊、无用或有问题的记忆，使你能够在很长一段时间内保持静止而不会那么强烈地感到单调。除了这些日常用途之外，你还可以抹除创伤性或使人衰弱的精神经历的记忆，尝试对一个允许进行豁免的精神效果进行第二次豁免，但忽略任何比成功更差的结果。在抹除某个精神效果的记忆后，这些记忆就消失了，因此你不能再次抹除它们来尝试对同一效果进行任何额外的豁免。

Frequency once per hour

You can erase the memories you find boring, useless, or problematic, allowing you to remain sessile for long periods of time without feeling the monotony quite as strongly. In addition to these mundane uses, you can erase memories of traumatic or debilitating mental experiences, attempting a second saving throw against a mental effect that allowed a saving throw but ignoring any result worse than a success. After Erasing the Memories of a mental effect, they're gone, so you can't erase them again to attempt any additional saving throws against the same effect.

Ravage.name: 蹂躏 Ravage
Ravage.description:
你用恶魔般的徒手攻击蹂躏你的敌人。用你从恶魔打击专长获得的徒手攻击打击三次。你的多重攻击减值会如常应用于这三次打击。

You ravage your foes with your demonic unarmed attacks. Strike three times with unarmed attacks you gained from the Demonic Strikes feat. Your multiple attack penalty applies normally on these three Strikes.

Fairy Messenger.name: 妖精信使 Fairy Messenger
Fairy Messenger.description:
频率 每小时一次

作为一名希德，你经常对低等妖精摆架子，让它们替你送信。作为一个1分钟行动，你召来一名微小的仙灵信使，将一条信息送往指定地点。你将一个对你而言十分熟悉、且为低等妖精所知的显眼地点或地标的影像、方向与距离烙印给它。你也可以选择给它附上一件小物体或便笺，重量至多为轻负载。仙灵会尽其所能到达目的地；若它成功抵达，就会在附近等待直到持续时间结束，允许其他非敌对生物接近它并取下所附的物体。该效果在24小时后结束，或当一名生物取下所附的物体时结束，以先发生者为准。

Frequency once per hour

As a sidhe, you often pull rank over minor fey and get them to deliver messages for you. As a 1 minute activity you call forth a tiny fairy messenger to carry a message to a given location. You imprint the image, direction, and distance of an obvious place or landmark well known to you within the minor fey. Optionally, you can attach a small object or note up to light Bulk to them. The fairy does their best to reach the destination; if they make it there, they wait nearby until the duration expires, allowing other nonhostile creatures to approach them and remove the attached object. The effect ends after 24 hours or when a creature removes the attached object, whichever happens first.

Minor Pseudopod.name: 次要伪足 Minor Pseudopod
Minor Pseudopod.description:
除了你的两条主要拟足外，你还可以同时显现第三条次要拟足，用于执行某些基础任务。你可以用你的次要拟足执行简单的交互动作，例如打开一扇未上锁的门。你的次要拟足无法执行需要手指或显著手部灵巧性的动作，包括任何需要进行检定才能完成的动作，并且你不能用它来持握物品。

In addition to your two main pseudopods, you can manifest a simultaneous third minor pseudopod that can perform certain basic tasks. You can perform simple Interact actions with your minor pseudopod such as opening an unlocked door. Your minor pseudopod can't perform actions that require fingers or significant manual dexterity, including any action that would require a check to accomplish, and you can't use it to hold items.

Cat Scion.name: 猫族后裔 Cat Scion
Cat Scion.description:
无论你是凯特西的后裔、照料一只胸前有白斑的受伤黑猫直至康复却得到超出预期收获的爱猫人士，还是完全出于其他原因，你都获得了采取猫形态的能力。以具有专注、神秘、变形和变化特征的单动作，你可以在你的人形形态与猫形态之间来回切换；你的猫形态是一只特定的超小型猫（通常为黑色），胸前有一块颜色截然不同的斑点（通常为白色）。关于你的猫形态的完整规则，见第178–179页的凯特西传承。你可以从上方“额外专长”中选择先决条件为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Item.tRtfw0StihZXTeqe]{Cait Sidhe} 传承的希德专长。

Whether you're the offspring of a cait sidhe, a cat lover who got more than they bargained for after nursing a wounded black cat with a white patch to health, or something else entirely, you've gained the ability to adopt a cat form. As a single action, which has the concentration, occult, polymorph, and transmutation traits, you can switch back and forth between your humanoid form and your cat form, a specific Tiny cat (typically black) with a spot of wildly different color on your chest (typically white). The full rules for your cat form are in the cait sidhe heritage on pages 178-179. You can take sidhe feats from the Additional Feats listed above with a prerequisite of @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Item.tRtfw0StihZXTeqe]{Cait Sidhe} heritage.

Hidden Mind.name: 隐藏心智 Hidden Mind
Hidden Mind.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你在一次意志豁免中失败。

你利用自身真实智能的模糊或隐蔽本质，将袭击你意志的一个效果转移到你所附身的身体或共生持用者身上。重骰这次失败的豁免，并采用较好的结果。若你是附身武器，你在该次重骰中获得+1环境加值；若你是共生武器，则获得+2环境加值，因为你的持用者有更多部分能分散该触发效果的注意。然而，当你以共生武器使用“隐藏心智”时，若第二次掷骰为成功，你的持用者会为你消解这些效果，并且在其意志恢复之前的10分钟内，你无法使用你的传承从持用者那里获得的技能。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You fail a Will saving throw.

You take advantage of the ambiguous or hidden nature of your true intelligence to shunt off an effect assailing your will to your possessed body or symbiotic wielder. Reroll the failed saving throw and take the better result. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to the reroll if you're a possessing weapon, or a +2 circumstance bonus if you're a symbiotic weapon, since there's more of your wielder to distract the triggering effect. However, when you use Hidden Mind as a symbiotic weapon, if the second roll is a success, your wielder diffuses the effects for you and you can't use the skills granted by your wielder from your heritage for 10 minutes until their will recovers.

Ward Token.name: 守护标记 Ward Token
Ward Token.description:
你从自己随身守护物中取出一件自从成为流浪者以来一直随身携带的纪念品，制成了一个标记，它使你得以维持自身。携带该标记时，你无需进食或饮水，并且你每天只需睡眠2小时便可获得相当于8小时睡眠的益处。然而，若你失去该标记，你将陷入疲乏，直到你要么再次找到该标记，要么通过将此专长重训掉来以神秘方式与该标记解除绑定。

You've formed a token from your ward out of a memento you've carried with you ever since you became a wanderer, and it allows you to sustain yourself. You don't need to eat or drink while carrying the token, and you need only 2 hours of sleep per day to gain the benefits of 8 hours of sleep. However, if you lose the token, you become fatigued until you either find the token again or mystically decouple yourself from the token by retraining out of this feat.

Orichalcum Synthesis.name: 星铜合成 Orichalcum Synthesis
Orichalcum Synthesis.description:
你将传说中的天金奥利哈钢碎片，或其某些神秘的扭曲时代性质，融入构成你武器躯体的材质之中。在决定弱点、抗力等的效果时，你被视为奥利哈钢。

You incorporate fragments of the legendary skymetal orichalcum, or else some of its mystical time-bending properties, into the composition that makes up your weapon body. You are treated as orichalcum when determining the effects of weaknesses, resistances, and the like.

Dungeon Loot.name: 地城战利品 Dungeon Loot
Dungeon Loot.description:
你可以将你化身所携带之物的部分因负载与重量造成的不便转移到你的地城中，使你看起来能够携带的东西比旁人预期的更多。你获得运动技能的受训（熟练度）等级；若你已在运动技能中为受训，则改为获得你选择的另一项技能的受训（熟练度）。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.C0Tcelg3BAPhML6J]{Hefty Hauler}技能专长。

You can displace some of the awkwardness of the bulk and weight of whatever your avatar is carrying into your dungeon, allowing you to hold more than someone might expect by looking at you. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Athletics, or trained in a different skill of your choice if you were already trained in Athletics. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.C0Tcelg3BAPhML6J]{Hefty Hauler} skill feat.

Perfect Attunement.name: 完美调谐 Perfect Attunement
Perfect Attunement.description:
频率 每日一次

你将自己调谐至极致，完美契合你的武器躯体能够移动与攻击的方式，使你在短时间内以自身作为武器时，能够赋予自己无与伦比的进攻能力。你在用自身进行攻击掷骰与伤害掷骰时获得+3状态加值，持续1分钟。然后用自身进行一次打击。若你处于无生命形态，或你是一件具有智能的武器物品，你无法进行打击，并且你将该状态加值赋予你的持用者而非你自己。

Frequency once per day

You attune yourself so perfectly to the way your weapon body is able to move and attack that you are able to grant yourself unparalleled offensive abilities when using yourself as a weapon, for a short time. You gain a +3 status bonus to attack rolls with yourself and damage rolls with yourself, which lasts for 1 minute. Then make a Strike with yourself. If you're in inanimate form or you're an item intelligent weapon, you can't make a Strike, and you grant the status bonus to your wielder instead of yourself.

Transformation Sense.name: 变化感知 Transformation Sense
Transformation Sense.description:
你对变形的本能知识使你更容易发现他人的变形状态，并抵抗敌对的变形效果。你获得+1环境加值，用于察觉检定以辨识某个生物正处于变形或变身效果之下，并用于对抗变形与变身效果的豁免。当你进入一名处于变形或变身效果之下的生物10英尺范围内时，GM会为你掷一次秘密的察觉检定，以让你注意到该生物已变形或变身，即使你没有花费动作进行检定。

Your instinctual knowledge of shapeshifting makes it easier to spot others who are transformed and to resist hostile transformation effects. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to discern that a creature is under a morph or polymorph effect, and to saving throws against morph and polymorph effects. When you come within 10 feet of a creature under a morph or polymorph effect, the GM rolls a secret Perception check for you to notice that the creature is morphed or polymorphed, even if you didn't spend an action to check.

Rejuvenating Gorge.name: 回春峡谷 Rejuvenating Gorge
Rejuvenating Gorge.description:
你能够通过狼吞虎咽异常大量的食物来修复自己并替换受损的血肉。若你狼吞虎咽10分钟，吃下至多相当于1周的食物，你获得等同于你的体质调整值 × 食物所对应的天数的生命值。此效果可与任何你从 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Treat Wounds]{Treat Wounds} 获得的治疗累加。到13级时，你可以吃下至多相当于10天的食物；到17级时，你可以吃下至多相当于两周的食物。

You are able to repair yourself and replace damaged flesh by gorging on unusually large amounts of food. If you gorge for 10 minutes, eating up to 1 week's worth of food, you gain Hit Points equal to your Constitution modifier × the number of days' worth of food. This is cumulative with any healing you receive from @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Treat Wounds]{Treat Wounds}. At 13th level, you can eat up to 10 days' worth of food, and at 17th level you can eat up to two weeks' worth of food.

Sound Control.name: 声音控制 Sound Control
Sound Control.description:
你对周围的声音施加控制，保护自己免受音波与听觉攻击的危险。你获得等同于你等级一半的音波伤害抗力，并在对抗听觉效果的豁免中获得+1环境加值。若你在对抗听觉效果的豁免中掷骰结果为成功，则改为大成功。

You exercise control over the sound around you, protecting yourself from the dangers of sonic and auditory attacks. You gain resistance equal to half your level to sonic damage and a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against auditory effects. If you roll a success on your saving throw against an auditory effect, you get a critical success instead.

Sidhe Hideaway.name: 西德隐居所 Sidhe Hideaway
Sidhe Hideaway.description:
频率 每日一次

你创造一个微型希德领域，用于休息并隐藏于外部世界之外，其入口为一圈蘑菇所构成的环，或称妖精环。你花费10分钟塑造并形成该领域；此后在8小时内，任何穿过妖精环者都会被送入一个小型异次元口袋领域，其中最多可容纳八个中型生物及其道具。大型生物按两个中型生物计算；超大型生物按四个中型生物计算；巨型生物则单独占满该空间。若试图进入的生物过多，则该空间会改为坍塌。

当该空间处于激活状态时，生物可以按其意愿反复离开或进入，只需穿过环的边界即可；但生物在未穿越边界之前无法看见空间边界之外的事物，而且若不使用魔法或先穿过该环，可能并不清楚里面是否有任何东西。虽然妖精环的半径仅有20尺，但其内部的异次元藏身处在里面更大，半径为40尺。

如果你也拥有 @Compendium[battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.wVNpFdNqB5TYvXw7]{Protective Ring} 专长，你可以在激活希德藏身处的同时激活它，而无需额外花费1分钟，并将两种效果系于同一个妖精环。若你如此做，你可以选择至多八个在施放期间在场的生物，使其能够在不触发警报的情况下进入和离开藏身处。

Frequency once per day

You create a minor sidhe realm to rest hidden from the outside world, entered by a ring of mushrooms, or faerie ring. You spend 10 minutes shaping and forming the realm, after which, for 8 hours, any who cross the faerie ring are sent into a small extradimensional pocket realm that holds up to eight Medium creatures and their gear. A Large creature counts as two Medium creatures, a Huge creature counts as four Medium creatures, and a Gargantuan creature fills the space on its own. If too many creatures attempt to enter, the space collapses instead.

While the space is active, creatures can leave or enter as often as they like by passing across the ring's boundary, though creatures can't see past the boundary of the space without crossing it, and it might not be clear that anything is inside without either using magic or crossing the ring first. While the radius of the faerie ring is only 20 feet, the extradimensional hideaway is larger on the inside, with a 40 foot radius.

If you also have the @Compendium[battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.wVNpFdNqB5TYvXw7]{Protective Ring} feat, you can activate it at the same time as Sidhe Hideaway without spending an additional minute to do so, tying both effects to the same faerie ring. If you do, you can select up to eight creatures present during the casting who can enter and leave the hideaway without triggering the alarm.

Insubstantial Form.name: 无实体形态 Insubstantial Form
Insubstantial Form.description:
频率 每小时一次

你可以采取虚体形态，可能帮助你渗透或逃脱。持续 5 分钟，你变为无定形。你失去任何对 AC 的物品加值以及护甲提供的所有其他效果和加值，并且你使用你的无甲防御的熟练度调整值。你获得对物理伤害的抗力 8，并免疫精准伤害。你不能施放法术、启用物品，或使用具有攻击或操作（特征）的动作。你可以滑过细小的裂缝。如果你不是水之雅依，你会变为气态并获得 10 英尺的飞行速度。如果你是水之雅依，你则变为一滩液体，并获得对你的游泳速度的 +30 英尺状态加值。无论哪种方式，你都可以提前解消该效果。

Frequency once per hour

You can take an insubstantial form, potentially helping you to infiltrate or escape. For 5 minutes, you become amorphous. You lose any item bonus to AC and all other effects and bonuses from armor, and you use your proficiency modifier for unarmored defense. You gain resistance 8 to physical damage and are immune to precision damage. You can't cast spells, activate items, or use actions that have the attack or manipulate trait. You can slip through tiny cracks. If you're not a water yai, you become gaseous and gain a fly Speed of 10 feet. If you're a water yai, you instead become a liquid puddle and gain a +30-foot status bonus to your swim Speed. Either way, you can Dismiss the effect early.

Lampad's Weep.name: 灯灵之泣 Lampad's Weep
Lampad's Weep.description:
频率 每小时一次

你在哭泣时将所有狂烈的情绪注入泪水，以悲伤碾碎你的敌人。所有位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内的敌人必须进行一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 意志豁免，对抗你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者，并产生如下效果。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 持续1轮，该生物无法使用反应动作（），并必须在其回合开始时再进行一次豁免；若失败，则该回合中其获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}，因为它无法控制地抽泣。

失败 同成功，但该效果的持续时间为1分钟。

大成功或大失败：失败 同成功，但该效果的持续时间为1分钟，且该生物不会在每个回合开始时再进行任何进一步的豁免，而是改为在1分钟内自动迟缓1。

Frequency once per hour

You infuse all your tempestuous emotions into your tears as you weep, crushing your foes with grief. All foes in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC, with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success For 1 round, the creature can't use reactions and must attempt another save at the start of its turn; on a failure, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for that turn as it sobs uncontrollably.

Failure As success, but the duration of the effect is 1 minute.

Critical Failure As success, but the duration of the effect is 1 minute, and the creature doesn't attempt any further saves at the start of each turn but is instead automatically slowed 1 for 1 minute.

Ooze Shape.name: 软泥形态 Ooze Shape
Ooze Shape.description:
你的核心含有少量来自其他软泥怪的黏液，使你能够在短暂时间内变形为另一种软泥怪形态。你每天可以施放一次@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.0gdZrT9lwO17EIxc]{软泥怪形态}，作为3环的天生异能秘法法术。

Your nucleus contains small amounts of goo from other oozes, allowing you to transform into another form of ooze for a brief time. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.0gdZrT9lwO17EIxc]{Ooze Form} as a 3rd-level innate occult spell once per day.

Serpent's Sight.name: 蛇之视野 Serpent's Sight
Serpent's Sight.description:
你与蛇发协调，从而同时掩蔽所有方向，使你能够避免被夹击。在你与发蛇之间，你获得全向视觉，直到你下个回合开始。这会使你不会被夹击。

You coordinate with your snake hair to cover all directions at once, allowing you to avoid being flanked. Between you and your hair snakes, you gain all-around vision until the start of your next turn. This prevents you from being flanked.

Gremlin Curse.name: 小魔怪诅咒 Gremlin Curse
Gremlin Curse.description:
你对一名敌人施加厄运诅咒，使其大失败并踉跄跌撞。选择30尺内的一名敌人。由于厄运和绊倒他们的摔跤，这个目标会变得笨拙，具体取决于其意志豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标在[[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}内成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

大失败 目标在[[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}内成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，并在[[/br 1d4 #minutes]]{1d4分钟}内成为笨拙 1。

You curse a foe with bad luck, causing them to fumble and stumble about. Choose a foe within 30 feet. The target becomes clumsy due to bad luck and pratfalls tripping them up, depending on their Will save.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} and clumsy 1 for [[/br 1d4 #minutes]]{1d4 minutes}.

Spiky Skin.name: 尖刺皮肤 Spiky Skin
Spiky Skin.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发 你被一次徒手打击或一次使用非触及的近战武器打击命中。

作为对敌人近身攻击的回应，你迅速长出石刺并将其从身体刺出，以报复的方式将敌人穿刺。你对触发生物造成 @Damage[5d10[piercing]] 伤害，其进行一次基础 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。于第11等级以及之后每2等级，该伤害增加1d10

当前伤害：@Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d10[piercing]]

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger You are hit with an unarmed Strike or a Strike with a nonreach melee weapon.

In response to your foe's close quarter attack, you quickly grow spikes of stone and jab those spikes out of your body, impaling your foe in retribution. You deal @Damage[5d10[piercing]] damage to the triggering creature, with a basic @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or your spell DC. At 11th level and every 2 levels thereafter, this damage increases by 1d10

Current damage: @Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d10[piercing]]

Self Repair.name: 自我修复 Self Repair
Self Repair.description:
虽然活的智能武器通常像其他活的生物一样通过治疗或医学进行修理，但你找到了一种像物品一样修理自己的方法，并且你会在休息时自动这么做。你可以使用工艺制作而非医学，对自己进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}。如果你休息10分钟，你会自动修理自己，获得等于你的[[/r (floor(@actor.level/2) * @actor.abilities.con.mod)[healing]]]{体质调整值 × 你等级的一半}的生命值。这与任何你从治疗伤口获得的治疗是累加的。你仍然无法像往常一样从修理动作中恢复生命值。

While living intelligent weapons are normally repaired via healing or Medicine like other living creatures, you've found a way to repair yourself like an item, and you do so automatically while at rest. You can use Crafting, instead of Medicine, to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on yourself. If you rest for 10 minutes, you repair yourself automatically, gaining Hit Points equal to your [[/r (floor(@actor.level/2) * @actor.abilities.con.mod)[healing]]]{Constitution modifier × half your level}. This is cumulative with any healing you receive from Treat Wounds. You still can't regain Hit Points from the Repair action, as normal.

Pit of Snakes.name: 蛇坑 Pit of Snakes
Pit of Snakes.description:
频率 每小时一次

你从头发里扯下几条蛇，并将它们掷出至多120尺远，它们会在落点体型与数量一同增长，在一个@Template[type:burst|distance:20]内制造一个浅但致命的蛇坑来纠缠你的敌人。蛇坑持续1分钟。当你掷出蛇时，区域内的生物必须尝试一次对抗你职业DC或法术DC中较高者的@Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)]豁免，并产生如下效果。未被蛇@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{擒抱}的生物若在该区域内结束其回合，必须尝试一次豁免；而那些已被蛇擒抱的生物则会自动受到[[/r 1d6[piercing]]]。这些蛇仍与你相连，永远不会攻击你，即使你进入该区域也是如此；你还可以用你的与蛇交谈能力与它们交谈。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到蛇造成的[[/r 1d6[piercing]]]。

失败 目标被蛇擒抱并受到[[/r 3d6[piercing]]]。蛇的@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Escape]{逃脱}DC等于你职业DC或法术DC中较高者。生物可以攻击一条蛇以尝试挣脱其缠绕。其AC等于你法术DC或职业DC中较高者，且若其受到的伤害大于或等于你的等级，它就会被摧毁。即使被摧毁，仍会有额外的蛇继续在区域内蜿蜒游动，并可在持续时间结束前擒抱生物。

Frequency once per hour

You pull off some of the snakes from your hair and fling them up to 120 feet away, where they grow in size and number, creating a shallow but deadly pit of snakes in a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] to bedevil your foes. The snake pit remains for 1 minute. Creatures in the area when you fling the snakes must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC, with the following effect. Creatures who end their turn in the area and aren’t @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} by the snakes must attempt a saving throw, while those already grabbed by the snakes automatically take [[/r 1d6[piercing]]]. The snakes are still connected to you and will never attack you, even if you come into the area, and you can speak with them using your speak with snakes ability.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes [[/r 1d6[piercing]]] from the snakes.

Failure The target is grabbed by the snakes and takes [[/r 3d6[piercing]]]. The snakes’ @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Escape]{Escape} DC is equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC. A creature can attack a snake in an attempt to release its grip. Its AC is equal to the higher of your spell DC or class DC, and it is destroyed if it takes damage greater than or equal to your level. Even if destroyed, additional snakes continue to slither in the area and can grab creatures until the duration ends.

Intelligent Weapon Lore.name: 智能武器学识 Intelligent Weapon Lore
Intelligent Weapon Lore.description:
在你探寻自己的起源（或者在你的前世曾是一名武器匠，你的心智与灵魂进入了一件武器）时，你对智能武器的奥秘以及如何创造它们了解颇深。你获得制作的受训（熟练度）等级，以及与你的武器魔法根源相关的技能（奥术对应奥秘学，神圣对应宗教，异能对应秘学，自然对应自然）。如果你将会自动在上述某项技能中变为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能中变为受训。你获得“附加学识”专长，应用于“智能武器学识”。

In your quest to understand your origins (or in your previous life as a weaponsmith whose mind and spirit entered a weapon), you've learned much about the mysteries of intelligent weapons and how to create them. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Crafting and the skill associated with your weapon magical tradition (Arcana for arcane, Religion for divine, Occultism for occult, and Nature for primal). If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain the Additional Lore feat in Intelligent Weapon Lore.

Petrifying Critical.name: 石化大成功或大失败 Petrifying Critical
Petrifying Critical.description:
当你对附近的敌人打出精准一击时，你可以凑近凝视他们，使其部分石化。每当你以近战攻击获得一次大成功并将要施加其大成功专精效果时，你可以选择使该生物部分石化，作为替代而非正常的大成功专精效果，使其在1轮内成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}，除非其成功通过一次针对你职业DC的 @Check[fortitude|against:class] 豁免。

When you strike a telling blow against a nearby foe, you can lean in to gaze at them and partially petrify them. Whenever you get a critical hit with a melee attack and would apply its critical specialization effect, instead of the normal critical specialization effect, you can choose to partially petrify the creature, causing them to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round unless they succeed on a @Check[fortitude|against:class] save against your class DC.

Oni's Regeneration.name: 恶鬼的再生 Oni's Regeneration
Oni's Regeneration.description:
频率 每日一次

你唤起你恶鬼形态内在的原始力量，使你几乎能从所有伤害中再生。你获得再生 15，持续 1 分钟，它会在你每个回合开始时为你恢复 15 点生命值。当你拥有再生时，你不会因伤害而死亡，且你的濒死（状态）不会增加到会杀死你的数值（多数情况下，这会阻止你超过 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死（状态） 3}），不过若你的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} 数值变为 4 或更高，你会保持 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} 直到你的伤势被治疗。若你受到强酸或火焰伤害（或者若你是火焰 yai，则在你受到强酸或寒冷伤害时），你的再生会失效，直到你下个回合结束之后。

每次你从恶鬼的再生恢复生命值时，你也会再生一个受损或毁坏的器官（若有）。在该效果的持续时间内，你还可以通过花费一个 Interact 动作，将断肢按在其被切断的区域上，以重新接回被切断的身体部位。

Frequency once per day

You call forth the primal power within your oni form, allowing you to regenerate from nearly all harm. You gain regeneration 15 for 1 minute, which restores 15 Hit Points to it at the start of each of your turns. While you have regeneration, you can't die from damage and your dying condition can't increase to a value that would kill you (in most cases, this stops you from going beyond @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying 3}), though if your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} value becomes 4 or higher, you stay @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} until your wounds are treated. If you take acid or fire damage (or if you take acid or cold damage, if you're a fire yai), your regeneration deactivates until after the end of your next turn.

Each time you regain Hit Points from Oni's Regeneration, you also regrow one damaged or ruined organ (if any). During the effect's duration, you can also reattach severed body parts by spending an Interact action to hold the body part to the area from which it was severed.

Resilient Slime.name: 坚韧黏液怪 Resilient Slime
Resilient Slime.description:
你黏滑的身体能够以一种黏稠分泌物蜕去许多种持续的痛楚。你用于移除持续性酸蚀、流血、火焰或毒素伤害的纯骰检定为@Check[flat|dc:10]而非DC 15（或在特别有效的协助下为@Check[flat|dc:5]而非DC 10）。

Your slimy body is able to slough off many kinds of lingering pain with a gooey secretion. Your flat check to remove persistent acid, bleed, fire, or poison damage is a @Check[flat|dc:10] instead of DC 15 (or @Check[flat|dc:5] instead of DC 10 with particularly effective assistance).

Aura Queen's Beauty.name: 灵光 女王之美 Aura Queen's Beauty
Aura Queen's Beauty.description:
你的美貌会令附近的生物分心到笨拙地绊倒自己。任何在你10尺内结束其回合的生物必须尝试一次对抗你的原初法术DC的意志豁免。失败时其获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，持续1轮；大失败时其获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，持续1轮。随后其在接下来的1分钟内暂时免疫。你可以用一个具有专注（特征）的单动作开启或关闭此灵光，并且你可以选择不影响你的盟友。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.d3GxKThp5CamJCRU]{效果：灵光 女王的美貌（失败）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.vEOxtsNBWQCpi7Uh]{效果：灵光 女王的美貌（大失败）}

Your beauty causes nearby creatures to become so distracted that they clumsily trip over themselves. Any creature that ends its turn within 10 feet of you must attempt a Will save against your primal spell DC. On a failure they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 round, and on a critical failure, they‘re @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 round. They are then temporarily immune for 1 minute. You can turn this aura on or off using a single action, which has the concentrate trait, and you can choose not to affect your allies.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.d3GxKThp5CamJCRU]{Effect: Aura Queen's Beauty (Failure)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.vEOxtsNBWQCpi7Uh]{Effect: Aura Queen's Beauty (Critical Failure)}

Tree Meld.name: 融入树木 Tree Meld
Tree Meld.description:
频率 每日一次

你接触一棵体积足以容纳你的树，并与其融合，持续至多10分钟。只要法术不需要穿出树外的效果线，你就可以在树内施放法术。你能听见但无法看见树外正在发生的事情。你可以解消此效果。对树造成的显著物理伤害会将你从树中逐出并对你造成[[/r 10d6]]伤害，而对你施放的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.115Xp9E38CJENhNS]{Passwall}法术会将你逐出但不造成伤害。 

Frequency once per day

You touch a tree of enough volume to contain you and merge into it for up to 10 minutes. You can Cast a Spell while inside as long as the spell doesn't require a line of effect outside the tree. You can hear, but not see, what's going on outside the tree. You can Dismiss this effect. Significant physical damage dealt to the tree expels you from the tree and deals [[/r 10d6]] damage to you, while a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.115Xp9E38CJENhNS]{Passwall} spell cast on you expels you without dealing damage.

Wrath of the Abyss.name: 深渊之怒 Wrath of the Abyss
Wrath of the Abyss.description:
你引导深渊对你这般叛逆者的愤怒，在形而上学层面欺骗深渊能量，使其将你的敌人而非你彻底歼灭，并将其错误引向外部。深渊复仇在 500 尺内一处 @Template[type:burst|distance:60] 中制造一次巨大的腐蚀性爆炸。区域内所有生物受到 @Damage[8d10[acid]] 伤害，而天界生物还会额外受到 @Damage[8d10[evil]] 伤害。效果取决于一次对抗你职业DC与法术DC中较高者的 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大成功或大失败 该生物受到全额伤害，且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 3}。如果它不在其家乡位面，则它必须在一次对抗你职业DC与法术DC中较高者的 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 意志豁免中成功，否则被放逐回其家乡位面。

You channel the wrath the Abyss feels toward a renegade like you, metaphysically tricking the Abyssal energies into annihilating your enemies instead of you by misdirecting them outward. The Abyssal vengeance creates an enormous corrosive explosion in a @Template[type:burst|distance:60] within 500 feet. All creatures in the area take @Damage[8d10[acid]] damage, and celestials take an additional @Damage[8d10[evil]] damage. The effects depend on a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3}. If it's not on its home plane, it must succeed at a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and your spell DC or be banished to its home plane.

Slimy Replica.name: 黏液复制体 Slimy Replica
Slimy Replica.description:
频率 每天一次

你可以用你的黏液制造临时的物体复制品。你花费 1 分钟操控你的黏液，便可塑形成一个由植物或矿物质构成、体积不超过 5 立方英尺的物体。它不能依赖精细工艺或复杂的活动部件，绝不会用来满足成本或类似要求，并且不能由贵重材料或稀有度为非普通或更高的材料制成。它显然是临时造物，因此不能被出售或冒充为真正的物品。

Frequency once per day

You can create temporary replicas of objects out of your slime. By spending 1 minute manipulating your slime, you can form an object of vegetable or mineral matter that's 5 cubic feet or smaller. It can't rely on intricate artistry or complex moving parts, never fulfills a cost or the like, and can't be made of precious materials or materials with a rarity of uncommon or higher. It is obviously a temporary creation, and thus can't be sold or passed off as a genuine item.

Fire's Blaze.name: 烈焰之火 Fire's Blaze
Fire's Blaze.description:
你的火焰飞弹会留下持续燃烧的火焰，引发危险的烈焰。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.LsBLm2I09XDkWmIF]{Infused Criticals} 恶鬼族裔专长作为奖励专长，并且你获得一个大成功或大失败专精效果，你可以将其应用于你的火焰飞弹徒手攻击，使其造成 1d6 持续伤害，再加上你的物品加值（用于徒手攻击掷骰）。此大成功或大失败专精效果造成的持续火焰伤害可与 Infused Criticals 造成的持续火焰伤害叠加。

特殊 若你使用火焰飞弹以 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.qYJopPiOLSVIJpG4]{Focused Missile} 命中，即使不是大成功或大失败，该敌人也会受到 @Damage[2d6[persistent,fire]] 伤害。这可与你在大成功或大失败时从 Infused Critical 或该大成功或大失败专精（如常，记得在翻倍后再应用大成功或大失败的伤害）施加的持续火焰伤害叠加。若你至少为 18 级，用 Focused Missile 命中所造成的持续火焰伤害提高至 [[/r 3d6]]。

 

Your fire missile leaves lingering flames that cause dangerous blazes. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.LsBLm2I09XDkWmIF]{Infused Criticals} oni ancestry feat as a bonus feat, and you gain a critical specialization effect you can apply to your fire missile unarmed attack to deal 1d6 persistent damage plus your item bonus to unarmed attack rolls. The persistent fire damage from this critical specialization effect is cumulative with the persistent fire damage from Infused Criticals.

Special If you hit with a @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.qYJopPiOLSVIJpG4]{Focused Missile} using your fire missile,even if it's not a critical hit, the foe also takes @Damage[2d6[persistent,fire]] damage. This is cumulative with persistent fire damage you apply on a critical hit from Infused Critical or the critical specialization (as normal, remember to apply the damage from the critical hit after doubling). If you're at least 18th level, the persistent fire damage from hitting with Focused Missile increases to [[/r 3d6]].

Spellblade Adept.name: 法术剑士专家 Spellblade Adept
Spellblade Adept.description:
你已专注于你的魔法能量，并获得了对更强大启动效果的许可。选择一个1级法术和一个2级法术，分别来自你武器的魔法根源。它们必须是你拥有许可的法术。你每天可以各使用一次你所选的法术，作为施放法术启动效果。这些启动效果使用你的法术DC。

You've focused your magical energies and gained access to more powerful activations. Select one 1st-level spell and one 2nd-level spell, each of your weapon magical tradition. They must be spells to which you have access. You can use each of your chosen spells once per day as Cast a Spell activations. The activations use your spell DC.

Navigate Life.name: 驾驭生活 Navigate Life
Navigate Life.description:
频率 每日一次

你认为生命中的一切奥秘与难题不过是由无数分岔道路组成、巨大且无限曲折的迷宫，而你穿行这些不同通道的能力简直超自然。只需片刻思索，你就能立刻根据最可能的潜在结果，判断自己是否该尝试应对生命中特定的曲折或回合，从而确定该选择是有益还是有害。除此之外，其具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.41TZEjhO6D1nWw2X]{Augury}的效果。

.

Frequency once per day

You consider all of life's mysteries and problems to be nothing more than one huge and infinitely twisting labyrinth of branching paths, and your ability to navigate through these differing passageways is downright supernatural. With just a moment's thought, you immediately determine whether you should try to navigate a particular twist or turn in life based on the most likely potential outcomes, determining whether the choice will be beneficial or detrimental. This otherwise has the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.41TZEjhO6D1nWw2X]{Augury}.

.

Rampage.name: 暴走 Rampage
Rampage.description:
你在战场上横冲直撞，撕碎较小的敌人并将其践踏在脚下。你疾行至多为你速度的两倍，并且可以穿过至少比你小一级体型的生物所占据的空间。你可以使用由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.RQBlbzOPd4h3Scsj]{恶魔打击} 授予的徒手攻击，对你穿过其空间的每个生物各进行一次打击。即使你在一次横冲直撞中多次穿过同一生物的空间，你也只能对该生物尝试一次此类打击。每次攻击都会计入你的多重攻击减值，但在你完成所有攻击之前，你的减值不会增加。

You rampage across the battlefield, tearing smaller foes apart and trampling over them. You Stride up to double your Speed and can move through the spaces of creatures at least one size smaller. You can make a Strike with an unarmed attack granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.RQBlbzOPd4h3Scsj]{Demonic Strikes} against each creature whose space you pass through. You can attempt such a Strike against the same creature only once in a single Rampage, even if you move through their space more than once. Each attack counts toward your multiple attack penalty, but you don't increase your penalty until you have made all your attacks.

Enveloping Garment.name: 包覆衣装 Enveloping Garment
Enveloping Garment.description:
频率 每小时一次

你用衣袍猛然抽击，可能电击并定住你的敌人。以衣袍徒手攻击进行一次打击，你只能在使用包覆衣袍时进行此打击。该徒手攻击造成1d6电击伤害，具有敏捷与灵巧特征，并属于斗殴武器组。若该打击命中，你伸出衣袍的一部分包覆目标，尝试用衣袍对其进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱}。除陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱}外，在一次成功的运动检定中，目标还会受到@Damage[(@actor.level)d6[electricity]]{你每个等级1d6电击伤害}（若你掷出大成功或大失败则伤害加倍；失败则伤害减半；大成功或大失败则不造成伤害）。由于你的衣袍抽出以抓住生物，即使你没有空手，你也能用包覆衣袍擒抱一个生物。

Frequency once per hour

You lash out with your garment, potentially shocking and immobilizing your foe. Make a Strike with a garment unarmed attack, which you can only make when using Enveloping Garment. This unarmed attack deals 1d6 electricity damage, has the agile and finesse traits, and is in the brawling weapon group. If the Strike hits, you extend a portion of your garment to envelop the target, attempting to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} them with your garment. In addition to becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, the target takes @Damage[(@actor.level)d6[electricity]]{1d6 electricity damage for each level} you have on a successful Athletics check (double damage if you roll a critical success, half damage on a failure, no damage on a critical failure).
