Because your garment lashes out to grab the creature, you can grab a creature with your Enveloping Garment even if you don't have a hand free.

Wall Master.name: 墙壁大师 Wall Master
Wall Master.description:
你从自己真正的地城之躯内部召唤出臭名昭著的坚固墙壁，让你的敌人体会在地城中迷失或被分隔、被迫返回入口的挫败感。这具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kOa055FIrO9Smnya]{Wall of Stone}法术的效果。

特殊 若你拥有陵墓传承，则该专长获得神术（特征）；若你拥有其他人工地城传承（如迷宫或高塔），则获得奥术；若你拥有自然地城传承（如群岛、洞窟、利维坦或巨树），则获得原初。

You call forth the notoriously sturdy walls from within your true dungeon body to subject your foes to the frustration of being lost or separated in a dungeon and forced to return to the entrance. This has the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kOa055FIrO9Smnya]{Wall of Stone} spell.

Special This feat gains the divine trait if you have the mausoleum heritage, arcane if you have another artificial dungeon heritage (such as labyrinth or tower) or primal if you have a natural one (such as an archipelago, caverns, leviathan, or tree).

The Dungeon's Magic Power is Omnipotent.name: 地城的魔法力量是全能的 The Dungeon's Magic Power is Omnipotent
The Dungeon's Magic Power is Omnipotent.description:
你与自己的地城之间的魔法连接强大到已达巅峰，使你能从地城中引出法术——这些法术本应需要技艺娴熟的法师或德鲁伊才能显现。选择一个3级或更低的法术，以及一个4级或更低的法术，二者均须来自与你的地城魔能（Dungeon Dweomers）法术相同的法术列表。它们必须是你拥有许可的法术。你可以将每个所选法术每天施放一次，作为相应根源的天生法术。

Your magical connection to your dungeon is so powerful that you have reached its zenith, drawing out spells from your dungeon that would take a skilled wizard or druid to manifest. Select one 3rd-level or lower spell and one 4th-level or lower spell, from the same spell list as your Dungeon Dweomers spells. They must be spells to which you have access. You can cast each of your chosen spells once per day as innate spells of the appropriate tradition.

Tree of Life.name: 生命之树 Tree of Life
Tree of Life.description:
频率 每日一次

触发 60尺内的一名活生物将会死亡。

你唤来生命之树的一片叶子，用治疗露水为濒死的生物涂抹。你阻止目标死亡，并使目标恢复等同于[[/r (4d8+@actor.classDC.abilityModifier.modifier)[healing]]]{4d8加上你的关键能力调整值}的生命值。若触发的效果是@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate}或死亡效果，你不能使用生命之树。

Frequency once per day

Trigger A living creature within 60 feet would die.

You call upon a leaf of the tree of life, anointing the dying creature with healing dew. You prevent the target from dying and restore Hit Points to the target equal to [[/r (4d8+@actor.classDC.abilityModifier.modifier)[healing]]]{4d8 plus your key ability modifier}. You can't use Tree of Life if the triggering effect was @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate} or a death effect.

Human Infiltrator.name: 人类渗透者 Human Infiltrator
Human Infiltrator.description:
你已渗透人类社会到几乎与人类无异的程度。你获得适用于人类族裔的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry} 专长，并获得一个你选择的1级人类族裔专长。为判定仅对人类生效的人类族裔专长的效果时，你视为人类。

You've infiltrated humanity to the point you're effectively a human as well. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry} feat for the human ancestry and gain a 1st level human ancestry feat of your choice. You are a human for the purpose of determining the effect of human ancestry feats that only work with humans.

Stheno Lore.name: 斯忒诺学识 Stheno Lore
Stheno Lore.description:
你直接向一位始祖学习，或向曾接受其亲授的人学习，或研读由其亲笔写就的第一手资料，因此你对自身族裔诞生之初的岁月有着深刻洞见。你获得宗教的受训（熟练度）等级，以及工艺或表演中自选一项的受训（熟练度）等级。如果你会在其中一项技能上自动获得受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在一项自选技能上获得受训（熟练度）。你还在斯忒诺学识上获得“额外学识”专长。

You learned directly from a progenitor, from someone who had firsthand teachings, or from a primary source written in their own hand, and so you have deep insight into the first days of your ancestry's birth. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Religion and in your choice of Crafting or Performance. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the Additional Lore feat in Stheno Lore.

Guiding Star.name: 引路星 Guiding Star
Guiding Star.description:
你可以放置一颗只有你能看见的微小星辰发光，以借助群星为你指引通往一个物体、地点或自愿的生物的道路。在你再次使用“引导星辰”之前，只要你能看见夜空且该目标也在同一片星空下被照亮，你就总能知晓目标的方向与距离，误差约在 10 英尺半径内。若该目标对你而言将会处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} 状态，你无视该隐蔽，因为星辰会揭示目标的形态。

You can place a tiny star that shines only for you to guide you to an object, place, or willing creature using the stars. Until you use Guiding Star again, as long as you can see the night sky and the target is also illuminated under the same stars, you always know the direction and distance to the target within roughly a 10-foot radius. If the target would be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to you, you ignore the concealment, as the star reveals the target's form.

Yai's Growth.name: 雅伊的成长 Yai's Growth
Yai's Growth.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你在短时间内长得如同风暴巨人一般高大，使你能够高耸于你的敌人之上。你获得4级 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} 的效果，持续1分钟。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You grow as tall as a storm giant for a short time, allowing you to tower over your foes. You gain the effects of 4th-level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} for 1 minute.

Nymph's Eyes.name: 宁芙之眼 Nymph's Eyes
Nymph's Eyes.description:
你拥有宁芙看穿昏暗状态的能力。你获得昏暗视觉。

You possess a nymph's ability to see easily in low light conditions. You gain low-light vision.

Never Again!.name: 绝不再犯！ Never Again!
Never Again!.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 你的回合结束且你被操控、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹（状态）}，或无法行动。

需求 你有1点或更多生命值

当你失去自主时，你因曾遭受可怖且不公的惩罚而产生的创伤会让你本能地猛烈反击，采取孤注一掷的动作。直到你下个回合结束，你压制一个操控你或阻止你行动的效果，即使是像石化（状态）或时间停滞这样的极端效果也可以。除非你在此期间找到了移除该效果的方法，否则该效果会在你下个回合结束时以全部威力恢复。

特殊 即使你被操控、麻痹或无法行动，你也可以使用此反应动作（）。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger Your turn ends and you are controlled, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}, or can't act.

Requirements You have 1 or more Hit Points

When you lose your agency, your trauma from the horrific and unfair punishments you received causes you to instinctively lash out to take desperate action. Until the end of your next turn, you suppress one effect that controls you or prevents you from acting, even extreme effects like the petrified condition or temporal stasis. The effect returns in full force at the end of your next turn, unless you've found a way to remove it in the meantime.

Special You can use this reaction even though you are controlled, paralyzed, or unable to act.

Despairing Terror.name: 绝望恐惧 Despairing Terror
Despairing Terror.description:
频率 每天一次

你引导来自无尽炼狱中的憎恨、恐惧与绝望，以恐惧淹没附近的敌人。所有30尺内的敌人必须尝试一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 意志豁免，对抗你更高的职业DC或你的法术DC，具有以下效果。

大成功 该敌人不受影响。

成功 该敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}。

失败 该敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 2}。

大失败 该敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 3}，并在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑}。

Frequency once per day

You channel the loathing, horror, and despair from your endless purgatory, inundating nearby foes with fear. All foes within 30 feet must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or your spell DC, with the following effects.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Shockwave Stomp.name: 冲击波践踏 Shockwave Stomp
Shockwave Stomp.description:
频率 每日一次

你用蹄子重重踏地，制造出一道巨人般的冲击波震动，以你前方的锥形向地面扩散。你前方 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 内的地面生物（包括在锥形范围内但位于地下的掘洞生物）必须进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗你更高的职业DC或法术DC，并产生以下效果。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该地面生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} 状态，直到其下个回合开始。

失败 该地面生物倒下 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

大成功或大失败：失败 同失败，且该地面生物受到 @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

Frequency once per day

You stomp your hoof onto the ground so hard that it creates a giant shockwave tremor spreading through the ground in a cone in front of you. Terrestrial creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] in front of you (including burrowing creatures within the cone but underground) must succeed at a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC, with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The terrestrial creature is @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]{Off-Guard} until the start of its next turn.

Failure The terrestrial creature falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Critical Failure As failure, plus the terrestrial creature takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage.

Touch Telepathy.name: 接触心灵感应 Touch Telepathy
Touch Telepathy.description:
你可以将自己的心灵与另一名你正接触的生物的心灵调谐。你获得接触心灵感应，使你能够在与任何你正接触的生物共享一种语言时，与其进行无声且纯粹的心灵交流。

You can attune your mind to that of another creature you're touching. You gain touch telepathy, allowing you to communicate silently and purely mentally with any creature you're touching, as long as you share a language.

Warrior's Arms.name: 战士的武装 Warrior's Arms
Warrior's Arms.description:
你那忽隐忽现的额外手臂偶尔提供协助，让你轻松运用双武器技巧。你获得 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.YhnCjiHNlS3nCeoC]{双武器战士奉献} 奉献专长，即使你通常必须先从当前变体中再获得更多专长后才能选择另一个奉献专长，你也仍可获得该专长。

The occasional assistance from your flickering additional arms makes it easy for you to use twin weapon techniques. You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.YhnCjiHNlS3nCeoC]{Dual-Weapon Warrior Dedication} dedication feat, even if you normally couldn't take another dedication feat until you take more feats from your current archetype.

Corrosive Grasp.name: 腐蚀之握 Corrosive Grasp
Corrosive Grasp.description:
你最强力的攻击会将腐蚀性的黏着物溅到敌人身上，用强酸灼烧他们。当你以触手的徒手攻击（或任何通过拟形怪专长或特性获得的徒手近战攻击）造成大成功时，你会对目标造成 1d4 持续性酸性伤害。

Your most powerful attacks spatter corrosive adhesive on your foes, burning them with acid. On a critical hit with a pseudopod unarmed attack (or any unarmed melee attacks gained via mimic feats or features) you deal the target 1d4 persistent acid damage.

Queen's Inklings.name: 女王的灵感 Queen's Inklings
Queen's Inklings.description:
尽管你已与自己的守护对象分离，但你获得了更广泛的联系，使你得以略窥宁芙女王所拥有的原初魔法。选择一个1环原初法术和一个2环或更低环的原初法术。它们必须是你有许可的法术。你每天可以将你所选的每个法术各施放一次，作为原初先天法术。

Though you have separated with your ward, you have gained a broader connection that grants you an inkling of the primal magic a nymph queen possesses. Select one 1st-level primal spell and one 2nd-level or lower primal spell. They must be spells to which you have access. You can cast each of your chosen spells once per day as primal innate spells.

Tree Strider.name: 树行者 Tree Strider
Tree Strider.description:
你可以利用你与植物的联结，在同一物种的树木之间穿行。你每天可以将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.F1qxaqsEItmBura2]{Nature's Pathway}作为原初先天法术施放一次。

You can use your connection to plants in order to step between trees of the same species. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.F1qxaqsEItmBura2]{Nature's Pathway} once per day as a primal innate spell.

Unluck Aura.name: 厄运灵光 Unluck Aura
Unluck Aura.description:
频率 每天一次

如同一只 pugwampi，你以厄运与彻底痛苦的帷幕环绕自身，毁掉附近他人的日子。持续 1 分钟，你在自身周围获得一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 的不幸灵光。灵光内除动物、小魔怪和豺狼人以外的生物会变得极其不走运；若它们进入该灵光（或你启动时它们已在灵光内），它们必须以你更高的职业DC或法术DC为目标进行一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 意志豁免，结果如下。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.0uyMV50rFnULCA8A]{灵光：不幸灵光}

成功 该生物不受影响。它在 24 小时内对不幸灵光暂时免疫。

失败 只要该生物处于灵光内，它进行的所有检定都必须掷骰两次并取较差结果。在它每个回合结束时，它可以再尝试一次意志豁免；若该豁免成功，则结束该效果并获得暂时免疫。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但该生物不能在其回合结束时尝试意志豁免来结束该效果并获得暂时免疫。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.yxgHWK2rTZKKAzDN]{效果：不幸灵光}

Frequency once per day

Like a pugwampi, you surround yourself in a shroud of bad luck and utter misery, ruining the days of others nearby. For 1 minute, you gain an unluck aura in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] around you. Creatures other than animals, gremlins, and gnolls in the aura become extremely unlucky; if they enter the aura (or are in the aura when you activate it), they must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC with the following results.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.0uyMV50rFnULCA8A]{Aura: Unluck Aura}

Success The creature is unaffected. They are temporarily immune to unluck aura for 24 hours.

Failure The creature must roll twice and take the worse result on all checks they make as long as they are within the aura. At the end of each of their turns, they can attempt another Will save, ending the effect and becoming temporarily immune on a successful save.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature can't attempt Will saves at the end of its turns to end the effect and become temporarily immune.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.yxgHWK2rTZKKAzDN]{Effect: Unluck Aura}

Shattering Shriek.name: 粉碎尖啸 Shattering Shriek
Shattering Shriek.description:
你释放出一声粉碎性的尖啸，令人想起尤瑞亚勒斯的强力嘶鸣，对石化的生物尤为凶残。你对30尺内一个无人看管的物体造成等同于[[/r (1d4*@actor.level)[sonic]]]{1d4 × 你的等级}的音波伤害，只要该物体的硬度小于或等于你等级的一半，你便无视该物体的硬度。若你的目标是一个处于@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{石化}状态的生物，则你造成最大伤害，并改为无视小于或等于你等级的硬度。

You unleash a shattering shriek, reminiscent of the mighty cry of euryales, which is especially vicious against petrified creatures. You deal an amount of sonic damage equal to [[/r (1d4*@actor.level)[sonic]]]{1d4 × your level} to a single unattended object within 30 feet, ignoring the object’s Hardness as long as it is less than or equal to half your level. If your target is a @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{Petrified} creature, you deal maximum damage and ignore Hardness less than or equal to your level instead.

Ooze Aegis.name: 软泥守护 Ooze Aegis
Ooze Aegis.description:
你的软泥体对几乎存在的每一种能量以及毒素都有抗力。你获得抗力 5，对抗酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰、力场、精神、负能量、毒素、正能量以及音波伤害。

Your ooze body is resistant to almost every kind of energy in existence, as well as to poison. You gain resistance 5 to acid, cold, electricity, fire, force, mental, negative, poison, positive, and sonic damage.

Nature's Fury.name: 自然之怒 Nature's Fury
Nature's Fury.description:
当你击倒敌人时，自然会作出回应，代替你继续伤害他们。当你使用拳头攻击，或使用由宁芙族裔专长获得的徒手攻击造成大成功时，你会造成 1d4 持续伤害，其伤害类型取决于你的传承：asteria 为钝击（你扭曲他们周围的空间）与 aura（疾风不断猛击他们），dryad 为穿刺（带刺藤蔓缠附在他们身上），epimelid 为挥砍（如剃刀般锋利的草刃割入他们体内），hesperid 为火焰，lampad 为精神（他们被沉重的情绪所淹没），maenad 为毒素（你让他们暴露于毒剂），或 naiad 为寒冷（冰冷的水带走热量，使他们出现轻度失温）。若你拥有上述未列出的其他传承，则该持续伤害为钝击。

When you strike your foe down, nature responds, continuing to harm them in your place. On a critical hit with your fist attack or an unarmed attack gained from a nymph ancestry feat, you deal 1d4 persistent damage with the damage type depending on your heritage: bludgeoning for asteria (as you warp space around them) and aura (as flurrying winds continually pummel them), piercing for dryad (as thorny vines cling to them), slashing for epimelid (as grass sharpened to razors cuts into them), fire for hesperid, mental for lampad (as they are overwhelmed with heavy emotions), poison for maenad (as you expose them to a toxin), or cold for naiad (as the chill water leeches heat and gives them mild hypothermia). If you have another heritage that isn't listed above, the persistent damage is bludgeoning.

Blood Splatter.name: 血液飞溅 Blood Splatter
Blood Splatter.description:
你保留的酸性黏液比大多数拒绝其血腥罪孽的叛逆巴巴乌更多。你可以每小时使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.xorlcY1YBzidwL6C]{Reactive Slime}，而不是每天一次。

You've retained more acidic slime than most renegade babaus who reject their bloody sin. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-actions.Item.xorlcY1YBzidwL6C]{Reactive Slime} once per hour instead of once per day.

Gremlin Lice.name: 小魔怪虱子 Gremlin Lice
Gremlin Lice.description:
你交到了一些会在冒险中与你并肩作战的朋友……不幸的是，对你周围的其他所有人来说，这些新朋友是一群小魔怪虱子。你与其他小魔怪不受影响，但这些小魔怪虱子会在你打出漂亮一击时侵扰敌人。以近战徒手攻击大成功或大失败命中时，你可以选择让你的目标根据其对抗你职业DC的 @Check[reflex|against:class] 豁免而被虱子侵扰。这是一种大成功或大失败专精效果。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 虱子未能完全侵扰目标，但目标仍会因瘙痒而分心，并在1轮内陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞（状态） 1}，或直到其使用一个交互动作去抓挠止痒为止（以先发生者为准）。

失败 虱子完全侵扰目标。被侵扰期间，目标生物因瘙痒而分心并陷入呆滞（状态） 1，但它可以使用一个交互动作去抓挠止痒，以将呆滞（状态）压制 [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}。侵扰会在24小时后结束，或直到该生物被浸入水中或暴露于严寒环境为止（以先发生者为准）。

You've made some friends who join you on your adventures... unfortunately for everyone else around you, these new friends are a colony of gremlin lice. While you and other gremlins are unaffected, these gremlin lice infest foes whenever you deliver a telling blow. On a critical hit with a melee unarmed attack, you can choose to have your target infested by lice depending on their @Check[reflex|against:class] save against your class DC. This is a critical specialization effect.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The lice don't fully infest the target, but the target is still distracted by itching and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round, or until they use an Interact action to scratch the itch, whichever comes first.

Failure The lice fully infest the target. While infested, the target creature is distracted by itching and is stupefied 1, though it can use an Interact action to scratch the itch to suppress the stupefied condition for [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}. The infestation ends after 24 hours or until the creature is submerged in water or exposed to a severe cold environment, whichever comes first.

Epimelid Queen's Beauty.name: 埃皮梅利德女王之美 Epimelid Queen's Beauty
Epimelid Queen's Beauty.description:
你的美丽如此宁静而令人愉悦，以至于会在削弱生物战斗意志的同时夺走它们的力量。任何在其回合结束时位于你10英尺内的生物都必须尝试一次对抗你原初法术DC的意志豁免。失败则他们在1轮内为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}，大成功或大失败：大失败则他们在1轮内为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}。随后他们在1分钟内暂时免疫。你可以用一个带有专注（特征）的单动作来开启或关闭该灵光，并且你可以选择不影响你的盟友。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.qPARS7GJ5gRfQQl8]{效果：艾皮梅利德女王的美丽（失败）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.BZvh6rytFIo3bX7n]{效果：艾皮梅利德女王的美丽（大成功或大失败：大失败）}

Your beauty is so serene and welcoming that it saps away creatures' strength alongside their drive to fight. Any creature that ends its turn within 10 feet of you must attempt a Will save against your primal spell DC. On a failure they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round, and on a critical failure, they‘re @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 round. They are then temporarily immune for 1 minute. You can turn this aura on or off using a single action, which has the concentrate trait, and you can choose not to affect your allies.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.qPARS7GJ5gRfQQl8]{Effect: Epimelid Queen's Beauty (Failure)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.BZvh6rytFIo3bX7n]{Effect: Epimelid Queen's Beauty (Critical Failure)}

Fey Skin (Nymph).name: 精类皮肤（宁芙） Fey Skin (Nymph)
Fey Skin (Nymph).description:
你与自然的连接使你能够迅速恢复并赋予你极佳的健康，但作为交换，你会像那些仍与其守护对象保持羁绊的宁芙一样，遭受对冷铁的同样弱点。你的最大生命值增加一个等于你等级的数值。如果你休息10分钟，你的魔法会维持并恢复你，使你恢复等于你等级数量的生命值；这与你从 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} 恢复的任何生命值累加。然而，你获得对冷铁的弱点5。

Your connection to nature allows you to recover quickly and grants you great health, though in exchange you suffer the same weakness to cold iron as nymphs who retain their bonds to their wards. Increase your maximum Hit Points by an amount equal to your level. If you rest for 10 minutes, your magic sustains and recovers you, causing you to regain a number of Hit Points equal to your level; this is cumulative with any Hit Points you regain from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. However, you gain weakness 5 to cold iron.

Dance of Ruin.name: 毁灭之舞 Dance of Ruin
Dance of Ruin.description:
你们围成一圈跳舞并吟唱，以制造一次毁灭性的电能爆炸。若在30尺内有更多具有“毁灭之舞”的弗罗克想加入舞蹈，你可以延迟舞蹈以等待更多弗罗克；在此情况下，效果会在最后一名弗罗克使用“毁灭之舞”后发生，或由你们中的一位选择完成该轮舞蹈并引发爆炸时发生。以你们中任意一名为中心的一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]内的每个非恶魔生物都会受到@Damage[2d12[electricity]]伤害，并须进行一次基础反射豁免，对抗所有参与舞蹈的弗罗克中最高的职业DC或法术DC。每有一名额外的弗罗克加入舞蹈，伤害便增加1d12（最多四名弗罗克造成@Damage[5d12[untyped]]伤害）。你与其他弗罗克可以在每轮使用“毁灭之舞”来继续跳舞，最多持续共3轮。该散发的体型每轮增加20尺，且伤害每轮每名弗罗克增加1d12，至多达到一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:60]以及@Damage[13d12[untyped]]伤害（四名弗罗克跳满全部3轮）。在15级时，基础伤害从@Damage[2d12[electricity]]伤害提高至@Damage[4d12[electricity]]伤害，且每加入一名弗罗克以及延长舞蹈的额外伤害从1d12提高至[[/r 2d12]]。这会将四名弗罗克跳满3轮时的最大总伤害提高至26d12。

You dance around in a circle and chant in order to create a ruinous explosion of electricity. If more vrocks with Dance of Ruin within 30 feet want to join the dance, you can delay the dance to wait for more vrocks; in that case, the effect occurs after the last vrock uses Dance of Ruin or one of you chooses to complete that round of the dance and cause the explosion. Each non-demon creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] from any of you takes @Damage[2d12[electricity]] damage with a basic Reflex save against the highest class DC or spell DC among all participating vrocks. For each additional vrock that joins the dance, the damage increases by 1d12 (to a maximum of four vrocks dealing @Damage[5d12[untyped]] damage). You and the other vrocks can continue dancing by using Dance of Ruin each round, for up to 3 rounds in total. The emanation's size increases by 20 feet each round, and the damage increases by 1d12 per vrock each round, to a maximum of a @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] and @Damage[13d12[untyped]] damage with four vrocks dancing for all 3 rounds. At 15th level, the base damage increases from @Damage[2d12[electricity]] damage to @Damage[4d12[electricity]] damage and the additional damage per added vrock and for extending the dance increases from 1d12 to [[/r 2d12]]. This increases the total maximum damage to 26d12 for four vrocks dancing for 3 rounds.

Guardian Statue.name: 守护者雕像 Guardian Statue
Guardian Statue.description:
频率 每日一次

你召唤出一尊小型的自我雕像，它不够大，不会妨碍穿过其空间的移动，不会阻止生物在其空间内结束其回合，也不会提供掩蔽。相反，这尊雕像会改变姿势以防止你与盟友受到伤害。被召唤时，雕像出现在与你相邻的位置，且必须占据一个空的空间。它的AC为10，生命值等于你等级的两倍，且没有硬度。每当你或与雕像相邻的盟友被一次打击命中时，雕像会介入并改为承受该伤害。然而，任何超过将雕像降至0生命值所需的额外伤害仍会结算到原本的目标上。若雕像在1分钟后仍存活，它会崩解成尘埃。

Frequency once per day

You call forth a small statue of yourself, not large enough to hinder movement through its space, prevent creatures from ending their turn in its space, or provide cover. Rather, the statue shifts its pose to prevent damage to you and your allies. When conjured, the statue appears adjacent to you and must occupy an empty space. It has AC 10 and Hit Points equal to twice your level, with no Hardness. Whenever you or an ally adjacent to the statue are hit by a Strike, the statue interposes and takes the damage instead. However, any additional damage beyond what it takes to reduce the statue to 0 Hit Points is still dealt to the original target. If the statue survives after 1 minute, it crumbles into dust.

Abyssal Shift.name: 深渊转移 Abyssal Shift
Abyssal Shift.description:
频率 每周两次

尽管你否认自己的罪孽，你与深渊的连接仍让你能轻松地转移至那里。你获得@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{位面转移}作为神圣的先天法术。你每周可以施放它两次。此能力只能用于在深渊与物质位面之间来回旅行。由于你的身体与深渊的天然共鸣，你可以充当该法术的法术焦点，并且不需要音叉。

Frequency twice per week

Despite denying your sin, your connection to the Abyss allows you to shift there with ease. You gain @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Plane Shift} as a divine innate spell. You can cast it twice per week. This can be used only to travel back and forth between the Abyss and the Material Plane. Due to your body's natural resonance with the Abyss, you can act as the spell focus, and you don't require a tuning fork.

Electricity's Shock.name: 电击震荡 Electricity's Shock
Electricity's Shock.description:
当你将体内的电能集中到你的电能飞弹中时，你可以电击你的敌人并使其更容易受到后续电能效果影响。若你使用电能飞弹以专注飞弹命中，敌人必须尝试一次@Check[fortitude|against:class-spell]豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者，否则可能陷入电击状态。处于电击状态的生物带有电荷，使电能更容易伤害它。它在受到造成电能伤害的攻击时为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}（即使只是额外的电能伤害，例如电击武器），并且在对抗电能效果的强韧与反射豁免检定上承受–2环境减值。若该生物从持续电能伤害以外的来源受到任意数量的电能伤害，或它花费一个交互动作将电能无害释放，则电击状态会提前结束。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标陷入电击状态，直到你下个回合结束。

大失败 目标陷入电击状态，持续1分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.oGcuLA4HcW8iJBPz]{效果：电能的电击（失败）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.ffcCDY77YNT690ox]{效果：电能的电击（大失败）}

When you focus the electricity within your body into your electric missile, you can shock your foe and make them vulnerable to further electricity effects. If you hit with a Focused Missile using your electric missile, the foe must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC or they might become shocked. A shocked creature is electrically charged, making it easy for electricity to harm it. It's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against attacks that deal electricity damage (even if it's only additional electricity damage, such as a shock weapon) and takes –2 circumstance penalty on Fortitude and Reflex saving throws against electricity effects. The shocked condition ends early if the creature takes any amount of electricity damage from a source other than persistent electricity damage, or if they spend an Interact action to discharge the electricity harmlessly.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is shocked until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure The target is shocked for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.oGcuLA4HcW8iJBPz]{Effect: Electricity's Shock (Failure)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.ffcCDY77YNT690ox]{Effect: Electricity's Shock (Critical Failure)}

Abyssal Contagion.name: 深渊瘟疫 Abyssal Contagion
Abyssal Contagion.description:
频率 每天一次

你将触及内的一名生物暴露于强大的深渊瘟疫之中，该瘟疫会从其身上虹吸走灵魂的碎片。若你上一动作是一次成功的近战打击，你可以以单动作使用深渊传染，以你命中的生物为目标；若你正常以双动作行动使用它，你会自动接触触及内的一个目标。该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] 豁免，DC取你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者，以避免感染深渊瘟疫。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到等同于你等级的负能量伤害。

失败 目标在阶段1时感染深渊瘟疫。

大失败 目标在阶段2时感染深渊瘟疫。

深渊瘟疫（疾病）；等级9。目标在疾病被治愈前，无法从深渊瘟疫导致的流失（状态）中恢复。

阶段1 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{流失 1}（1天）

阶段2 流失增加2（1天）。

Frequency once per day

You expose a creature within your reach to a powerful Abyssal plague that siphons fragments of their soul away from them. You can use Abyssal Contagion as a single action if your last action was a successful melee Strike, targeting the creature you hit; if you use it normally as a two-action activity, you automatically touch a target within your reach. The creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] save against the higher of your class DC and your spell DC to avoid contracting Abyssal plague.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes negative damage equal to your level.

Failure The target is afflicted with Abyssal plague at stage 1.

Critical Failure The target is afflicted with Abyssal plague at stage 2.

Abyssal Plague (disease); Level 9. The target can't recover from the drained condition from Abyssal plague until the disease is cured.

Stage 1 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Drained]{Drained 1} (1 day)

Stage 2 drained increases by 2 (1 day).

Void Trap.name: 虚空陷阱 Void Trap
Void Trap.description:
频率 每天一次

你踏入空间的虚空并在远处显现，在身后留下一个微型黑洞来湮灭你的敌人。你立刻将自己以及你穿戴和持握的任何物品从你当前的空间传送到你能看见的120尺内一处空旷的空间。若这会把另一个生物一同带过去——即使你将其装在一个异次元容器中——虚空陷阱将失败，而阻止传送的效果也可能同样阻止你传送。若你成功传送，你可以选择在新位置进入你的@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.B20yTsAL7wqq67ix]{虚空形态}并立即躲藏。此外，若你成功传送，你会在原地留下一个由虚空能量构成的微型黑洞。以你原本的空间为中心的40尺爆发范围内的生物受到@Damage[20d6[void]]伤害，并且可能会被拉向爆发中心，取决于其强韧豁免。被吸向中心属于强迫移动。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半的负能量伤害，并向黑洞中心移动5尺。

失败 该生物受到全额的负能量伤害，并向黑洞中心移动10尺。

大失败 该生物受到双倍的负能量伤害，并向黑洞中心移动20尺。

Frequency once per day

You step through the void of space and appear at a distance, leaving a miniature black hole in your wake to annihilate your foes. You instantly transport yourself and any items you're wearing and holding from your current space to a clear space within 120 feet you can see. If this would bring another creature with you—even if you're carrying it in an extradimensional container—Void Trap fails, and effects that prevent teleportation might prevent you from teleporting as well. If you successfully teleport, you can choose to enter your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.B20yTsAL7wqq67ix]{Void Form} in your new location and immediately Hide. Additionally, if you successfully teleport, you leave behind a miniature black hole of void energy. Creatures within a 40-foot-burst centered around your original space take @Damage[20d6[void]] damage and might be pulled toward the center of the burst, depending on their Fortitude save. Being sucked toward the center is forced movement.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half the negative damage and moves 5 feet toward the black hole's center.

Failure The creature takes the full negative damage, and moves 10 feet toward the black hole's center.

Critical Failure The creature takes double the negative damage, and moves 20 feet toward the black hole's center.

Insidious Weapon.name: 阴险武器 Insidious Weapon
Insidious Weapon.description:
你可以躲避各种魔法效果：这些效果试图辨识你真实本质的讯息时，你会将其改为影响你的持用者而非你自己。侦测与揭示效果会侦测或揭示适用于你持用者的结果，而不是关于你的真实信息，除非该效果的反制等级高于你自身的等级。由于附身武器的持用者是一具空壳身体，依效果不同，这仍可能产生可疑的结果。例如，读取思想的法术与特殊感官会揭示你持用者的思想（或对附身武器而言没有思想），而非你的思想。再举一例，除非你的持用者具有魔法（特征）或类似特征（多数持用者并没有），否则这会阻止侦测效果判定你是魔法的。

You can elude all sorts of magical effects that make attempts to discern information about your true nature by sending them to affect your wielder instead of you. Detection and revelation effects detect or reveal the results appropriate for your wielder, rather than the true information about you, unless the effect has a counteract level higher than your own. Because a possessing weapon's wielder is a vacant body, this might still yield suspicious results, depending on the effect. For instance, spells and special senses that read thoughts would reveal your wielder's thoughts (or no thoughts for a possessing weapon) rather than your own. As another example, unless your wielder has the magical trait or a similar trait (which most wielders don't), this prevents detection effects from determining that you're magical.

Noble Scion.name: 贵胄后裔 Noble Scion
Noble Scion.description:
无论你是道恩·希（daoine sidhe）的继承人，还是被命运选中统治之人，宫廷之道在你的灵魂中歌唱。你在社会获得受训（熟练度）等级，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.JtjnFsOToBLnSRO9]{Courtly Graces}技能专长。若你已在社会中为受训，则你改为在你选择的另一项技能中成为受训；若你已拥有Courtly Graces，则你获得一个你符合条件的、你选择的不同的1级技能专长。你可以从上方列出的附加专长中选取以@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Item.dUiBl3eeFOhISz0s]{Daoine Sidhe}传承为先决条件的希专长。

Whether you're the heir of a daoine sidhe or one chosen to rule by fate, the ways of the courts sing through your soul. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Society and the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.JtjnFsOToBLnSRO9]{Courtly Graces} skill feat. If you were already trained in Society, you become trained in a different skill of your choice, and if you already had Courtly Graces, you gain a different 1st-level skill feat of your choice for which you qualify. You can take sidhe feats from the Additional Feats listed above with a prerequisite of @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Item.dUiBl3eeFOhISz0s]{Daoine Sidhe} heritage.

Water Yai Swimmer.name: 水崖游泳者 Water Yai Swimmer
Water Yai Swimmer.description:
你将自己与水之本性更深地连接在一起，提高了你游泳的速度。你的游泳速度提高至25尺。

You've connected yourself more deeply to your watery nature, increasing the speed with which you can swim. Your swim Speed increases to 25 feet.

All the World's a Maze.name: 整个世界都是迷宫 All the World's a Maze
All the World's a Maze.description:
你将整个广阔的世界视为一座迷宫，只要你知道最终目的地，就能轻松穿行于它的曲折回合之中。当你选择一个目的地时，你狡黠的解迷宫本能会帮助你找到通往该目的地的最高效路线，使你以及与你一同进行陆上旅行的盟友在持续时间内，将来自困难地形的移动减值减半，只要你不偏离本能为你提供的路线。这不会对遭遇中的移动产生任何效果。

You consider the whole wide world to be a maze, and as long as you know your eventual destination, you can navigate its twists and turns with ease. When you choose a destination, your cunning maze-solving instincts help you find the most efficient route to that destination, allowing you and allies who travel overland with you to reduce the movement penalty from difficult terrain by half for the duration, as long as you don't deviate from the route your instincts have provided. This doesn't have any effect on movement during encounters.

Minotaur Lore.name: 牛头人学识 Minotaur Lore
Minotaur Lore.description:
你已学会如何在迷宫中辨路并施展运动壮举。你获得运动与求生的受训（熟练度）等级。若你本会自动在其中一项技能中成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训（熟练度）。你还获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore}技能专长，适用于牛头人学识（技能）。

You've learned how to navigate mazes and perform feats of athleticism. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Athletics and Survival. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} skill feat in Minotaur Lore.

Bull Over.name: 公牛翻滚 Bull Over
Bull Over.description:
你可以轻松冲刺并将一个敌人推开。进入一个体型与你相同或更小的敌人的方格中进行一次Step，而该敌人必须移动到其身后紧邻的空闲空间中。敌人必须移动，即使这么做会让它置于危险之中，但它可以尝试一次对抗你的运动技能DC的@Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.skills.athletics.dc)]豁免，在成功时阻止你的Step。若敌人尝试这么做，它会受到[[/r (@actor.level+@actor.abilities.str.mod)[bludgeoning]]]{等级加你的力量调整值}的伤害，除非它大成功。你不能对一个无法移动到空闲空间中的敌人尝试Bull Over（例如它被坚固的物体或其他生物包围）。

You can rush and shove a foe out of the way with ease. Take a Step into the square of a foe that is your size or smaller, and the foe must move into the empty space directly behind it. The foe must move even if doing so place it in harm's way, but it can attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:resolve(@actor.skills.athletics.dc)] saving throw against your Athletics DC, blocking your Step on a success. If the foe attempts to do so it takes [[/r (@actor.level+@actor.abilities.str.mod)[bludgeoning]]]{level plus your Strength modifier}, unless it critically succeeds. You can't attempt to Bull Over a foe that couldn't move into an empty space (if it is surrounded by solid objects or other creatures, for example).

Not Today.name: 今天不行 Not Today
Not Today.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你豁免失败

你知道你的故事不会在此结束。你注定要继续你的旅程，直到一次命中注定的遭遇。你可以对触发的豁免进行重骰，取两次结果中较好的那个。如果你正在对抗最终战役反派或其他会终结战役的事件所造成的效果，或是适合作为你故事结尾的角色弧线终结事件（由GM决定），则你不能使用“不是今天”。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You fail a saving throw

You know that your story doesn't end here. You're destined to continue your journey until a fated encounter. You can reroll the triggering saving throw, using the better of the two results. You can't use Not Today if you are facing against an effect from a final campaign villain or other campaign-ending event, or character-arc ending event appropriate to end your story (determined by the GM).

Speak With Trees.name: 与树交谈 Speak With Trees
Speak With Trees.description:
作为一棵巨人树的化身，你觉得与其他树木交谈再自然不过。你可以向落叶树或针叶树提问、从它们那里获得回答，并对其使用交涉（技能），具体取决于你是哪一种树。GM决定哪些植物可计入此能力。

As the avatar of a giant tree, you find it natural to speak with other trees. You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with either deciduous or coniferous trees, depending on which type of tree you are. The GM determines which plants count for this ability.

Dungeon Dive.name: 地城潜入 Dungeon Dive
Dungeon Dive.description:
你将与你的地城相匹配的外来困难地形与自身内在地城中的环境碎片交织在一起，使你能够以惊人的速度穿越此类阻碍。若你拥有树木传承，你会无视任何由植物造成的困难地形，例如灌木、藤蔓与灌丛。即使是被魔法操控的植物也无法阻碍你的前进。若你拥有群岛传承或利维坦传承，则本效果不适用于由植物造成的困难地形，而是适用于由浅水造成的困难地形；若你拥有其他传承，则适用于由瓦砾造成的困难地形。

You interfuse patches of foreign difficult terrain that matches your dungeon with fragments of the environment from within your own inner dungeon, allowing you to progress at a startling rate through such obstructions. If you have the tree heritage you ignore any difficult terrain caused by plants, such as bushes, vines, and undergrowth. Even plants manipulated by magic don't impede your progress. Instead of applying for difficult terrain caused by plants, this effect applies for difficult terrain caused by shallow water if you have the archipelago or leviathan heritage, or rubble if you have another heritage.

Minotaur Weapon Familiarity.name: 牛头人武器熟悉度 Minotaur Weapon Familiarity
Minotaur Weapon Familiarity.description:
许多牛头人喜爱巨人斧，而你也不例外。你获得带有牛头人（特征）的非普通武器的许可。你熟悉带有牛头人（特征）的武器，以及巨斧、战斧、手斧、凿斧和手凿斧——就熟练度而言，你将其中任何军用武器视为简易武器，将其中任何高级武器视为军用武器。到第5等级时，每当你用这些武器之一造成大成功或大失败时，你获得其大成功或大失败专精效果。

Many minotaurs love giant axes, and you’re no exception. You gain access to uncommon weapons with the minotaur trait. You have familiarity with weapons with the minotaur trait as well as with greataxes, battle axes, hatchets, adzes, and hand adzes—for the purposes of proficiency, you treat any of these that are martial weapons as simple weapons and any that are advanced weapons as martial weapons. At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with one of these weapons, you get its critical specialization effect.

Snake Form.name: 蛇形态 Snake Form
Snake Form.description:
你可以以魔法变形为一条与你的体型大致相当的蛇；如果你投入更多能量，还能增强你的蛇形的力量。每小时一次，你可以将 @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.wp09USMB3GIW1qbp]{Animal Form} 作为2级神圣先天法术施放，但只能变成蛇。每天一次，当你以此方式施放animal form时，你改为施放3级animal form。

You can magically transform into a snake of roughly your size, and you can boost your snake form’s power if you put more energy into it. Once per hour, you can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.wp09USMB3GIW1qbp]{Animal Form} as a 2nd-level divine innate spell, but only to turn into a snake. Once per day, when you cast animal form in this way, you cast 3rd-level animal form instead.

Internal Plating.name: 内部装甲板 Internal Plating
Internal Plating.description:
你的物体形态内部有额外的几丁质甲板，可以在将你的要害移动到意想不到的位置时，潜在地保护它们免受一次致命打击的大成功或大失败。每当你受到致命打击的大成功或大失败命中时，尝试一次@Check[flat|dc:17]。若成功，则该命中变为普通命中。这与fortification符文不叠加。你额外获得对精准伤害的抗力5。在第20等级时，这提高为对精准伤害的抗力10。

You have additional chitin plates inside your object form to potentially protect your vitals from a critical strike while moving them to unexpected places. Each time you're critically hit, attempt a @Check[flat|dc:17]. On a success, it becomes a normal hit. This isn't cumulative with the fortification rune. You additionally gain resistance 5 to precision damage. At 20th level, this increases to resistance 10 to precision damage.

Slime Form.name: 黏液怪形态 Slime Form
Slime Form.description:
你可以将自己的形态坍缩成黏液怪，一滩大致呈圆顶状、中心有一枚核的水洼。以一个具有专注与操作（特征）的单动作，你可以在你的自然形态与黏液怪形态之间切换其粗略的物理形状。处于黏液怪形态时，你可以穿过狭窄的空间，仿佛你的体型比实际小一级（若你本来已是微型，则可穿过更狭窄的空间）。在你的黏液怪形态中，你没有正常的手臂和手，但你仍能通过形成至多两条临时的拟足来持握并操作物体；这些拟足没有手或手指。每条拟足可以持握一件单手物品，或两条拟足一起持握一件双手物品。

默认情况下，就持握与操作物品而言，其运作方式与你平常相同，不过由GM裁定，某些操作动作在黏液怪形态下可能更容易，而另一些可能更困难。处于黏液怪形态时，你无法再进行拳击徒手攻击（或大多数其他需要特定身体部位、而你的黏液怪形态并不具备的徒手攻击），不过你仍然可以像平常一样在黏液怪形态下进行徒手攻击。

你的黏液怪形态会持续，直到你再次使用此动作切换回你的正常形态。

You can collapse your form into a slime, a roughly dome-shaped puddle with a nucleus at the center. As a single action, which has the concentrate and manipulate trait, you can switch their rough physical shape between your natural form and your slime form. While in slime form, you can move through tight spaces as if you were one size smaller than you are (or even tighter spaces if you were already Tiny). In your slime form, you don't have normal arms and hands, but you are still able to hold and manipulate objects by forming up to two temporary pseudopods, which don't have hands or fingers. Each pseudopod can hold a one-handed item, or the two pseudopods together can hold a two-handed item.

By default, this works the same way as normal for you in terms of holding and manipulating items, though at the GM's discretion, some manipulate actions might be easier for you in slime form and some might be more difficult. You can no longer make fist unarmed attacks (or most other unarmed attacks requiring specific body parts your slime form doesn't have) while in slime form, though you can still make unarmed attacks while in slime form as normal.

Your slime form lasts until you use this action again to switch back to your normal form.

Quick Reforge.name: 快速重铸 Quick Reforge
Quick Reforge.description:
你可以如此迅速地重铸自身，以至于你完成变形所用的时间，仅相当于他人恢复专注或稍作喘息的时间。除了在你的每日准备期间使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.6TQtBtBNVcWr4jc7]{Reforge Self} 专长重铸自身之外，你还可以以一个 10 分钟行动来重铸自身，该行动具有专注和操作（特征）特征。

You can reforge yourself so rapidly, the process of transforming yourself is complete in the time it takes others to merely recover their focus or take a short breather. In addition to reforging yourself during your daily preparations with the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.6TQtBtBNVcWr4jc7]{Reforge Self} feat, you can reforge yourself as a 10 minute activity, which has the concentrate and manipulate traits.

Amaranthine Beauty.name: 不凋之美 Amaranthine Beauty
Amaranthine Beauty.description:
你的美貌永恒不朽，且充盈着原初能量；通过触及那不朽的性相，你可以更频繁地放大其效果。你可以每小时使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.DSy9Xk0CYJ0vAN6i]{迷人美貌}，而非每天一次。

Your beauty is timeless and overflowing with primal energy, and by tapping into that immortal aspect, you can amplify its effects far more often. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.DSy9Xk0CYJ0vAN6i]{Charming Beauty} once per hour instead of once per day.

Unseen Saboteur.name: 隐形破坏者 Unseen Saboteur
Unseen Saboteur.description:
你已经学会了如何让自己隐形，以便在不被抓到的情况下肆意破坏。你可以每小时一次以原始先天法术施放4环@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}。

You've learned how to make yourself invisible in order to wreak havoc without being caught. You can cast 4th-level @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} as a primal innate spell once per hour.

Slimy Grappler.name: 黏液擒抱者 Slimy Grappler
Slimy Grappler.description:
你可以用你黏滑的身体的每一部分来擒抱你的敌人。你在运动（或如果你已在运动中受训，则选择你偏好的另一项技能）中变为受训，你的伪足徒手攻击获得擒抱特征，并且即使你没有空闲的手，你也可以通过将生物部分吸收到你身体的任何部位来 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple} 生物。

You can use every part of your slimy body to grapple your foes. You become trained in Athletics (or another skill of your choice if you're already trained in Athletics), your pseudopod unarmed attacks gain the grapple trait, and you can @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple} creatures even if you don't have a free hand by absorbing them partially into any part of your body.

Sidhe Magic.name: 西德魔法 Sidhe Magic
Sidhe Magic.description:
你已发展出额外的魔法才能，挖掘出席迪以施法潜能闻名的天赋。选择一个来自灵异法术列表的普通戏法，或你有许可的另一个灵异戏法。你可以随意将该戏法作为灵异先天法术施放。照常，该戏法会被升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）。如果你是艾斯席迪，你也可以选择奥术戏法来代替灵异戏法，并将其作为奥术先天法术施放。

You have developed additional magic talents, tapping into the spellcasting potential for which sidhe are renowned. Choose a common cantrip from the occult spell list, or another occult cantrip to which you have access. You can cast this cantrip as an occult innate spell at will. As normal, the cantrip is heightened to half your level, rounded up. If you're an aes sidhe, you can choose an arcane cantrip instead of an occult cantrip if you prefer and cast it as an arcane innate spell instead.

Second Evolution.name: 第二次进化 Second Evolution
Second Evolution.description:
黏液怪的核心始终具备进化与成长的能力；同样地，你也进化出了第二个传承能力。除你原本的传承外，你获得一个你目前尚未拥有的黏液怪传承。你无法以此方式获得分形传承，因为它取决于你的父母而非你；同样地，你也无法获得任何其他无法在后天获得的传承。

Slimes' nuclei are always capable of evolving and growing, and in the same vein, you've evolved a second heritage ability. You gain a slime heritage that you don't currently possess, in addition to your original heritage. You can't gain the fractal heritage in this way, since it depends on your parent and not you; similarly, you can't gain any other heritage that couldn't be gained later in life.

Muse Scion.name: 缪斯后裔 Muse Scion
Muse Scion.description:
无论你是利亚南·希（leanan sidhe）及其所激发并深爱的艺术家的后裔，还是一位你的灵感令其获得新生而非过早入土的艺术家，你自己已成为一位缪斯。你可以在至少持续 10 分钟的亲密交谈或其他互动过程中，选择向一名自愿的生物提供你的协助。这具有与利亚南·希传承能力相同的效果。你可以从上方所列的额外专长中选择具有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Item.ermc38rJtI9iGAu8]{Leanan Sidhe} 传承作为先决条件的希迪专长。

Whether you're the descendant of a leanan sidhe and a beloved artist they inspired, or an artist whose inspiration led to a new life instead of an early grave, you've become a muse yourself. You can choose to grant a willing creature your assistance over the course of an intimate conversation or other interaction taking at least 10 minutes. This has the same effects as for the leanan sidhe heritage ability. You can take sidhe feats from the Additional Feats listed above with a prerequisite of @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Item.ermc38rJtI9iGAu8]{Leanan Sidhe} heritage.

Doppelganger's Fashion.name: 变形怪的时尚 Doppelganger's Fashion
Doppelganger's Fashion.description:
你花费1分钟专注于你的衣着以延展你的变形能力，使你能够调整它以适配你的形态。你可以改变你衣着的颜色、质地、图案以及细微的设计元素，但不能改变整体外形、体型或用途。这些改变不能提升制作质量或提高艺术性，但你可以降低美观度。你不会变成不同的材质，也不会创造出比该物体原本组成部分更多的材料。该物体的统计数据也保持不变。该效果为永久。

You spend 1 minute focusing on your outfit to extend your shapeshifting, allowing you to alter it to fit your form. You can change your outfit's color, texture, pattern, and minor design elements, but not the overall shape, size, or purpose. The changes can't increase the craft quality or increase the artistry, but you can decrease the aesthetic appeal. You don't change to a different material or create more material than what's originally part of the object. The object's statistics also remain unchanged. The effect is permanent.

Hesperid Magic.name: 赫斯珀里得魔法 Hesperid Magic
Hesperid Magic.description:
你控制与扭曲光线的能力使你能够照亮隐藏的敌人，也能用幻术为自己伪装。你每天可以施放一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HRb2doyaLtaoCfi3]{Faerie Fire}，并且每小时可以施放一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]{Illusory Disguise}，两者均为原初天生法术。

Your ability to control and bend light allows you to illuminate hidden foes, as well as to disguise yourself with illusions. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HRb2doyaLtaoCfi3]{Faerie Fire} once per day and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]{Illusory Disguise} once per hour, both as primal innate spells.

Combine Blade.name: 复合刃 Combine Blade
Combine Blade.description:
你可以使用不同的拟足组合来改变你的刀刃徒手攻击的属性。当你为原本专长中的任一选项使用 Mimic Blade 时，该刀刃为 modular 穿刺和钝击。现在，当你使用 Mimic Blade 时也可以选择以下选项；这会使用你的两条拟足，这意味着你在使用它们时无法操作或持有物品：

  • 你将两条拟足结合在一起，在一条极长拟足的末端形成一把格外致命的刀刃，能够以强劲的动量挥砍。你的刀刃造成 [[/r 1d8[slashing]]] 伤害，并具有 deadly d8、forceful 与 触及 特征。
  • 你将两条拟足结合在一起，形成一把巨大的弯曲刀刃。你的刀刃造成 [[/r 1d10[slashing]]] 伤害，并具有 forceful 与 sweep 特征。

     

You can use different combinations of pseudopods in order to alter the properties of your blade unarmed attack. When you Mimic Blade for either of the choices from the original feat, the blade is modular piercing and bludgeoning. You can now also choose the following options when you use Mimic Blade, which uses both of your pseudopods, meaning you can't manipulate or hold items while using them:

  • You combine both pseudopods together to form an especially deadly blade at the end of an extremely long pseudopod that can swing with forceful momentum. Your blade deals [[/r 1d8[slashing]]] damage and has the deadly d8, forceful, and reach traits.
  • You combine both pseudopods together to form an enormous curved blade. Your blade deals [[/r 1d10[slashing]]] damage and has the forceful and sweep traits.

Oracular Insight.name: 神谕洞察 Oracular Insight
Oracular Insight.description:
你与宇宙中某个不可见的性相有着深刻的联系，并且能够汲取由斯忒诺亲自传下的、对可能未来的神谕式理解。你每小时可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.41TZEjhO6D1nWw2X]{Augury}作为一次神圣先天法术施放一次。

You have a deep connection to an unseen aspect of the universe and can tap into an oracular understanding of possible futures passed down from Stheno herself. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.41TZEjhO6D1nWw2X]{Augury} once per hour as a divine innate spell.

Frenzied Slashes.name: 狂乱斩击 Frenzied Slashes
Frenzied Slashes.description:
你狂乱地挥击并拥抱混沌，进行一连串可能撕碎你敌人的攻击。用同一把武器或徒手攻击，对同一目标进行三次近战打击，每次承受–4减值。这算作三次攻击以计算你的多重攻击减值，但在你完成全部三次攻击之前，你不会提高该减值。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙2}状态，持续到你下一回合开始为止。若你用由@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.RQBlbzOPd4h3Scsj]{恶魔打击}专长授予的灵巧徒手攻击进行这三次打击，则这三次攻击改为承受–2减值而非–4减值。

You lash out wildly and embrace the chaos, making a series of attacks that might maul your foe. Make three melee Strikes against the same target and using the same weapon or unarmed attack, each at a –4 penalty. This counts as three attacks for your multiple attack penalty, but you don't increase the penalty until after you make all three attacks. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} condition until the beginning of your next turn. If you made your three Strikes with an agile unarmed attack granted by the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.RQBlbzOPd4h3Scsj]{Demonic Strikes} feat, you take a –2 penalty on the three attacks instead of a –4 penalty.

Smasher.name: 粉碎者 Smasher
Smasher.description:
你以打破常规的方式解决任何问题，使你在需要诉诸暴力的时候更容易破坏事物。你的打击在对具有硬度的物体和生物进行时，会无视1点硬度。若你使用带有数值大于1的强度符文的武器或徒手攻击进行一次打击，你改为无视等同于该数值的硬度，使用+3强度符文时最多可无视3点硬度。

You smash an outside the box solution to any problem, making it easier for you to break things when the time comes to use violence. Your Strikes ignore 1 Hardness from objects and creatures that have Hardness. If you make a Strike using a weapon or unarmed attack with a potency rune that has a value greater than 1, you can ignore that much Hardness instead, to a maximum of 3 Hardness with a +3 potency rune.

Misty Stride.name: 迷雾步伐 Misty Stride
Misty Stride.description:
你短暂地让欺瞒性的魔法薄雾环绕自身，使你有机会尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{制造佯攻}，然后 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}。无论你是否成功，在制造佯攻与潜行动作期间，你都会因薄雾而处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态。隐蔽会在潜行动作结束后结束；若你在潜行期间未触及另一种形式的掩蔽或隐蔽，当你的回合结束时，这可能会导致你变为被观测到。

You surround yourself with deceptive magical mist momentarily, giving you the chance to attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion}, then @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}. Whether you succeed or not, you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} by the mist during both the Create a Diversion and the Sneak actions. The concealment ends after the Sneak action ends, which might cause you to become observed when your turn ends if you didn't reach another form of cover or concealment during your Sneak.

Amphibious Ease.name: 两栖适应 Amphibious Ease
Amphibious Ease.description:
你能轻松穿行于陆地与水域之间；若你是欧莫克斯，则如同流动的污水一般；若你是赫兹洛，则如同你那酷似蟾蜍的身体。你从赫兹洛传承或“流动欧莫克斯”专长获得的游泳速度提升至25尺。

You can move through both land and water with ease, like flowing sewage if you're an omox or like the toad your body so closely resembles if you're a hezrou. Your swim Speed from the hezrou heritage or the Flowing Omox feat increases to 25 feet.

Cunning Strike.name: 狡诈打击 Cunning Strike
Cunning Strike.description:
频率 每日一次

你专注于将战斗中的一切移动视作迷宫的形态，完美地在各种可能性间穿行，并在时机成熟时出手。直到你回合结束前，你下一次进行攻击掷骰时，将该次攻击掷骰掷骰两次并采用较高的结果。该次攻击无视对攻击掷骰的环境罚值，以及因目标处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{Concealed} 或 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden} 而需要的任何纯骰检定。

Frequency once per day

You concentrate on thinking of all the movements of combat as a form of labyrinth, perfectly navigating through the possibilities and then striking when the time is right. The next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll the attack twice and use the better result. The attack ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll and any flat check required due to the target being @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{Concealed} or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Hidden]{Hidden}.

Dungeon? No, I'm Just a Passing Beast Ta.name: 地城？不，我只是个路过的驯兽师 Dungeon? No, I'm Just a Passing Beast Tamer
Dungeon? No, I'm Just a Passing Beast Ta.description:
你已经太久无法在战斗中指挥你的地城住民了。如今，终于，你获得了指挥一只来自你地城之内的强大动物的能力，并说服它作为你的伙伴……而且，你在自己麾下获得更多动物也只是时间问题！

你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.wdmUH6hdat7jpEWt]{Beastmaster Dedication} 专长，即使你通常必须先从你当前的变体中再选更多专长才能选择另一个入门专长也不例外。你从驯兽师变体获得的动物伙伴来自你的异次元地城真我，这意味着除非在地城中战斗，否则它们不在自己的家乡位面，并且可能会被放逐，或受到其他只对不在其家乡位面的生物起作用的能力影响。如果你通过 Additional Companion 专长获得额外动物伙伴，除你当前活跃的伙伴之外的其他伙伴会返回你的内在地城，而不是在附近觅食。你仍然可以照常通过 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.8kGpUUUSX1sB2OqQ]{Call Companion} 来替换它们，并且可以通过 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.5kUQuIP8N57MXhuz]{Beastmaster's Call} 来创造一个当前并不活跃的伙伴的投影，尽管它们在你的地城之内。除此之外，驯兽师变体的机制对你而言与对任何其他驯兽师而言的运作方式相同。

You've gone too long without being able to command the denizens of your dungeon in battle. Now, at long last, you've gained command of a mighty animal from within your dungeon and convinced it to serve as your companion... and it's only a matter of time before you gain more animals under your sway!

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.wdmUH6hdat7jpEWt]{Beastmaster Dedication} feat, even if you normally couldn't take another dedication feat until you take more feats from your current archetype. Your animal companions from the beastmaster archetype come from your extradimensional dungeon true self, which means they're not on their home plane except while fighting in the dungeon and could potentially be banished or affected by other abilities that only work on creatures that aren't on their home plane. If you gain additional animal companions with the Additional Companion feat, the companions other than your active companion return to your inner dungeon, rather than foraging nearby. You can still switch them out normally with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.8kGpUUUSX1sB2OqQ]{Call Companion} and create a projection of a companion that isn't currently active with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.5kUQuIP8N57MXhuz]{Beastmaster's Call}, even though they're within your dungeon. The mechanics of the beastmaster archetype otherwise function the same for you as they do for any other beastmaster.

Hulking Marauder.name: 魁梧掠夺者 Hulking Marauder
Hulking Marauder.description:
你长得比大多数同族传承成员更高大、更具威势；或者如果你是赫兹罗，你已经恢复了昔日完整的身躯体量。你的体型增加至大型（若你尚未为大型），且你的触及增加至10尺。这不会改变你的任何其他数据。

You've grown larger and more imposing than most members of your heritage, or if you're a hezrou, you've recovered the full extent of your former stature. Your size increases to Large you weren't Large already, and your reach increases to 10 feet. This doesn't change any of your other statistics.

Naiad Queen's Beauty.name: 水泽仙女女王的美貌 Naiad Queen's Beauty
Naiad Queen's Beauty.description:
你的美貌使附近的生物目眩神迷、难以招架。任何在其回合结束时位于你10尺内的生物必须尝试一次意志豁免，对抗你的原初法术DC。失败时，他们将成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}，而在大成功或大失败时，他们将成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}。随后，他们会获得1分钟的暂时免疫。你可以用一个具有专注（特征）的单动作来开启或关闭该灵光，并且你可以选择不影响你的盟友。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.RNG5f43fXhs0PiwS]{效果：水泽女王之美（失败）}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.YvCq4R4tC788IoWR]{效果：水泽女王之美（大成功或大失败）}

Your beauty stuns and overwhelms nearby creatures. Any creature that ends its turn within 10 feet of you must attempt a Will save against your primal spell DC. On a failure they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}, and on a critical failure, they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}. They are then temporarily immune for 1 minute. You can turn this aura on or off using a single action, which has the concentrate trait, and you can choose not to affect your allies.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.RNG5f43fXhs0PiwS]{Effect: Naiad Queen's Beauty (Failure)}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.YvCq4R4tC788IoWR]{Effect: Naiad Queen's Beauty (Critical Failure)}

Daoine Sidhe Haughtiness.name: 道因希·希德的傲慢 Daoine Sidhe Haughtiness
Daoine Sidhe Haughtiness.description:
你对自己的自信与高贵的派头使他人难以长时间用情绪或心智效果影响你。你对抗情绪效果的豁免获得+1环境加值，并且每当你受到持续至少2轮的心智效果影响时，你可以将持续时间减少1轮。

Your confidence in yourself and noble swagger make it difficult for others to affect you with emotion or mental effects for long. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against emotion effects, and whenever you are affected by a mental effect that lasts at least 2 rounds, you can reduce the duration by 1 round.

Double Strike.name: 双重打击 Double Strike
Double Strike.description:
你唤起你隐藏的力量猛然出击或两次发射你的飞弹，如同冰矢或虚空矢武术的虚空矢虚空领主一般。用徒手攻击进行两次打击。若两次都命中同一生物，则将它们的伤害合并，用于计算抗力与弱点。照常将你的多重攻击减值应用于这些打击。

You draw upon your hidden power to lash out or fire your missile twice, much like an ice yai or a void yai voidlord of martial arts. Make two Strikes with unarmed attacks. If both hit the same creature, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses. Apply your multiple attack penalty to the Strikes normally.

Grievous Strike.name: 致命打击 Grievous Strike
Grievous Strike.description:
你以造成尤为骇人的创伤为目的发起攻击。进行一次近战打击。在计算你的多重攻击减值时，这次打击视为两次攻击。若此次打击命中，你造成额外 @Damage[2d6[untyped]] 伤害，伤害类型与本次打击相同；若该打击为由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.RQBlbzOPd4h3Scsj]{Demonic Strikes} 专长授予的徒手攻击，则改为额外造成 @Damage[2d8[untyped]] 伤害。命中时，目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}，除非其通过针对你职业DC的 @Check[will|against:class] 意志豁免。大成功或大失败命中时，若目标在针对你职业DC的豁免中失败，则目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}；若豁免成功，则目标获得 frightened 1（即使豁免为大成功或大失败）。在18级时，额外伤害提高至 @Damage[3d6[untyped]]；若该打击为由 Demonic Strikes 专长授予的徒手攻击，则改为 @Damage[3d8[untyped]]。

You attack with the intent to create an especially horrific wound. Make a melee Strike. This counts as two attacks when calculating your multiple attack penalty. If this Strike hits, you deal an additional @Damage[2d6[untyped]] damage of the same damage type, or @Damage[2d8[untyped]] damage if the Strike was with an unarmed attack granted by the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.RQBlbzOPd4h3Scsj]{Demonic Strikes} feat. On a hit, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} unless it succeeds at a @Check[will|against:class] save against your class DC. On a critical hit, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a failed save against your class DC and frightened 1 on a successful save (even on a critical success). At 18th level, the additional damage increases to @Damage[3d6[untyped]], or @Damage[3d8[untyped]] if the Strike was with an unarmed attack granted by the Demonic Strikes feat.

Warding Strikes.name: 守护打击 Warding Strikes
Warding Strikes.description:
频率 每天一次

你以一连串注入神秘能量的攻击来阻挡敌人的攻击。以你自身对一个敌人进行一次近战打击。除打击的正常效果外，它还具有下述效果，持续至多 1 分钟。若你所攻击的敌人死亡，或在任一回合结束时你未以一次近战打击命中该敌人，则此效果提前结束。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.c33X49KF6RaOPZcg]{效果：守护打击}

大成功 你获得对该敌人的 AC +3 状态加值，持续 1 轮，且在效果结束前获得对该敌人的 AC +2 状态加值。

成功 你在效果结束前获得对该敌人的 AC +2 状态加值。

失败 你在效果结束前获得对该敌人的 AC +1 状态加值。

大失败 你不会获得任何额外效果。

Frequency once per day

You ward off your foe's attacks with a string of attacks infused with mystical energy. Make a melee Strike with yourself against a foe. In addition to the normal effects of the Strike, it has the effects below, for up to 1 minute. The effect ends early if the foe you attacked dies or at the end of any turn in which you didn't hit that foe with a melee Strike.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.c33X49KF6RaOPZcg]{Effect: Warding Strikes}

Critical Success You gain a +3 status bonus to AC against the foe for 1 round and a +2 status bonus to AC against the foe until the effect ends.

Success You gain a +2 status bonus to AC against the foe until the effect ends.

Failure You gain a +1 status bonus to AC against the foe until the effect ends.

Critical Failure You gain no additional effect.

Bouncy Slime.name: 弹跳黏液怪 Bouncy Slime
Bouncy Slime.description:
你的黏液怪不会在撞击时噗嗤啪嗒地溅开，而是格外富有弹性，让你能够四处弹跳。当你坠落时，你不会受到坠落伤害。

Rather than sploosh and splat on impact, your slime is especially elastic, allowing you to bounce around. When you fall, you take no falling damage.

Traps and Tricks.name: 陷阱与诡计 Traps and Tricks
Traps and Tricks.description:
你投身于古老而备受推崇的小魔怪根源：破坏物体并设置陷阱。你在手艺（技能）中获得受训熟练度。若你已在手艺（技能）中受训，则改为在你选择的一项技能中获得受训熟练度。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.DMetdzt1VJL2Y62i]{Snare Crafting} 技能专长。

You engage in the time honored gremlin tradition of sabotaging objects and setting up traps. You gain the trained proficiency in Crafting. If you were already trained in Crafting, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.DMetdzt1VJL2Y62i]{Snare Crafting} skill feat.

Focused Missile.name: 聚焦导弹 Focused Missile
Focused Missile.description:
你将能量集中于你的第三只眼，释放出比平常强大得多的飞弹。使用你的@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.8k2etAnsPjxPjIL8]{Third Eye}专长授予的飞弹徒手攻击进行一次打击。若你花费两个动作，射程增量加倍（通常为80尺），且若此次打击命中，你造成额外一颗武器伤害骰的伤害（通常为1d6）。你也可以改为花费3个动作以进一步专注，将额外伤害提高至两颗武器伤害骰（通常为2d6），并将射程增量提高至三倍（通常为120尺）。

若你的等级至少为10级，则该专长的额外伤害翻倍：若你花费2个动作，通常造成2d6点额外伤害；若你花费3个动作，通常造成4d6点额外伤害。若你的等级至少为18级，则该专长的额外伤害变为三倍：若你花费2个动作，通常造成3d6点额外伤害；若你花费3个动作，通常造成6d6点额外伤害。

You focus your energy into your third eye, releasing a much more powerful missile than normal. Make a Strike with the missile unarmed attack granted by your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.8k2etAnsPjxPjIL8]{Third Eye} feat. If you spend two actions, the range increment is doubled (typically 80 feet) and if this Strike hits, you deal additional die of weapon damage (typically 1d6). You can instead spend 3 actions to focus even more, increasing the additional damage to two weapon damage dice (typically 2d6) and the range increment to triple (typically 120 feet).

If you're at least 10th level, the additional damage from this feat doubles, typically dealing 2d6 additional damage if you spend 2 actions or 4d6 additional damage if you spend 3 actions. If you're at least 18th level, the additional damage from this feat triples, typically dealing 3d6 additional damage if you spend 2 actions or 6d6 additional damage if you spend 3 actions.

Liquid Leap.name: 液体飞跃 Liquid Leap
Liquid Leap.description:
需求 你至少有一半身体浸没在液体中。

你使自己部分液化，然后立刻将自己传送进附近的另一处液体中，即使它们并不相连。你从当前的空间传送到120英尺内任意一个被液体完全或大部分填充的未被占据的空间（使得你在新的空间中也至少有一半身体浸没在液体中）。

Requirements You are at least halfway submerged in a liquid.

You partially liquefy yourself and then instantly transport yourself into another nearby liquid, even if they aren't contiguous. You teleport from your current space to any unoccupied space that's full or mostly full of liquid within 120 feet (such that you would be at least halfway submerged in your new space).

Trapper Mimic.name: 陷阱拟形怪 Trapper Mimic
Trapper Mimic.description:
你已经学会如何设置陷阱来保护你的巢穴。你在制造上获得受训的熟练度。如果你已经在制造上受训，则你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训。你获得@Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.DMetdzt1VJL2Y62i]{圈套制造}专长。

You've learned how to set traps to protect your lair. You gain the trained proficiency in Crafting. If you were already trained in Crafting, you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.DMetdzt1VJL2Y62i]{Snare Crafting} feat.

Total Mimicry.name: 完全拟态 Total Mimicry
Total Mimicry.description:
使用一种类似于你常规的物体拟态但更为完整的过程，你会将自己完全变成一个物体，而不只是具有该物体外观的仿制品。你会变成由植物物质或常见矿物构成的物体。你变成的物体不能依赖精巧的工艺或复杂的活动部件，你永远不会满足成本或类似条件，并且你不能由贵重材料或稀有度为罕见或更高的材料制成。在此形态下，他人可以将你当作预定的物品来使用。然而，你没有任何感官器官，无法感知周围世界，唯一例外是当他人接触你时，你能通过你的接触感知；并且你无法采取行动，除非是进行回忆知识，或再次使用完全拟态以恢复为你先前的形态。你可以压缩成体积小于你正常形态的物体，但你的质量保持不变，因此如果你变成一个特别小的物体，你极高的密度可能会暴露你。

Using a process similar to your normal object mimicry but more complete, you transform yourself fully into an object rather than just a facsimile with the object's appearance. You become an object made of vegetable matter or common minerals. The object you become can't rely on intricate artistry or complex moving parts, you never fulfill a cost or the like, and you can't be made of precious materials or materials with a rarity of uncommon or higher. While in this form, others can use you as the intended item. However, you have no sensory organs and can't perceive the world around you except for your sense of touch when others touch you, and you can't act except to Recall Knowledge or to use Total Mimicry again to revert back to your prior form. You can condense down into an object with less volume than your normal form, but your mass remains the same, so if you become a particularly small object, your extremely high density might give you away.

Superbounce.name: 超级弹跳 Superbounce
Superbounce.description:
你比寻常的弹跳黏液怪更能弹跳，蜷缩成一团，横冲直撞四处乱弹。你在进行特技检定以通过@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Tumble Through]{Tumble Through}敌人的空间时，获得+2环境加值。在从至少20英尺的高度坠落或跳下后，你可以反弹回空中，最高可达你坠落距离的一半（如果你是跳跃，则向前的距离也只有一半那么远）。这些反弹会持续，直到你反弹的距离少于20英尺为止。

You bounce even more than normal for a bouncy slime, curling up into a ball and careening every which way. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Acrobatics checks to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Tumble Through]{Tumble Through} a foe's space. After falling or jumping from a height of at least 20 feet, you can bounce back into the air, up to half the distance you fell (and half as far forward if you jumped). These bounces continue until you bounce less than 20 feet.

Trickster's Alarm.name: 骗徒的警报 Trickster's Alarm
Trickster's Alarm.description:
你可以布置一个简单的警报法术来协助你的恶作剧和破坏。你每天可以施放一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4WAib3GichxLjp5p]{Alarm}，作为一个原始先天法术。

You can set up a simple alarm spell to assist in your pranks and sabotage. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4WAib3GichxLjp5p]{Alarm} once per day as a primal innate spell.

Serpentine Discorporation.name: 蛇形解体 Serpentine Discorporation
Serpentine Discorporation.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

正如斯忒诺本人在被击倒后通过她头发上的蛇存活下来一样，你学会了使自己的身体离散并栖居于你的发蛇之中，化为由微型蛇组成的虫群形态。处于虫群形态时，你获得集群（特征），并获得对挥砍与穿刺伤害的抗力10，以及对区域与溅射伤害的弱点10。你可以挤入仅有几英寸宽的空间，通过缝隙让构成你的蛇穿行。你不会获得集群心智能力，因此你仍会正常受到心智效果影响。作为虫群，你无法说话、施放法术、使用需要双手的操作动作、启动你的魔法物品，或以你正常身体进行任何打击；除非是蛇獠牙或蛇颚打击（如果你拥有它们）。你无法使用@Compendium[battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-features.1AaQnwjE9JTcawGv]{蛇之搜寻}，因为你是在直接控制你的发蛇。离散持续5分钟，但你可以提前解消该效果。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.PhwHBKxByy4UpQMR]{效果：蛇形离散}

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Much as stheno herself, upon being laid low, survived through the snakes of her hair, you have learned to discorporate your body and inhabit your hair snakes, taking the form of a swarm of Tiny snakes. While in swarm form, you have the swarm trait, and you gain resistance 10 to slashing and piercing damage and weakness 10 to area and splash damage. You can fit into spaces only a few inches wide, moving your constituent snakes through the gap. You don’t gain the swarm mind ability, so you are still affected normally by mental effects. As a swarm, you can’t speak, cast spells, use manipulate actions requiring your hands, activate your magic items, or make any of your Strikes with your normal body other than snake fangs or snake jaws Strikes, if you have them. You can’t use @Compendium[battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-features.1AaQnwjE9JTcawGv]{Snake Search}, since you are controlling your snake hair directly. The discorporation lasts for 5 minutes, but you can Dismiss the effect early.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.PhwHBKxByy4UpQMR]{Effect: Serpentine Discorporation}

Slime Hug.name: 黏液怪拥抱 Slime Hug
Slime Hug.description:
当你擒抱一个生物时，你会用黏液覆盖它，使其在逃脱后短暂减速。在你对一个生物进行 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple} 且它不再处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} 状态后（通常是因为你没有再次 Grapple 它，或它 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escaped}），它的各项速度在1轮内承受–5英尺的环境减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.0qaR5Mwstzn5vffe]{效果：黏液之拥}

When you grapple a creature, you cover them in slime, slowing them down for a short time after they escape. After you @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Grapple]{Grapple} a creature and it is no longer @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Grabbed]{Grabbed} (usually because you didn't Grapple it again or it @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escaped}), it takes a –5-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.0qaR5Mwstzn5vffe]{Effect: Slime Hug}

Deceptive Mimic.name: 欺诈拟形怪 Deceptive Mimic
Deceptive Mimic.description:
当你处于任何物体形态时，任何人都极其难以侦测到你，而不仅仅是在你偏好的形态下。当你使用物体形态变形为任何物体（而不仅仅是你偏好的物体形态）时，你的欺瞒DC获得+4状态加值，以防止他人看穿你的伪装。

It's incredibly difficult for anyone to detect you when you're in any object form, not just your preferred form. When using object form to transform into any object, not just your preferred object form, you gain a +4 status bonus to your Deception DC to prevent others from seeing through your disguise.

Sidhe Power.name: 西狄之力 Sidhe Power
Sidhe Power.description:
你从体内的西地魔法源泉中获得了更强大的法术。选择一个1级异能法术，以及一个2级或更低等级的异能法术。它们必须是你有许可使用的法术。你每天可以将你所选的每个法术各施放一次，作为异能先天法术。如果你通过 @Compendium[battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.oCUkwkZB92OguTC6]{Sidhe Magic} 或你的艾斯西地传承选择了一个奥术戏法，那么你也可以改为在你愿意时，通过Sidhe Power获得奥术法术，并将其作为奥术先天法术施放。

You've gained more powerful spell from the wellspring of sidhe magic within you. Select one 1st-level occult spell and one 2nd-level or lower occult spell. They must be spells to which you have access. You can cast each of your chosen spells once per day as occult innate spells. If you chose an arcane cantrip with @Compendium[battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.oCUkwkZB92OguTC6]{Sidhe Magic} or your aes sidhe heritage, you can instead choose to gain arcane spells to cast as arcane innate spells with Sidhe Power if you prefer.

Nymph Lore.name: 宁芙学识 Nymph Lore
Nymph Lore.description:
你了解自然的奥秘以及如何进行优美的表演。你获得自然和表演的受训（熟练度）等级。如果你本来会自动在这些技能之一中变为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你选择的一项技能中变为受训。你也在宁芙学识中变为受训。

You understand the secrets of nature and how to make beautiful performances. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Nature and Performance. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also become trained in Nymph Lore.

Plot Armor.name: 剧情护甲 Plot Armor
Plot Armor.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你将因某个效果而降至0生命值，或因某个死亡效果而被立刻杀死

如果你的故事尚未走到尽头，命运将保护你不至于过早退场，有时甚至会离谱到让旁人对作者生硬的牵强附会翻白眼。借由某种怪异的命运转折——例如一只鸟从天而降挡在某个生物的攻击之前、闪电被附近的金属杆导开，或其他类似的安排——你不会从触发该效果的效果中受到伤害，或不会被该死亡效果杀死；由GM酌情决定，这也可能阻止触发效果的其他组成部分（例如，若你的剧情护甲让一条蛇的毒牙没能伤到你，而是令它咬在旁边的树枝上，那么你也不会承受蛇的毒液）。若你正面对来自战役最终反派的效果，或其他将结束战役的事件，或适合作为你故事终章的角色弧线终结事件，你不能使用剧情护甲。哪些效果或事件符合条件由GM判定。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points by an effect or killed instantly by a death effect

If you haven't reached the end of your story, Fate will protect you from a premature ending, sometimes to unbelievable lengths that lead others to roll their eyes at the blatancy of the author's contrived justifications. Through some bizarre twist of fate, such as a bird falling out of the sky in front of a creature's attack, lightning being diverted by a nearby metal rod, or some other contrivance, you don't take damage from the triggering effect or aren't killed by the death effect; at the GM's discretion, this might prevent other components of the triggering effect as well (for instance, if your Plot Armor prevents a snake's fangs from damaging you by causing it to bite into a nearby tree branch instead, you wouldn't suffer the snake's venom either). You can't use Plot Armor if you are facing against an effect from a final campaign villain or other campaign-ending event or character‑arc ending event appropriate to end your story. The GM determines which effects or events qualify.

Collective Pacing.name: 集体节奏 Collective Pacing
Collective Pacing.description:
节奏的变化不一定仅限于故事中的单一角色，你可以运用那些叙事原则，将更多生物牵引到彼界的时间流中。然而，故事中的动作往往会在叙事弧的后段引发反应动作（），你的节奏改变也必须以同样的方式保持平衡。你每天一次可以以7环秘法天生法术施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o6YCGx4lycsYpww4]{Haste} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow} 其中之一。无论你选择将这两个法术中的哪一个作为7环天生法术施放，你都必须在同一天通过“叙事节奏”将相反的法术作为你的3环天生法术施放；反之亦然：如果你在某一天先通过“叙事节奏”施放了3环的 haste 或 slow，你必须通过“集体节奏”将另一个法术作为你的7环天生法术施放。若你是 aes sidhe，你也可以按自身偏好将它们作为奥术天生法术而非秘法天生法术来施放。

Changes of pace aren't necessarily limited to a single character in a story, and you can use those principles of storytelling to affect a greater number of creatures to the otherworldly flow of time. However, actions in stories tend to cause reactions later down the narrative arc, and your pacing changes must balance in the same way. You can cast either @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o6YCGx4lycsYpww4]{Haste} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow} as a 7th-level occult innate spell once per day. Whichever of the two you choose to cast as a 7th-level innate spell, you must cast the opposite spell as your 3rd-level innate spell that same day from Narrative Pacing, and vice versa: if you cast your 3rd-level haste or slow from Narrative Pacing first in a given day, you must cast the other spell as your 7th-level innate spell from Collective Pacing. If you're an aes sidhe, you can cast them as arcane innate spells instead of occult innate spells if you prefer.

Hunted Fear.name: 被狩猎的恐惧 Hunted Fear
Hunted Fear.description:
当你在附近但未被看到时，你可以用喷鼻声与蹄踏声惊吓你的敌人，用这些声音恐吓他们。你可以通过发出骇人的声音，对能听见你但看不见你的敌人使用 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Demoralize]{挫敌气势}。当你这么做时，你不会因为不说话而在该检定上承受 –4 环境减值。如果目标位于迷宫或类似难以穿行的结构中，你在该检定上获得 +2 环境加值。如果目标因此陷入恐惧，他们还会在为避免迷路而进行的生存检定上承受 –2 环境减值，持续 1 分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.pqqD132KrtLx7n85]{效果：猎捕之惧}

You can startle your foes when you're nearby but unseen, terrifying them using the sound of snorts and hoof clomps. You can @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Demoralize]{Demoralize} foes who can hear you but not see you by using terrifying sounds. When you do, you don't take a –4 circumstance penalty to the check for not speaking a language. If the target is in a maze or similarly difficult-to-navigate structure, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to this check. If the target becomes frightened, they also take a –2 circumstance penalty to Survival checks to avoid getting lost for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.pqqD132KrtLx7n85]{Effect: Hunted Fear}

Yai Adept Dedication.name: 雅伊精通者奉献 Yai Adept Dedication
Yai Adept Dedication.description:
你已深入钻研构成你恶鬼形态的元素力量，释放第三眼的内在潜能，使你能在不断扩展的力量中更进一步，同时也让你暴露于虚空的诱惑之下。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.8k2etAnsPjxPjIL8]{Third Eye} 恶鬼族裔专长作为一个加值族裔专长；你的飞弹徒手攻击的伤害骰提升一级，从1d4提升至1d6；其射程增量从20尺提升至40尺。

特殊 如果你已经拥有Third Eye专长，你可以免费将其重训为另一个1级恶鬼族裔专长，无需花费时间进行重训。

You've delved deeply into the elemental power that makes up your oni form, releasing the inner potential of your third eye and allowing you to progress even further in your expanding power, while exposing you to the temptation of the void. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.8k2etAnsPjxPjIL8]{Third Eye} oni ancestry feat as a bonus ancestry feat, the damage die from your missile unarmed attack increases by one step, from 1d4 to 1d6, and the range increment increases from 20 feet to 40 feet.

Special If you already have the Third Eye feat, you can retrain it to another 1st-level oni ancestry feat for free without spending time retraining.

Euryale's Sight.name: 欧律阿勒之final Euryale's Sight
Euryale's Sight.description:
通过训练、魔法适应，或与美杜莎或尤里艾尔的联系，你以一种不同于大多数其他斯忒诺斯的方式使你的双眼适应了黑暗。你获得微光视觉。如果你已经拥有微光视觉，则改为获得黑暗视觉；若你是月视斯忒诺斯，则你与头发蛇都改为获得黑暗视觉。

Through training, magical adaptation, or a link to medusas or euryales, you have adapted your eyes to the dark in a way unlike most other sthenos. You gain low-light vision. If you have low-light vision, you gain darkvision instead, and if you are a moonsight stheno, both you and your hair snakes gain darkvision instead.

Metal Slime.name: 金属黏液怪 Metal Slime
Metal Slime.description:
你的黏液身体转化为液态金属，使你能够抵御各种各样的攻击。你的金属黏液怪是板甲护甲组的中甲护甲，给予AC +4物品加值、敏捷上限+1、检定减值–2、速度减值–5英尺，以及力量值16。你永远不能穿戴其他护甲或移除你的金属黏液怪；然而，即使穿着这套护甲睡觉，你仍不会因此变为@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fatigued]{Fatigued}。最后，你可以如常在你的金属黏液怪上蚀刻护甲符文。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-equipment.Item.uVBDIwJkMRItTwfH]{金属黏液怪身体}

Your slime body transforms into liquid metal, allowing you to fend off all sorts of attacks. Your metal slime is medium armor in the plate armor group that grants a +4 item bonus to AC, a Dex cap of +1, a check penalty of –2, a speed penalty of –5 feet, and a Strength value of 16. You can never wear other armor or remove your metal slime; however, you still don't become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fatigued]{Fatigued} from sleeping in this armor. Finally, you can etch armor runes onto your metal slime as normal.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-equipment.Item.uVBDIwJkMRItTwfH]{Metal Slime body}

Spellblade Supremacy.name: 咒刃霸权 Spellblade Supremacy
Spellblade Supremacy.description:
你已将引导神秘能量注入魔法启动的技艺推至巅峰。选择一个5级法术和一个6级法术，二者均来自你的武器魔法根源。它们必须是你拥有许可的法术。你每天可以各使用一次你所选的法术，作为施放法术启动。该启动使用你的法术DC。

You've reached the apex of channeling your mystic energies into magical activations. Select one 5th-level spell and one 6th-level spell, each of your weapon magical tradition. They must be spells to which you have access. You can use each of your chosen spells once per day as Cast a Spell activations. The activations use your spell DC.

Collapse Into Sludge.name: 坍塌为淤泥 Collapse Into Sludge
Collapse Into Sludge.description:
你将自身连贯的形态部分坍塌为更接近深渊欧莫克斯的酸性淤泥状。持续 1 分钟，你来自欧莫克斯传承的酸抗力从你等级的一半提升为你的等级，并且你获得等同于你等级一半的精准伤害抗力，以及对大成功或大失败的额外伤害的抗力。在一次大成功或大失败中，如果该抗力大于额外伤害，它会将额外伤害降低至 0，但不会降低该次攻击的正常伤害。

You collapse your coherent form partway into acidic sludge more closely resembling an Abyssal omox. For 1 minute, your resistance to acid damage from the omox heritage increases from half your level to your level, and you gain resistance to precision damage and the extra damage from critical hits equal to half your level. On a critical hit, if the resistance is greater than the extra damage, it reduces the extra damage to 0 but doesn't reduce the attack's normal damage.

Tiny Shift.name: 微型位移 Tiny Shift
Tiny Shift.description:
你可以变形为比大多数变形怪更小的形态。除了小型与中型类人生物外，你还可以使用变形怪的伪装变形为超小型类人生物。当你这样做时，你变为超小型，且你的触及变为0英尺。

You can shapeshift into smaller forms than most doppelgangers. In addition to Small and Medium humanoids, you can use doppelganger's disguise to transform into Tiny humanoids. When you do so, you become Tiny and your reach becomes 0 feet.

Wall Of Duplicates.name: 复制墙 Wall Of Duplicates
Wall Of Duplicates.description:
频率 每小时一次

你创造一堵由你自身复制体组成、会攻击任何试图穿过它者的墙。这堵墙是一条直线，高20尺、长120尺、厚2寸，可在你选择的120尺内任何位置出现，并提供掩蔽。当墙被创造时、当生物试图穿过墙时、或当生物在墙内结束其回合时，墙会对墙的空间内的每个生物造成等同于你的武器伤害骰，再加上2个额外武器伤害骰的伤害（不计任何加值、减值或调整值）。进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true] 豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC（取较高者）以减少伤害。若生物在墙被创造时成功通过该豁免，则其被推至其所选一侧最近的空间。试图穿过墙的生物若在该豁免中大失败，则无法穿过，并在墙相邻处结束其移动。大失败其豁免的生物也会承受任何重击专精效果以及额外的致命或夺命伤害，类似于你对其造成了重击。

Frequency once per hour

You create a wall of duplicates of yourself that attack anyone who tries to pass through. The wall is a straight line 20 feet high, 120 feet long, and 2 inches thick that appears anywhere you choose within 120 feet, and it provides cover.
