The wall deals damage equal to your weapon's damage dice plus two additional weapon damage dice (without any bonuses, penalties, or modifiers) to each creature that's in the wall's space when it is created, that attempts to pass through the wall, or that ends its turn inside the wall. A @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher, reduces the damage. A creature that succeeds at this save when the wall is created is pushed to the nearest space on the side of its choice. Creatures trying to move through the wall fail to do so if they critically fail the save, ending their movement adjacent to the wall. A creature who critically fails their save also takes any critical specialization effect and extra deadly or fatal damage, similarly to if you critically hit them.

Voice of Earthen Power.name: 大地之力的嗓音 Voice of Earthen Power
Voice of Earthen Power.description:
当你开口说话时，大地与石头本身都能听见你声音中的力量，并且它们已学会在你召唤时倾听。尽管石头通常并不具备智能，你却是在与“生命精华”交谈——那是存在于世间万物之中的生命力碎片，其人格会受到石头种类的影响；而对于加工过的石材而言，还会受到石头所属结构类型的影响。石头的视角、察觉与知识赋予它一种与人类截然不同的世界观，使它不会认为相同的细节同样重要。石头大多能回答有关过去触碰过它们的生物的问题，以及它们之下或之后隐藏着什么。

When you speak, the earth and stones themselves hear the power in your voice, and they have learned to listen when you call. While stone is not normally intelligent, you speak with the vitae, fragments of life force within all things in the world, which have a personality colored by the type of stone, as well as by the type of structure the stone is part of, for worked stone. A stone's perspective, perception, and knowledge give it a worldview different enough from a human's that it doesn't consider the same details important. Stones can mostly answer questions about creatures that touched them in the past and what is concealed beneath or behind them.

Dungeon Dweomers.name: 地城秘法 Dungeon Dweomers
Dungeon Dweomers.description:
你与自己的地城之间日益增长的魔法联系赋予你更强大的秘术，你可以将其带入周遭世界来为你达成目的。从与你的地城魔法或陵墓或高塔传承戏法相同的法术列表中选择一个1环法术与一个2环或更低环法术。它们必须是你拥有许可的法术。你每天可以各施放一次所选法术，作为相应根源的先天法术。

Your burgeoning magical connection to your dungeon grants you more powerful dweomers, which you can bring forth into the world around you to serve your purposes. Select one 1st-level spell and one 2ndlevel or lower spell from the same spell list as your Dungeon Magic or mausoleum or tower heritage cantrip. They must be spells to which you have access. You can cast each of your chosen spells once per day as innate spells of the appropriate tradition.

Never Today.name: 永远不在今天 Never Today
Never Today.description:
你太过倔强而不肯屈服，即使胜算不在你这边，也能扭转你个人的叙事，从而更频繁地保护自己。你可以每小时使用一次“不是今天”，而非每天一次。

You're too stubborn to give in, even when the odds are against you, allowing you to twist your personal narrative in order to protect you more often. You can use Not Today once per hour, rather than once per day.

Mimic Object.name: 拟形怪 物体 Mimic Object
Mimic Object.description:
你可以迅速改变你的形状，变成任意一个与你体型相同的简单物体。在使用物体形态时，你可以用单动作伪装成任意一个与你体型相同的简单物体，而不只是你偏好的物体形态。当你变形为你的偏好物体形态之一时，你的欺瞒DC获得+4状态加值，以防止他人看穿你的伪装。

You can change your shape quickly into any simple object of your size. When using object form, you can Impersonate any simple object of your size as a single action, not just your preferred object form. When transforming into one of your preferred object forms, you gain a +4 status bonus to your Deception DC to prevent others from seeing through your disguise.

Hair Trigger.name: 发丝扳机 Hair Trigger
Hair Trigger.description:
触发 你使用察觉掷骰先攻。

你和你的蛇发都在警戒危险，因此当危险找上你时，它们能帮助你更快作出反应。为你自己掷骰一次察觉用于先攻，再为你的头发掷骰一次（你的头发将你的察觉调整值 – 5 作为它们的察觉调整值），并使用较高的结果。

Trigger You roll initiative using Perception.

You and your snake hair are both looking out for danger, and so they can help you react sooner when danger finds you. Roll Perception for initiative once for yourself and once for your hair (your hair uses your Perception modifier – 5 as their Perception modifier), and use the higher result.

Doppelganger Lore.name: 变形怪学识 Doppelganger Lore
Doppelganger Lore.description:
你学会了变形怪用于冒充他人并融入社会的技巧，以及关于其他变形怪的信息。你在欺瞒和社交中获得受训（熟练度）熟练度等级。如果你原本会自动在这些技能之一上成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训（熟练度）。你也在变形怪学识中成为受训（熟练度）。

You've learned doppelganger techniques for impersonation and blending into society, as well as information about other doppelgangers. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Deception and Society. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also become trained in Doppelganger Lore.

Soaring Weapon.name: 翱翔武器 Soaring Weapon
Soaring Weapon.description:
你可以自由飞行，而当你使用额外的魔法能量时，你飞得更快。你永久获得等同于你速度的飞行速度，并且当你使用飞行武器专长时，你在1分钟内获得你的飞行速度+20尺的状态加值，而不是在1分钟内获得飞行速度。

You can fly freely and when you use additional magic energy, you fly faster. You permanently gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed, and when you use the Flying Weapon feet, you gain a +20-foot status bonus to your fly Speed for 1 minute instead of gaining a fly Speed for 1 minute.

Grievous Wound.name: 重创 Grievous Wound
Grievous Wound.description:
你残酷的徒手攻击会以持续性的伤害摧毁你的敌人，无论你是否打出关键一击。当你使用从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.RQBlbzOPd4h3Scsj]{Demonic Strikes} 获得的徒手攻击，命中一次 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.q536NM7XagisMM47]{Grievous Strike} 时，你造成 [[/r 2d8]] 点持续伤害，伤害类型与 Vicious Criticals 相同。若你至少为18级，该持续伤害提升为 [[/r 3d8]]。该持续伤害可与来自 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.1cdZ95afnA3rveX8]{Vicious Criticals} 的持续伤害叠加；如同常规，当你的部分伤害仅在大成功或大失败时才适用时，在将 Grievous Strikes 的持续伤害翻倍后，再追加 Vicious Criticals 的持续伤害。

Your grievous unarmed attacks devastate your foes with lingering harm, whether you strike a telling blow or not. When you hit with a @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.q536NM7XagisMM47]{Grievous Strike} using an unarmed attack gained from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.RQBlbzOPd4h3Scsj]{Demonic Strikes}, you deal [[/r 2d8]] persistent damage of the same type as Vicious Criticals. If you're at least 18th level, the persistent damage increases to [[/r 3d8]]. This persistent damage is cumulative with the persistent damage from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.1cdZ95afnA3rveX8]{Vicious Criticals}; as normal when part of your damage only applies on a critical hit, add the Vicious Criticals persistent damage after doubling the Grievous Strikes persistent damage.

Vengeful Anger.name: 复仇之怒 Vengeful Anger
Vengeful Anger.description:
那些欺负或折磨你的人会点燃你的怒火——至少在他们没有把你吓到的时候。只要你未处于恐惧状态，你对过去曾欺负或折磨过你的生物进行武器和徒手攻击所造成的伤害获得+1环境加值。若你的攻击造成超过1个武器伤害骰的伤害，则该加值等于武器伤害骰或徒手攻击伤害骰的数量。该加值也适用于任何在过去1分钟内对你的一次攻击中重击成功并对你造成伤害的生物。

Those who bully or torment you stoke your anger, at least when they aren't scaring you. As long as you aren't frightened, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to damage with weapons and unarmed attacks against creatures who bullied or tormented you in the past. If your attack deals more than one weapon die of damage, the bonus is equal to the number of weapon damage dice or unarmed attack damage dice. This bonus also applies to any creature that critically succeeded at an attack against you and dealt damage to you within the last minute.

Aerial Assist.name: 空中助攻 Aerial Assist
Aerial Assist.description:
每当你能够飞行时，无论是通过法术、物品，还是努力长出自己的翅膀，你都会操控风来协助你的飞行。每当你拥有飞行速度时，你的飞行速度获得+5英尺状态加值，并且在进行特技检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Qf1ylAbdVi1rkc8M]{飞行机动}时获得+1环境加值。若你在特技上为大师，或在原初法术DC上为专家，则你的飞行速度的状态加值提升为+10英尺加值；若你在特技上为传奇，或在原初法术DC上为大师，则你的飞行速度的状态加值提升为+15英尺加值。

Whenever you become able to fly, whether via spells, items, or working on growing your own wings, you control winds to assist your flight. Whenever you have a fly Speed, you gain a +5-foot status bonus to your fly Speed and a +1 circumstance bonus to Acrobatics checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Qf1ylAbdVi1rkc8M]{Maneuver in Flight}. If you are a master in Acrobatics or an expert in primal spell DCs, the status bonus to your fly Speed increases to a +10-foot bonus, and if you are legendary in Acrobatics or a master in primal spell DCs, the status bonus to your fly Speed increases to a +15-foot bonus.

Read the Narrative.name: 阅读叙述 Read the Narrative
Read the Narrative.description:
你不只是偷瞄正在进行的叙事。你对命运的信仰足够坚定，以至于你持续追踪所有可能影响你的叙事，在问题成分萌芽之初就将其扼杀，同时推动那些能让你获益的叙事转折。你花费1小时绘制图表、写下剧情要点、目标与相互交织的叙事，并对比结果后，你会得以窥见命运的安排。选择你计划在1周内参与的一项特定目标或行动，或你预计可能在1周内发生的一个事件。你会获知一条隐晦的线索或一段可能有助于所选事件的建议，通常以押韵的短句或征兆的形式出现。

You don't just take a peek at the ongoing narrative. Your faith in Fate is strong enough that you keep constant track of all possible narratives that might affect you, nipping potential problematic components in the bud while encouraging narrative twists that work out to your own advantage. By spending an hour drawing diagrams, writing out plot points, goals, and interlocking narratives, and comparing the results, you gain a glimpse into what Fate has in store. Choose a particular goal or activity you plan to engage in within 1 week, or an event you expect might happen within 1 week. You learn a cryptic clue or piece of advice that could help with the chosen event, often in the form of a rhyme or omen.

Two Skies, Two Suns.name: 双天双日 Two Skies, Two Suns
Two Skies, Two Suns.description:
尽管你更像你的 stheno 父母，你也与另一位父母的族裔有着深刻的联系，这也是你生活中的重要组成部分。你获得与另一位父母相匹配族裔的 @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry} 通用专长，并且你还获得该族裔的一个1级族裔专长。

While you took after your stheno parent, you have a profound connection to your other parent’s ancestry as well, and it’s a major part of your life. You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry} general feat for the ancestry matching your other parent, and you also gain one 1st-level ancestry feat from that ancestry.

Ventriloquist's Trickery.name: 腹语师的诡计 Ventriloquist's Trickery
Ventriloquist's Trickery.description:
有时你需要抛声或投射其他声音来完成完美的骗局。你每天可以将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yV7Ouzaoe7DHLESI]{腹语术}作为原初先天法术施放一次。

Sometimes it's necessary to throw your voice or project other sounds to pull off the perfect caper. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yV7Ouzaoe7DHLESI]{Ventriloquism} once per day as a primal innate spell.

Unseen Sight.name: 无形视界 Unseen Sight
Unseen Sight.description:
你的双眼能够看见他人看不见之物，并揭示一切隐藏之物。你可以看见 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible} 的生物和物体。它们在你眼中呈现为半透明的轮廓，并且对你而言它们处于 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{Concealed} 状态，而非未被察觉。

Your eyes can that which is invisible to others and expose all that is unseen. You can see @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible} creatures and objects. They appear to you as translucent shapes, and they are @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Concealed]{Concealed} to you rather than undetected.

Oni's Orders.name: 恶鬼的命令 Oni's Orders
Oni's Orders.description:
频率 每日一次

你对一个生物大喊一道具备支配力与威吓性的命令，使你的目标在短暂地遵从你的命令后才停下来思考自己在做什么。你可以命令目标靠近你、逃跑（如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}状态）、放开它正握着的东西、倒下@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，或原地站定。在它服从你的命令之前，它无法延迟或进行任何反应动作（）。效果取决于目标对抗你的职业DC或法术DC（取其较高者）所进行的@Check[will|against:class-spell]豁免。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 在其下一回合的第一个动作中，该生物必须使用一个单动作来照你所命令的去做。

大成功或大失败 目标必须在其下一回合使用所有动作来服从你的命令。

Frequency once per day

You shout a commanding and intimidating order at a creature, causing your target to momentarily follow your order before it stops to think about what it's doing. You can command the target to approach you, run away (as per the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} condition), release what it's holding, drop @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, or stand in place. It can't Delay or take any reactions until it obeys your command. The effects depend on the target's @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure For the first action on its next turn, the creature must use a single action to do as you command.

Critical Failure The target must use all its actions on its next turn to obey your command.

Powerful Charge.name: 强力冲锋 Powerful Charge
Powerful Charge.description:
频率 每分钟一次

你放低你的角，然后向前冲锋，用强力冲撞将敌人刺穿。以直线进行两次跨步，然后用你的角徒手攻击进行一次打击。若你从起始位置移动了至少20英尺，该次打击造成额外1d8点与角徒手攻击相同类型的伤害；若你的角徒手攻击受益于强效或极效打击符文，则该次打击改为造成额外2d8点伤害而非1d8。

Frequency once per minute

You lower your horns, and then rush forward to impale your foe with a powerful charge. Stride twice in a straight line and then Strike with your horn unarmed attack. If you moved at least 20 feet from your starting position, the Strike deals 1d8 additional damage of the same type as your horn unarmed attack; if your horn unarmed attacks benefits from a greater or major striking rune, the Strike deals 2d8 additional damage instead of 1d8.

Profane Vision.name: 亵渎视界 Profane Vision
Profane Vision.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 一个厄运效果将导致你对你的 d20 结果重骰，或掷骰两次并取较低结果。

随着你日益强大，那位既赋予又折磨艾瑞阿勒的无情梦魇会在你遭遇最严重厄运的时刻向你展示力量的一瞥，试图引诱你堕入腐化。不同于通常情况——当一个幸运效果和一个厄运效果同时适用于同一次掷骰时，“亵渎幻视”不会抵消触发的厄运效果。取而代之的是，仍按该厄运效果正常进行重骰或掷骰两次，但最终取两个结果中较高的一个。通过自愿使用“亵渎幻视”，你也会让这场梦魇更多地进入你体内，这可能导致令人不安的梦境或产生更深层的影响，由 GM 决定。

Frequency once per day

Trigger A misfortune effect would cause you to reroll your d20 result or roll twice and take the lower result.

As you have grown in strength, the merciless nightmare who empowers and torments euryales offers you glimpses of power in your moments of greatest misfortune in an attempt to tempt you to corruption. Unlike normally, when a fortune and misfortune effect apply to the same roll, Profane Vision doesn’t cancel out the triggering misfortune effect. Instead, reroll or roll twice as normal for the misfortune effect, but in the end, take the higher of the two results. By voluntarily using Profane Vision, you also invite the nightmare into you a little more, which could cause unsettling dreams or have deeper effects, as determined by the GM.

Smoke Vision.name: 烟雾视觉 Smoke Vision
Smoke Vision.description:
与普通的火牙伊不同，你能像透过稀薄空气一样轻松看穿烟雾。你如同烟雾，烟雾也接纳你。烟雾不会妨碍你的视线；你无视由烟雾造成的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽（状态）}状态。

Unlike ordinary fire yai, you can see through smoke as easily as thin air. You are as smoke, and smoke accepts you. Smoke doesn't impair your vision; you ignore the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition from smoke.

Sculptor's Glance.name: 雕刻师的一瞥 Sculptor's Glance
Sculptor's Glance.description:
频率 每小时一次

汇聚你的魔法与雕塑家的直觉，你将目光集中在30尺内一块边长10尺或更小的石质立方体上，用双眼与纯粹的意志之力将其重塑。除了需要你的注视以及增加的射程外，此能力同样具有@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.McnPlLFvKtQVXNcG]{Shape Stone}的效果。若因生物站在石头上而需要进行@Check[reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)]豁免，则使用你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。

Frequency once per hour

Pooling your magic and your sculptor’s instincts, you concentrate your gaze upon a cube of stone 10 feet across or smaller within 30 feet, reshaping it with your eyes and sheer force of will. Other than requiring your gaze and the increased range, this also has the effects of @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.McnPlLFvKtQVXNcG]{Shape Stone}. If a @Check[reflex|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] saving throw is necessary due to creatures standing on the stone, use the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Aes Sidhe Crafter.name: 艾斯·希德工匠 Aes Sidhe Crafter
Aes Sidhe Crafter.description:
你已学会魔法手艺的远古秘密，踏上创造新领域之路的第一步。你在手艺（技能）中获得受训（熟练度）熟练度等级。如果你本应自动在手艺（技能）中成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训（熟练度）。你获得@Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.xWY5omyIcILNR7y1]{Magical Crafting}技能专长作为加值专长，即使你不满足先决条件。

You have learned the ancient secrets of magical crafting, taking the first steps along the path to building new realms. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Crafting. If you would automatically become trained in Crafting (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain the @Compendium[pf2e.feats-srd.xWY5omyIcILNR7y1]{Magical Crafting} skill feat as a bonus feat, even if you don’t meet the prerequisites.

Void Missile.name: 虚空飞弹 Void Missile
Void Missile.description:
你屈从于虚空那腐化的召唤，将虚空鸦夷最微末的力量灌注于自身。除了来自 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.8k2etAnsPjxPjIL8]{Third Eye} 专长的飞弹徒手攻击外，你的第三只眼还可以产生一次虚空飞弹徒手攻击；该攻击造成负能量伤害，但在其他方面，其伤害数值与射程增量与原本的飞弹攻击相同。任何仅适用于你原本飞弹的特殊元素效果（例如来自 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.fd6tuFN2X8g26m3r]{Fire's Blaze} 或 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.LbtO9AfBWx8dw6D0]{Wind's Howl} 专长）都不适用于虚空飞弹。若你专注于虚空并引出额外力量，你的攻击会将你的敌人无痕地拖入虚空。当你以虚空飞弹徒手攻击使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.qYJopPiOLSVIJpG4]{Focused Missile} 时，若该攻击将敌人打至 0 生命值，则其必须在一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免中对抗你更高的职业DC或法术DC；若失败，则其形体屈服于虚空而被瓦解，仅留下些许尘埃痕迹（其道具仍会留下）；此为死亡效果。

特殊 若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.LsBLm2I09XDkWmIF]{Infused Criticals} 专长，你的虚空飞弹会造成持续负能量伤害，而非你传承通常的持续伤害。

You give into the corrupting call of the void, infusing yourself with the least of a void yai's powers. In addition to your missile unarmed attack from the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.8k2etAnsPjxPjIL8]{Third Eye} feat, your third eye can produce a void missile unarmed attack, which deals negative damage but otherwise deals the same amount of damage with the same range increment as your original missile attack. Any special elemental effect that applies only to your original missile (such as from the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.fd6tuFN2X8g26m3r]{Fire's Blaze} or @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.LbtO9AfBWx8dw6D0]{Wind's Howl} feats) don't apply to the void missile. If you focus on the void and draw additional power, your attacks draw your foes into the void without a trace. When you use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.qYJopPiOLSVIJpG4]{Focused Missile} with your void missile unarmed attack, if the attack brings your foe to 0 Hit Points, it must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or your spell DC or be disintegrated as its form succumbs to the void, leaving only traces of dust (its gear remains); this is a death effect.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.LsBLm2I09XDkWmIF]{Infused Criticals} feat, your void missile deals persistent negative damage, rather than the usual persistent damage for your heritage.

Haniver Wave Glider.name: 哈尼弗波浪滑翔器 Haniver Wave Glider
Haniver Wave Glider.description:
你以类似蝠鲼的方式缓慢地滑过波浪。你获得两栖（特征），使你能够在水下或空气中呼吸，同时获得15英尺的游泳速度。

You glide through the waves slowly, in a manner akin to a manta ray. You gain the amphibious trait, allowing you to breathe underwater or in the air, as well as a swim Speed of 15 feet.

Water Garment.name: 水之衣装 Water Garment
Water Garment.description:
虽然所有水夜叉都能用水塑形成衣物，并且常常做成和服的样式，但你已将你的水之衣物精炼到足以保护你免受伤害。你的衣物给予你AC+1物品加值，且敏捷加值上限为+4。你在你的衣物上受训；它不使用你的护甲或无甲熟练度。从第7等级起，若你的无甲熟练度更高，你可以改用无甲熟练度。此外，你可以在你的衣物上铭刻基础与属性符文。若你如此做，强效符文会提高你的衣物对AC的物品加值，就如同它们通常对护甲所做的一样。你也可以将护符固定在你的衣物上。若你穿戴任何种类的护甲，你衣物上的基础与属性符文将不发挥作用；并且若你在你的衣物已固定一个护符时再穿上固定了护符的护甲，则两个护符都会停止发挥作用，你必须再次将它们固定。与探险者服装类似，你的衣物不是护甲，因此你无法铭刻指定特定护甲类型的属性符文，例如轻型护甲或重型护甲。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-equipment.Item.cD7z5tLk4kJdlrbN]{Water Garment}

While all water yai can form garments out of water, and often do so in the form of a kimono, you've refined your water garment to be powerful enough to protect you from harm. Your garment grants you a +1 item bonus to AC, and a maximum Dexterity bonus of +4. You are trained in your garment; it doesn't use your armor or unarmored proficiencies. Starting at 7th level, you can use your unarmored proficiency if it's better. Furthermore, you can inscribe fundamental and property runes onto your garment. If you do, potency runes increase your garment's item bonus to AC, just as they normally do for armor. You can also affix a talisman to your garment. If you wear armor of any kind, your fundamental and property runes on your garment don't function, and if you don armor with an affixed talisman while a talisman is affixed to your garment, both talismans cease to function and you must affix them again. Like explorer's clothing, your garment isn't armor, so you can't inscribe property runes that specify a particular type of armor, such as light armor or heavy armor.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-equipment.Item.cD7z5tLk4kJdlrbN]{Water Garment}

Undetectable Form.name: 无法侦测形态 Undetectable Form
Undetectable Form.description:
你的变形怪伪装完美无缺，甚至能欺骗揭穿诡计的魔法手段。侦测与揭示效果会侦测或揭示与你外形相符的结果，而非真实信息，除非该效果的反制等级为10或更高。例如，若你伪装成一名守序善良的精灵牧师，用于侦测你阵营的法术与特殊感官会揭示你的阵营为守序善良，而9环或更低的@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{真实视域术}会将你的精灵形态显示为真实。

Your doppelganger's disguise is so perfect, you fool even magical means of revealing the deception. Detection and revelation effects detect or reveal the results appropriate for your form, rather than the true information, unless the effect has a counteract level of 10 or higher. For instance, if you were disguised as a lawful good elf cleric, spells and special senses that detect your alignment would reveal your alignment to be lawful good, and a 9th-level or lower @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{True Seeing} would show your elf form as true.

Call Constellation.name: 召唤星座 Call Constellation
Call Constellation.description:
频率 每小时一次

你召唤出围绕你的七颗星座，扭曲其间路径中的空间，将敌人碾成星尘。你先在自己身上放置一颗闪烁的星标，然后在30尺内的一个生物或物体上放置第二颗星标，再在距离上一颗星标30尺内的一个生物或物体上放置第三颗星标，如此继续，直到总共放置七颗星标。沿着你创造的路径出现六道星光线，连接第一颗星标与第二颗星标、第二颗与第三颗，依此类推。这七颗星标与连接它们的六道线共同构成一个星座。

任何未被星标标记的生物，只要在其回合开始时位于星座的任意一条线中，或在其回合中进入任意一条线，便会受到 @Damage[6d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true] 豁免，豁免DC取你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者。一个生物每回合只能承受此伤害一次，即使它穿过多条线也一样。随着被星标标记的生物与物体移动，星座的各条线也会随之移动。然而，如果任意两颗相邻星标之间的距离曾超过30尺，则它们之间的星光线会断裂；而任何现在已不再有直接路径回到你身边的线也会断裂。该效果最多持续1分钟，但你可以花费一个具有专注（特征）的 单动作 提前结束该效果。

钝击伤害在16级时提高至 @Damage[7d6[bludgeoning]]，在19级时提高至 @Damage[8d6[bludgeoning]]。

Frequency once per hour

You call forth a constellation of seven stars around you, distorting space in the path between to grind your foes into stardust. You place a twinkling star on yourself, then place a second star on a creature or object within 30 feet, then place a third star on a creature or object within 30 feet of the last star, and so on, until you've placed seven stars in total. Six lines of starlight appear along the path you created, connecting the first star to the second star, the second star to the third star, and so on. Together, these seven stars and the six lines that connect them form a constellation.

Any creature that isn't marked by one of the stars and that begins its turn in one of the constellation's lines or enters one of the lines on its turn takes @Damage[6d6[bludgeoning]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC. A creature can take this damage only once per turn, even if it moves through several lines. The lines of the constellation shift as the star-marked creatures and objects move around. However, if the distance between two consecutive stars ever exceeds 30 feet, the line of starlight between the two breaks, and any lines that now no longer have a direct path back to you also break. The effect lasts for up to 1 minute, but you can end the effect early by spending a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

The bludgeoning damage increases to @Damage[7d6[bludgeoning]] at 16th level and @Damage[8d6[bludgeoning]] at 19th level.

Protective Ring.name: 防护戒指 Protective Ring
Protective Ring.description:
频率 每小时一次

你可以在自己周围布置一圈用于防护的蘑菇环，也就是仙灵环，暂时宣称该区域为你所有，并惩罚那些擅自闯入者。此过程需要10分钟，并具有@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.4WAib3GichxLjp5p]{Alarm}法术的效果，但有以下不同：打破环并触发你的警报的生物会因擅闯而受到诅咒，在1分钟内其攻击掷骰与技能检定承受–1状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.hUeuCE6okobyT4Ve]{效果：防护之环诅咒}

Frequency once per hour

You can set a protective ring of mushrooms, a faerie ring, around you, claiming the territory temporarily as your own and punishing those who trespass. The process takes 10 minutes, and has the effects of the @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.4WAib3GichxLjp5p]{Alarm} spell, except that the creature that breaks the circle and triggers your alarm is cursed for its trespass, taking a –1 status penalty to attack rolls and skill checks for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-effects.Item.hUeuCE6okobyT4Ve]{Effect: Protective Ring Curse}

Vermin Ally.name: 害虫盟友 Vermin Ally
Vermin Ally.description:
无论你是否是米特弗利特，你都已发展出一种不可思议的能力，可以与节肢动物（昆虫、蜘蛛、蝎子、螃蟹以及类似的无脊椎动物）交流。你可以向节肢动物提问、从它们那里获得回答，并对节肢动物使用交涉（技能）。如果你是米特弗利特，大多数节肢动物很可能对你抱持冷漠的起始态度，并给你时间来陈述你的理由。否则，这会因节肢动物而异。

特殊 如果你是米特弗利特，你可以将此专长作为加值专长获得，而无需为此花费族裔专长，作为交换，你必须接受以下米特弗利特弱点：你很容易被威吓与惊吓。你对抗 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} 与恐惧效果的意志豁免与意志 DC 具有 –1 减值。

Whether or not you are a mitflit, you've developed an uncanny ability to communicate with arthropods (insects, spiders, scorpions, crabs, and similar invertebrate animals). You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with arthropods. If you're a mitflit, most arthropods are likely to have an indifferent starting attitude toward you and give you time to make your case. Otherwise, it varies from arthropod to arthropod.

Special If you're a mitflit, you can gain this feat as a bonus feat without spending an ancestry feat to do so in exchange for accepting the following mitflit vulnerability: You are easy to intimidate and scare. You have a –1 penalty to your Will saves and Will DC against @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} and fear effects.

Slime Climb.name: 黏液怪攀爬 Slime Climb
Slime Climb.description:
你的黏稠黏液让你能够轻松地缓慢攀爬穿过各种表面。你获得15英尺的攀爬速度。

Your goopy slime makes it easy for you to climb slowly across various surfaces. You gain a climb Speed of 15 feet.

Ooze Surge.name: 软泥激涌 Ooze Surge
Ooze Surge.description:
频率 每日一次

你化作一股软泥激流并向前奔涌，对敌人造成巨大伤害。处于一条长度至多120尺直线内的生物受到[[/r 18d6 #Damage]]{18d6}点伤害，伤害类型与你的假足肢徒手攻击造成的伤害类型相同，并以你更高的职业DC与法术DC进行@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true]豁免。你在该区域的另一端重新凝固。尽管你的移动仍可能触发反应动作（），但当你处于软泥激流形态时，大多数反应动作（）通常不会对你产生效果，除非该反应动作（）能够反制软泥奔涌，或GM判定其会影响奔涌的吐息直线本身。

Frequency once per day

You transform into a torrent of ooze and surge forward, causing massive damage to your foes. Creatures in a line with a length up to 120 feet take [[/r 18d6 #Damage]]{18d6} damage of the same type your pseudopod unarmed attack deals with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC. You solidify back at the other end of the area. While your movement can still trigger reactions, most reactions typically won't have an effect on you while you are a torrent of ooze unless the reaction would counteract Ooze Surge or the GM determines it would affect the surging line of breath itself.

Spellblade Master.name: 法术剑宗师 Spellblade Master
Spellblade Master.description:
你已精通你的魔法能量，使你能够将更强大的法术用于启动。选择一个3环法术和一个4环法术，二者均须属于你的武器魔法根源。它们必须是你拥有许可的法术。你每天可以各将所选法术使用一次，作为施放法术启动。该启动使用你的法术DC。

You've mastered your magical energies, granting you more powerful spells to use as activations. Select one 3rd-level spell and one 4th-level spell, each of your weapon magical tradition. They must be spells to which you have access. You can use each of your chosen spells once per day as Cast a Spell activations. The activations use your spell DC.

Laketouched.name: 湖触者 Laketouched
Laketouched.description:
你与淡水和水泽宁芙的联系使你在水下如鱼得水。你获得10尺的游泳速度与两栖（特征）。如同所有具有两栖（特征）的生物一般，你可以同时呼吸水与空气。你可以从上方所列的“额外专长”中选择先决条件为水泽宁芙传承的宁芙专长。

Your bond with fresh water and naiads makes you at home underwater. You gain a swim Speed of 10 feet and the amphibious trait. Like all creatures with the amphibious trait, you can breathe both water and air. You can take nymph feats from the Additional Feats listed above with a prerequisite of naiad heritage.

Breezetouched.name: 拂风之触 Breezetouched
Breezetouched.description:
你曾被微风亲吻，获得了一丝灵光操控风的力量。你不会因坠落受到任何伤害，无论你坠落的距离有多远。你可以从上方列出的额外专长中选择先决条件为灵光传承的宁芙专长。

You've been kissed by the breeze and gained a measure of an aura's power over wind. You take no damage from falling, regardless of the distance you fall. You can take nymph feats from the Additional Feats listed above with a prerequisite of aura heritage.

Split.name: 拆分 Split
Split.description:
需求 你的当前生命值至少为最大生命值的一半。

频率 每分钟一次

触发 你将要承受一定量的挥砍或穿刺伤害，且该伤害不足以将你降至0生命值。

你允许一次攻击暂时将你劈成两半，以迷惑你的攻击者。你不会承受触发的伤害，而是分裂为两个你自己，二者都占据你的空间。你在制造分裂个体时失去你当前生命值的一半。生物分别以你的任一分裂个体为目标，但当他们第一次对你的任一分裂个体造成伤害或以其他方式用有害效果影响它时，受到伤害或被影响的个体便消散为虚无（若一个效果同时对两个个体造成伤害或影响，你选择哪一个个体消散）。在你下一回合开始时，若两个个体仍都存在，你选择其中一个消散。在你仍有两个个体期间，你无法行动。

 

Requirements You are at or above half your maximum Hit Points.

Frequency once per minute

Trigger You would take an amount of slashing or piercing damage that would not be enough to reduce you to 0 Hit Points.

You allow an attack to split you in half temporarily to confound your attackers. Instead of taking the triggering damage, you split into two of yourself, both occupying your space. You lose half of your current Hit Points in creating the split selves. Creatures target either of your split selves separately, but the first time they deal damage to either of your selves or otherwise affect it with a harmful effect, the damaged or affected self dissolves into nothing (if an effect damages or affects both selves at once, you choose which self dissolves). At the beginning of your next turn, if both selves still exist, you choose which one dissolves. While you still have two selves, you can't act.

Inspiration.name: 灵感 Inspiration
Inspiration.description:
如同宁芙女王一般，你可以激励他人，通过给予他们一枚你恩宠的标记（通常是一缕你的头发）来提升他们的艺术与表演；这一过程需要10分钟。只要该生物携带你的标记，并且与你保持良好关系，他们在所有制造与表演检定上，获得一次成功的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{援助}带来的益处。此效果持续至你选择激励另一名生物，或决定撤销你的激励为止。

 

Like a nymph queen, you can inspire others to enhance their art and performances by giving them a token of your favor, typically a lock of your hair, in a process that takes 10 minutes. As long as the creature carries your token and remains in good standing with you, they gain the benefit of a successful @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid} on all their Craft and Performance checks. This lasts until you choose a different creature to inspire or decide to revoke your inspiration.

Demonic Tail.name: 恶魔尾巴 Demonic Tail
Demonic Tail.description:
你一直都有一条尾巴作为你恶魔形态的一部分，但你已经学会了如何运用它在执行其他功能之外完成简单任务。你可以用尾巴执行简单的交互动作，例如打开一扇未上锁的门。你的尾巴无法执行需要手指或显著手部灵巧度的动作，包括任何需要进行检定才能完成的动作，并且你无法用它来持有物品。

You've always had a tail as part of your demon form, but you've learned how to use it to perform simple tasks, in addition to its other functions. You can perform simple Interact actions with your tail, such as opening an unlocked door. Your tail can't perform actions that require fingers or significant manual dexterity, including any action that would require a check to accomplish, and you can't use it to hold items.

Dungeon Familiar.name: 地城魔宠 Dungeon Familiar
Dungeon Familiar.description:
你从自身内部的地城中召唤出一个极小的居民来作为你的魔宠。你按照《Pathfinder Second Edition Core Rulebook》中的常规魔宠规则获得一个魔宠。这个魔宠来自你的地城，因此它通常在外形或主题上与在你地城中发现的各种类型居民之一相似。

You conjure up a very small denizen from the dungeon within yourself to serve as your familiar. You gain a familiar using the normal familiar rules from Pathfinder Second Edition Core Rulebook. This familiar comes from your dungeon, so it often shares a physical or thematic resemblance to one of the various types of denizens found within your dungeon.

Story Sense.name: 故事感知 Story Sense
Story Sense.description:
你梳理与特定生物相关的联系与理论，以及它如何与你自身的故事产生关联，从而判断关于其近期未来的一个线索。选择一个除你自身以外的生物并梳理这些联系。该过程需要3分钟，并揭示一个在叙事中很重要的单词：对于一个不重要的背景角色而言，大约影响接下来一天；对于一名冒险者或其他叙事节奏紧张的角色而言，大约影响接下来一小时。这个单词神秘且难以理解，往往通过隐喻而非字面意义发挥作用，不过其含义事后回想时可能更清晰。GM进行一次秘密的 @Check[flat|dc:6]。若该生物的叙事过于不确定，或纯骰检定失败，你的故事感知仅会揭示单词“无”。无论结果如何，该生物随后会在24小时内暂时免疫于你的故事感知。

You draw out connections and theories related to a particular creature and how it relates to your own story, determining a hint about its near future. Choose a creature other than yourself and draw out those connections. The process takes 3 minutes, and it reveals a single word important to the narrative for roughly the next day of an unimportant background character or roughly the next hour for an adventurer or other character with a hectic narrative. The word is mysterious and difficult to understand, often working through metaphor rather than face value, though the meaning might be clearer in hindsight. The GM rolls a secret @Check[flat|dc:6]. If the creature's narrative is too uncertain, or on a failed flat check, your Story Sense simply reveals the word "none." Either way, the creature is then temporarily immune to your Story Sense for 24 hours.

Haughty Demand.name: 傲慢的要求 Haughty Demand
Haughty Demand.description:
你以如此自信的口吻宣告命令，甚至连敌人也会不由自主地短暂听从你。你每天一次可以将@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.aIHY2DArKFweIrpf]{Command}作为异能固有法术施放。如果你是aes sidhe，你可以选择获得将command作为奥术固有法术施放的能力，而不是作为异能固有法术施放，若你更偏好如此。

You proclaim a command with such self assuredness, even a foe can't help but momentarily heed you. You can cast @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.aIHY2DArKFweIrpf]{Command} once per day as an occult innate spell. If you're an aes sidhe, you can choose to gain the ability to cast command as an arcane innate spell instead of an occult innate spell if you prefer.

Turn the Tables.name: 扭转局势 Turn the Tables
Turn the Tables.description:
频率 每分钟一次

触发 你一次豁免失败。

对大多数凡人在日常生活中而言，无法承受某个危险的险境通常就意味着他们根本应付不了它；而在故事里，事情运作的方式不同。起初，新揭示的特殊能力确实有效，但最终，英雄或反派会克服它并扭转局势。而这正是命运对你所适用的逻辑。在接下来的一分钟内，每当你必须再次对来自同一生物、危害、物体或来源的、与触发该能力的效果相同的效果进行豁免时，你掷两次豁免并取较好的结果，直到你第一次在该豁免中成功为止；这是一种幸运效果。就此专长而言，如果同一位施法者施放第二个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.sxQZ6yqTn0czJxVd]{Fireball} 法术，则这被视为来自同一来源的相同效果（即使他们以不同的法术等级施放）；但如果是不同的施法者施放火球术，或同一位施法者施放了不同的法术或使用了不同的能力，则“扭转局势”的好处不适用。若仍有歧义，则由 GM 决定某个效果是否为来自同一来源的相同效果。

Frequency once per minute

Trigger You fail a saving throw.

For most mortals in their regular life, being unable to endure a dangerous peril means they likely can't handle it at all, in stories, the way things work is different. At first, a newly-revealed special ability is effective, but eventually, the hero or villain overcomes it to turn the tables. And that is the logic Fate applies to you. In the next minute, whenever you must attempt another saving throw against the triggering effect from the same creature, hazard, object, or source, you roll your saving throw twice and take the better result, until the first time you succeed at your saving throw; this is a fortune effect. For the purpose of this feat, if the same spellcaster casts a second @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.sxQZ6yqTn0czJxVd]{Fireball} spell, that's considered the same effect from the same source (even if they cast it at a different spell level), but if a different spellcaster cast fireball or the same spellcaster cast a different spell or used a different ability, the benefits of Turn the Tables wouldn't apply. If it's still ambiguous, the GM determines whether or not an effect is the same effect from the same source.

Seductive Presence.name: 魅惑气场 Seductive Presence
Seductive Presence.description:
当你靠近时，你可以轻易操纵那些觉得你有吸引力的人。你获得对抗10尺内可能觉得你有吸引力的生物的+1环境加值，该加值适用于用于@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Make an Impression]{Make an Impression}、@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request}或@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.B4EifRZ4snkC2e7m]{Succubus's Embrace}的交涉检定，以及用于@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Create a Diversion]{Create a Diversion}或@Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie}的欺瞒检定。如果你在交涉上是大师，则由“魅惑仪态”带来的交涉检定环境加值提高至+2；如果你在欺瞒上是大师，则由“魅惑仪态”带来的欺瞒检定环境加值提高至+2。

You can easily manipulate those who find you attractive when you are near them. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus against creatures within 10 feet who could find you attractive, which applies on Diplomacy checks to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Make an Impression]{Make an Impression}, @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request}, or @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.B4EifRZ4snkC2e7m]{Succubus's Embrace}, as well as Deception checks to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Create a Diversion]{Create a Diversion} or @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie}. If you're a master in Diplomacy, the circumstance bonus for Diplomacy checks from Seductive Presence increases to +2, and if you're a master in Deception, the circumstance bonus for Deception checks from Seductive Presence increases to +2.

Sidhe Sovereignty.name: 希德主权 Sidhe Sovereignty
Sidhe Sovereignty.description:
你的西狄魔法极为强烈，远超较弱施法者的能力。选择一个3级或更低的神秘法术，以及一个4级或更低的神秘法术。它们必须是你拥有许可的法术。你可以每天各施放一次你所选择的法术，作为神秘天生法术。如果你在@Compendium[battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.rijL5FFdhr2oBz8D]{Sidhe Power}中选择了奥术法术而非神秘法术，那么你也将从西狄主权中获得奥术法术而非神秘法术。

Your sidhe magic is intense, outstripping the capacity of lesser spellcasters. Select one 3rd-level or lower occult spell and one 4th- level or lower occult spell. They must be spells to which you have access. You can cast each of your chosen spells once per day as occult innate spells. If you chose arcane spells instead of occult spells from @Compendium[battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.rijL5FFdhr2oBz8D]{Sidhe Power}, you gain arcane spells instead of occult spells from Sidhe Sovereignty as well.

Dungeon Duality.name: 地城二元性 Dungeon Duality
Dungeon Duality.description:
并非每座地城都只有一种形态。有时树之地城也同时是一座高塔，或是一头巨大的利维坦在其庞大的咽喉之中藏着迷宫。选择第二个地城传承，并说明你内在地城的更深层级如何将两种传承的若干性相结合。你获得该第二传承及其益处。在你的GM酌情裁定下，若某些组合并列时不合逻辑，则可能无法选择。

Not every dungeon takes only one form. Sometimes a tree dungeon is also a tower, or a massive leviathan has a labyrinth within its colossal gullet. Choose a second dungeon heritage, and explain how your inner dungeon's deeper levels combine some aspects of both heritages. You gain the second heritage and its benefits. At your GM's discretion, some combinations might not be possible if they don't make sense in tandem.

Demonic Terror.name: 恶魔恐惧 Demonic Terror
Demonic Terror.description:
频率 每日一次

你从内在自我中显露出一个可怖的恶魔性相，使那些胆敢与你为敌者心生恐惧。持续1分钟，当任意生物试图对你采取敌对动作时，该生物必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] 豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。随后该生物获得暂时免疫，直到其下个回合结束。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{惊惧（状态）2}；惊惧（状态）在其使用动作前生效。

大失败 该生物获得惊惧（状态）2，且其动作失败并被浪费。

Frequency once per day

You reveal a terrifying demonic aspect from your inner self, terrifying those who dare to stand against you. For 1 minute, when any creature attempts a hostile action against you, the creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:resolve(@actor.attributes.classOrSpellDC.value)] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. It is then temporarily immune until the end of its next turn.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature becomes @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{Frightened 2}; the frightened condition applies before using its action.

Critical Failure The creature becomes frightened 2, and its action fails and is wasted.

Perfect Discipline.name: 完美戒律 Perfect Discipline
Perfect Discipline.description:
你已精通你的戒律，使你能够更频繁地磨砺心智。你可以每小时使用一次宁心戒律，而非每天一次。

You've perfected your discipline, allowing you to steel your mind more often. You can use Serene Discipline once per hour, rather than once per day.

Storm Of Duplicates.name: 复制风暴 Storm Of Duplicates
Storm Of Duplicates.description:
频率 每小时一次

你创造出自身的复制体风暴，并在一个锥形、线形或散发中挥砍、刺击或射击它们。选择一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]、@Template[type:emanation|distance:10] 或 @Template[type:line|distance:60]。区域内的生物受到等同于你的武器伤害骰，再加上额外1个武器伤害骰的伤害，不包含任何其他加值、减值或调整值。它们各自尝试一次 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true] 豁免，对抗你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者。豁免大失败的生物会承受任何重击专精效果以及额外的致命或绝命伤害，类似于你对其造成重击时。

Frequency once per hour

You create a storm of duplicates of yourself and swing, stab, or shoot them in a cone, line, or emanation. Choose a @Template[type:cone|distance:30], @Template[type:emanation|distance:10], or @Template[type:line|distance:60]. Creatures in the area take damage equal to your weapon damage dice, plus one additional weapon damage die, without any other bonuses, penalties, or modifiers. They each attempt a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC. A creature who critically fails their save takes any critical specialization effect and extra deadly or fatal damage, similarly to if you critically hit them.

Ancestral Longevity.name: 祖传长寿 Ancestral Longevity
Ancestral Longevity.description:
多年来，你积累了大量的生活知识。在你的每日准备期间，你可以回顾自己的人生经历，从而在你选择的一个技能中获得受训（熟练度）的熟练度等级。该熟练度持续到你再次准备为止。由于该熟练度是临时的，你不能将其用作技能提升或诸如专长之类的永久角色选项的先决条件。

You have accumulated a vast array of lived knowledge over the years. During your daily preparations, you can reflect upon your life experiences to gain the trained proficiency rank in one skill of your choice. This proficiency lasts until you prepare again. Since this proficiency is temporary, you can't use it as a prerequisite for a skill increase or a permanent character option like a feat.

Indomitable Renegade.name: 不屈叛徒 Indomitable Renegade
Indomitable Renegade.description:
除了你自己之外，没有人能决定你的命运！如果你会在你的回合开始时因一次失败的意志豁免而获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{Confused}、@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled} 或 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fleeing]{Fleeing}，你可以选择尝试以相同的 DC 进行一次意志豁免。如果你这么做并且成功，你将直到你的下个回合前成为 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Paralyzed]{Paralyzed}，而非违背你的意志行动。

No one decides your fate except you! If you would start your turn @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Confused]{Confused}, @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}, or @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Fleeing]{Fleeing} due to a failed Will save, you can choose to attempt a Will save against the same DC. If you do so and succeed, you become @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Paralyzed]{Paralyzed} until your next turn, rather than act against your will.

Stone Elocutionist.name: 石之雄辩者 Stone Elocutionist
Stone Elocutionist.description:
你已学会如何与石头和石化的生物交谈并进行对话，尽管这种对话通常相当困难。石头通常并不聪明，但你是在与其中的生命精华交谈；这些生命精华具有个性，这种个性既会受到石材种类的影响，也会在加工石材的情况下受到其所属结构类型的影响。石头的视角、察觉与知识赋予它一种与人类截然不同的世界观，因此它不会认为相同的细节重要。石头大多能回答关于过去触碰过它的生物，以及它之下或其后方隐藏着什么的问题。另一方面，@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{Petrified} 的生物会如同该生物未被石化时一样作出反应；如果石化它的人是你，这种反应可能包括不愿提供信息；不过，如果你是唯一能听见它们的人，它们最终也可能因绝望而转向与你交谈。

You’ve learned how to speak to stone and petrified creatures and hold a conversation, though the conversation is usually quite difficult. While stone is not normally intelligent, you speak with the vitae, which have a personality colored by the type of stone as well as by the type of structure the stone is part of for worked stone. A stone’s perspective, perception, and knowledge give it a worldview different enough from a human’s that it doesn’t consider the same details important. Stones can mostly answer questions about creatures that touched them in the past and what is concealed beneath or behind them. @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{Petrified} creatures, on the other hand, react exactly as the creature would if it wasn’t petrified, which might include a reticence to impart information if you’re the one who petrified them; then again, if you’re the only one who can hear them, they might turn to conversation out of desperation eventually.

Olfactory Disguise.name: 嗅觉伪装 Olfactory Disguise
Olfactory Disguise.description:
当你采取具有卓越嗅觉的形态时，你自己也会获得那些强化的嗅觉感官。当你使用变形怪的伪装来【假扮】一名将嗅觉作为模糊感官的人形生物时，你获得嗅觉作为模糊感官，范围为30英尺，或该族裔通常拥有的距离，以两者中较低者为准。只要你保持该伪装，这些益处就会持续。

When you take a form with exceptional scent, you gain those improved olfactory senses for yourself. When you use doppelganger's disguise to Impersonate a humanoid with scent as an imprecise sense, you gain scent as an imprecise sense out to 30 feet, or to the distance the ancestry normally has, whichever of the two distances is lower. These benefits last as long as you remain in that disguise.

Transparentize.name: 透明化 Transparentize
Transparentize.description:
频率 每小时一次

你可以使用幻术使你的黏液形态与核心变得透明，使你暂时获得 @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible}。你会一直保持隐形，直到你使用一次敌对动作，或直到经过10分钟，以先发生者为准。

Frequency once per hour

You can use illusions to cause your slime form and nucleus to become transparent, rendering you temporarily @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible}. You remain invisible until you use a hostile action, or until 10 minutes pass, whichever comes first.

Motionsense.name: 运动感知 Motionsense
Motionsense.description:
你继承了如同大多数黏液怪所拥有的那样多的软泥怪天然动作感知。你获得一种特殊感官：不精确动作感知，射程30尺。这意味着每当一名生物做出任何动作时，你都可以使用你的动作感知来确定其位置。

You have inherited as much of an ooze's natural motionsense as most slimes possess. You gain a special sense: imprecise motionsense with a range of 30 feet. This means you can use your sense of motion to determine the location of a creature whenever it makes any motions.

Fairy Servant.name: 妖精仆从 Fairy Servant
Fairy Servant.description:
你会被一名@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{隐形}的仙灵仆从跟随；他胆小但忠诚，会为你提供基本的虚荣性侍奉，但在出现任何危险迹象时会立刻逃离。该仙灵仆从拥有@Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.xqmHD8JIjak15lRk]{隐形仆役}的资料数据，但他们不是法术效果，你不需要维持该法术，并且他们会执行自己的动作。他们通常会执行诸如给你端来饮料、擦去你的汗水或以其他方式照料你之类的动作，且绝不会做任何危险的事，比如打开一扇可能设有陷阱的门。遭遇开始时，他们会立刻逃跑，且永远不会协助你。若尽管如此胆小，该仙灵仆从仍被杀死，则在三天三夜之后的日落时分，会有一名新的仆从前来侍奉你。

You are followed by an @Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Invisible]{Invisible} fairy servant, cowardly but loyal, that provides you with basic vanity service but flees swiftly at the first sign of danger. The fairy servant has the statistics of an @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.xqmHD8JIjak15lRk]{Unseen Servant}, but they aren't a spell effect, you don't need to Sustain the spell, and they take their own actions. They generally perform actions like bringing you a drink, wiping away your sweat, or otherwise attending to you and never do something dangerous like opening a door that might be trapped. When an encounter begins, they flee immediately and never assist you. If, despite their cowardice, the fairy servant is slain, a new servant arrives to attend you at sunset after three days and three nights.

Tapestry Teller.name: 织锦述说者 Tapestry Teller
Tapestry Teller.description:
无论你是否是挂毯织工，你都能轻松与大群人打成一片，周旋于复杂的社交场合。你获得交涉（技能）的受训（熟练度）等级。如果你会自动在交涉（技能）中成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在由你选择的另一项技能中成为受训（熟练度）。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KpFetnUqTiweypZk]{群体印象} 技能专长。

Whether you're a tapestry weaver or not, you can befriend large crowds of people easily, navigating complex social situations. You gain the trained proficiency rank in the Diplomacy skill. If you would automatically become trained in Diplomacy (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in different a skill of your choice. In addition, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.KpFetnUqTiweypZk]{Group Impression} skill feat.

Queen's Court.name: 女王的宫廷 Queen's Court
Queen's Court.description:
你在自己的领地内统御着一群较弱的妖精随从。必要时，你可以带上一些随从与你一同踏上冒险，不过他们的出现可能会引起一阵骚动。你的随从团会协助你，并满足大多数基本的请求。你的随从团中的较弱妖精拒绝与你一同旅行前往明显危险的地方，包括大多数冒险地点，但他们会在离你最近、符合其天性的自然区域等你；若不存在这样的自然区域，则会在一个对妖精友善的聚居地等你。你的随从团在战斗遭遇中绝不会使用除撤退以外的任何动作；如果你故意伤害他们，或GM根据你的行为自行裁定，你的随从团就会不再承认你为他们的女王并离你而去。当你进行收集情报时，你可以让随从团协助你，使你的交涉检定获得+1环境加值，并减少所需时间（通常减至1小时，若拥有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.4RjDxgvNXNl5GG9d]{Hobnobber}专长则减至30分钟）。如果你拥有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.sLEawQueTV1wGn0B]{Sow Rumor}专长，你也可以让随从团协助你散播流言，获得与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{收集情报}相同的好处。

You keep court over a coterie of lesser fey within your territory. When necessary, you can bring some of them with you on your adventures, though their presence might stir up a scene. Your coterie are helpful to you and fulfill most basic Requests. The lesser fey of your coterie refuse to travel with you to places that are obviously dangerous, including most adventure locations, but they'll wait for you at the nearest natural region matching their nature, or at a settlement friendly to fey if no such natural region exists. Your coterie never use actions during a combat encounter other than to retreat, and they abandon you as their queen if you intentionally bring them harm, or at the GM's discretion based on your actions. When you Gather Information, you can use your coterie to assist you, granting a +1 circumstance bonus to your Diplomacy check and reducing the time it takes (typically to 1 hour, or to 30 minutes with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.4RjDxgvNXNl5GG9d]{Hobnobber} feat). If you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.sLEawQueTV1wGn0B]{Sow Rumor} feat, you can have your coterie assist you in spreading rumors, with the same benefits as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information}.

Naiad's Celerity.name: 水泽仙女的迅捷 Naiad's Celerity
Naiad's Celerity.description:
你重新建立了与水更深层次的联系，提升了你在水中的速度。你的游泳速度从10英尺提升至25英尺。

You've reestablished a deeper connection to water, increasing your speed in water. Your swim Speed increases from 10 feet to 25 feet.

Twist Fate.name: 扭转命运 Twist Fate
Twist Fate.description:
频率 每日一次

你诅咒一个胆敢冒犯你的蠢货，注定他们在不久的将来遭遇与其罪行相称的暴力结局。选择60尺内的一个生物。一次可怕的意外事故——通常会带有基于该生物冒犯你方式的诗意正义色彩——会在[[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}后发生，对该生物造成[[/r 55]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic:true]豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。这会在不论目标当时位于何处的情况下发生，即使它旅行到了另一个位面。GM应暗掷以决定伤害在何时发生，并决定意外事故的形式以及它造成的伤害类型；一般而言，这场意外应当是造成某种物理伤害的事故；例如，一个没有与你握手的生物可能会发现窗户破裂，将锋利的挥砍玻璃碎片甩进它的手臂。然而，在更不寻常的环境与冒犯情境中，其他伤害类型也可能合适；例如，一个给你端上温热食物的生物可能会在其厨房里被烤箱爆炸焚毁，造成火焰伤害。当你扭曲命运时，此诅咒的伤害会在你超过13级后每高出2个等级增加5点，至多在19级时达到70点伤害。

当前伤害：[[/r ceil(@actor.level/2) * 5 + 20]]

Frequency once per day

You curse a fool who had the audacity to offend you, dooming them to meet a violent fate befitting their offenses in the near future. Choose a creature within 60 feet. A horrific accident, usually tinged with poetic justice based on the way in which the creature offended you occurs [[/br 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} later, dealing [[/r 55]] damage to the creature, with a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic:true] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. This happens regardless of where the target is located at the time, even if it travels to another plane. The GM should roll to determine when the damage occurs secretly and determine the form of the accident as well as the type of damage it deals; generally, the accident should be one that deals physical damage of some type; for instance a creature who failed to shake your hand might find that a window breaks and flings sharp slashing glass into their arm. However, other damage types might be appropriate in more unusual environments and offense; for instance, a creature who served you lukewarm food might be incinerated in an oven explosion in their kitchen, dealing fire damage. The damage from the curse when you Twist Fate increases by 5 for every two levels you have above 13th, to a maximum of 70 damage at 19th level.

Current damage: [[/r ceil(@actor.level/2) * 5 + 20]]

Defensive Discorporation.name: 防御性离散化 Defensive Discorporation
Defensive Discorporation.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发 敌人对你进行的打击为大成功或大失败。

当你的敌人对你投射出的化身施以沉重一击时，你不再承受该创伤，而是令你的化身解体。你令化身解除显现，而触发的攻击仅造成其在命中时通常会造成的伤害量（通常为全额伤害而非双倍伤害）。任何由大成功或大失败造成的其他效果仍然发生。照常，在你的化身解除显现时，你处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]，且你不能行动，除非用以使用你的启动族裔专长、进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索}、回忆知识，以及显现你的化身。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger An enemy's Strike against you is a critical hit.

When your foe delivers a telling blow to your projected avatar, instead of taking the wound, you discorporate your avatar. You unmanifest your avatar, and the triggering attack deals only the amount of damage it would normally deal on a hit (typically full damage instead of double damage). Any other effects caused by a critical hit still occur. As normal, with your avatar unmanifested, you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg], and you can't act except to use your activation ancestry feats, to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}, to Recall Knowledge, and to manifest your avatar.
